16:34.t: Mana nikabanyola amabii kabakhola, mana nibakhoyeshela kalia akabakholelanga eshiyenya meno.

16:35.t: Ne Abatsokaasi baboola mbu: “Nyasaye achamanga, shikhwakhalamile shiosishiosi habundu wuwe tawe, efwe nohomba Abapapa befu, ne shikhwakhakaanilekhwo shiosishiosi tawe halali Ye (akane).” Kho, mana endi nilwabakhola balia abali imbeli wabu. Kho, shikali khubarumwa halali okhusia butswa oburume mubulafu.

16:36.t: Ne toto khwaruma Omurumwa mubuli omukanda ababoolele mbu: “Laame Nyasaye ne mube ehale nende Shetani.” Kho, mubo balimwo ba Nyasaye yalunjisia, ne mubo balimwo bobukori bwakhoyeshela. Kho, chende khushialo mana mulolekhwo indukho yabayingasi shingala yali.”

16:37.t: Kata norakhwo eshinani muno mbu balunjikhe, (manya mbu) Nyasaye shalunjisinjia ulia owatila okhukora tawe. Ne shibalinyoola ababahabina tawe.

16:38.t: Nabo betsuba khulira lia Nyasaye eshitsubo shiabu shia amaani mbu: “Nyasaye shalilamusia abafwa tawe.” Khulwa shina? Ni indache yayerakhwo omwene, halali Abandu abanji shibamanyile tawe.

16:39.t: Kho abenoosilie kalia akabakabukhanila, ne mbu kho Abakhayi bamanye mbu bo toto ni ababeeyi.

16:40.t: Toto likhuwa liefu khushindu shia khwenya khuboolanga butswa mbu: “Ba’’ nishiba.

16:41.t: Ne balia bawuya shichila Nyasaye nibamalile okhukholelwa obubii, toto khwitsa okhubara khushialo obulayi muno, ne omurungo kwomwikulu ni omukhongo muno, bamanyangakhwo bayie!

16:42.t: Balia abefwila mana besikanga butswa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi.

16:43.t: Nafu shikhwaruma imbeli wuwo halali Abasatsa abakhwafimbulilanga obufimbuli. Kho, reebe abali nobwitsulili nikali mbu shimumanyile tawe.

16:44.t: Khubimanyisio bili habulafu nende Ebitabu. Ne khweshia amachelo kho winoosilie Abandu akeshibwa khubo, khobanyoole okhupaara.

16:45.t: Ne koo basuubilanga mbu bali nomulembe balia abakholanga ebifwanga mbu Nyasaye shiyetsa okhubasishia muliloba tawe nohomba shalabarerera eshinyasio nabo nibalamanyile tawe?

16:46.t: Nohomba shalabatila khutsinjendo tsiabu eyi nende eyi, mana shibalanyala okhushila tawe?

16:47.t: Nohomba mbu shalabahelesia eshinyasio muburii bwabu tawe? Toto Nyasaye wuwo ni Omuholo, Oweshisa muno.

16:48.t: Koo! Shibalolangakhwo buli bia Nyasaye yaloonga eshinikha shiabio shibotokhananga okhurula omukhono omulunji nende omukaata, ne biinamilanga Nyasaye nibihotselesiye.

16:49.t: Ne binamilanga Nyasaye bioosi bichendanga mwikulu nende khushialo, mutsisolo nende Abamalaika boosi, ne shibali abafuru tawe.

16:50.t: Baritsanga Nyasaye wabu Omulesi owuli hekulu wabu, ne bakholanga eliabalomesibungwa.

16:51.t: Ne Nyasaye yaboola mbu: “Mulabakhwo nende nyasaye babili tawe. Ye ni Nyasaye mulala butswa yenyene. Kho murie butswa esie!”

16:52.t: Ni ebibie ebili mwikulu nende mushialo, ne idini neyiyie buli lwoosi. Koo, muritsanga ulali Nyasaye tawe?

16:53.t: Ne emikabo chioosi cha muli ninacho ni okhurula khu Nyasaye, mana amabii nikabanyoola, niye butswa owamulililanga.

16:54.t: Mana nabarusiliaho obubii obo, awo sa, omukanda mulala mwinywe kukakhula okhumutsokaasia Nyasaye wabu Omulesi.

16:55.t: Khobakhaye ebiakhwabahelesia. Kho, mwikhoye. Mulitsa okhumanya.

16:56.t: Ne ebuleka webindu biakhubakabile babishilanga balia kata balamanyile tawe. Toto mulirebwa kalia koosi akamwachikhanga.

16:57.t: Ne barererangao Nyasaye Abana abakhana. Nyasaye ni Omutswenufu ehale nende ako, nabo beyenyelanga ababachama.

16:58.t: Ne mulala wabu naboolelwa amakhuwa kokhwibula omwana omukhana, obweni bwaye bumaliyanga ne yetsula nende eshibeela.

16:59.t: Yefisa mubandu khulwokhubolelwa amakhuwa amabii kabolelwe. Yereba mbu: 'Amenye ninaye nende tsisoni nohomba amuyabile mwiloba?' Manya mbu ni obubii muno obo obwababusinjia.

16:60.t: Ne balia balasuubilanga mwikulu tawe, bali nende ifwani imbii, naye Nyasaye niye weyifuma yoluyali muno, naye niwa Amaani, Owamachesi muno.

16:61.t: Ne Nyasaye abukulilanga Abandu obubii khububii bwabu, shiyakhaleshelekhwo isolo yosiyosi khushialo tawe. Halali ababikhanga okhula ebise biarebwaho. Ne ebise biabu nibiliula, shibalishinda isandala tawe nohomba shibaliiyungubasia tawe.

16:62.t: Ne bahelesinjia Nyasaye ebindu biabasinya, ne tsinimi tsiabu tsiboolanga obubeyi mbu bo balanyoola amalayi. Toto abo babishilwa omulilo, ne toto balilekhwamwo.

16:63.t: Nditsuba khu Nyasaye mbu toto efwe khwaruma (Abarumwa) mumikanda chiaranjilila imbeli wuwo, halali Shetani yabaronela ebikhole biabu. Kho, olwalelo ye niye omwitsa wabu. Nabo bali nende eshinyasio eshilulu.

16:64.t: Ne shikhwakhwishilia Eshitabu halali obenosilie kalia akabakabukhanangamwo, ne shibe obulunjifu nende tsimbabaasi khubandu basuubilanga.

16:65.t: Ne Nyasaye yeshinjia amatsi okhurula mwikulu, ni khuko alamusia liloba nilimalilenje okhufwa. Toto mu ako kalimwo ameeko khubandu bawulilanga.

16:66.t: Ne toto mutsisolo mulimwo nende ameeko amakhongo. Khubanywesinjia khubilia bili mutsinda tsiatsio hakari wa amasingo nende amatsayi karulangao amabeele amalafu amalayi khubakanywetsanga.

16:67.t: Ne khubiamo bietsitende nende tsizabibu, mukasinjiamwo fiokhumeesia nende omukabo omulayi. Toto mu ako khulimwo nende ameeko khubandu bekhonyelanga obwongo.

16:68.t: Ne Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yafimbulila inzushi mbu: “Wikasilie tsinzu mubikulu, nende khumisala nende mubilia ebiabombakhanga.’’

16:69.t: Mana olie buli khushiamo, ne obure khutsinjila tsia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi etsiakholwa tsinyangu. Shilarula mutsinda tsiatsio eshinywebwa shiobukondo bwaukhane, mukari washio khulimwo nende obuwonia khubandu.” Toto mukano khulimwo nende ameeko khubandu baparanga.

16:70.t: Nyasaye niye wabaloonga mana khandi abafwisinjia. Ne mwinywe balimwo bayindilanga bahebwa obulamu oburambi boola khulubaka olubi, bakorwa buli eshindu olunyuma lwokhuba abamanyi. Toto Nyasaye niye Omumanyi po, Omunyali muno.

16:71.t: Ne Nyasaye yaninia ekulu abandi mwinywe okhushila abandi khumikabo. Ne balia baninibwa shibakalusinjia omukabo kwabu khubalia abemikhono chiabu emilunji chiatila, kho babe nashilala mumikabo echo tawe. Koo, emikabo chia Nyasaye ni chio cha bakhayanga?

16:72.t: Ne Nyasaye niye wabalonjela abakhasi okhurulana ninanyu, ne nabanyalila okhunyoola okhurula khubakhasi abo abana nende abetsukhulu, mana nabakabila ebindu ebilayi. Kho mana basuubilanga akalali katoto ne bakhayanga tsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye?

16:73.t: Ne balekhanga Nyasaye nibalaama abalakhabahelesia omukabo kwosikwosi tawe, okhurula mwikulu nohomba khushialo ne babula obunyali bwa shiosishiosi tawe.

16:74.t: Mulachelasia Nyasaye tawe. Toto Nyasaye yamanya nanyu shimumanyile tawe.

16:75.t: Nyasaye abachelasilia Abasatsa babili, mulala khubo ni omusumba omurumwa owuli hasi womwami wuwe, owulanyala shiosishiosi tawe; nende ulia owakhwakaba omukabo kurula khwifwe, mana naye arusinjia khumukabo oko mubwifisi nende mubwang’ang’u. Koo, bakhaba nashilala? Okhwitsomibwa khwoosi ni khwa Nyasaye, halali abanji mubo shibamanyile tawe.

16:76.t: Ne Nyasaye abachelasilia Abandu babili, mulala wabu ni omutimbe shanyala shiosishiosi tawe, naye ni omusiko khumwami wuwe, wosiwosi wamulinjisia, sharera obulayi bwosibwosi tawe. Koo, uno yakhaba nashilala nende ulia ulomesinjia obulunjifu, naye ali khunjila ingololofu?

16:77.t: Ne nika Nyasaye butswa, akalalolekha komwikulu nende kokhushialo. Ne likhuwa lieyindukho lili butswa shinga okhumotiamotia tsimoni, nohomba ni ahambi muno. Toto Nyasaye ni Omunyali muno wabuli eshindu.

16:78.t: Nyasaye yabarusia mutsinda tsiabanyinenywe nimulamanyile shiosishiosi tawe. Ne nabahelesia tsimbulililo nende tsindolelo nende emioyo kho munyoole okhupa orio.

16:79.t: Koo! Shibalolangakhwo amayoni shinga kehotselesinjia mumuya tawe? Abulawo ukatilanga halali Nyasaye. Toto mu ako kalimwo ameeko khubandu basuubilanga.

16:80.t: Ne Nyasaye yabakholela tsinzu tsienyu okhuba eshimenyo. Ne nabanyalila (okhukasia) tsinzu khumaselo ketsisolo, akamunyoolanga mbu ni amangu khubise bioluchendo lwenyu, nende ebise biokhuwulukha khwenyu.. nende khubukoya bwatsio nende amabaa katsio nende obukuya bwatsio, ebiamukasilinjia ebindu biokhwikhonyela khubise sa.

16:81.t: Ne Nyasaye khubindu biayabalonjela yabakholela eshinikha, ne nabakasilia eshimenyo mufikulu, ne nabakholela tsingubo tsibashinganga okhurulana nende obutundumu ubunji, nende tsingubo tsiebichuma etsibashinganga mumiero chienyu. Endio nilwa abetsusilinjia tsimbabaasi tsitsie kho munyoole okhumwilekhulila.

16:82.t: Ne nibaloba, shikali khwiwe halali okhusya khuli hafulafu.

16:83.t: Bamanya emikabo chia Nyasaye mana bachikhayanga. Ne abanji mubo ni abakhayi.

16:84.t: Ne inyanga yakhulibuusia buli mumukanda omuloli, ne abakhayi shibalichamilwa nohomba shibalileshelwa okhusaba eshileshelo tawe.

16:85.t: Ne balia abakhola tsimbi olwabalilola eshinyasio, shibalitutuyilibwa eshinyasio esho tawe, nohomba shibalihelesibwa ebise bindi tawe.

16:86.t: Ne balia batsokaasia Nyasaye olwa balilola abatsokaasi babu, baliboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, bano nibo abatsokaasi befu, abakhwalamanga habundu wuwo.” Nabo balibasukunila likhuwa nibaboolela mbu: “Toto enywe muli ababeyi.”

16:87.t: Ne inyanga eyo balilekhulila Nyasaye, ne akabachikhanga kalibakora.

16:88.t: Balia bakhaya mana nibekalila (abandu) injila ya Nyasaye, khulibametela eshinyasio hekulu weshinyasio shingala abeene bakholanga amabii.

16:89.t: Ne inyanga yakhulirusia buli mumukanda omuloli khubo okhurulana ninabo, ne wesi khukhurere obe omuloli khu bano. Ne khwakhwishilia Eshitabu shino eshiboolanga buli eshindu, nashio ni obulunjifu nende tsimbabaasi, nende obusangali khubasalamu.

16:90.t: Toto Nyasaye alomesinjia okhukhola obuleeng’afu, nende okhukhola obulayi, nende okhuhelesia abeekho, ne akania eshifwolo nende okhukhola tsimbi. Abebaalilanga kho munyale okhwitsulila.

16:91.t: Ne mukhole indakano ya Nyasaye nimulakana, ne mulafunaka ibitsubo bienyu tawe nimumalile okhubiraho naamaani tawe, ne nimumalile okhukhola Nyasaye okhuba omuloli wenyu. Toto Nyasaye amanyile kamukholanga.

16:92.t: Ne mulaba shinga Omukhasi ulia owateta olusi lulwe ebitonye ebitonye, nilumalilenje okhuba oluumu. Mukholanga ebitsubo bienyu okhuba injila yokhukatania. Khulwa okhuba mbu omukanda mulala kwa Abandu kuli nende amaani okhushila omukanda kwa Abandu bandi. Toto Nyasaye abatemanga munjila eyo. Ne toto alibaboolela inyanga yeyindukho akamwawukhanilanga.

16:93.t: Ne Nyasaye yenyanga, yakhabakholele okhuba omukanda mulala butswa. Halali akosinjia owayenya, ne alunjisinjia owayenya. Ne toto mulirebwa khukalia koosi kamwakholanga.

16:94.t: Ne mulakhola okhwitsuba khwenyu okhuba khwokhukatania hakari wenyu tawe. Eshilenje shiletsa shiarerekha nishibeele nishimalile okhwema obulai muno, mana mupile amabii kenyu khulwa okhwikalila injila ya Nyasaye, mwanyoola eshinyasio eshikhongo.

16:95.t: Ne mulakula shiobukusi obutiti khumalako ka Nyasaye tawe. Eshili ewa Nyasaye nishio eshilayi khwinywe, nikali mbu mwakhamanya.

16:96.t: Ebiamuli ninabio biliwa, ne ebili wa Nyasaye nibo bilitong’a, ne toto efwe khulihelesia balia befwila omurungo kwabu khumalayi kabu kabakholanga.

16:97.t: Yesiyesi ukhola amalayi abe omusatsa nohomba omukhasi, naye nali omusuubili, khwitsa toto okhumumenyia obulamu obulayi, ne toto khulibarunga omurungo kwabu khumalayi kabu kabakholanga.

16:98.t: Ne niwenya okhusoma Ikurani, wilinde khu Nyasaye okhurulana nende Shetani owalondwa.

16:99.t: Toto ye abula amaani khubalia basuubila, mana besikanga Nyasaye wabu Omulesi.

16:100.t: Amaani kaye kali khubalia abamwaambanga obulina, nende balia abamutsokaasinjia nende Nyasaye.

16:101.t: Ne nikhukalukhania olunyali habundu wolunyali, ne Nyasaye ni umanyile muno akayeshinjia, baboola mbu: “Ewe olisa omuchishi.” Halali abanji mubo shibamanyile tawe.

16:102.t: Boola mbu: “Roho woluyali yakeshia okhurula khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi khubwatoto, kho katinyisie balia basuubila, ne kabe obulunjifu nende kokhurera akomwikhoyo khubasalamu.

16:103.t: Ne toto khwamanya mbu balaboola mbu: “Omundu niye umwechesinjia” ulusungo lwa ulia owabamanyinjia nilweshicheni, niluno ni olusungo lweshiarabu lwa habulafu.

16:104.t: Toto balia balasuubilanga tsinyaali tsia Nyasaye tawe, Nyasaye shabalunjisinjia tawe, ne balinyoola eshinyasio eshilulu.

16:105.t: Balia abachikhanga obubeyi ni balia abalasuubilanga ebimanyisio bia Nyasaye tawe, ne abo nibo ababeyi.

16:106.t: Ulia ukhaya Nyasaye namalilenje okhusuubila, halali ulia unichilisibwe ne omwoyo kwaye nikubunile po khubusubili, ne ulia wikulilanga eshilifu shishie obukhayi, obusinyifu bwa Nyasaye buli khubo, ne balinyoola eshinyasio eshikhongo.

16:107.t: Endio nilwokhuba mbu bo bachama obulamu bwokhushialo okhushila obulamu bwomwikulu. Ne toto Nyasaye shalunjisinjia Abandu abakhayi tawe.

16:108.t: Abo nibo aba Nyasaye yasuba emioyo chiabu nende tsimbulililo tsiabu nende tsindolelo tsiabu. Ne abo nibo abakaandala.

16:109.t: Inganakani ibulaho tawe, abo nibo balibula obukhala mwikulu.

16:110.t: Mana toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi khubalia abawuya nibakhasandibwa, mana nibalwana mana nibesumilisia, toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi olunyuma lwa ako ni Omulesheli muno, Owetsimbabaasi po.

16:111.t: Inyanga yabuli omundu alitsa okhwikomelela omwene, ne buli omundu alirungwa mubwitsufu akayakholanga, ne shibalikholelwa obubii tawe.

16:112.t: Nyasaye abachelasilinjia olukongo lwali nende omulembe nende obwihotselefu, omukabo kwalwo kwalwitsilanga mubunji okhurulila buli elubeka. Halali nilukhaya tsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye, mana Nyasaye nalupilia eshifwalo shieyinzala nende oburi khulwokhubeela kalia akabakholanga.

16:113.t: Ne Omurumwa yabetsela okhurula mubo, mana nibamuyingasia, mana eshinyasio nishiboolela nibalibo abeene bekholela obubii.

16:114.t: Ne mulie khubilia bia Nyasaye abahelesiyie, ebiamwachamilwa ebilayi, ne mukhupe orio khutsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye, toto nimuli mbu mumulamanga Ye sa.

16:115.t: Yabakania okhulia shifwile, nende amalasile, nende inyama yeyimbitsi, nende shisinzilwe nishilarumbulilwekho elira lia Nyasaye tawe. Halali ulia unichililisibwa bilali okhufienya nohomba okhubura eshichelo tawe, awo toto Nyasaye ni omunji wobulesheli, Owetsimbabaasi muno.

16:116.t: Ne mulaboola khububeyi bwetsinimi tsienyu mbu: “Shino shiafuchililwa ne shino shiakanibwa.” Muletsa mwachishila Nyasaye obubeyi. Toto bachishilanga Nyasaye obubeyi shibalibura tawe.

16:117.t: Omwikhoyo mutiti butwsa, ne balinyoola eshinyasio eshikhongo muno.

16:118.t: Ne Abayahudi khwabakania akakhubakaniile khale awo, ne shikhwabakholela obubii tawe, halali bo abeene nibekholela obubii.

16:119.t: Mana toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi khubalia bakholanga obubii khubulamanya mana nibekanila nibakhakhola ako, mana nibakhola amalayi, toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi olunyuma lwa ako ni Omunji wokhuleshela, Omunji westimbabaasi.

16:120.t: Toto Ibrahim yali Omwimilisi, Omwihotselefu khu Nyasaye, Omutswenufu, ne shiyali mubatsokaasi tawe.

16:121.t: Yali omukhupi wa orio khutsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye. Mana namwawula ne namulunjisia khunjila ingololofu.

16:122.t: Mana nikhumuhelesia mushialo amalayi, naye toto mwikulu aliba mubandu abalayi.

16:123.t: Mana nikhukhufimbulila mbu: “Loonda emilukha chia Ibrahim omulunjifu, ne shiyali mubatsokaasi tawe.”

16:124.t: Toto Jumamosi yarebwaho khubalia bakabukhanamwo khuyo, ne toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, alikhalaka eshina hakari wabu inyanga yeyindukho khukalia akabakabukhanangamwo.

16:125.t: Langa khunjila ya Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi mumachesi, nende amachelo amalayi, ne olomalome nabo munjila indayi muno. Toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi amanyile muno ulia wakora ehale nende injila yiyie, ne amanyile muno balia abalunjikha.

16:126.t: Ne nimurunga imoongo, runge ebihelana nende ebia mukholelwe amabii. Ne nimwifwila, toto awo nobulayi khubalia abefwilanga.

16:127.t: Ne wifwile. Okhwifwila khukhwo khulaba halali khulwa Nyasaye butswa. Ne olabeelela shichila bo tawe. Ne olaba mubunyakhani shichila kabatutanga tawe.

16:128.t: Toto Nyasaye ali halala nende balia bamuria, nende balia abakholanga amalayi.

17:1.t: Obutswenufu ni bwa ulia owayila Omusumba wuwe eshilo okhurula khumusikiti kwoluyali okhula khumusikiti kwa ehale okwa khwahelesia tsikhabi ebili mumbeka tsiakwo, kho khumwechesie bilala khubimanyisio biefu. Toto ye niwokhuwulila po, Owokhulola muno.

17:2.t: Ne khwahelesia Musa Eshitabu, ne nikhushikhola obulunjifu khubana ba Israili mbu; “Mulakhola omulindi wundi ulali esie tawe.”

17:3.t: Olwibulo lwa balia bakhwachinga halala nende Nuh. Toto ye yali Omusumba wokhupa orio muno.

17:4.t: Ne khwabusilia Abana ba Israili mushitabu mbu; ‘‘Toto enywe mwitsa okhukhola obwononi khushialo khabiri, ne toto mana mulikhola obufuru obukhongo.”

17:5.t: Mana olwa yiliula indache ya obwononi bwa imbeli, khulibarerera Abasumba befu abalwani abatinyu, nabo balinjila mutsingo tsienyu buli elubeka, ne ino ni indache iliikholekha.

17:6.t: Mana khulibakalusilia enywe obushiri khubo, ne khulibametela omwandu nende Abana, ne khulibakhola mube omukanda omunji.

17:7.t: Nimukhola amalayi, mwikholelanga abeene. Ne nimukhola amabii, mwikholelanga abeene. Ne olwa indache ya obwononi bwokhumalilikha yiliula, kho banyoole okhunyasia obweni bwenyu, ne benjile mumusikiti shingala benjilangamwo lwamberi, ne kho banyasie okhunyasia okhukhongo bioosi biababukula.

17:8.t: Aundi Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi alababeela tsimbabaasi. Ne nimukalushila, fwesi khulakalushila. Ne khwakhola omulilo kwa Jahannam okhuba imboye ya Abandu abakhayi.

17:9.t: Toto Ikurani ino ilunjisinjia khunjila ilunjifu muno. Ne isuubisinjia Abasuubili abakholanga amalayi mbu toto bali nende omurungo omukhongo.

17:10.t: Ne mbu toto balia abalasuubilanga mwikulu tawe, khwabarecheshela eshinyasio eshilulu muno.

17:11.t: Ne Omundu asabanga amabii shingala khandi asabanga amalayi. Ne toto Omundu niwa amaababa muno.

17:12.t: Ne khwakhola eshilo nende eshitere okhuba ebimanyisio bibili, mana nikhuiniawo eshimanyisio shieshilo, ne nikhukhola eshimanyisio shieshitere okhuba nende obulafu kho mukhabe tsimbabaasi tsirulanga khu Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi, ne munyoole okhumanya eshichelo shiemika nende okhubala. Ne buli eshindu khwashinoosia habulafu muno.

17:13.t: Ne buli Omundu khwamuboyela khwikosi khukhwe ebikhole bibie, ne inyanga yeyindukho khulimurusilia eshitabu shishie eshialinyoola nishibambulwe

17:14.t: (Aliboolelwa mbu) “Soma eshitabu shishio. Oyela omwene okhwibalila (ebikhole bibio) obulayi inyanga yino.”

17:15.t: Ulia ulunjikha, yelunjishilanga omwene. Ne ulia ukora, yekosinjia omwene. Ne Omundu shalichinjila owundi omusiko kukwe tawe. Ne efwe shikhuli bokhuhelesia eshinyasio tawe okhula khube nikhwaruma Abarumwa.

17:16.t: Ne nikhwenya okhusishia olukongo, khulomesinjia ababii balwo, (baleshe obubii) halali batsililila nende amabii kabu omo. Awo, likhuwa liburanga khubo, mana khubasishie okhusishia okhubii.

17:17.t: Ne emikanda chinga chakhwasishia inyuma wa Nuhu. Ne Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi ayela khutsimbi tsia Abandu baye okhuba wokhutsimanya, owutsilola muno.

17:18.t: Ulia wenyanga omwikhoyo kwokhushialo kwa lwangulwangu, khwitsa okhumuwa lwangu lwangu omo, akakhwenya khu ulia wa khwenya, mana khumukholele Jahanam yenjilemwo nali omuleche, owutafibwa.

17:19.t: Naye ulia wenya mwikulu, mana nakhola eshinani khubikhole biamwo, mana nali omusuubili, abo obukhalabani bwabu buliba bwokhupilwa orio.

17:20.t: Abo boosi (ababii nende abalayi) khuhelesinjia bano nende bano – khumikabo chia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi. Ne emikabo chia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi shichiikalilungwa tawe.

17:21.t: Henga shingala khwachingula abandi mubo okhushila abandi. Ne mwikulu balichingulwa tsingaasi tsikhongo po, ne balikholwa obulayi muno.

17:22.t: Olakhola Nyasaye nashilala nende nyasaye wundi tawe, wakhetsa wafunaanibwa wakhaya okhuhabinwa.

17:23.t: Ne Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yabusia mbu: ‘‘Mulalaama shiosishiosi tawe halali Ye sa, ne abebusi babili obakholele amalayi. Ne yesiyesi khubo nakofula nohomba boosi halala, olababoolela mbu uff tawe (olachong’a nabo tawe), ne olabayibila tawe, ne obaboolele amakhuwa keshiroonyo (amalayi).

17:24.t: Ne obenamilie olubaa lwobwihotselefu okhurulana khutsimbabaasi, ne boola mbu: 'Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, babeele tsimbabaasi shingala bandela neshili omutiti.'"

17:25.t: Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi yamanya muno akali mumioyo chienyu. Nimulaba abalayi, toto Ye ni Wobulesheli muno khubalia bamukalukhangakhwo.

17:26.t: Ni ohelesie Omwikho wuwo eshiakhoyeshela, nende Abamanani nende abali khuluchendo, ne olasasia sa busasia tawe.

17:27.t: Toto balia bakholanga isasia ni Abana babu mashetani. Ne Shetani yaloba muno Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi.

17:28.t: Ne niwiira ehale ninabo, khukhukhaaba tsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, tsiosuubililanga, mana baboolele amakhuwa amalayi.

17:29.t: Ne olakhola omukhono kukwo kwaba shinga kwaboywa mwikosimwo tawe, nohomba olakubambula orio orio butswa tawe, wakhafunanibwa mana wawelwa.

17:30.t: Toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi abambulilanga omukabo kukwe owayenya. Toto Ye khubandu bebe abamanyile muno, ne abalolanga obulayi po.

17:31.t: Ne mulera Abana benyu khulwokhuria obumanani tawe. Nefwe khukabangabo emikabo halala nende enywe. Toto okhubeera ni eshionono eshikhongo.

17:32.t: Ne mulasita ahambi nende obuyeyi (okhuyilana) tawe. Toto ni eshifwolo, ne ni injila imbii muno.

17:33.t: Ne mulera omundu wa Nyasaye yakana okhwira tawe okhuyiniakhwo khubwatoto. Ne ulia wirwa khukhukholelwa obubii, awo toto khuhelesiyie omwemeli wuwe obunyali, kho alabura eshichelo mukhwira tawe. Toto ye akhonyungwa.

17:34.t: Ne mulasita ahambi nende omwandu kwomwana omufwilwa tawe okhuyiniakhwo munjila indayi, okhula akubuye, ne mukhole shingala mwalakana. Toto amalakano kalirebwa.

17:35.t: Ne mwitsusie eshichelo olwa muchela. Ne muchele khushichelo shia habwene. Obo ni obulayi khwinywe, ne ni obulayi mukhumalilikha.

17:36.t: Ne olaloondachila kobula ninako obumanyi tawe. Toto tsimbulililo, nende tsindolelo nende obumanyi bwomwoyo, ebo bioosi bilirebwa.

17:37.t: Ne olachenda khushialo nende isunga tawe. Toto ewe shonyala okhufutula liloba tawe nohomba shonyala okhula oburambi bwetsingulu tawe.

17:38.t: Ako koosi obubii bwako nibwokhusinyisia imbeli wa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi.

17:39.t: Ako niko malala khuka Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yakhufimbulila akamachesi. Ne olara halala nende Nyasaye, nyasaye wundi tawe, wakhetsa wasukunwa mumulilo nofunaanibungwa notaafibungwa.

17:40.t: Koo! Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi yabaawulila Abana abasiani, naye niyeyawulila Abana abakhana okhurula Mubamalaika? Toto enywe muboolanga amakhuwa amakhongo.

17:41.t: Ne toto khwamala okhwinoosia mukurani ino obulayi kho banyoole okhwitsulila, ne elo shilibametanga halali okhwira ehale ninayo.

17:42.t: Boola mbu: “Nyasaye alabetsanga nende abanyasaye bandi shingala baboolanga, toto bwene bakhakonyele injila yokhula khuweshisala shia obwami.”

17:43.t: Nyasaye nomutswenufu muno, ne ali hekulu muno wa akababoolanga ako.

17:44.t: Amakulu saba, nende liloba nende bioosi bilimwo bimutswenulanga. Ne shibulaho shiosishiosi halali shimutswenulanga khu tsifuma tsitsie tsindayi, halali enywe shimumanyanga okhutswenula khwabio okho tawe. Toto Ye ni Omwihotselefu muno, Owobulesheli po.

17:45.t: Ne nosooma Ikurani, khuretsanga hakari wuwo nende hakari wabalia abalasuubilanga mwikulu eshikalilo shishinganga.

17:46.t: Ne khwara ebiokhusuba khumioyo chiabu; baletsa bachimanya obulayi tawe, ne (khwara) mumarwi kabu obusiru. Ne norumbula Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yenyene Mukurani, abo bakalukhaninjia emikongo chiabu ni beerukha.

17:47.t: Efwe khumanyile muno eshifune eshia bakawulilisilinjia, ne olwabemoonyanga, olwa ababii abo baboolanga mbu: “Enywe shimuloondanga halali Omundu walokwa.”

17:48.t: Lola shingala bakhuchelasilia, mana nibakora; kho shibanyala okhunyoola injila tawe.

17:49.t: Ne baboola mbu: “Koo, olwakhuliba ebikumba nende ebitonye biasiebwasiebwa, mbu khulilamusibwa, okhuba ebilonji ebiyiakha?”

17:51.t: Nohomba eshilonje shindi mubilia ebiamulolanga mbu nebikhongo mumioyo chienyu.” Awo balaboola mbu: “Ni wina witsa okhukhukalusia?” Boola mbu, “Ni ulia owabalonga olwambeli.” Awo betsa okhukhuresilia emirwe chiabu, ne balaboola mbu: ‘‘Kaliba lina ako?” Boola mbu: “Kanyala okhuba ahambi hano.”

17:52.t: Inyanga ya alibalanga, nanyu mulifuchilila khukhumwitsomia, ne mulipara mbu shimwekhala halali ebise bititi butswa.

17:53.t: Boolela Abasumba banje, baboole akali amalayi. Toto Shetani atswatswaninjia hakari wabu. Toto Shetani ni omusuku owahabulafu womundu.

17:54.t: Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi yabamanya muno. Niyenya, nababeela tsimbabaasi, ne niyenya, nabahelesia eshinyasio, ne sikhwakhuruma ewe okhuba omulindi wabu tawe.

17:55.t: Ne Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi yamanya muno ebili mwikulu nende mushialo. Ne toto khwachingula hekulu Abarumwa bandi okhushila abandi, ne Daudi khwamuhesia Izaburi.

17:56.t: Boola mbu, “Lanje boosi abamuboolanga mbu ni abanyasaye nimulekha Ye. Shibalanyala okhubarusiliaho obubii nohomba okhukalukhania tawe.”

17:57.t: Ababasabanga abo bakhabanga injila yookhwira hambi nende Nyasaye wabu Omulesi - ni wina wabu uli ahambi muno - ne basubilanga tsimbabaasi tsitsie, ne baritsanga eshinyasio shishie. Toto eshinyasio shia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi nishokhuriibwa.

17:58.t: Ne lubulaho olukongo lwosilwosi tawe halali efwe khulilusishia inyanga yeyindukho nishili okhula nohomba khuliluhelesia eshinyasio eshilulu. Kano koosi kahandikwa mushitabo.

17:59.t: Ne shibulaho shikhwikalilanga okhurera ebimanyisio, halali ni okhubeela mbu Abandu ba khale babikatsula. Ne khwahelesia aba Thamudi ingamia ikhasi okhuba eshimanyisio eshia habulafu, mana nibachikholela obubii. Ne shikhuyilanga ebimanyisio ebo tawe halali khulwa okhurisia.

17:60.t: Ne olwakhwakhuboolela mbu: “Toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yamanya obulayi Abandu.” Ne shikhwakhola amaloro kalia akawarola halali okhutema Abandu, nende omusala okwatsubwa mukurani. Ne khubarisinjia, halali shikabametanga shiosishiosi tawe halali obukori obukhongo.

17:61.t: Ne olwakhwaboolela abamalaika mbu: “Rerere Adam obweni hasi.” Nibara obweni hasi okhuyiniakhwo Ibilis. Naboola mbu: “Koo, enderere obweni hasi ulia owawaloonga okhurula khwiloba?’’

17:62.t: Naboola mbu: “Ololanga uno wohelesiye oluyali muno okhushila esie, ni umbelesia ebise okhuula inyanga yeyindukho, toto ndilasishia muno olwibulo lwaye lwoosi halali batiti butswa.”

17:63.t: (Nyasaye) Naboola mbu: “Tsia; yesiyesi ulikhulondakho mubo, mana toto Jahanamu niyo omurungo kwenyu, omurungo omunji muno.

17:64.t: Ne khwesa bonyalilwa mubo khu sauti yiyio, ne obakhung’asilie, abaninanga bobo tsifarasi nende batsitsanga khumakulu. Ne sanjilana ninabo khumwandu nende Abana babu, ne obalache.” Halali Shetani shabalakanga halali obubeyi butswa.

17:65.t: Toto Abasumba banje obula obunyali khubo tawe. Ne Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi ayela okhuba omulindi.

17:66.t: Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi ni ulia ubelusilinjia ebininwa bienyu munyanza, kho mukonye omukabo kukwe. Toto Ye ni umunji wetsimbabaasi khwinywe.

17:67.t: Ne obutinyu nibubanyoola munyanza, babakoranga balia boosi bamulanganga mbu nyasaye, halali Nyasaye yenyene butswa. Ne olwa abahonokosinjia mwola khulukongo, mukalukhananga. Toto Omundu ni omunji wokhukhaya.

17:68.t: Koo, musuubilanga mbu muli nomulembe mbu shiyetsa okhubasishia nebuleka wosiwosi weshialo tawe, nohomba mbu shalabarerera imbumbuyeka yolufu mana mubule okhunyoola omukhonyi?

17:69.t: Nohomba mwasuubila mbu muli nomulembe mbu shalibakalusiamwo olundi khandi tawe - mana abarerere omuyeka omululu, mana abasishie mumatsi khulwa obukhayi bwenyu? Mana mubule ubakhoonya khwifwe (khushinyasio shino)?

17:70.t: Ne toto khwaninia abandu hekulu, mana nikhubachinga khushialo nende munyanza mana nikhubakaba khumikabo emilayi ne nikhubakholela obulayi muno okhushila ebindi bia khwaloonga.

17:71.t: Inyanga yakhulilaanga Abandu halala nende abemilisi babu, kho balia balihebwa eshitabu shiabu mumukhono omusatsa, abo balisoma eshitabu shiabu, ne shibalikholelwa obubii bwosibwosi tawe kata shinga oluusi lwa hakari wa olufwa lwa itende.

17:72.t: Ne uba khushialo khuno omuwofu, mwikulu khandi aliba omuwofu, ne owakora muno injila.

17:73.t: Nabo toto bali hambi muno okhukhutswatswania oleshe kalia akakhwakhufimbulila, kho onyoole okhukhuchishila kalali kano, ne awo toto bakhakhukholele omwitsa wa mbusia ngonia.

17:74.t: Ne khukhayanga okhukhutinyisia, wakhabeele ahambi muno okhubayekhakho hatiti.

17:75.t: Awo nafu toto khwakhakhupiliyie eshinyasio eshikhongo shiobulamu. Ne mana shiwakhanyoolelekhwo omukhonyi ukhuhabina khwifwe tawe.

17:76.t: Ne toto bali ahambi muno okhukhulonda kushialo (Madina) kho bakhurusiemwo. Ne shibakhekhale inyuma wuwo halali ebise bititi butswa.

17:77.t: Eyo niyo imelo ya balia abakhwaruma imbeli wuwo mubarumwa befu. Ne sholanyoola obwawukhani mu imelo yefu tawe.

17:78.t: Ne swaliya khatsotso eliuba niliakhakalukhana, okhula eshilima shieshilo, ne Ikurani yomumabwibwi. Toto Ikurani (Iswala) yomumabwibwi ili nende abaloli buli lwoosi.

17:79.t: Ne eshilo bukha olaame ninayo. Eyo ni eshimetelo khwiwe, yakhaba ario Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yakhulamusilia habundu woluyali.

17:80.t: Ne boola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, nyinjisia amenjililo amalayi, ne ndusia okhurusia okhulayi, ne umbe amaani karula khwiwe akakhonya.”

17:81.t: Ne boola mbu: “Obwatoto buulile, ne obubeyi burulile. Toto obubeyi nibwo obwokhurulao muno.”

17:82.t: Ne khweshia mu Kurani eshili mbu ni eshiwonia, nende tsimbabaasi khubasuubili, ne shishibametanga Abakhayi halali obusishi (okhutiba).

17:83.t: Ne olwakhuwelesinjia Omundu tsimbabaasi tsiefu, akalukhananga mana yere elubeka. Ne libii nilimutila, afwitsanga omwoyo muno.

17:84.t: Boola mbu: “Buli shiamulala akholanga mu injila yiyie, ne Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi yamanya muno ulia owalunjikha muno injila.’’

17:85.t: Ne bakhurebanga amakhuwa ka roho. Boola mbu: ‘‘Roho ni likhuwa lirulana nende Nyasaye wanje Omulesi. Nanyu shimwahebwa mubumanyi halali butiti.”

17:86.t: Ne khwenyanga, toto khwakhabukule koosi aka khwakhufimbulila, mana shiwakhanyolele ukhwemela khwelo imbeli wefu tawe.

17:87.t: Halali khutsimbabaasi tsirula khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi. Toto obulayi bubwe khwiwe ni obukhongo.

17:88.t: Boola mbu: “Kata nibekhung’asia Abandu nende Amajini mbu kho barere eshifwana shinga Ikurani ino, shibakhanyala okhurera eshifwana ngayo tawe kata nibakhonyana abeene khubeene.”

17:89.t: Ne toto khwenoosilia Abandu buli amachelasio mu Ikurani ino. Halali Abandu abaanji bakhayanga koosi okhuyiniakho okhukhaya (Nyasaye) butswa.

17:90.t: Ne (abakhayi) baboola mbu, "Shikhunyala okhusuubila tawe okhula okhukhulukusilie isebele mwiloba.

17:91.t: Nohomba obe nende omukunda kwetsitende nende tsizabibu, mana chikhulukusiemo emialo makhulukusia.

17:92.t: Nohomba okhukwisiekhwo likulu ebitonye ebitonye shingala wishemulanga, nohomba okhurerere Nyasaye nende abamalaika obweni khubweni.

17:93.t: Nohomba obe nende inzu yeyidhahabu, nohomba onine mwikulu. Ne shikhulasuubila okhunina khwao tawe okhula okhwishilie eshitabu khusome. Boola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi nomutswenufu. Esie endisa omundu, Omurumwa (shendi Malaika nohomba Nyasaye tawe).”

17:94.t: Ne shibulaho shiakayila abandu okhusuubila olwa obulunjifu bwabetsela halali baboola mbu: “Koo, Nyasaye yaruma omundu okhuba Omurumwa wuwe?”

17:95.t: Boola mbu: “Khushialo abamalaika babetsangakho nibachenda nibehotseresiye, toto khwakheshiyie okhurula mwikulu Malaika yaba Omurumwa.”

17:96.t: Boola mbu: “Nyasaye ayela okhuba omuloli hakari wanje ninanyu. Toto Ye yamanya obulayi Abasumba be, ne abalolanga muno.”

17:97.t: Ne owa Nyasaye alunjisia, oyo niye omulunjifu. Ne ulia wakosia, mana ewe shonyala okhubanyoolela omulindi ulali Ye (Nyasaye) tawe. Ne khulibakhung’asia inyanga yeyindukho nibakhwesurulungwa khubweni bwabu, ne nibali abawofu, abasilu, abekala amarwi. Eshimenyo shiabu ni Jahanam. Buli nikukhola okhututuya okhwakha khwako, nikhubametela omwakho omululu.

17:98.t: Oko nikwo omurungo kwabu shichila toto abo bakhaya ebimanyisio biefu, mana nibaboola mbu: “Olwa khuliba ebikumba nende ebitonye abiasiebwa, khulilamusibwa khube ebilonje ebiyia?”

17:99.t: Shibalolaakhwo mbu Nyasaye owaloonga likulu nende eshialo ali nende obunyali bwokhuloonga abali shingabo? Na yabarereraho ebise bibula inganakani mwo. Halali ababii bakhaya koosi okhuyiniakho okhutsililila mubukhayi butswa.

17:100.t: Boola mbu: “Mubetsanga mbu nenywe muli nende eshiachi shietsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, toto mwakhatsiikaliile khulwa okhuria okhutsiikhonyela. Ne toto omundu nomwimani muno.”

17:101.t: Ne toto khwahelesia Musa ebifune tisa ebili habulafu. Kho barebe abana ba Israili olwayabetsela, ne Firauni nababoolela mbu: ‘‘Toto esie ekhuparira ewe Musa mbu walokwa.”

17:102.t: Naboola mbu: “Toto ewe omanyile mbu abulaho weshia ebifune bino halali Nyasaye Omulesi welikulu nende eshialo bibe ebifune bia habulafu. Ne toto esie ekhuparira ewe Firauni mbu omalile okhusikha.”

17:103.t: Mana Firauni niyenya okhubaloonda mushialo shiabu, mana nikhumusishia mumatsi ye nende abali halala ninaye boosi.

17:104.t: Ne nikhuboolela inyuma wuwe abaana ba Israil mbu: “Ikhale khushialo shino, ne olwayilitsa indache yeyindukho, khulibareera mweesi halala.”

17:105.t: Ni khubwatoto khwayishia, ne khubwatoto yekha. Ne shikhwakhuruma halali obe wokhuhana akomwikhoyo, omwikanyilisi.

17:106.t: Ne Ikurani khwayikabula tsimbeka tsikabukhane, kho onyoole okhusomela Abandu khukhuwuluukha, ne khwayishia hatiti hatiti.

17:107.t: Boola mbu: “Muyisubile nohomba mulayisubila tawe. Toto balia bahebwa obumanyi ino nishili, nibasomelwa, bakwitsanga mafumama nibasujuda muno.”

17:108.t: Ne babolanga mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi nomutswenufu. Toto indache ya Nyasaye wefu Omulesi iliikholekha butswa.”

17:109.t: Ne bakwitsanga mafumama, nibalila, ne ibametanga obwihotselefu.

17:110.t: Boola mbu: “Musabe Allah (Nyasaye) nohomba musabe Arrahman (owetsimbabaasi muno). Elira liosiliosi liamumulanga, ali nende amera amalayi muno.” Ne olalaama iswala yiyio khubuyoka tawe, ne olaboola mumwoyo kwa hasi tawe, halali tila hakarikari wa ako.

17:111.t: Ne boola mbu: “Okhwitsomibwa khwoosi nikhwa Nyasaye, ulia ulebukulila omwana tawe, ne abula omusanji khubwami bubwe, ne abula omwitsa khulwobulemefu. Ne mwitsoomie okhwitsoomia okhukhongo muno.”

18:1.t: Okhwitsomibwa khwoosi nikhwa Nyasaye, oweshia Eshitabu khumusumba wuwe, ne shiyashikhola okhuba mashiama tawe.

18:2.t: Eshikololofu, kho shikanyilisilie Abandu eshinyasio eshilulu shirulanga khuye, ne shihelesie akomwikhoyo balia basuubilanga, abakholanga ebikhole ebilayi, mbu balinyoola omurungo omulayi.

18:4.t: Ne shikanyilisie balia baboola mbu: “Nyasaye ali nende Omwana.”

18:5.t: Abo babula obumanyi bwosibwosi bwalio, kata baasabwe bosi. Ni likhuwa likhongo muno lirulanga muminwa chiabu. Shibaboolanga halali obubeyi butswa.

18:6.t: Ne onyala okhwiyira ewe omwene khulwa okhubabelelela ngala bali mbu shibasubilanga amakhuwa kano tawe.

18:7.t: Toto efwe khwakhola ebili khushialo bibe ebirone biashio, kho khubateme ni wina mubo webikhole ebilayi muno.

18:8.t: Ne toto nefwe khulikhola bioosi ebo bili hekulu walio okhuba liloba eliumu.

18:9.t: Nohomba oparanga mbu Abandu ba mumbinga nende kalia kahandikwa, mbu biali ebiamakana okhurulana nende ebimanyisio biefu?

18:10.t: Olwa Abasiani abo belushila mumbinga, mana nibaboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, khuhelesie tsimbabaasi tsirulanga khwiwe ne khukasilie obulunjifu mulikhuwa liefu.”

18:11.t: Mana nikhusuba amarwi kabu mumbinga omo khumika eminji.

18:12.t: Mana nikhubalamusia khokhumanye mbu kuli hena khumikanda chibili chino okwabala obulayi muno ebise biabamenya.

18:13.t: Efwe khukhukanilanga amakhuwa kabu khubwatoto. Toto abo ni ababuukha, abasuubila Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, mana nikhubametela obulunjifu.

18:14.t: Mana nikhura amaani mumioyo chiabu olwabeema mana nibaboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi ni Nyasaye Omulesi welikulu nende eshialo, shikhulalaamakhwo Nyasaye wundi yesiyesi ulali Ye tawe. Toto awo khulaba khuboolele obubii obwaburirira eshichelo.

18:15.t: Abandu befu bano bakhola abanyasaye balali Ye tawe. Shichila shina nibalarerakhwo eshifune shili habulafu? Kho ni omubii shina omukhongo muno okhushila ulia uchishilanga Nyasaye obubeyi?"

18:16.t: Ne olwa mwali nimubawukhekhwo nende bilia ebiabalaamanga habundu wa Nyasaye. Mana yilushile mumbinga, Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi alabekulila tsimbabaasi tsitsie, ne alabakholela amakhuwa kenyu okhuba amangu.

18:17.t: Ne olola eliuba olwalirulanga, liburira ehale nende imbinga yabu elubeka womukhono omulunji. Ne olwa likwitsanga ehale ninabo namukhono omukaata, nabo nibali mukhombe mukari we imbinga eyo. Ebo ni bilala khubimanyisio bia Nyasaye. Ulia owa Nyasaye alunjisia, oyo niye omulunjifu. Ne owaakosia, oyo shalamuhelesia omwemeresi wokhumulunjishia tawe.

18:18.t: Ne opara mbu bali meso, nabo khane bakonele. Ne khubakalukhaninjia namukhono mulunji nende namukhono mukata. Ne imbwa yabu nilambisiyie ebilenje biayio mubwinjilililo. Obalolanga, wakhakalukhane lwangu okhubelukha, ne toto oburi obunji bwakhakhwitsulemwo shichila bo.

18:19.t: Kho endio nilwakhwabalamusia kho bareebane abeene khubeene. Naboola omubooli mubo mbu: “Mwikhale tsinyanga tsinga?” Nibaboola mbu: “Khwikhale inyanga ndala nohomba ebuleka weyinyanga.” Nibaboola mbu: “Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi amanyile muno ebise bia mwekhala. Kho, rumekho mulala khwinywe nende amamondo kenyu kano khushiiro mana ahenje eshiakhulia shina eshilayi muno abarerere. Ne akhole amakhuwa kano mumachesi, ne alabarumbulakhwo khuyesiyesi tawe.

18:20.t: Shichila bo nibamanya hamuli, balabalasa amachina, nohomba balabakalusia mumilukha chiabu, ne awo shimulibura kata hatiti tawe.”

18:21.t: Na endio nilwakhwabarumbusia khobanyoole okhumanya mbu indache ya Nyasaye ni yatoto, ne mbu toto inyanga yeyindukho ibula obukanakani tawe, olwa basolananga abeene khubeene shichila likhuwa liabu. Nibaboola mbu: “Yumbashe inzu ekulu wabu. Nyasaye wabu Omulesi yabamanya obulayi muno.” Balia bashila mulikhuwa liabu nibaboola mbu: “Toto efwe khulombakha omusikiti ekulu wabu.”

18:22.t: (Abandi) balaboolanga mbu: “Bali Abandu bataru, wakhane wabu ni imbwa yabu.” Ne (abandi) balaboolanga mbu: “Bali abandu barano, ne wakhasasaba wabu ni imbwa yabu.” (Babolanga) khu khutemakho butswa okhuboola akabakorerwe. Ne baboolanga mbu, “Bali abandu saba, ne wamunane wabu ni imbwa yabu.” Boola mbu: ‘‘Nyasaye wanje Omulesi ni umanyile muno mbu bali benga. Abulaho ubamanyile halali batiti butswa. Kho, olayingana ekulu wabo tawe halali okhuyingana khwa hekulu hekulu butswa. Ne olareba amakhuwa kabu omundu yesiyesi mubo tawe.

18:23.t: Ne toto olabolakhwo khu liosiliosi tawe mbu: ‘‘Toto nditsa okhukhola elo mutsuli.”

18:24.t: Halali (ometekho) “Inshallah (Nyasaye nachama).” Ne yitsulila Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi niwibilila, ne boola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi alaalunjisia injila ili ahambi muno nende obulunjifu okhushila buno.”

18:25.t: Ne bamenya mumbinga mwabu omo emika tsimia tsitaru, ne nibametakhwo tisa.

18:26.t: Boola mbu: Nyasaye amanyile muno ebise biabekhala. Niye umanyile akefisile akomwikulu nende khushialo. Nookhulola nende okhuwulila okhulayi khuli khurie okhukhwe. Nabo babula omulindi ulali Ye, naye shatsokasinjiakhwo yesiyesi mukhubusia khukhwe tawe.

18:27.t: Ne soma akawafimbulilwa okhurula mushitabu shia Nyasaye wuwo omulesi. Abulaho unyala okhukalukhasia amakhuwa keke tawe. Nawe sholinyoola owawilushila wosiwosi okhumwilukhaye akhaye okhukhunyoola tawe.

18:28.t: Ne wisumilisie halala nende balia balaamanga Nyasaye wabu Omulesi itsuli nende ingoloobe, nibakhabanga obweni bubwe. Ne olababusiamwo tsimoni tsitsio khulwokhwenya ebirone biobulamu bwokhushialo tawe. Ne olalonda tawe khu balia abakhwalekha bakandala emioyo chiabu mana nibalonda obwikombi bwabu, mana amakhuwa kabu nikabura eshichelo.

18:29.t: Ne boola mbu buno ni obulaamba okhurula khu Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi. Kho, ulia wenya, asuubile, ne owenya, akhaye. Toto efwe khwarecheshela ababii omulilo okwa olukaka lwakwo lulibaterera. Ne nibenya obukhonyi, balikhonywa khumatsi kali shinga amafura kasalulusibwe akalisaamba obweni bwabu. Neeshinywebwa eshibi muno shili shirie shino! Ne ni habundu ali abii muno arie hano!

18:30.t: Toto balia abasuubila mana nibakhola amalayi, efwe toto shikhukosinjia omurungo kwabalia bakholanga amalayi tawe.

18:31.t: Abo balinyoola emikunda chilaliwa tawe, echiburangamwo emialo, balironwamwo nende ebifwalo biokhumakhono, ebia idhahabu, ne balifwalwa tsingubo tsia obukondo bwobunyasi etsia hariri inyangu nende hariri isiro. Balikhalamwo khubitali ebiaronwa (khufono). Ni omurungo omulayi kuli kuriena kuno! Ne ni habundu alayi ali arie hano!

18:32.t: Ne bachelasilie abasatsa babili, mulala wabu khwamukholela emikunda chibili chetsizabibu, mana nikhuchibotokhanilia mitende, ne hakari wachio nikhuraho emisala chindi chieyimele.

18:33.t: Emikunda chibili chino chioosi chietsulamwo ebiamo biachio, ne shikhwachilemiakhwo shiosishiosi tawe. Ne mukari mwachio nikhubusiamwo omwalo.

18:34.t: Ne yali nende ebiamo ebinji. Mana naboolela owashie nibakalusaninjia mbu: “Esie ekhushila khumwandu nende amaani khulwa Abandu bendi ninabo.”

18:35.t: Mana niyenjila mumukunda kukwe niyekholele obubii, naboola mbu: “Shembara omukunda kuno nikulibiyakhwo tawe, tsinyanga tsioosi.

18:36.t: Ne shembara indukho nilibaho tawe. Ne kata nibiba mbu engalusibwa wa Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, toto ndilinyoola wokhukalukhawo andayi muno okhushila kano.”

18:37.t: Owashie namuboolela nibakalusaninjia mbu: “Koo, okhayanga ulia wakhuloonga khuliloba, mana khu indonyande ya amatsi kolwibulo, mana nakhukhola omundu omulaamba?”

18:38.t: Owashie namuboolela nibakalusaninjia mbu: “Koo, okhayanga ulia wakhuloonga khuliloba, mana khu indonyande ya amatsi kolwibulo, mana nakhukhola omundu omulaamba?”

18:39.t: Mana olaboolangakhwo lwawenjira mumukunda kukwo mbu: “Biendi nabo bino Nyasaye niye wanyenyera, amaani shikanyolekhanga halali khu Nyasaye. Ni undolanga mbu endi nende omwandu omutiti nende abana batiti okhushila ewe.

18:40.t: Awundi Nyasaye wanje Omulesi alambelesia eshilayi okhushila omukunda kukwo, ne arumile omukunda oko likulu okhurula mwikulu mana kube liloba likhaya lirerekhanga.

18:41.t: Nohomba amatsi kakwo kakhame obule okhukanyoola.”

18:42.t: Mana ebiamo biaye nibibotokhanwa, mana natong’a okhukalukhania amakhono keke, khulwa obukhalabani bwaye omo nabio (ebiamo) nibibula khumisala chabyo, mana naboola mbu: “Ehh! Emanyangakhwo, shindakhatsokasiye Nyasaye wanje Omulesi nende shiosishiosi tawe.”

18:43.t: Kho, shiyali nende omukanda kwokhumukhonya tawe ehale nende Nyasaye, naye omwene shiyali unyala okhwikhonya tawe.

18:44.t: Eyo obulindi bwatoto nibwa Nyasaye butswa owatoto. Ye niye omurunji omulayi muno, owokhurera obumalilishi obulayi.

18:45.t: Ne bachelasilie obulamu bwokhushialo mbu buli shinga amatsi kakhwishinjia okhurula mwikulu, mana nikesaasia nende emimela chiomwiloba, mana emimela echo nichiba amasafu amomu, akakhalishe khalishe akomuyaka kuwutsanga eyi nende eyi. Ne Nyasaye ali nende obunyali muno khubuli eshindu.

18:46.t: Omwandu nende Abana ni ebirone biobulamu bwokhushialo. Ne ebikhole ebilayi bitong’anga nibo obulayi imbeli wa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi khumurungo nende okhusuubilila okhulayi.

18:47.t: Ne inyanga yakhulichesia efikulu, ne olilola eshialo nishili eshiang’ang’u, ne khulibalamusia ne shikhulilekha yesiyesi mubo tawe.

18:48.t: Ne baliemibwa imbeli wa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi olunyaali. Toto enywe mukhwitsile shingala khwabalonga olwambeli. Halali mwaparanga mbu shikhulibarereraho ebise bino tawe.

18:49.t: Ne Eshitabu shilirebwaho imbeli (wabu). Kho, olilola shinga ababii baliria muno shichila kalia kalimwo. Ne baliboola mbu: “Oh bayie, Eshitabu shino shibere shirie, sishilesherekho lititi nohomba likhongo tawe halali shialihandika obulayi muno.” Ne balinyoola koosi kabakhola nikali hawo. Ne Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi shakholelanga yesiyesi obubii tawe.

18:50.t: Ne olwakhwaboolela abamalaika mbu: “Rerere Adam obweni hasi.” Mana nibara obweni hasi halali Ibilis, ye yali okhurula mumajini, mana nafunaka lilako lia Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi. Koo, mumukholanga ye nende olwibulo lulwe abalina (benyu) habundu wa Nyasaye, nabo nabasuku benyu? Ni obubii buli burie buno bwababii bakalukhaninjia.

18:51.t: Shindabakhola okhuba abaloli bookhulongwa khwelikulu nende eshialo nohomba okhulongwa khwabu abeene tawe. Ne shindakhola abakosinjia okhuba abakhonyi tawe.

18:52.t: Ne inyanga yaliboola mbu: “Rerekhwo abamwasanjinjia ninaasi abamwachikhanga” mana balibalanga, halali shibalibafuchililila tawe, mana khulira hakari wabu eshikalilo.

18:53.t: Ne Ababii balilola omulilo, ne balimanya mbu okhula balenjilamwo, ne mana shibalinyoola amelushilo tawe.

18:54.t: Ne toto khwaboolela Abandu Mukurani ino buli imbia yokhufwanania. Halali Omundu yabura eshichelo okhushila buli eshindu mukhuyingana.

18:55.t: Ne shibulaho shiekayila Abandu okhusuubila olwa obulunjifu bwabetsela mana basabe eshileshelo khu Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, halali kaboolele kalia akabakhale, nohomba eshinyasio shibetsele nibalolanga.

18:56.t: Ne shikhurumanga Abarumwa tawe halali babe bokhuhana akomwikhoyo nende abokhwikanyilisia. Ne balia bakhaya bayingananga khu kobubeyi mbu khubakwisie hasi obwatoto khuko. Ne bakholanga tsinyali tsianje nende kalia akabekanyilisibwa okhuba omubayo.

18:57.t: Ne ni wina omubii omukhongo okhushila ulia owitsulisibungwa tsinyaali tsia Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi mana atsileche mana niyebilila akemikhono chichie chiaranjilisia. Toto efwe khwara efisubo khumioyo chiabu kho bakhaye okhuchimanya obulayi, ne khwara mumarwi kabu shiokhukeekasia. Ne nobalanga khubulunjifu, shibakhachama okhulunjikha tawe.

18:58.t: Ne Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi niye Omunji weshileshelo, Owetsimbabaasi. Alababukulilanga obubii khulwa kalia akabakhola, toto yakhabarerere eshinyasio lwangu lwangu. Halali bali nende ebise ebia balalinyoola amelushilo kosikosi akokhumwilukha tawe.

18:59.t: Ne etso ni tsingongo etsia khwatsisishia olwa tsiakhola obubii, nikhubarererao ebise biokhusikha khwabu.

18:60.t: Ne olwa Musa yaboolela omusiani waye mbu: “Ndalatsililila okhutsia, okhula ndule wetsinyanza tsibili tsibukanilanga nohomba enzililile okhutsia emika nemika.”

18:61.t: Kho olwa boola we tsinyanza etso tsibukanilanga, nibebilila inyeni yabu, mana nayo nitsililila okhutsia imbeli munyanza.

18:62.t: Olwa babura mana niboola imbeli, yaboolela omusiani wuwe oyo mbu: “Khwelesie eshiakhulia shiefu shieshitere. Toto khunyoolele khuluchendo lwefu luno amachonye.”

18:63.t: Naboola mbu: “Olutsi, wakhuwulushile halia khushitulo? Esie toto ndibilile inyeni eyo. Ne abulaho owakhola ndebilila halali Shetani mbu ndalayitsulila tawe, mana niitila injila yayo niitsia munyanza okhutsia khwamakana."

18:64.t: Naboola mbu: “Awo niho wakhwenyerenje.” Mana nibakalukha inyuma okhulonda injila yabu ilia ilia.

18:65.t: Mana nibanyoola Omusumba mubasumba befu owakhwahelesia tsimbabaasi okhurula khwifwe, ne owakhwechesia amasomo okhurula khwifwe.

18:66.t: Musa namuboolela mbu: “Koo, enyala ndakhulondakhwo unzechesiekhwo kobulunjifu kawechesibwa?”

18:67.t: Naboola mbu: “Toto ewe shonyala okhwifwila okhuba halala ninasi tawe.

18:68.t: Ne onyala orie okhwifwila kalia akolakamanyile obulayi muno tawe?”

18:69.t: Naboola mbu: “Nyasaye nachama, witsa okhuunyoola nendi omwisumilisi, ne shinditsa okhulobakhwo likhuwa lilio liosiliosi tawe.”

18:70.t: Naboola mbu: “Mana niwunondakhwo, olandeeba liosiliosi tawe okhula esie anjake okhukhuboolela hekulu walio.”

18:71.t: Mana nibarula, ne olwa banina mubwaro, nabufutula. Musa namureeba mbu: ‘‘Ofutule obwaro kho osishie abalimwo? Toto okholele likhuwa libii muno.”

18:72.t: Naboola mbu: “Shekhuboolelekhwo mbu sholanyala okwifwila ninasi tawe?”

18:73.t: Naboola mbu: “Olambukulila obubii khukandibilile tawe, ne olasitoyelia amakhuwa kanje tawe.”

18:74.t: Mana boosi nibarula halala, nibanyoola Omusiani mulala mana namwira. Musa naboola mbu: “Ahh! Wirire omundu eshikhaya ubula libii, ulerere Omundu tawe? Toto okholele likhuwa libii muno.”

18:75.t: Naboola mbu: “Koo, shekhuboolelekhwo mbu sholanyala okhwifwila halala ninasi tawe?”

18:76.t: Naboola mbu: “Nekhureeba liosiliosi khandi, olaandekha okhuba halala ninawe khandi tawe. Shichila omalile okhunyoola eshifune okhurula khwisie.”

18:77.t: Mana nibatsililila okhutsia, okhula olwa boolela Abandu bolukongo lulala, nibareeba abeene olukongo olo eshiakhulia, nibaloba okhubeyamira obucheni, ne nibanyoolamwo (mulukongo olo) lisisi nilienyanga okhukwa, mana naliemia. Musa naboola mbu: “Noli uchama, wakhabukule omurungo khulwa elo.”

18:78.t: Naboola mbu: “Hano ni wakhulekhanira esie ninawe. Nditsa okhukhuboolela obwatoto bwakalia kolanyalile okhwisumilisia khuko tawe.

18:79.t: Kho eliaro lilia liali lia abamanani bakholanga munyanza, ne nindenya mbu elirekhwo isoni, shichila imbeli wabu Omwami yaliyo ubukulanga buli eliaro lilayi khumaani.

18:80.t: Ne omusiani ulia, abebusi bebe bali abasuubili, nikhuria mbu aletsa yabayila mubukori bwokhubura eshichero nende okhukhaya.

18:81.t: Kho mana khwenya mbu Nyasaye wabu Omulesi abakalukhasirie omwana omulayi okhushila oyo, khubutswenufu, nende owuli ahambi muno khushisa.

18:82.t: Nalo lisisi lilia, liali lia abaana abafwilwa babili, mulitokho elo, ne hasi walio kwaliho omwandu kwabu, ne samwana yali omundu omulayi, kho Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yenya mbu bakubuye mana berusilie abeene omwandu kwabu oko, etso nitsimbabaasi tsirula khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi. Ne shekholele kano khubunyali bwanje tawe. Obo nibo obwatoto bwa kalia akokhayilwe okhwifwila khuko."

18:83.t: Ne bakhurebanga amakhuwa ka Dhul’karnain, boola mbu: “Nditsa okhubasomela amakhuwa keke kandi.”

18:84.t: Toto efwe khwamura obulai muno khushialo, ne nikhumuwa injila yokhunyoola buli eshindu.

18:86.t: Okhuula shingala yoola ebukwe weliuba, yalinyola liheranga khusebere eya amatoyi amanji. Awo nanyoola Abandu. Nikhuboola mbu: “Ewe Dhul’karnain, bahelesie eshinyasio nohomba obakholele obulayi.”

18:87.t: Naboola mbu: “Ulia owakhola obubii, khwitsa okhumuwa eshinyasio, mana alikalusibwa khu Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, naye alimuhelesia eshinyasio eshibii muno.

18:88.t: Ne ulia owasuubila mana nakhola ebikhole ebilayi, alanyoola omurungo omulayi, nafu khwitsa okhumuboolela amakhuwa kefu amangu.

18:90.t: Okhula shingala yoola weliuba lirulilanga (mumbo), yalinyola nilirulilanga khubandu abalakhwarereraho eshishinjilo shiokhubekalila okhurulana ninalio tawe.

18:91.t: Ne shinga endio khwali nikhumanyile obulayi amakhuwa koosi kayali ninako.

18:93.t: Okhula shingala yoola hakari wetsingulu tsibili, yanyoola inyuma watsio abandu balawulilanga amakhuwa tawe.

18:94.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Ewe Dhul-Karnain, toto Yaajuj nende Maajuj, bakholanga obuononi khushyalo. Kho khukhwelesie omurungo ore eshikalilo hakari wefu ninabo?”

18:95.t: Naboola mbu: “Kalia ka Nyasaye wanje Omulesi yandinyisiliamwo ni amalayi muno. Kho, mukhoonye nende amaani, ndalara hakari wenyu ninabo eshikalilo eshisiro.

18:96.t: Munderere ebitonye bieshichuma.” okhula shingala yetsusia obwiyangu buli hakari wetsingulu tsibili etso, naboola mbu: ‘‘Bwaane (omulilo)” okhula shingala yakhola eshichuma esho omulilo, naboola mbu: ‘‘Nderere ishaba isalulushe enzushe khuno.”

18:97.t: Mana shibanyala okhushinina bashiambuka, nohomba okhuyabamo obwina tawe.

18:98.t: Naboola mbu: “Tsino ni tsimbabaasi okhurula khu Nyasaye wanje Omulesi. Ne olwa yiliula indache ya Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, alishifunakafunaka muno. Ne indache ya Nyasaye wanje Omulesi ni yahabwene."

18:99.t: Ne khulibalekha abeene khubeene beenjiranemwo, ne olwa olwika lulifurwamwo, awo khulibakhung’asia boosi halala.

18:100.t: Ne khulilolosia Jahanamu inyanga eyo imbeli wabakhayi malolosia.

18:101.t: Abetsimoni tsiabu tsiali tsiafunikhwa ehale nende ametsulilo kefu, ne shibali nibanyala okhuwulila tawe.

18:102.t: Koo, balia abakhaya baparanga mbu banyala okhukhola Abasumba banje abalina babu habundu wanje? Toto efwe khwarecheshela Jahannam abakhayi ibe wabaliishila.

18:103.t: Boola mbu: “Koo, ebabilekhwo balia bebikhole biabu biabiiya muno?”

18:104.t: Ni balia bobukhalabani bwabu bwakora eshikhaya mubulamu bwokhushialo, nabo baparanga mbu bakholanga ebikhole ebilayi.

18:105.t: Abo nibo bakhaya ebimanyisio bia Nyasaye wabu Omulesi nende okhubukana ninaye. Kho, ebikhole biabu nibikwa akhaya, ne shikhulibateba inyanga yeyindukho tawe.

18:106.t: Kho, Jahanam nikwo omurungo kwabu shichila bakhaya mana nibakholela omubayo ebimanyisio bianje nende Abarumwa banje.

18:107.t: Toto balia abasuubila mana nibakhola amalayi, ameshelo kabu kaliba Firdaws.

18:108.t: Balimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi, shibalienya okhurulamwo tawe.

18:109.t: Boola mbu: “Inyanza yibetsanga mbu nibwo obwino bwokhuhandika amakhuwa ka Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, inyanza yakhomele amakhuwa ka Nyasaye wanje Omulesi nikashili okhuwa, kata khureranga etsindi shinga etso.

18:110.t: Boola mbu: “Toto esie endisa Omundu shinga enywe, efimbulilungwa mbu Nyasaye wenyu ni Nyasaye mulala. Kho, ulia wikomba okhubukana nende Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, akhole ebikhole ebilayi, ne alatsokaasiakhwo yesiyesi khumalamo ka Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi tawe."

19:2.t: Obwitsulisio bwetsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi khumusumba wuwe Zakaria.

19:3.t: Olwa yalanga Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi omulango kwobwifisi.

19:4.t: Naboola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, toto ebikumba bianje bimalile okhuba ebiteshele, ne omurwe kwanje kwakhanga tsimbutsi, ne shindali weyikhabi imbi tawe Nyasaye wanje Omulesi khulwa okhukhusaba.

19:5.t: Ne toto esie eyendelanga Abandu banje nindakharulaho, ne omukhasi wanje nomukumba. Kho mbelesia witsa okhutong’a mushilenje shianje okhurula khwiwe.

19:6.t: Witsa okhuchelama esie nende okhuchelama olwibulo lwa Yaqub, ne Nyasaye wanje omulesi omukhole omwene abe uchamisia.”

19:7.t: Ewe Zakaria, toto efwe khukhwetsanga amakhuwa akomwikhoyo ko (okhwibula) omwana, elira lilie ni Yahya, khushili okhuhelesiakhwo yesiyesi imbeli wuwe elira shinga lino.

19:8.t: Naboola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, ndakhanyoola endie omwana omukhasi wanje nali omukumba, nasi ndamala okhukofula muno?”

19:9.t: Naboola mbu: “Ne endio nilwa kali. Nyasaye wuwo omulesi aboolele mbu: 'Kano ni amangu muno khwisie, ne toto ndakhuloonga khale, ne shiwali eshindu tawe.'"

19:10.t: Naboola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje omulesi kholela eshimanyisio.” Naboola mbu: “Eshimanyisio shishio ni mbu sholanyala okhuboola nende abandu khutsinyanga tsitaru tawe nawe nolisa omulamu habwene.”

19:11.t: Mana narulila abandu baye okhurula mu mihirab, nabasomeselia nomukhono mbu: “Tswenule Nyasaye itsuli nende ingoloobe.”

19:12.t: Ewe Yahya, tila Eshitabu nende amaani. Nafwe khwamuhelesia oburuchi nashili omutiti.

19:13.t: Ne nikhumuhelesia eshisa okhurula khwifwe nende obutswenufu, ne yali owaria Nyasaye.

19:14.t: Ne (nikhumukhola) omulayi khubebusi bebe, ne shiyali omufuru omukhayi tawe.

19:15.t: Ne omulembe kube khuye inyanga yayebulwa nende inyanga yalifwa, nende inyanga ya alilamusibwa mubafu.

19:16.t: Ne yitsulila Mushitabu Mariam, olwa yawukha khubandu bebe natsia ebuleka webukwe.

19:17.t: Mana naraho eshikalilo okhwiyikalila ehale ninabo. Mana nikhumurumila roho wefu, niyekhola khuye shinga omundu mwene.

19:18.t: (Mariam) Naboola mbu: “Toto esie ndilinda khu Omunji Wetsimbabaasi (yaninde) okhurulana ninawe, toto noba noritsanga Nyasaye."

19:19.t: (Malaika) Naboola mbu: “Toto esie endi Omurumwa wa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, erumilwe mbu nditse ekhubile akomwikhoyo mbu olanyola omwana omutswenufu.”

19:20.t: Naboola mbu: “Ndakhanyoola endie omwana ne omundu yesiyesi ashili okhundilakhwo tawe, ne esie kata shindatemakhwo okhuba omuyeyi tawe?”

19:21.t: Naboola mbu: “Ne endio nilwa kali, Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi aboolele mbu: 'Kano ni amangu muno khwisie, kho khumukhole eshimanyisio khubandu nende tsimbabaasi tsirulanga khwifwe. Ne lino ni likhuwa liamala okhubusibwa.'”

19:22.t: Kho, nachinga inda yiyie, mana narula nayo okhutsia abundu ehale.

19:23.t: Mana obululu bwokhwibula nibumuyila hasi khushisina shiomutende, naboola mbu: “Emanyanga ndafwa kano nikashili okhunyoola, ndaba ndamala okhwibililwa khale.”

19:24.t: Namulanga okhurulila hasi wuwe mbu: “Olabeelela tawe, toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi akhukholeele isebele hasi wuwo.

19:25.t: Ne resia ebuleka wuwo eshisina shiomutende; kwitsa okhukhulakasilia tsitende tsindayi, tsinyengu.

19:26.t: Kho, lia mana onywe, mana osangasie tsimoni. Ne nolola omundu yesiyesi, boola mbu: 'Toto esie elachile Omunji wetsimbabaasi okhwiyikalila okhusunga, kho inyanga yino shindalaboola nende Omundu yesiyesi tawe.'"

19:27.t: Natsia ninaye khubandu bebe namuchinjile, nibaboola mbu: “Ewe Mariam, okholele likhuwa liamakana.

19:28.t: Ewe omukhana wabu Haruni, papa wuwo shiyali omundu omubii tawe ne mama wuwo yesi shiyali omuyeyi (omutamba) tawe.”

19:29.t: Nabachomesilia olwala khuye (omwana oyo), nibaboola mbu: “Khwakhalomaloma khurie nende Omwana ushili indaana, omutoro ushilelungwa?”

19:30.t: Naboola mbu: “Toto esie endi Omusumba wa Nyasaye. Yambelesiye Eshitabu, ne yakholele okhuba Omurumwa.

19:31.t: Ne yakholele okhuba weyikhabi wosiwosi wendi, ne yalachilisie okhulaama (Iswala) nende okhuyinia eshihanwa shia Izaka olwemba neshili omulamu.

19:32.t: Nende okhukholela mama wanje amalayi. Ne shiyakholele okhuba omufuru, omubii tawe.

19:33.t: Ne omulembe kube ninasi inyanga yandebulwa nende inyanga yandilifwa, nende inyanga yandililamusibwa okhuba omulamu.”

19:34.t: Oyo niye Isa Omwana wa Mariam. Likhuwa liatoto eliabakanakanangamwo.

19:35.t: Shikakhoyeshele khu Nyasaye okhuba nende Omwana tawe. Obutswenufu nobubwe, niyenya eshindu aboolanga butswa mbu: “Ba!” Ni shiba.

19:36.t: “Ne toto Nyasaye ni Omulesi wanje nende Omulesi wenyu. Kho, mumulaame. Ino niyo injila ilunjifu.”

19:37.t: Halali emikanda chiakabukhana abeene khu beene. Kho mana eshinyasio eshikhongo shilinyoola balia abakhaya, khulwa okhuula khwe inyanga ikhongo eyo.

19:38.t: Baliwulila ne balilola obulayi buli burie inyanga yabalikhwitsila? Halali abakhayi lelo bali mubukori obwa habulafu.

19:39.t: Ne obekanyilisie inyanga yokhwiyitsulisia ebise bielikhuwa lilibusibwa, nabo bali mukhukoyana nemana shibasubilanga tawe.

19:40.t: Ne toto ni efwe khulichelama eshialo nende bioosi bili hekulu washio. Ne balikalusibwa khwifwe.

19:41.t: Ne rumbula mushitabu shino Ibrahim, toto ye yali owatoto muno, Omurumwa.

19:42.t: Olwa yaboolela Samwana mbu: “Ewe papa wanje, shina shichilanga nolaama ebilawulila nende ebilalola, nende ebilakhukhoonya shiosishiosi tawe?

19:43.t: Ewe papa wanje, toto bwene enyoolele obumanyi bushili okhukhulilakhwo ewe. Kho nonda, nditsa okhulunjisia khu injila ya habwene.

19:44.t: Ewe papa wanje, olalaama Shetani tawe. Toto Shetani yaloba (amakhuwa ka Nyasaye) Omunji wetsimbabaasi.

19:45.t: Ewe papa wanje, toto eritsanga eshinyasio shirulanga khuwetsimbabaasi okhukhunyoola. Ne olaba alala nende Shetani.”

19:46.t: Naboola mbu: “Koo, shiwenya Abanyasaye banje tawe ewe Ibrahim? Nolalekha (akoboolanga ako) tawe, toto ndalakhulasa amachina. Ne ndulakhwo otsie ehale mbelio.”

19:47.t: Naboola mbu: “Omulembe kube ninawe. Nditsa okhusabila Nyasaye wanje Omulesi eshileshelo. Toto Ye yambulilanga muno.

19:48.t: Nasi nditsa okhubarulakhwo, nende akamulaamanga akalali aka Nyasaye ako. Ne nditsa okhusaba Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, ne shinditsa okhuba ukhola obubii nesaba Nyasaye wanje omulesi tawe.”

19:49.t: Kho olwa yalekhana nabo nende kalia akabalaamanga akalali ka Nyasaye tawe, khwamuhelesia Is’haka nende Yaqub, ne buli shiamulala nikhumukhola okhuba Omurumwa.

19:50.t: Ne nikhubahelesia tsimbabaasi tsiefu, ne nikhubakhola okhuba nende olulimi lwatoto olwa hekulu.

19:51.t: Ne rumbula mushitabu shino Musa. Toto ye yali Omutswenufu Omwaule, ne yali Omurumwa, Omunabii.

19:52.t: Olwa khwamulanga ebuleka womukhono omusatsa weshikulu, mana nikhumusitia ahambi okhuboola ninafu mubwifisi.

19:53.t: Ne khutsimbabaasi tsiefu, nikhumuhelesia omusiani wabu mbu Haruni yesi abe Omunabii.

19:54.t: Ne rumbula mushitabu shino Ismail. Toto ye yali owatoto khubulakani, ne yali Omurumwa, Omunabii.

19:55.t: Ne yalomesinjia Abandu bebe iswala (okhulaama) nende izakaa (eshihanwa), ne yali yachamilwa ewa Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi.

19:56.t: Ne rumbula mushitabo shino Idris. Toto ye yali owa obwatoto muno, Omurumwa.

19:58.t: Abo nibo aba Nyasaye yahelesia omukabo mubarumwa mulwibulo lwa Adam, nende balia abakhwabachinga halala nende Nuhu, nende olwibulo lwa Ibrahim nende Israil, nende balia abakhwalunjisia mana nikhubaawula. Nibasomelwa tsinyali tsia Owetsimbabaasi, bakwitsanga nibasujuda nibalila.

19:59.t: Halali nibabalondakhwo inyuma wabu abaloondi ababii, nibarenguya okhulaama (Iswala) mana nibaloonda obwikombi obubii, kho balinyoolana nende eshinyasio eshululu.

19:60.t: Halali balia abekanila mana nibasuubila, ne nibakhola amakhuwa amalayi, abo balinjila mumukunda kwomwikulu, ne shibalikholelwakhwo obubii bwosibwosi tawe.

19:61.t: Mumikunda chiomwikulu chilaliwa tawe, echia Owetsimbabaasi yalaka Abasumba bebe mubwifisi. Ye toto indache yiyie buli lwoosi yulangasa.

19:62.t: Shibaliwulilamwo amakhuwa kabula obukhala tawe halali omulembesa, ne balinyoolamwo omukabo kwabu itsuli nende ingolobe.

19:63.t: Oko nikwo omukunda kwomwikulu, okwa khulichelemia Abasumba befu balia abaali nibaria Nyasaye.

19:64.t: Ne shikhwikhanga tawe halali khubunyali bwa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi. Neebibie ebili imbeli wefu nende inyuma wefu, nende ebili hakari hao. Ne Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi shini wokhwibilila tawe.

19:65.t: Nyasaye Omulesi welikulu nende eshialo, nende ebili hakari wabio; kho mulaame Ye butswa, ne wisumilisie mukhumulama. Koo, wamanyakhwo yesiyesi uli shinga Ye?

19:66.t: Ne Omundu aboolanga mbu: “Koo, olwandiliba nefwile, toto ndililamusibwa ndaba omulamu?”

19:67.t: Koo, Omundu shiyetsulilanga mbu toto khwamuloonga inyuma hawo naye nalali eshindu tawe?

19:68.t: Kho, nditsuba khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi mbu toto khulibakhung’asia abo halala nende amashetani, mana khulibara mumbeka mwomulilo kwa Jahanam nibasikame.

19:69.t: Mana toto khulirusia buli mumukanda balia mubo abaloba muno Nyasaye Owetsimbabaasi.

19:70.t: Ne toto efwe khwamanya muno abakhoyeshele okhusambwamwo.

19:71.t: Ne abulao yesiyesi mwinywe halali alikuulakhwo (khu Jahanam). Elo nilikhuwa lili khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi eliamala okhubusibwa.

19:72.t: Mana khulihabina balia bamuria, ne khulilekhamwo ababii nibasikame.

19:73.t: Ne nibasomelwa tsinyali tsiefu tsili habulafu, abakhayi baboolelanga abasuubili mbu: “Ni mukanda shina khuchibili chino kuli nende eshimenyo eshilayi nende Abandu boluyali?”

19:74.t: Ne emikanda chinga chiakhwasishia imbeli wabu khumika chiabura, chiali nende amarone amalayi muno nende habundu alayi muno?

19:75.t: Boola mbu: “Balia bali mubukori, lekhe Owetsimbabaasi abametele ebise okhula balole akabalakungwa, eshinyasio nohomba Indukho. Awo nawabalimanya mbu niwina weshimenyo eshibii nende owa abalwaani abateshele muno.”

19:76.t: Ne Nyasaye ametelanga obulunjifu balia abalunjikha. Ne ebikhole ebilayi bitong’anga, neebilayi muno khumurungo ewa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, ne naamakalusio amalayi.

19:77.t: Koo, walolakhwo ulia owakhaya ebimanyisio biefu mana naboola mbu: “Toto esie nditsa okhuhebwa omwandu nende Abana?”

19:78.t: Koo, ye yanyola amakhuwa kefisa, nohomba Owetsimbabaasi yamulaka?

19:79.t: Shikali kario tawe. Khwitsa okhuhandika akaboolanga, ne khulamumeta muno ebise bieshinyasio.

19:80.t: Ne khulimuhelesia akaboolanga ako, ne alikhwitsila nali yenyene.

19:81.t: Ne bekholela abanyasaye baandi habundu wa Nyasaye mbu khobanyoole amaani (oluyali).

19:82.t: Shikali kario tawe. Balikongola okhulamwa khwabu okho, ne baliba abasuku babu.

19:83.t: Koo, shimulolangakhwo mbu efwe khwaruma amashetani khubakhayi, ababaretsangamwo amaani kokhukhola amabii?

19:84.t: Kho olabayuyukhanila tawe. Efwe toto khubabalilanga tsinyanga tsiabu.

19:85.t: Inyanga yakhulikhung’asia abaria Nyasaye okhubayila khuwetsimbabaasi babe abacheni be.

19:86.t: Ne khulichomia ababii mumulilo kwa Jahannam, nibali nende omwalakho omunji.

19:87.t: Shibaliba nende obunyali bwokhusabila abandi eshileshelo tawe, halali balia bakhola indakano ewa Omunji wetsimbabaasi.

19:88.t: Ne baboola mbu: “Omunji wetsimbabaasi yekholela Omwana.”

19:90.t: Likulu lili hambi muno okhwatikha, ne liloba okhwarukha, ne tsingulu okhukwa ebitonyetonye.

19:91.t: Khulwa bachikha mbu Omunji wetsimbabaasi yekholela Omwana.

19:92.t: Ne shikakhoyeshela Omunji Wetsimbabaasi okhwikholela Omwana tawe.

19:93.t: Abulaho yesiyesi khubali mwikulu nende mushialo halali alitsila Omunji wetsimbabaasi nali Omusumba.

19:94.t: Ne toto yamala okhubamanya, ne yababala obulayi muno.

19:95.t: Ne buli shiamulala alimwitsila Ye (Nyasaye) inyanga yeyindukho yenyene.

19:96.t: Netoto balia basuubila mana nibakhola amalayi Omunji wetsimbabaasi alibakholela obuyanzi.

19:97.t: Ne toto khwakhuanguyilia (Ikurani) khulusungo lulwo kho obiile akomwikhoyo khuyo balia abaria Nyasaye, ne wikanyilisie khuyo Abandu bayingananga muno.

19:98.t: Ne emikanda chinga echia khwasishia imbeli wabu? Ololangakhwo mulala khubo nohomba obawulilangakho nibemonyelesia?

20:2.t: Shikhwakhwishilia Ikurani mbu khonyoole obutinyu tawe.

20:3.t: Halali ibe ametsulisio khu ulia wihotselesinjia.

20:4.t: Naameshio karulanga khu ulia owalonga liloba nende amakulu kali hekulu muno.

20:5.t: Omunji wetsimbabaasi, yachingukha ekulu weshisala shia obwami.

20:6.t: Nebibie ebili mwikulu nende mushialo, nende bili hakari wabio nende ebili hasi weliloba.

20:7.t: Ne kata nolomaloma likhuwa khumwoyo kwa ekulu (nohomba kwa asi), toto ye yamanya akefisa nende kata akali mubwifise muno.

20:8.t: Nyasaye, abulaho nyasaye wundi halali Ye tawe, ne ali nende ameera amalayi muno.

20:9.t: Ne koo, lwakhuulila olukano lwa Musa?

20:10.t: Olwa yalola omulilo, mana naboolela Abandu bebe mbu: “Linde mbeli, esie toto endutsi omulilo. Ndakhaba endio ndabarerera eshichenga shiomulilo oko, nohomba enyala okhunyoola khumulilo oko obulunjifu.”

20:12.t: Toto esie nesie Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, kho rusia ebilaro bibio. Toto ewe oli mulitwoma lioluyali elia Tuwa.

20:13.t: Ne esie ekhwaule, kho wulila akofimbulilungwa.

20:14.t: Toto esie nesie Nyasaye, abulaho nyasaye wundi owulali esie tawe, kho laama esie, ne olumilile okhuswaliya khulwokhunzitsulila.

20:15.t: Toto Indukho itsia okhuula, ndenya okhuyifisa katong’ane, kho buli omundu arungwe khukalia akayakholanga.

20:16.t: Kho, toto balakhwikalila okhuisuubila balia abalaisuubilanga tawe, abaloondanga butswa obwikombi bwa emioyo chiabu abeene; wakhetsa wasikha.

20:17.t: Ne nishina esho shili mumukhono kukwo omulunji ewe Musa?”

20:18.t: Naboola Mbu: “Ino ni indabushi yanje yandisililangakhwo, ne eyikwisilinjia amasafu ke ebiayo bianje, ne khandi echikhonyelanga khumilimo chindi.”

20:19.t: Nyasaye naboola mbu: “Isukune hasi ewe Musa.”

20:20.t: Mana nachisukuna, lola, niikalukhana inzukha imoolanga tsimbilo.

20:21.t: Nyasaye naboola mbu; “Ibukule, ne olaria tawe, khulayikalusia shingala ibeele anyuma awo.

20:22.t: Ne ra omukhono kukwo mukwaya, kularula nikuli omulafu tswe, kubula obubii bwosibwosi. Shino ni eshimanyisio shindi.

20:24.t: Tsia khu Firaun, toto ye yabura eshichelo.”

20:25.t: Naboola mbu: “Ewe Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, mbangulila eshilifu shianje.

20:26.t: Ne khola amakhuwa kanje kabe amaangu.

20:29.t: Ne umberesie omukhoonyi okhurula mubandu banje.

20:32.t: Ne mure halala ninasi khumilimo chianje chino.

20:36.t: (Nyasaye) Naboola mbu: “Toto ofuchililwe amasayo koko ewe Musa.

20:37.t: Ne toto khwamalakho okhukhukholela obulayi olundi.

20:38.t: Olwa khwafimbulila mama wuwo kalia akakhwamufimbulila.

20:39.t: Mbu mure mwisanduku mana olire mumwalo, mana omwalo oko kulamusukuna khulukuku anyoole okhubukulwa nende omusuku wanje khandi omusuku wuwe, ne ndakhurakhwo obuyanzi okhurula khwisie, ne mbu olelwe mutsimoni tsianje.

20:40.t: Olwa omukhana wenyu yachendanga naboola mbu: 'Koo, ebechesiekhwo Omundu unyala okhumulela?' Mana nikhukhukalusia khu mama wuwo kho tsimoni tsisie tsisangale, ne kho alabeelela tawe. Ne wera Omundu mana nikhukhuhabina okhurula mushibeela eshikhongo esho, mana nikhukhutema amatemo amanji. Mana niwikhala emika eminji halala nende Abandu ba Madyan, mana khandi witsile shingala walachilwa ewe Musa.

20:42.t: Tsia ewe nende omusiani wenyu halala nende ebifune bianje, ne mulachonya okhunzitsulila tawe.

20:43.t: Tsie khu Firauni, toto ye yabura eshichelo.

20:44.t: Mumuboolele amakhuwa amaangu, yakhaaba ario yetsulila (amachelo) nohomba yaria Nyasaye."

20:45.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Ewe Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, efwe toto khuritsanga mbu anyala okhukhuleka efwe nohomba okhuburirila eshichero.”

20:46.t: (Nyasaye) Naboola mbu; “Mularia tawe. Toto esie endi halala ninanyu. Ewulilanga, ne endolanga.

20:47.t: Tsie mana mumuboolele mbu: 'Toto efwe khuli Abarumwa ba Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi. Kho balekhule Abaana ba Israili barule halala ninafu ne olabara mushinyaasio tawe. Toto khukhwitsile nende ebimanyisio birula khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi. Ne omulembe kulaba khubalia baloondanga obulunjifu.

20:48.t: Toto efwe khurererwe obufimbuli mbu eshinyasio shilanyoola balia abayingananga mana bafutare omukongo.'”

20:49.t: (Firauni) Naboola mbu: “Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi ni wina, ewe Musa?”

20:50.t: Naboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi ni ulia wahelesia buli eshindu imero yashio mana nashilunjisia.”

20:51.t: Naboola mbu: “Ne babura khale balia baliba barie?”

20:52.t: Naboola mbu: “Obumanyi bwako buli khu Nyasaye wanje Omulesi mushitabu. Nyasaye wanje Omulesi shakoranga nohomba shiyebililanga tawe.

20:53.t: Ulia wabakholela liloba okhuba obulili, ne nabarereramwo tsinjila, mana niyeshia amatsi okhurula mwikulu, ni khu ako nikhumesiliakhwo emimela chiaukhaane."

20:54.t: Lie, ne mulisie ebiayo bienyu. Toto mukano bilimwo ebimanyisio khubandu bamachesi.

20:55.t: Okhurula khulio (liloba) khwabaloonga, ne khulibakalusia mulio, ne mulio khulibarusia khandi (mube abalamu).

20:56.t: Ne toto khwamwechesia ebimanyisio biefu bioosi, halali yayingana nakhaya.

20:57.t: Naboola mbu: “Witsile okhukhurusia efwe khushialo shiefu khubulosi bubwo, ewe Musa?

20:58.t: Mana efwe khwitsa okhukhurerera obulosi shinga obo. Kho, raho hakari wefu ninawe ebise biokhubukanana, ebia khulafunaka efwe nohomba ewe tawe. Abe habundu halayi muno.”

20:59.t: (Musa) Naboola mbu: “Ebise bienyu ni inyanga yoburone. Ne Abandu bakhung’asibwe itsuli.”

20:60.t: Mana Firauni nakalukha inyuma, mana nakhung’asia ebifwanga biayee, mana niyetsa.

20:61.t: Musa nababoolela mbu: “Abaane enywee! Mulachishila Nyasaye obubeyi tawe, yakhetsa yabamala nende eshinyasio. Ne toto yamala okhubiyilwa ulia uchikhanga.”

20:62.t: Kho mana nibasolana abeene khubeene khulwa likhuwa liabu elo, mana nibasanjilana mubwifisi.

20:63.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Toto Abandu bano ni abalosi babili, benyanga okhubarusia mushialo shienyu khubulosi bwabu, ne bainieho injila yenyu yobulamu indayi po.

20:64.t: Kho lano khung’asie halala ebifwanga bienyu bioosi, mana mwitse nimuli khulunyaali. Ne toto Inyanga yino ulashila niye witsa okhuba hekulu."

20:65.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Ewe Musa, ewe newe ularanjilila okhusukuna nohomba efwe khuranjilile?”

20:66.t: Naboola mbu: “Enywe ranjilile okhusukuna.” Lola! Emikoye chiabu nende tsindabushi tsiabu nitsimuloloshela khulwa obulosi bwabu mbu tsimoolanga tsimbilo.

20:67.t: Mana Musa niyenjilwamwo oburi mumwoyo kukwe.

20:68.t: Nikhuboola mbu: “Olaria tawe. Toto ewe newe witsa okhushila.

20:69.t: Kho sukuna shili mumukhono kukwo omusatsa, shitsa okhumila biabakasiyie ebo. Toto bakasiye butswa ebifwanga biobulosi, ne Omulosi shashirangakhwo wosiwosi watsila tawe.”

20:70.t: Mana abalosi abo boosi nibakwa hasi nibasujuda. Nibaboola mbu: “Khusuubile Nyasaye wa Haruni nende Musa.”

20:71.t: (Firauni) Naboola mbu: “Ehh! Mumusuubile neeshili okhubasubula. Toto ye (Musa) niye omukhongo wenyu owabechesia obulosi. Kholano toto nditsa okhubateta emikhono chienyu nende amakulu kenyu buchikha, ne toto nditsa okhubabaamba khumisala chietsitende, ne toto mulamanya mbu niwina mwifwe omululu muno weshinyasio, khandi wookhushitsililisia muno."

20:72.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Shikhulakhwaula ewe okhushila ebimanyisio bili habulafu bikhwitsile tawe, khandi okhushila ulia wakhuloonga. Kho, khalaka eshiina shiosishiosi shionyala okhukhalaka. Ewe onyala okhukhalaka eshina shilondokhana nende obulamu bwokhushialo khuno butswa.

20:73.t: Toto efwe khusuubile Nyasaye wefu Omulesi; kho akhuleshele ebionono biefu nende akokhunichilisiye kano akobulosi. Ne Nyasaye nomulayi, khandi niwokhubaho tsinyanga tsioosi.”

20:74.t: Toto ulia ulitsa khu Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, nali mbu niwamabii, toto alinyoola omulilo kwa Jahanamu, shalifwamwo tawe ne shalimenyamwo (obulamu obulayi) tawe.

20:75.t: Ne ulia ulimwitsila nali omusubili owakhola ebikhole ebilayi, abo nibo balinyoola ebisaala bia hekulu.

20:76.t: Emikunda chilaliwa tawe, chiburangamwo emialo, balimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi. Ne oko niko omurungo kwa buli ulia wetswenula.

20:77.t: Ne toto khwafimbulila Musa mbu: “Orule nende Abasumba banje, ne obakholele Injila yokhulukongo inyumu munyanza. Olaria okhunyoolwa nohomba olaria shiosishiosi tawe.”

20:78.t: Firauni nabalondakhwo halala nende omukanda kukwe kwabalwani, mana nikabanyoola munyanza omo akabanyoola.

20:79.t: Mana Firaun nakosia Abandu baye, ne shiyabalunjisia tawe.

20:80.t: "Enywe Abana ba Israil, toto efwe khwabahabina okhurulana nende abasuku benyu, mana nikhubalaka mbu mwitse ebuleka womukhono musatsa weshikulu shia Tur, mana nikhubeshilia Manna nende Salwa.

20:81.t: Lie mubilayi bilia ebiakhubakabile, ne mularuuma olwakho khu ako tawe, liruma lianje liakhetsa liabatila. Ne ulia weliruma lianje linyoola alaba amalile okhusikha.

20:82.t: Ne toto esie endi wokhuleshela muno khu ulia owusaba eshileshelo, nasuubila, nakhola amalayi mana natila obulunjifu.

20:83.t: Ne nishina shiakhuyungubasia nolekha Abandu bobo ewe Musa?"

20:84.t: Naboola mbu: ”Bali inyuma wanje banondangakhwo. Ne ekholele lwangu okhukhwitsila Nyasaye wanje Omulesi kho onyoole okhumba obuchami (bwo)."

20:85.t: (Nyasaye) Naboola mbu: “Toto Khuhelesiye Abandu bao amatemo ewe niwakharula, ne Omusamaria abakosiyie.”

20:86.t: Mana Musa nakalukha khubandu bebe nasinyishe nabeelele muno. Naboola mbu: “Enywe abandu banje, Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi shiyabalakakhwo indache indayi? Koo, ebise ebo bimurambiyile ebia indache eyo nohomba mwenyele mbu liruma okhurula khu Nyasaye wenyu omulesi libeshele, khulwendio mufunache indache yanje?”

20:87.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Efwe shikhufunache indache yiyio khukhwenya khwefu tawe, halali efwe khwatukhwa emisiko chiebirone biabandu mana nikhuchisukuna (mumulilo, nichisalulukha nichikasia eshifwanani shia Nyasaye). Ne endiosa nilwa Omusamaria yasukuna yesi.”

20:88.t: Mana nabakasiliamwo eshimosi shilikho eshikhuli shirusinjia oluyoka. Mana nibaboola mbu; “Uno niye nyasaye wenyu khandi niye nyasaye wa Musa, halali (Musa) yebilila.”

20:89.t: Koo, shibalolakhwo mbu (eshimosi esho) sishibakalusinjia likhuwa tawe, nohomba sishiakhabakhola libii liosiliosi tawe nohomba okhubakhoonya?

20:90.t: Ne Haruni yababoolela khale awo mbu; “Enywe Abandu banje, toto enywe mutemelwe sa nende kano. Ne toto Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi ni ulia owetsimbabaasi tsinyinji muno. Kho munoonde, ne muwulile amakhuwa kanje.”

20:91.t: Nibaboola mbu; “Shikhulalekha okhushilaama tawe okhula shingala Musa alachelela.”

20:92.t: (Olwa Musa yachelela) Yaboola mbu: “Ewe Haruni, nishina shikhukayile shingala obalutsi nibakorere?

20:94.t: (Haruni) Naboola mbu: “Ewe Omwana wa mama wanje, olakhwesa tsindefu nohomba omurwe kwanje tawe. Toto esie ndaria mbu oletsa waboola mbu okabule Abana ba Israil, ne showulile likhuwa lianje tawe.”

20:95.t: (Musa) Naboola mbu: “Ewe Omusamaria, obele orie okhukhola kano?”

20:96.t: Naboola mbu: “Endutsi kabalalolanga tawe, mana nendila ebuleka inditi wa amalaro akomurumwa ulia yasena. Mana nesukuna. Ne endio nilwa omwoyo kwanje kwambila.”

20:97.t: (Musa) naboola mbu; “Mana rula tsia! Ne toto kalaba khwiwe mubulamu bwao bwokhushialo okhuboola mbu: 'Olandilakhwo tawe.' Ne toto oli nende indakano yolalifunachilwa tawe. Ne khahengakhwo Nyasaye wuwo owotsililile okhumulaama. Toto khwitsa okhumusamba mana khumutumulile munyanza akoreremwo."

20:98.t: Toto Nyasaye wenyu ni Allah (Nyasaye), ulia uli mbu abulaho ulaamungwa khubwatoto halali Ye tawe. Yaswania buli eshindu obumanyi.

20:99.t: Ne endio nilwakhukhukanilanga khumakhuwa kali imbeli wuwo. Ne toto khwakhuhelesia ametsulilo okhurula khwifwe.

20:100.t: Balia betsa okhuba ehale ninako, toto abo balichinga inyanga yeyindukho emisiko.

20:101.t: Balimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi, ne ni obubii buli burie khumundu inyanga yeyindukho okhuchinga emisiko echo.

20:102.t: Inyanga yabilifurwa mulwika, ne khulikhung’asia aboononi inyanga eyo, tsimoni tsiabu nitsili bulu (khulwa oburii).

20:103.t: Balimonyaniamwo abeene khubeene, ne baliboola mbu: “Shimwekhala khushialo halali tsinyanga ekhumi butswa.”

20:104.t: Efwe khumanyile muno akabaliboola, olwa abalayi muno mubo khunjila baliboola mbu: “Enywe shimwekhalamwo halali inyanga ndala yonyene.”

20:105.t: Ne bakhurebanga amakhuwa ketsingulu, boola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi alitsisia masia.

20:108.t: Inyanga eyo balilonda khumulanji owa yesiyesi shalinyala okhumukorakhwo tawe, ne emioyo chiliihotselesilia Omunji wetsimbabaasi, ne sholiwulila halali tsimbindo tsiebilenje nende okhwimonyelesia.

20:109.t: Inyanga eyo khulibulaho okhusabilwa khwosikhwosi halali khu ulia wachamilwa nende Omunji wetsimbabaasi, mana afuchilile likhuwa lilie.

20:110.t: Yamanya akali imbeli nende akali inyuma wabu. Nabo shibanyala okhumumanya obulayi muno tawe.

20:111.t: Ne obweni bulitutuyila Omulamu Ulafwitsanga tawe. Ne toto baliba nibabiyilwe boosi balia bachinga obubii.

20:112.t: Ne ulia ukhola amalayi niyasuubila, shaliria okhukholelwa obubii nohomba okhwimwa eshishie tawe.

20:113.t: Ne endio nilwakhweshia Ikurani mulwarabu, ne nikhwinoosiamwo amekanyilisio ketsimbia tsioosi khobanyoole okhuria nende okhwilinda, ne ibarerere ametsulisio.

20:114.t: Ne toto Nyasaye niwoluyali, owahekulu, Omwami watoto. Ne olayuyukhanila (okhusoma) Ikurani obufimbuli bwayio nibushili okhuwa tawe. Ne boola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi meeta obumanyi.”

20:115.t: Ne toto khwalaka Adam khale indache, mana niyebilila, ne shikhwalola khuye lichomo likhongo tawe.

20:116.t: Ne olwa khwaboolela Abamalaika mbu: “Rerere Adam obweni hasi.” Boosi nibara obweni hasi halali Ibilisi, yaloba.

20:117.t: Ne nikhuboola mbu: “Ewe Adam, toto uno ni omusuku wuwo nende womukhasi wuwo, kho alabayinia mumukunda kwomwikulu tawe; mwaba khubutinyu.

20:118.t: Toto ewe sholawulilamwo inzala tawe nohomba okhuba eshiekenyi tawe.

20:119.t: Ne toto ewe sholiwulilamwo obulo nohomba oluuya tawe."

20:120.t: Mana Shetani namubeyiabeyiamwo, namuboolela mbu: “Ewe Adam, ekhumanyiekhwo omusala kwokhumenya tsinyanga tsioosi nende obwami bulawa tawe?”

20:121.t: Mana nibalia khumusaala oko, mana eshiekenyi shiabu nishibaloleshela. Nibachaka okhwifimba amasafu komumukunda kwomwikulu oko. Mana Adam nakosela Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, nakora injila.

20:122.t: Mana Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi namwawula, namuhelesia eshileshelo, ne namulunjisia.

20:123.t: Naboola mbu: “Yishe okhurulamwo mwesi nimuli abasuku abeene khubeene. Ne obulunjifu okhurula khwisie nibuboolela, ulia ulalonda obulunjifu bwanje obo shalikora nohomba shalisanda tawe.

20:124.t: Ne ulia ura emukongo obwitsulisio bwanje, alaba nende eshimenyo shiobusandi, ne inyanga yeyindukho alikhung’asibwa nali omuwofu.

20:125.t: Aliboola mbu: 'Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, khulwashina niwukhung’asia nendi omuwofu, ne ndali nendolanga obulayi muno?'”

20:126.t: Alimuboolela mbu: “Endio nilwa biakhwitsila ebimanyisio biefu nawe nobibilila, kho kata wesi inyanga yino wibililwe.”

20:127.t: Ne endio nilwa khurunganga ulia waburirisia eshichelo, ne nalasuubila ebimanyisio bia Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi tawe, ne eshinyasio shiomwikulu neshilulu muno khandi eshiokhutong’a muno.
