33:57.t: Toto balia basinyisinjia Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, Nyasaye abatsuba khushialo nende mwikulu, ne yabarecheshela eshinyasio (shietsisoni) shokhututuyia.

33:58.t: Ne balia basinyisinjia Abasuubili Abasatsa nende Abasuubili Abakhasi khukabalakholele tawe, toto bamala okhuchinga obuchishi obukhongo nende tsimbii tsilolekha.

33:59.t: Ewe Omurumwa, boolela Abakhasi bao, nende Abakhana bao, nende Abakhasi babasuubili, beishiliekhwo obulayi tsingubo tsiabu, okhukhola endio khulachila bamanyishe, kho balasinyisibwa tawe, ne Nyasaye ni Omulesheli muno, Owetsimbabaasi po.

33:60.t: Ne Abeshikhabili nende balia bali nende obulwale mumioyo chiabu, nende balia abasalasinjia obubii mulukongo, nibalalekha tawe, toto khwitsa okhubasasiakhwo ewe, ne shibetsa okhwikhala omo ahambi ninawe tawe halali khubise bititi butswa.

33:61.t: Bali nende eshilamo. Wosiwosi wabalolekhana, batilwe mana berwe okhwirwa khwatoto.

33:62.t: Eyo niimero ya Nyasaye khubalia baraanjilila. Ne sholinyoolela imero ya Nyasaye obukalukhani tawe.

33:63.t: Abandu bakhurebanga okhulondokhana nende indukho, boola mbu: “Obumanyi bwayo buli khu Nyasaye butswa, ne nishina shitsa okhukhumanyisia mbu khawundi indukho ili ahambi?”

33:64.t: Toto Nyasaye yara eshilamo khubakhayi, ne yabarecheshela omulilo kusambanga muno.

33:65.t: Balimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi, ne shibalinyoola omuhelwa nohomba omukhonyi tawe.

33:66.t: Inyanga yobweni bwabu bulikalukhanibwa mumulilo, baliboola mbu: “Abaane, khumanyangakhwo khwawulila Nyasaye, mana khwawulila Omurumwa.”

33:67.t: Ne baliboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, toto efwe khwaulila Abaami befu nende Abakhongo befu, mana nibakhukosia Injila.

33:68.t: Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, bahelesie eshinyasio eshikhabili, ne obaheresye eshilamo eshikhongo.”

33:69.t: Enywe Abasuubila, mulaba shinga balia abasinyisia Musa, mana Nyasaye namutswenula ehale nende kababoola, naye yali weshiribwa imbeli wa Nyasaye.

33:70.t: Enywe balia basuubila, rie Nyasaye, ne boole amakhuwa katoto.

33:71.t: Alabakasilia ebikhole bienyu ne alabaleshela ebionoono bienyu. Ne ulia uwulila Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, toto alaba naburire okhubura okhukhongo.

33:72.t: Toto efwe khwalolesia amalako kefu khu likulu nende eshialo nende efikulu, mana nibikhaya okhukachinga mana nibikaria, mana Omundu nakachinga. Toto ye ni omwonooni omukhongo, omusilu muno.

33:73.t: Kho Nyasaye anyoole okhuhelesia eshinyasio abeshikhabili Abasatsa nende abeshikhabili Abakhasi, nende abatsokaasi beshisatsa nende abatsokaasi beshikhasi, ne aleshele abasubili abasatsa nende abasubili abakhasi. Ne toto Nyasaye ni Omulesheli muno, Owetsimbabaasi po.

34:1.t: Okhwitsomibwa khwoosi ni khwa Nyasaye, ulia owebili mwikulu nende mushialo ne bibie, ne mwikulu okhwitsomibwa nokhukhwe, naye ni Owamachesi, Omumanyi muno.

34:2.t: Amanyile kenjilanga mushialo nende karulangamwo, nende kekhanga okhurula mwikulu nende kaninangamwo, naye ni Owetsimbabaasi muno, Omulesheli po.

34:3.t: Ne abakhayi baboola mbu: “Indukho eyo shilikhwitsila tawe.” Boola mbu: “Shineendio tawe? Nditsuba khu Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, toto ilibetsela, Omumanyi wakefisile, sishifisanga khuye tawe kata eshili nende obusiro shinga bweyindukusi, mwikulu nohomba khushialo, nohomba eshititi okhushila esho, nohomba eshikhongo muno, halali bioosi ebo bili mushitabu shinoosinjia.”

34:4.t: Kho arunje balia abasuubila mana nibakhola ebikhole ebilayi. Abo balinyoola obulesheli nende omukabo kwoluyali.

34:5.t: Ne balia bakhalabana okhuyingasia ebimanyisio biefu, nibalola mbu betsa okhukhushila, abo balinyoola eshinyasio eshibii shiobululu.

34:6.t: Ne balia bahebwa obumanyi, bamanya mbu kalia keshibwa khwiwe okhurula khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi ni katoto, nako kalunjisinjia khunjila ya Owamaani, witsomibungwa muno.

34:7.t: Ne balia abakhaya baboola mbu: “Koo, khubechesiekhwo Omusatsa ubaboolelanga mbu olwa muliba nimurandulwe (nimubolele) ebitonye ebitonye mbu mulikalusibwa mwaba ebiloonje ebiyiakha?

34:8.t: Koo, yachiishila Nyasaye obubeyi nohomba ali nende lilalu? Halali balia abalasubila mwikulu tawe bali mushinyasio nende obukori bwa ehale muno.

34:9.t: Koo, shibalolangakhwo akali imbeli wabu nende akali inyuma wabu aka ekulu nende eshialo? Khwenyanga, khwakhalomesiye liloba liabamila nohomba khwakhabakwisiyiekhwo ebitonye bia likulu. Toto mu ako bilimwo ebimanyisio khubuli Omusumba, Owekanila (yasaba eshileshelo).

34:10.t: Ne toto khwahelesia Dawud emikabo okhurula khwifwe: “Enywe tsingulu, kalusie omwoyo halala ninaye, nende enywe amayoni, mwesi.” Ne nikhumutoratosilia eshichuma.

34:11.t: Nikhumuboolela mbu: “Kasia (tsingubo tsiebichuma) tsibambalifu, ne olunjisie obulayi khukhuliimasia. Ne mukhole ebikhole ebilayi. Toto esie endolanga obulai muno akamukholanga.”

34:12.t: Ne Suleiman khwamukholela omuyeka (kwatsitsanga) oluchendo lwakwo lweyitsuli (luyela oluchendo) lwomwesi mulala, nende oluchendo lwakwo lweyingolobe luyela oluchendo lwo mwesi mulala, mana nikhumusalulila ishaba. Ne mumajini (khwalimwo) nende kalia kakholanga emilimo imbeli wuwe khubuchami bwa Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, ne buli wira ebuleka khumalomesio kefu mubo, khumutisia eshinyasio shiomulilo kwakhanga.

34:13.t: Bamukholelanga eliayenya, shinga olukoba lweliye, nende ebifwanani, nende masinia amakhongokhongo, nende emifuria emikhongo chilarusibungwa habundu wachio tawe, (nikhubaboolela mbu): “Enywe Abandu ba Daudi, khole ebikhole ebilayi khulwa okhupa orio (khutsimbabaasi tsiamwahebwa). Ne ni batiti mubasumba banje bakhupanga orio.

34:14.t: Ne olwa khwamubusilia okhufwa (olwa yafwa), abulaho wabechesia lifwa lilie halali isolo yomwiloba, eyalia indabushi yiyie. Kho shingala yakwa, Amajini nikamanya nikaboola mbu kabetsanga nikamanya amakhuwa kefisile, shikakhamenyele mushinyasio shiokhututuyibwa esho tawe.

34:15.t: Toto mushimenyo shia (Abandu beshialo sha) Sabai shialimwo eshimanyisio. Emikunda chibili, omukhono omulunji nende omukaata. “Lie khumukabo kwa Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi, ne khupe orio. Eshialo eshilayi, ne Nyasaye Omulesi Omulesheli muno.”

34:16.t: Halali bo nibaloba, mana nikhubarerera amatsi amanji (nikabiyia tsindalo tsiabu), ne nikhubakalukhanilia habundu wemikunda chiabu echo emikunda chindi chibili echia ebiamo ebilulu bia obukhwakhwa, nende emisala mititi chia mikunasi.

34:17.t: Khwabarunga kano shichila obuyingani bwabu, nafu shikhuhelesinjia eshinyasio tawe halali khu ulia ukhaya.

34:18.t: Ne hakari wabu nende tsingongo tsilia etsia khwahelesia tsikhabi, khwaraho tsingongo tsilolekhana, mana nikhuramwo ebihulushilo bioluchendo. “Chendemwo eshilo neshitere nomulembe.”

34:19.t: Halali nibaboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, raho oluchendo olurambi hakari wetsinjendo tsiefu”, mana nibakholela emioyo chiabu obubii. Kho nikhubakhola tsingano, nikhubasalaasia emikanda chikabukhane. Toto mu kano kalimwo ameeko khubalia abefwilanga, abakhupanga orio muno.

34:20.t: Ne toto Ibilisi nakhola amaparo keke khubo okhuba katoto, kho nibamuloondakhwo, halali omukanda kwa Abasuubili.

34:21.t: Naye shiyali nende obunyali bwosibwosi khubo tawe, halali kho khumanye mbu ni wina usuubila mwikulu ne ni wina uba nende eshibeyibeyi. Ne Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi niye wokhulinda obulai buli eshindu.

34:22.t: Boola mbu: “Lanje balia abamuboolanga mbu ni abanyasaye balali Nyasaye tawe. Babula shiosishiosi kata shiobusiro shinga indukusi mwikulu nohomba khushialo, ne babulamwo obusaanji (mwikulu nende mushialo), naye abula omukhoonyi mubo.

34:23.t: Ne okhusabila khwosikhwosi shikhulikhoonya tawe imbeli wuwe halali khu ulia ulichamilwa, okhula shinga lwoburi bulirusibwa mumioyo chiabu baliboola mbu: “Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi aboolele mbu shina?” Nabo baliboola mbu: “Obwatoto, naye niye Owa hekulu, Omukhongo.”

34:24.t: Boola mbu: “Ni wina ubahetsanga emikabo okhurula mwikulu nende khushialo?” Boola mbu: “Nyasaye.” Ne (baboolele): “Toto efwe nohomba enywe khuli khubulunjifu nohomba khubukori obuli habulafu.”

34:25.t: Boola mbu: “Shimulirebwa ebionoono bia efwe khwakhola tawe, nohomba efwe shikhulirebwa aka enywe mukholanga tawe.”

34:26.t: Boola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi alikhukhung’asia, mana alikhukhalachila eshina hakari wefu khubwatoto, naye niye Owukhalakanga eshina obulai muno, Omumanyi muno.”

34:27.t: Boola mbu: “Muumanyiekhwo balia bamutsokasinjia naye okhuba abasaanji (bebe).” Shikanyalikhana tawe, halali Ye niye Nyasaye yenyene, owa Amaani, Owamachesi muno.

34:28.t: Ne sikhwakhuruma halali khubandu boosi, obaboolere amakhuwa koomwikhoyo, Omwikanyilisi, halali Abandu abanji shibamanyile tawe.

34:29.t: Ne baboolanga mbu: “Iliba lina indache yino, nimuli ababoolanga obulaamba?”

34:30.t: Boola mbu: “Muli nende ebise bialakwa, inyanga eya mulalisita imbeli wayio kata isaa ndala nohomba shimuliyiranjilila tawe.”

34:31.t: Ne balia abakhaya nibaboola mbu: “Shikhulasuubila Ikurani ino tawe, nohomba ebitabu bilia bieshibwa imbeli wayio.” Ne nolilolakhwo shinga aboononi olwa baliemibwa imbeli wa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, olwa balikalusania amakhuwa abeene khubeene. Abateshele baliboolela balia belola abakhongo mbu: “Mukhayanga okhuba enywe, toto efwe khwakhabeele Abasuubili.”

34:32.t: Abelola okhuba abakhongo baliboolela abateshele balia mbu: “Koo, nefwe khwabekalila obulunjifu nibumalile okhuboolela? Tawe, enywe abeene nenywe mwali aboononi.”

34:33.t: Abateshele balia nibaboolela balia abelola abakhongo mbu: “Halali mwakholanga ebifwanga eshitere nende eshilo, olwa mwakhulomesinjia okhukhaya Nyasaye nende okhumukholela Abasanji.” Nabo balichisa okhwiyitsulisia olwa balilola eshinyasio, ne khulira eminyororo mumakosi kabalia bakhaya. Shibarungungwa akandi tawe halali kabo bakholanga.

34:34.t: Ne shikhwarumakho Omwikanyilisi mulukongo lwosilwosi, halali abeene lwo abalikho nashio baboola mbu: “Toto efwe khukhaya akamwarumwa ninako ako.”

34:35.t: Ne nibaboola mbu: “Efwe khuli nende omwandu omunji nende abana, ne efwe shikhulihebwa eshinyasio tawe.”

34:36.t: Boola mbu: “Toto Nyasaye wanje Omulesi yekulilanga omukabo owayenya, ne atutuyilinjia (owa yenya), halali Abandu abanji shibamanyile tawe.”

34:37.t: Ne shini omwandu kwenyu nohomba abana benyu ebitsa okhubara ahambi ninafu khuyingasi tawe, halali ulia wasuubila mana nakhola amalayi. Kho abo balinyoola omurungo kumeeteshe khukalia akabakholanga, ne baliba nomulembe mubikoro biomwikulu.

34:38.t: Ne balia bakhalabananga okhuyingasia tsinyaali tsiefu nibalola mbu balakhushila, abo balirerwa mushinyasio.

34:39.t: Boola mbu: “Toto Nyasaye wanje Omulesi abambulilanga omukabo owayenya mubasumba bebe, ne atutuyilinjia (owayenya). Ne shiosishiosi shiamuhana, ye alashikalusiaho, naye niye Omukabi Omulayi muno okhushila abakabi boosi.”

34:40.t: Ne (betsulile) Inyanga yaalibakhung’asia boosi, mana aboolele Abamalaika mbu: “Koo, bano babalaamanga?”

34:41.t: Baliboola mbu: “Oli ehale nende obulemefu bwosibwosi, newe omuhelwa wefu, shini abo tawe, halali bo balaamanga Amajini, ne abaanji mubo bakasuubilanga.”

34:42.t: Kho nyanga yino abulaho ulanyala okhukhoonya owashie khubulayi nohomba khububii. Ne khuliboolela balia bakhola obubii mbu: “Pile eshinyasio shiomulilo, shilia eshiamwayingananga.”

34:43.t: Ne nikhubasomela tsinyaali tsiefu etsia habulafu, nibaboola mbu: “Uno shini shiosishiosi tawe halali omusatsa wenya okhubasitia ehale nende aka bapapa benyu balaamanga.” Ne baboola mbu: “Kano shini shiosishiosi tawe halali obubeyi obwachikhwa.” Ne baboola balia bakhaya olwa obwatoto bwabetsela mbu: “Buno shineshindu tawe halali obulosi obwa habulafu.”

34:44.t: Ne shikhwabahelesia ebitabu biabasomanga tawe, nohomba shikhwabarererakhwo omwikanyilisi yesiyesi imbeli wuwo tawe.

34:45.t: Ne balia bali imbeli wabu bayingasia. Ne bashili okhula ebuleka ndala wa ekhumi, ewa khwahelesia abo, bayingasia Abarumwa banje. Kho eshinyasio shianje shiali shirie?

34:46.t: Boola mbu: “Toto esie ebachelelanga likhuwa elala butswa, mbu mweme shichila Nyasaye, babili babili, nende shiamulala shiamulala, mana mupare obulai." Owashienywe uno abula lilalu. Ye ni omwikanyilisi sa wenyu, eshinyasio eshilulu nishishiili okhuula.

34:47.t: Boola mbu: “Omurungo kwebasaba oko ni okwenyu enywe. Omurungo kwanje kuli sa khu Nyasaye butswa, naye ni omuloli wabuli eshindu.”

34:48.t: Boola mbu: “Toto Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, arusinjia obukori khubwatoto, naye ni Omumanyi muno wa akefisile.”

34:49.t: Boola mbu: “Obwatoto bwitsile, ne obubeyi shibularera amacheni tawe ne shibulakalusia (amaani kabwo) tawe.”

34:50.t: Boola mbu: “Nikali mbu engorere, toto esie engora sa khulwanje omwene. Ne nelunjikha, nishichila ka Nyasaye wanje yafimbulilanga. Toto ye ni Omuwulili muno, owuli ahambi.”

34:51.t: Ne ololangakhwo shingala baliba nibabeyabeya, halali balibula amelushilo tawe, ne balitililwa abundu ahambi.

34:52.t: Ne baliboola mbu: “Khumusuubile (Nyasaye)”, halali bakhanyala barie okhubunyoola (obwisilamu eyo) habundu ehale eyo?

34:53.t: Ne bamala okhumukhaya (Nyasaye) khale. Ne basukuna ehale amakhuwa kalalolekha tawe okhurula habundu ahale (khu Nyasaye).

34:54.t: Ne baliikalilwa hakari wabu nende kalia akabekomba, shingala abaashiabwe bekalilwa khale. Toto abo balitsingi nende inganakani yokhurera eshibeyibeyi.

35:1.t: Okhwitsomibwa khwoosi ni khwa Nyasaye owaloonga likulu nende eshialo, owakhola Abamalaika Abarumwa betsimbaya tsibili tsibili, nende tsitaru tsitaru nende tsine tsine. Ametanga khukhuloonga shinga yenya. Toto Nyasaye ni Omunyali muno wabuli eshindu.

35:2.t: Tsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye yekulila Abandu, abulaho unyala okhutsiikalila. Ne etsia yekalila, abulaho unyala okhutsirera nalali Ye tawe. Naye niwamaani, Owamachesi muno.

35:3.t: Enywe Abandu, yitsulile tsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye khwinywe. Koo, aliho omuloonji wundi owulali Nyasaye owubahelesinjia omukabo okhurula mwikulu nende mwiloba? Abulaho nyasaye wundi owulali Ye tawe, kho mukalukhanibungwa hena?

35:4.t: Ne nibakhuyingasia, bamala okhuyingasibwa Abarumwa balia abaali imbeli wuwo, ne amakhuwa koosi kalikalusibwa khu Nyasaye.

35:5.t: Enywe Abandu, toto indache ya Nyasaye niya habwene, kho obulamu bwokhushialo bulabakatia tawe, ne alabakatia omubeyi omukhongo ulia mwalekha Nyasaye tawe.

35:6.t: Toto Shetani ni omusuku wenyu, kho mumukhole omusuku. Toto ye alanganga omukanda kukwe okhuba Mubandu bomumulilo.

35:7.t: Balia bakhaya baliba nende eshinyasio eshilulu. Ne balia basuubila mana nibakhola amalayi balinyoola eshileshelo nende omurungo omukhongo.

35:8.t: Kho ulia waronelwa ebikhole bibie ebibii, mana nabilola okhuba ebilayi, toto Nyasaye akosinjia owayenya, ne alunjisinjia owayenya. Kho omwoyo kukwo kulafwa okhubeela okhubabeelela tawe. Toto Nyasaye amanyile muno kabakholanga.

35:9.t: Ne Nyasaye niye uyilanga omuyeka mana kutuumule amaleesi, mana kukoosie khushialo shiafwa, mana nikhulamusilia khuko liloba nilimalilenje okhufwa, ne ni endio nilwa okhulamusibwa mubafu (khuliba).

35:10.t: Ulia wenya obukhoongo, (amanye mbu) obukhoongo bwoosi nibwa Nyasaye. Amakhuwa amalayi kaninanga nikamutsila, ne eshikhole eshilayi ashichingulanga. Ne balia bakholanga ebifwanga biamabii balinyoola eshinyasio eshilulu, ne ebifwanga biabu bilitsia akhaya.

35:11.t: Ne Nyasaye yabaloonga enywe okhurula khuliloba, mana nende okhurulana nende indonyande yamatsi kolwibulo, mana nabakhola okhuba Abasatsa nende Abakhasi. Ne Omukhasi yesiyesi shachinganga inda nohomba shiyebulanga tawe halali khubumanyi bubwe. Ne shahelesibwa olubaka lwokhumenya nohomba okhututuyilibwa olubaka lulwe tawe, halali koosi kali mushitabu. Toto ako ni amangu khu Nyasaye.

35:12.t: Ne tsinyanza tsibili tsino shitsiakhaba nashilala tawe, ino niyamaatsi amamilimili keshiuya, nokanywa kakholomokha obulayi khumwoyo, ne eyindi eyo niyekeichumbi amalulu. Ne okhurula mukoosi mulitsangamwo inyama inzelemu, ne murusinjiamwo ebirone biamwifwalanga. Ne olalolamwo amaaro nikakhalakaniamwo kho mukhaabemwo tsimbabaasi tsitsie, ne khomunyoole okhupa orio.

35:13.t: Yenjisinjia eshilo mushitere ne yenjisia eshitere mushilo, ne yakhola eliuba nende omwesi okhumuwulila, bioosi bichendanga okhula ebise biarebwaho. Oyo niye Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi owuli nende obwami. Ne balia abamulaamanga abalali Ye, babula shiosishiosi tawe kata shinga akhakhoba kha hekulu wa olufwa lwa itende.

35:14.t: Nimubasaba, shibalabawulila amasayo kenyu tawe. Ne kata nibabawulila, shibalabakalusia tawe. Ne inyanga yeyindukho balibeekana okhubatsokaasia khwenyu okho, ne abulaho wakhakhuboolela shingala kali okhushila Omumanyi wa koosi tawe.

35:15.t: Enywe Abandu, enywe muli abatakha khu Nyasaye, ne Nyasaye niye Omuyinda witsomibungwa muno.

35:16.t: Niyenya, nabarusiaho, narera ebilonje bindi ebiyakha.

35:17.t: Ne likhuwa elo shilili litinyu khu Nyasaye tawe.

35:18.t: Ne Omundu shalichinga omusiko kwa owundi tawe. Ne ulia uliyingwa okhuchinga shalichinjilwa kata hatiti tawe, kata nali omwikho wuwe. Toto ewe wikanyilisinjia balia abaritsanga Nyasaye wabu Omulesi nabo nibashiili okhumulola ne balumililanga okhulaama (iswala). Ne ulia witswenula, yetswenulilanga omwoyo kukwe omwene, ne amakalushilo kali khu Nyasaye.

35:19.t: Ne shibakhaba nashilala omuwofu nende ulolanga tawe.

35:22.t: Ne shibakhaba nashilala abalamu nende abafuu tawe. Nyasaye awulilisinjia owayenya, nawe shonyala okhuwulilisia bali mubilindwa tawe.

35:24.t: Toto efwe khwakhuruma khubwatoto obe wokhuhana akomwikhoyo nende omwikanyilisi. Ne kubulaho omukanda kwosikwosi okhula omwikanyilisi yoolamwo.

35:25.t: Ne nibakhuyingasia, bamala okhuyingasia balia abali imbeli wuwo. Abarumwa babu babeetsela nende ebifune bili habulafu, nende mutsimbapulo nende ebitabu biobulafu.

35:26.t: Mana nendila balia bakhaya. Mana eshinyasio shianje shiali shirie?

35:27.t: Koo, shololangakhwo mbu Nyasaye yeshinjia amatsi okhurula mwikulu mana nikhukarusilia ebiamo bikabukhane obukondo bwabio, ne mutsingulu tsilimwo tsinyaali tsindafu nende tsinzakhanyu, etsiobukoondo bukabukhane, ne etsindi tsimali muno?

35:28.t: Ne Mubandu nende tsisolo tsimoolanga nende tsisolo tsindi tsikabukhane obukondo, endio. Toto balia baritsanga Nyasaye Mubasumba bebe nibalia abamanya. Toto Nyasaye niwa Amaani, Omulesheli muno.

35:29.t: Toto balia basomanga eshitabu shia Nyasaye mana nibalumilila okhulaama mana nibarusia eshihanwa khubilia ebiakhubakabile mubwifisi nende mubwang’ang’u basubilanga inganga eyilalisikha tawe.

35:30.t: Kho abarunge omurungo kwabu omulaamba, ne abametele okhurula khu tsimbabaasi tsitsie. Toto Ye ni Omulesheli muno, Owokhupa orio inyinji.

35:31.t: Ne eshitabu shiakhwakhwishilia mubufimbuli nishio eshiatoto, shifuchilisania nende bilia bialiho imbeli washio. Toto Nyasaye yamanya muno Abasumba bebe, ne abalolanga muno.

35:32.t: Mana nikhuchelamia eshitabu balia abakhwawula mubasumba befu. Ne mubo baliho bakholela obubii emioyo chiabu, ne balimwo bali hakarikari, ne mubo baliho belushilanga amakhuwa amalayi khubuchami bwa Nyasaye. Obo nibo obulayi obukhongo.

35:33.t: Emikunda chilaliwa tawe balinjilamwo, balironwa ebirone bieyidhahabu nende ilulu, ne ebifwalo biabu mwo biliba bia hariri.

35:34.t: Ne baliboola mbu: “Okhwitsomibwa khwoosi nikhwa Nyasaye owakhurusiliaho eshibeela. Toto Nyasaye wefu Omulesi ni Omulesheli muno, owokhupa orio inyinji.

35:35.t: Ulia khulwetsimbaasi tsitsie yakhura efwe habuundu wokhumenya khatsotso. Shikhulinyoolwamwo nende eminyakhano tawe ne shikhulinyolwamwo nende amachong’e tawe."

35:36.t: Ne balia bakhaya balinyoola omulilo kwa Jahannam, shibalikhalachilwa eshina baafwamwo tawe, ne shibalitutuyilibwa eshinyasio shiakwo tawe, ne endio nilwa khulirunga buli omukhayi.

35:37.t: Ne omo balikhupamwo obuyoka: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi khurusiemwo, khwitsa okhukhola amalayi kalali kalia akakhwakholanga tawe.” “Shikhwabahelesiamwo ebise biomundu okhwitsulila, ne khandi mana Omwikanyilisi naabetsela? Kho mana pile, ne Ababii babula ubahabina.”

35:38.t: Toto Nyasaye nomumanyi wakefisa, komwikulu nende khushialo. Toto ye ni Omumanyi muno wa kali mufilifu.

35:39.t: Ye niye wabakhola okhuba abalindi bokhushialo. Kho ulia ukhaya, buli khuye obukhayi bubwe. Ne shikhumetelanga abakhayi okhukhaya khwabu Nyasaye halali okhusilwa muno, ne okhukhaya khwa abakhayi shikhubametanga shiosishiosi tawe halali okhusikha.

35:40.t: Boola mbu: “Mulolangakhwo abamusanjinjia benyu abo, abamulaamanga habundu wa Nyasaye? Munzechesiekhwo nibuleka shina yokhushialo yabaloonga, nohomba balikho nende obusanji bwosibwosi mwikulu? Nohomba khwabahelesia eshitabu mana bali nende ebifune bili habulafu okhurulamwo? Ne abamabii shibalakananga halali obubeyi butswa.”

35:41.t: Toto Nyasaye niye wikalilanga likulu nende eshialo bikhaye okhurulaho. Ne birulaangaho, abulaho wakhabiikalila halali Ye. Toto ye ni Omuholo muno, Omunji Wobulesheli.

35:42.t: Ne betsuba khu Nyasaye eshitsubo shiabu eshikhongo mbu omwikanyilisi nabetsela mbu balaba abalunjifu muno okhushilakhwo omukanda kundi kwosikwosi. Ne olwa Omwikanyilisi yaboolela, shiyabametela shiosishiosi tawe halali okhwira ehale muno.

35:43.t: Khulwa obufuru bwabu khushialo nende okhukhola ebifwanga ebibii. Ne ebifwanga ebibii shibikalushilanga tawe halali khu ulia wabikhola. Ne shibalindanga tawe halali omulukha kwa balia abaranjilila khale. Ne sholanyoola obukabukhani khumilukha chia Nyasaye tawe, ne sholanyoola obukalukhasio khumilukha chia Nyasaye tawe.

35:44.t: Koo, shibachendangakhwo khushialo mana balolakhwo shinga indukho ya balia bali imbeli wabu yali, ne bali nende amaani muno okhushila bo? Ne shibulaho shinyala okhushila Nyasaye mwikulu nende khushialo. Toto ye ni Omumanyi muno, Omunyali po.

35:45.t: Ne Nyasaye abukulilanga Abandu khukabakholanga, shiyakhaleshelekhwo khushialo khuno isolo yosiyosi tawe, halali ababikhanga okhula ebise biarebwaho. Kho olwebise biabu biliula (balirungwa), toto Nyasaye alolanga muno Abasumba bebe.

36:5.t: Khuno nookhwishia khwa Nyasaye Owamani, Owobukoosia muno.

36:6.t: Mbu kho wikanyilisie abandu ba basamwana balekanyilisibwa tawe, mana nabo bali mubukoyani.

36:7.t: Obwatoto likhuwa liamala okhubura khubaanji mubo, mana shibasuubilanga tawe.

36:8.t: Toto efwe khwaboya mwikosi mwabu nemikoye okhuula khubinwanwa, mana emirwe chiabu chilisa hekulu.

36:9.t: Mana nikhura imbeli wabu eshikalilo khandi inyuma wabu eshikalilo, mana nikhufunikha tsimoni tsiabu mana shibalolanga tawe.

36:10.t: Ne ninashilala sa khubo, obekanyilisie nohomba obule okhubekanyilisia, shibalisuubila tawe.

36:11.t: Toto ewe wikanyilisinjia ulia uloondanga ametsulisio mana naria Omunji Wetsimbabaasi, khukefisile, kho muboolere koomwikhoyo keshileshelo nende omurungo omulayi.

36:12.t: Toto efwe khulamusinjia abafu, ne khuhandikanga kabakholanga nende kabalekha inyuma. Ne buli eshindu khwashibikha obulai muno mushitabu shinoosinjia.

36:13.t: Ne bakanile imbakha nobachelasilia Abandu bolukongo, olwa betselwa nende Abarumwa.

36:14.t: Olwa khwabarumila babili, nibabakatsula mana nikhubametela owakhataru. Nibaboola mbu: “Toto efwe khurumilwe khwinywe.”

36:15.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Enywe mulisa Abandu shinga efwe, ne (Nyasaye) Omunji Wetsimbabaasi shiyeshiakhwo shiosishiosi tawe, ne enywe mukatinjia butswa.”

36:16.t: Baboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi amanyile mbu efwe toto khurumilwe khwinywe.

36:17.t: Ne khubula elindi tawe halali okhusia khuli habulafu.”

36:18.t: Baboola mbu: “Efwe toto khulolanga lisubiro khwinywe. Nimulalekhana ninafu tawe, toto khulabalasa amachina, ne toto mulanyoolwa nende eshinyasio eshikhongo okhurula khwifwe.”

36:19.t: Baboola mbu: “Lisubiro lwenyu lili khwinywe. Khulwa sa mbu mwitsulisibwe? Halali enywe muli sa abandu babura eshichelo?”

36:20.t: Mana omusatsa mulala niyetsa okhurula mumbeka wolukongo olo nayuukanga muno, naboola mbu: “Enywe abandu banje, loonde Abarumwa bano.

36:21.t: Loonde balia abalabasabanga omurungo tawe, nabo abeene nabalunjifu.

36:22.t: Ne khulwa shina ndalalaama ulia wanoonga tawe, ne ewuwe niwamulikalusibwa.

36:23.t: Koo, endiile abanyasaye bandi balali Ye tawe? Nyasaye Omunji wetsimbabaasi niyanyenyela amabii, okhusaba khwenyu shikhulaakhoonya shiosishiosi tawe, nohomba shibakhahabina tawe.

36:24.t: Toto mana esie endio emba endi mubukori bwa habulafu.

36:25.t: Toto esie esuubiile khu Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi, kho rechelesie.”

36:26.t: Naboolelwa mbu: “Injila mumukunda kwomwikulu.” Naboola mbu: “Abayie abandu banje bamanyanga khwo.

36:27.t: Shingala Nyasaye wanje Omulesi yandesheele mana niyanda mubalia abahelesibwa oluyali.”

36:28.t: Ne shikhweshiakhwo khubandu be imbeli wuwe omukanda kweliyie okhurula mwikulu, ne shikhwali beshia tawe.

36:29.t: Lwali butswa oluyoka lulala, lola, bali bamalile okhusuma.

36:30.t: "Abaane, ebeelelela abandu banje. Omurumwa yesiyesi shiyabetselanga tawe okhula bamubayile."

36:31.t: Koo, shibalolangakhwo nemikanda chinga chakhwasishia imbeli wabu? Abo toto shibali babakalushila tawe.

36:32.t: Ne toto boosi balikhung’asibwa barerwe imbeli wefu.

36:33.t: Ne eshimanyisio khubo ni liloba [eliumu] liafwa, khulilamusinjia mana khuchesemwo imele yabaliitsanga.

36:34.t: Ne nikhukasiamwo emikunda chia tsitende nende tsizabibu, ne nikhukasiamwo tsisebele.

36:35.t: Kho balie khubiamo bie, nende aka emikhono chiabu chilakholele tawe. Koo, shibakhupanga orio tawe!

36:36.t: Obutswenufu nibwa Nyasaye waloonga eshisatsa neshikhasi bioosi khubimelanga mwiloba, nende enywe abeene, nende ebiabalamanyile tawe.

36:37.t: Ne eshilo neshimanyisio shindi khubo, olwa khurusinjiamwo eshiteere, ne lola, baba mushiilima.

36:38.t: Ne eliuba lichendanga khushichelo shalio. Esho nisho eshichelo shia Nyasaye Owamaani, Omumanyi muno.

36:39.t: Ne Omwesi khwakurereraho ameshelo okhula kukalukhe kube shingala likhamari liumile.

36:40.t: Eliuba shiniliula khumwesi nohomba eshilo okhubura eshitere tawe, nabo bioosi bibotokhananga khutsinjila tsiabio.

36:41.t: Ne ni eshimanyisio khubo mbu efwe khwachinga olwibulo lwabu musafina yitsule.

36:42.t: Ne nikhubalonjela okhurula khufwani eyo ebiabaninangakhwo.

36:43.t: Ne nikhwenya, nikhubasishia mumatsi, ne abulaho ubakhoonya nohomba shibahabinwa tawe.

36:44.t: Halali tsimbabaasi tsirulanga khwifwe, nende omwikhoyo kwebise bititi.

36:45.t: Ne nibaboolelwa mbu: “Mwilinde ehale nende kali imbeli wenyu nende kali inyuma wenyu, khomunyoole okhubeelwa tsimbabaasi.”

36:46.t: Ne sishiboolelanga eshimanyisio shiosishiosi mubimanyisio bia Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, halali shibabukulangamwo oluchendo tawe.

36:47.t: Ne nibaboolelwa mbu: “Hane khubilia bia Nyasaye abakabile", Abakhayi baboolelenga Abasuubili mbu: “Koo, khulisie balia ba Nyasaye niyenya nabalisia? Toto enywe muli mubukori bwa habulafu.”

36:48.t: Ne baboolanga mbu: “Kamukhulakanga kano kalirulila lina, nimuli toto abahabwene?”

36:49.t: Shibalindanga halali oluyoka lulala butswa lulibabukula nabo nibali mukhusolana.

36:50.t: Mana shibalinyoola okhulaamila nohomba shibalikalukha khubandu babu tawe.

36:51.t: Na olwa olwika lulifurwamwo, balirula mubilindwa nibelushila ewa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi.

36:52.t: Baliboola mbu: “Abayie! Wina ukhulamusiyie okhurula wakhubeele nikhukonele. Kano niko aka Omunji wetsimbabaasi yalaka, ne Abarumwa nibaboola katoto.”

36:53.t: Ne shiluliba halali oluyoka lulala butswa, ne lola, boosi balikhung’asibwa imbeli wefu.

36:54.t: Mana olwa lelo abulaho yesiyesi ulikholelwa amabii kosikosi, ne shimulirungwa halali kalia kamwakholanga.

36:55.t: Toto abandu ba mumukunda kwomwikulu lelo bali khumilimo khubusangafu.

36:56.t: Bo nende abakhaye babu nibali mubinikha bayeshele khubisaala biobwokholo.

36:57.t: Balinyolamwo tsimbia tsioosi tsiebiamo, ne balinyoolamwo buli eshiabeenya.

36:58.t: “Omulembe” nilikhuwa lilirula khu Nyasaye Omulesi, Wobukoosia muno.

36:60.t: Koo, shindalakana ninanyu enywe Abandu mbu mulalaama Shetani tawe? Toto ye ni Omusuku wenyu owa habulafu.

36:61.t: Ni mbu munaame esie. Ino niyo injila ingololofu.

36:62.t: Ne khubwatoto ye yakosia omukanda omukhongo mwinywe, koo shimwekhonyerangakhwo obwongo tawe?

36:65.t: Olwa lelo khulatimbia eminwa chiabu, ne emikhono chiabu chilaboola ninafu, ne ebilenje biabu bilarusia obuloli khu kalia kabakholanga.

36:66.t: Ne khwenyanga, khwakhatimbiyie tsimoni tsiabu baba nibashilanila injila halali bakhalutsi barie?

36:67.t: Ne khwenyanga, khwakhabakalukhaniye ifwani nibali hao butswa, mana shibakhanyalile okhutsia nohomba okhukalukha tawe.

36:68.t: Ne wakhukofusia, khumukalusinjia inyuma mubulonji, mana koo, shibeekhonyerangakhwo obwongo tawe?

36:69.t: Ne shikhwamwechesia [Muhammad] amashairi tawe, ne elo shilienyekhana khuye tawe. Shino ni eshitsulisio nende Ikurani iretsanga abulafu.

36:70.t: Kho shikanyilisilie ushili omulamu, ne likhuwa libure khubakhayi.

36:71.t: Koo, shibalolangakhwo mbu khwabaloonjela okhurulana khumilimo chia emikhono chiefu tsisolo tsiemiruko, etsia barukanga.

36:72.t: Ne nikhubanguyisilia etsindi mutsisolo etso tsiabaninangakhwo, ne etsindi batsiliitsaanga.

36:73.t: Ne bo banyoolanga mutsisolo etso akobukhonyi nende ebinywebwa, kho mana shibakhupanga orio tawe?

36:74.t: Ne batila abanyasaye bandi habundu wa Nyasaye mbu khobanyoole obukhoonyi.

36:75.t: Shibalinyala okhubakhonya tawe halali abo nibo baliba abasikari babu olwa balikhwitsila.

36:76.t: Mana amakhuwa kabu kalakhubelesia tawe. Toto efwe khwamanya kabafisanga nende kabaretsaanga habulafu.

36:77.t: Ne omundu shalolanga ta mbu khwamuloonga okhurulana nende indonyande ya amatsi kolwibulo, ne lola awosa, naaba omuseeri wa habulafu.

36:78.t: Ne nakhuchelasilia, naye yebilila okhulongwa khukhwe. Mana naboola mbu: “Ni wina oyo ulilamusia ebikumba nibimalile okhubulungukha?”

36:79.t: Boola mbu: “Alibilamusia ulia wabiloonga olwokhuranjilila, naye ni Omumanyi muno wabuli okhuloonga khwoosi.

36:80.t: Ulia wabakholela okhunyoola omulilo okhurula khumusala omubisi, mana nimunyoola okhubwana omulilo okhurulana ninakwo."

36:81.t: Koo, waloonga likulu nende eshialo shanyala okhulonga bafwana ninabo tawe? Khulwa shina, naye niye Omuloonji Omukhongo, Omumanyi muno?

36:82.t: Toto likhuwa lilie niyenya eshindu, ashiboolela butswa mbu: “Ba!” Ni shiba.

36:83.t: Mana yatswenukha ulia wobwami bwa buli eshindu buli mumukhono kukwe, ne ewuwe niwo wamulikalusibwa.

37:5.t: Nyasaye Omulesi welikulu nende eshialo nende ebili hakari wabio. Ne ni Nyasaye Omulesi we ebukwe tsioosi.

37:6.t: Toto efwe khwarona likulu lia hambi (liokhushialo) khuburone bwetsing’ining’ini tsikhongo.

37:7.t: Nende okhulilinda okhurulana nende buli shetani omukhayi.

37:8.t: Balanyoola okhuwulila ebilonje bioluyali bia hekulu muno tawe, ne balasungwayo okhurulila buli mumbeka.

37:9.t: Nibaloondungwa, ne bali nende eshinyasio shilaliwa tawe.

37:10.t: Halali ulia upusulanga eshindu eshititi, ne mana shimulondangakhwo eshichenga shiomulilo shimesamesanga.

37:11.t: Barebekhwo mbu: “Koo, abo ni baloongwa okhuloongwa okhutinyu muno okhushila ebilonje bindi biakhwaloonga?” Toto efwe khwabaloonga okhurula khuliloba litilanga.

37:12.t: Halali owukanga, nabo bakholanga omubayo sa.

37:14.t: Ne nibalola eshimanyisio, nibakhola omubayo sa.

37:15.t: Ne baboola mbu: “Kano shini shiosishiosi tawe halali ni obulosi butswa buli habulafu.

37:16.t: Mbu olwa khulifwa mana khwamala khwaba liloba nende ebikumba, kho toto khulilamusibwa?

37:19.t: Luliba sa oluyoka lulala butswa, ne hawo, lola, balichaka okhulengalenga.

37:20.t: Baliboola mbu: “Abayiee, ino niyo inyanga yomurungo.”

37:22.t: Khung’asie boosi bakhola amabii nende abakhasi babu, nende balia boosi babalaamanga.

37:23.t: Abalali Nyasaye tawe. Mana bachomie khunjila yomulilo kwa Jahannam.

37:26.t: Halali olwa lelo belekhulile muno Nyasaye.

37:27.t: Balihengana abeene khubeene mana bachake okhurebana.

37:28.t: Baliboola mbu: “Toto enywe mwakhwitsilanga okhurulila omukhono omulunji.”

37:29.t: Balibakalusia mbu: “Halali enywe abeene shimwali Abasuubili tawe.

37:30.t: Efwe shikhwali nobunyali khwinywe tawe, halali enywe abeene mwali abakori.

37:31.t: Mana khumalile okhukhoyeshela likhuwa lia Nyasaye wefu Omulesi. Toto efwe khulapila butswa eshinyasio.

37:32.t: Kho khwabakosia eshichila mbu fwesi khwali abakori.”

37:33.t: Toto abo inyanga eyo balisaanga halala mushinyasio.

37:35.t: Toto bo olwa baboolelungwa mbu: “Abulaho nyasaye wundi ehale nende Nyasaye”, nibakhola obufuru.

37:36.t: Ne baboolanga mbu: “Toto efwe khuleshe sa abanyasaye befu okhubeela omukaasi wa amashairi wuno, omulalu?”

37:37.t: Halali ye yetsa khubwatoto, ne nafuchilisania nende Abarumwa.

37:39.t: Ne shimulirungwa tawe, halali kalia akamwakholanga.

37:45.t: Balirererwa buli luno nende lulia eshisanda shieshinywebwa shieyisebele.

37:47.t: Shibula obubii bwosibwosi, ne shishibameesinjia tawe.

37:48.t: Ne baliba nende Abakhasi balalengangakho abalali abasatsa babu tawe, betsimoni tsindayi muno.

37:49.t: Abakhasi shinga amabuyu kaliindwa obulai muno.

37:50.t: Balilengana abeene khubeene mana bachake okhureebana.

37:51.t: Aliboola omubooli mulala mubo: “Toto esie ndali nende omwitsa.

37:53.t: Mbu nikhufwa, khwaba liloba nende ebikumba, mbu toto khulirungwa?'”

37:55.t: Kho alihenga ne alimulola hakari wa Jahannam.

37:56.t: Aliboola mbu: “Wallahi (nditsuba khu Nyasaye mulala)! Wali ahambi muno okhungosia.

37:57.t: Chikhayanga okhuba emikabo chia Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, ndakhabeele mubalia abenjisibwamwo.

37:59.t: Halali okhufwa khwefu khwokhuranga, nafu shikhulinyoola eshinyasio tawe."

37:61.t: Ne shinga kano, nikabakhole balia bakhola.

37:62.t: Koo, okhubukanilwa endi shinokhulayi, nohomba omusaala kwa Zaquum?

37:63.t: Toto efwe khwakukhola okhuba eshinyasio khubalia abamabii.

37:64.t: Toto oko ni omusaala kurulanga hakari wa Jahannamu.

37:65.t: Ebibuli bia ebiamo biakwo bili shinga emirwe chia mashetani.

37:66.t: Toto abo balilia ebiamo ebo mana betsusie khubio tsinda tsiabu.

37:67.t: Mana khu ako bahelesibwe amaatsi kayile karabachila.

37:68.t: Mana obwatoto amakalushilo kabu kaliba Jahannam.

37:70.t: Nabo nibakhola lwangu okhuloonda amaseenelo kabu.

37:71.t: Ne khubwatoto bamala okhukora imbeli wabu abandu bakhale abaanji.

37:73.t: Mana henga olole shingala yali indukho yabalia abekanyilisibwa.

37:75.t: Ne toto Nuhu yakhulaanga, ne efwe khuli abalayi po bokhufuchilila.

37:76.t: Ne nikhumuhabina ye halala nende Abandu be okhurulana nende amasila amakhongo.

37:78.t: Mana nikhumuleshela ifuma indayi khubetsa inyuma wuwe.

37:79.t: Omuleembe kube khu Nuhu mushialo shioosi.

37:80.t: Toto endio nilwa khurunganga abakholi bamalayi.

37:81.t: Toto ye ali Mubasumba befu Abasuubili.

37:83.t: Ne toto Ibrahim yali mumukaanda kukwe.

37:84.t: Olwa yetsela Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi nende omwoyo kukwe kwoosi.

37:85.t: Olwa yaboolela papa wuwe nende Abandu bebe mbu: “Ni shina shiamulamaanga?

37:87.t: Mupariranga shina Nyasaye Omulesi webilonje bioosi?”

37:91.t: Mana nabwondela eminyasaye chiabu. Nachiboolela mbu: “Shichila shina shimuliitsanga tawe?

37:95.t: Naboola mbu: “Enywe mulaamanga ebindu bia mwiraanyanga abeene?

37:96.t: Ne Nyasaye niye wabaloonga halala nende akamukholanga ako."

37:97.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Muumbashile eshiumbashe mana mumusukune mumulilo.”

37:98.t: Kho benya okhumukholela amabii, halali nikhubakhola bo okhuba ba hasi muno.

37:99.t: Ne naboola mbu: “Toto esie ewuya enzia ewa Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, Ye alalunjisia."

37:100.t: "Ewe Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, mbelesia ulia uli mubakholi bamalayi."

37:101.t: Mana nikhumuboolera koomwikhoyo, komwana omwihotselefu muno.

37:102.t: Olwa yoola eshichelo shiokhuchenda ninaye, yamuboolela mbu: “Ewe mwana wanje, toto esie endutsi mumaloro mbu ekhusinzanga, kho hengamwo, olola orie?” Naboola mbu: “Ewe papa wanje, khola shinga oloomesibungwa, witsa okhuunyoola Nyasaye nachama, nendi mubalia befwiilanga.”

37:103.t: Kho boosi babili olwa belekhulila Nyasaye, mana namukonelia obweni.

37:105.t: Toto omalile okhukhola habwene khumaloro kalia. Toto endio nilwa khurunganga Abakholi bamalayi.

37:106.t: Toto kano ni amatemo kali habulafu.”

37:108.t: Mana nikhumuleshela ifuma indayi khubetsa inyuma.

37:111.t: Toto ye ali Mubandu befu basuubila.

37:112.t: Ne nikhumuboolera koomwikhoyo, kokhwibulwa khwa Is’haaq, abe Omurumwa womubandu Abalayi.

37:113.t: Mana nikhumuhelesia tsikhabi ye nende Is’haaq. Ne mulwibulo lwabu, nibarulamwo Abandu abalayi nende balia bekholela amabii habulafu.

37:114.t: Ne toto khwakholela obulayi Musa nende Harun.

37:115.t: Nikhubahabina halala nende Abandu babu okhurulana nende obutinyu obukhongo.

37:117.t: Ne nikhuhelesia babili abo Eshitabu shinoosinjia.

37:119.t: Mana nikhubaleshela ifuma indayi khubalia betsa inyuma wabu.

37:120.t: Omulembe kube khu Musa nende Harun.

37:122.t: Toto babili abo bali Mubasumba befu Abasuubili.

37:124.t: Olwa yaboolela Abandu bebe mbu: “Shimuritsanga tawe?

37:125.t: Mulaamanga Baal (eshimoosi shieidhahabu) ne mulekha omuloonji omulayi mwene?

37:126.t: Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi nende wa bapapa benyu bakhale.”

37:129.t: Mana nikhumuleshela ifuma indayi khubalia betsa inyuma wuwe.

37:132.t: Toto ye ali Mubasumba befu Abasuubila.

37:134.t: Olwa khwamuhabina halala nende Abandu baye boosi.

37:135.t: Halali omukhasi omushiele owali mubatong’a inyuma (mubasishibwa).

37:138.t: Nende eshilo, mana kho shimukharetsangakhwo mubwongo tawe?

37:139.t: Ne toto Yunus yali mulala khubarumwa.

37:141.t: Mana nibasanjilana mumakhuwa, mana nikamukwiila obubi.

37:142.t: Mana inyeni nimumila naye nali ufunaanibwa.

37:143.t: Ne akhayanga okhuba mubalia abatswenulanga Nyasaye.

37:144.t: Yakhamenyele munda mwayo okhuula inyanga yokhulamusibwa mubafu.

37:145.t: Mana nikhumusukuna khulukuku, naye nali omulwale.

37:147.t: Mana nikhumuruma khubandu iyelefu imia ndala nohomba bashilaho awo.

37:148.t: Mana nibasuubila, ne nikhubara mubwokholo okhula okhufwa khwabu.

37:149.t: Ne bareebe mbu: “Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi niye uli nende abana abakhana nabo bali nende abana abasiani?

37:150.t: Nohomba khwaloonga Abamalaika okhuba beshikhasi nabo nibalolanga?”

37:151.t: Ne toto manya mbu khububeyi bwabu baboolanga mbu:

37:153.t: Oh, yalobola abana beshikhana okhushila beshisiani?

37:156.t: Nohomba muli nende eshifune shia habulafu?

37:157.t: Mana nakharerekhwo eshitabu shienyu, nikali mbu muboolanga obwatoto.

37:158.t: Ne baraho olwikho hakari waye nende Amajini, ne Amajini kamala okhumanya mbu toto (baboolanga bario) balikhung’asibwa (mumililo).

37:159.t: Obutswenufu ni bwa Nyasaye ehale nende akabamuchishilanga ako.

37:164.t: Ne habulaho yesiyesi mwifwe, halali ali nende habundu wuwe amanyikhane.

37:165.t: Ne toto efwe nefwe khwemaanga olunyaali.

37:169.t: Toto khwakhabeele Abasumba ba Nyasaye Abatswenulwa.”

37:170.t: Halali (olwa eshitabu shiabetsela) bashikhaya, mana hambi hano balitsa okhumanya.

37:171.t: Ne toto likhuwa liefu liamala okhuranjilila khubasumba befu Abarumwa.

37:173.t: Ne omukanda kwefu kwabalwani niko kulishila.

37:175.t: Ne bahenje butswa, mana hambi hano balitsa okhulola.

37:177.t: Kho olwa eshinyasio eshio shilibeshela mushikuri shiabu, iliba itsuli imbi muno khubalia bekanyilisibwa.

37:179.t: Ne henga butswa, mana hambi hano balitsa okhulola.

37:180.t: Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, Nyasaye Owaamaani, nomutswenufu muno ehale nende kabamuchishilanga ako.

37:182.t: Ne okhwitsomibwa khwoosi nikhwa Nyasaye Omulesi webiloonje bioosi.

38:1.t: Swad. Nditsuba khu Ikurani eyili nende ametsulisio.

38:2.t: Halali Abakhayi bali mukhwilola nende obuyingani.

38:3.t: Ni emikanda chinga chia khwasishia imbeli wabu, mana nibalanga owubakhonya, ne ebise biokhuwonokokha biali biburire.

38:4.t: Ne bawuka mbu yabetsera omwikanyilisi okhurula mubo, mana nibaboola mbu: “Uno ni Omulosi Omubeyi muno.

38:5.t: Eh! Akholele Abanyasaye okhuba Nyasaye mulala yenyene! Toto kano ni amakhuwa khokhuchenyia muno.”

38:6.t: Mana Abakhongo mubo nibarula nibababoolela mbu: “Tsie mana mwisumilisie khubanyasaye benyu. Toto endio nilwakenyekhana.

38:7.t: Efwe shikhwawulilakhwo kano mushima shiefu shiokhumalilikha tawe. Kano shineshindu tawe halali ni obuchishi butswa.

38:8.t: Mbu niye butswa weshilibwa amekanyilisio mwifwe?” Halali abo bali nende obukanakani khu amekanyilisio kanje, ne mana bashili okhupila eshinyasio shianje tawe.

38:9.t: Nohomba bali nende ebiachi bietsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, Owamaani, Khakaba?

38:10.t: Nohomba bo bali nende obwami bwomwikulu nende khushialo, nende ebili hakari wabio? Khomana banine tsinjila tsiokhutsia eyo.

38:11.t: Okwo nikwo omukanda kwabalwani kulishililwa eyo mumikanda (chia abakhayi).

38:12.t: Bayingana inyuma wabu Abandu ba Nuhu, nende babu A’di nende Firaun owali nende ebiumbashe.

38:13.t: Nende Thamud nende Abandu ba Luti nende Abandu bomumutsuru. Echo nichio emikanda.

38:14.t: Abo boosi bayingasia Abarumwa mana nibakhoyeshela eshinyasio.

38:15.t: Ne bano shiabalindangasa ni oluyoka lulala butswa olulali lwokhubukhamwo tawe.

38:16.t: Nabo baboolanga mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, khurerere lwangu eshinyasio shiefu inyanga yeyindukho nishili okhuula.”

38:17.t: Wisumilisie khukababoolanga ako, ne witsulile Omusumba wefu Daudi owamaani. Toto ye yali omunji wokhusaba eshileshelo.

38:18.t: Ne toto khwahotselesia ebikulu halala ninaye nibitsoomia ingolobe nende mumabwibwi halala ninaye.

38:19.t: Ne kata amayoni kakhung’asibwa emikanda nemikanda, koosi kali amehotselefu khuye.

38:20.t: Ne nikhumeta amaani obwami bubwe, ne nikhumuhelesia amachesi nende obumanyi bwokhubusia omuse.

38:21.t: Ne koo, lwakhulilakhwo olukano lwaabasoolani olwa baniina liisisi nibeinjila munzu yokhulamilamwo?

38:22.t: Olwa benjila wa Daudi, naye narenga khubo, nibaboola mbu: “Olaria tawe, efwe khuli abasoolani babili, mulala wefu akoseele owashie, kho khukhalachile eshina khubwatoto, ne olakwila elubeka tawe, ne khulunjisie khunjila yobwatoto.

38:23.t: Toto uno ni Omusiani wefu, ali nende amakondi amakhasi amakhumi tisa nende tisa, nasi endisa nende likondi lilalasa lieshikhasi, mana aboolanga mbu: 'Mbelesia elilio elo ekhuruchile' (nasi shindenya tawe). Mana yashilile khumakhuwa.”

38:24.t: Naboola mbu: “Toto ye akhukholeele obubii okhusaba likondi lilio okhumeta khukeke. Ne toto abeyisanga abanji bakholelananga obubii abeene khubeene, halali balia basuubila mana nibakhola amalayi, ne nibatiti sa mubo.” Mana Daudi nalola mbu khumukholeele amatemo, nasaba eshileshelo khu Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, mana nakwa hasi okhwihotselesia khu Nyasaye wuwe nende okhumukalushila.

38:25.t: Mana nikhumuleshela ako, ne toto ye ewefu ali nende eshisaala shia hambi muno ninafu nende habundu halayi wokhukalukha.

38:26.t: Ewe Daudi, toto efwe khwakhukhola okhuba omwemelesi wefu khushialo, kho khalaka emise chia Abandu khubwatoto, ne olalonda obwikombi bwomwoyo bwakhukosia ehale nende injila ya Nyasaye tawe. Toto balia bakoranga ehale nende injila ya Nyasaye balinyoola eshinyasio eshilulu khulwa okhubula oluchendo khwabu mu Inyanga yokhubalilwa efikhole.

38:27.t: Ne shikhwaloonga likulu nende eshialo, nende ebili hakari wabio eshikhaya tawe. Ako ni amaparo ka balia abakhaya. Kho eshinyasio eshilulu shiomulilo shilinyoola balia Abakhaya.

38:28.t: Nohomba khukhole balia basubila babe shinga balia bakholanga amabii khushialo, nohomba khukhole abaria Nyasaye shinga abetsimbii?

38:29.t: Eshitabu shino shakhwakhwishilia ewe ni sha tsikhabi tsinyinji kho banyoole okhupaara mutsinyaali tsiashio, ne abandu ba amachesi banyoole okhuwulila.

38:30.t: Ne khwahelesia Dawudi Suleiman yali Omusumba omulayi muno, toto ye yali omunji wokhukalushila Nyasaye.

38:31.t: Olwa yalolwesibwa mubise bya ingolobe (lasiri) tsinyumbu tsia tsimbiro mana khandi tsindai po.

38:32.t: Mana naboola mbu: “Toto esie ndachama ebindu ebilayi okhushila okhwitsulila Nyasaye wanje Omulesi", okhula (tsifarasi etso) nitsikhamukha mushirima (Suleiman niyenya mbu atsilole khandi).

38:33.t: "Tsikalusie khwisie.” Mana nachaka okhutsitilakhwo mwikosi nende khubilenje.

38:34.t: Ne toto khwatema Suleiman, nenikhura omubili khushisaala shishie, mana nakalukha okhusaba eshileshelo.

38:35.t: Naboola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, ndeshela, ne mbelesia obwaami bwomundu wundi alalinyoola inyuma wanje tawe. Toto ewe newe Omuwani watoto.”

38:36.t: Mana nikhukhola omuyeka okhumurumushila, kwachendanga khubulomesi bubwe hosi hosi ayenya okhuula.

38:37.t: Mana nikhukhola amashetani okhumurumushila, koosi kombakhanga nende keyibilanga mumatsi.

38:39.t: Shino ni eshihanwa shiefu. Kho mana rusia nohomba shitiile, shibula eshichelo.

38:40.t: Ne toto ye ewefu ali nende eshisaala shia hambi muno nefwe, nende habundu halayi muno wokhukalukha.

38:41.t: Ne yitsulila Omusumba wefu Ayub, olwa yalanga Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi mbu: “Toto esie Shetani yanderere obusinyifu nende obusandi.”

38:42.t: Nyasaye namuboolela mbu: “Sieba hasi eshilenje shishio (isebele nirundukha hasi awo). Kano namatsi amanyifu kokhwisinga nende kokhunywa.”

38:43.t: Mana nikhumuhelesia Abandu bebe nende abandi shinga abo, nende tsimbabaasi tsirula khwifwe, nende eshitsulisio khubaandu bobwongo.

38:44.t: “Ne bukula mumukhono kukwo liisaka omukhupile (omukhaye wuwo khulwokhwitsuba khwa wetsuba khumabii kayakhola), ne olafunaka eshitsubo tawe." Toto khwamunyoola nali Omwifwiili, Omusumba Omulayi muno. Toto ye yali wokhukalukha khwifwe muno khukhusaba eshileshelo.

38:45.t: Ne yitsulila Omusumba wefu Ibrahim nende Is’haaq nende Yaqub bali ba amaani nende amachesi.

38:46.t: Toto efwe khwabalobola khulikhuwa lilayi muno liokhwitsulila mwikulu.

38:47.t: Ne toto abo bali khwifwe Mubandu abaule abalayi.

38:48.t: Ne yitsulila Ismail, nende Alyasa nende Dhul-kifli, ne abo boosi bali Mubandu abalayi.

38:49.t: Kano ni ametsulisio, ne toto bwene balia baria Nyasaye habundu wabu wokhukalukha aliba alayi muno.

38:50.t: Emikunda chomwikulu echilaliwa tawe, echiabekulilwa emiliango chiachio.

38:51.t: Omo baliyiekhamwo nibalaanga ebiamo ebinji nende ebinywebwa ebilayi po.

38:52.t: Ne baliba nabakhaye babu abalengangasa abasatsa babu butswa, abolubaka lulala.

38:53.t: Kano niko kamwalakwa [okhunyoola] inyanga yokhubalilwa ebikhole.

38:54.t: Toto kuno niko omukabo kwefu okulawetsaanga tawe.

38:55.t: Endio nilwa kaliba, ne toto balia baruumanga olwakho lwa Nyasaye amakalushilo kabu kaliba amabii.

38:56.t: Jahannam balinjilamwo, naho ni habundu abii muno wokhukonawo.

38:57.t: Endio nilwa kaliba, mana banywemwo amatsi kayia pa nende kamafila.

38:59.t: Kuno nikwo omukanda kulinjila halala ninanyu, balibula okhwinjisibwa obulayi. Toto abo balinjila mumulilo.

38:60.t: Baliboola mbu: “Enywe nenywe mubula amwinjila halayi, nenywe mwachila nikhunyoola eshinyasio, kho muli habundu abii muno wokhutong'a.”

38:61.t: Baliboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, balia bachila nikhunyoola kano bameete eshinyasio amakhabi khabili mumulilo.”

38:62.t: Mana ababii balia balireeba mbu: “Kabeele karie wakhulalolanga Abandu bakhwabalilanga mubabii mumulilo kuno?

38:63.t: Koo, khwababayila nohomba tsimoni tsiefu nitsilalolanga tawe?"

38:64.t: Toto khuno nokhusolana khwatoto khwa Abandu bomumuliro.

38:65.t: Boola mbu: “Esie endisa Omwikanyilisi, ne abulaho Nyasaye wundi tawe owulali Nyasaye mulala Owamani muno.

38:66.t: Nyasaye Omulesi welikulu nende eshialo, nende bili hakari wabio, Owamaani muno, Omunji weshileshelo.”

38:67.t: Boola mbu: “Kano ni amacheni amakhongo muno aka enywe mukhayanga.

38:68.t: Ka enywe mubula ninako oluchendo [enywe nanyu mukakhayanga].

38:69.t: Shindali nende obumanyi bwa ebilonje ebikhongo bioluyali olwabiayingananga tawe.

38:70.t: Ndahebwa obufimbuli shichila esie endi Omwikanyilisi owa habulafu.

38:71.t: Olwa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yaboolela Abamalaika mbu: 'Esie ndalalonga Omundu okhurula khuliloba.

38:72.t: Kho olwandalamukasia obulai, mana emufuremwo omwoyo okhurulana ninasi, kho murerere obweni bwenyu hasi.'”

38:73.t: Mana Abamalaika boosi nibara hasi obweni halala.

38:74.t: Halali Iblisi nakhola obufuru, mana naba mubakhayi.

38:75.t: Nyasaye namureeba mbu: “Ewe Iblisi, shina shikhukayiile okhura hasi obweni khulwa shienonjele nende emikhono chianje? Okholele obufuru nohomba oli mubakhongo?”

38:76.t: Iblisi naboola mbu: "Esie endi omulayi muno okhumushila ye. Waloonga esie okhurulana khu muliro, naye nomuloonga okhurula khuliloba.”

38:77.t: Nyasaye namuboolela mbu: “Mana rulamwo, ewe toto olonderwe.

38:78.t: Ne toto eshilaamo shianje shikhulikhwo okhula inyanga yomurungo.”

38:79.t: Iblis naboola mbu: "Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, mbelesia obwiyangu ndalafwa tawe okhula inyanga yokhulamusibwa mubafu."

38:80.t: Nyasaye namuboolela mbu: “Mana oli mubahelesibwe obwiyangu.

38:82.t: Iblis naboola mbu: “Nditsuba khumaani koko, toto nditsa okhubakosia boosi [Abana ba Adam].

38:84.t: Nyasaye naboola mbu: “Toto, ne emboolanga obwatoto.

38:85.t: Ndiliitsusia Jahannam khu ewe nende balia boosi balikhuloondakhwo mubo.”

38:86.t: Boola mbu: “Esie shebarebanga omurungo kwosikwosi tawe nohomba esie shendi wokhunichilisia tawe.

38:87.t: Kano ni ametsulisio butswa khubiloonje bioosi.

38:88.t: Ne toto mulamanya amacheni kayo ahambi hano."

39:1.t: Okhwishibwa khweshitabu shino khurulana nende Nyasaye Owamani, Owamachesi muno.

39:2.t: Toto efwe khwakhwishilia eshitabu shino khubwatoto, kho laama Nyasaye yenyene mubutswenufu khu Dini yiyie butswa.

39:3.t: Toto Idini yabwene imberi wa Nyasaye niobusalamu butswa. Ne balia abeliindanga khu ulali Nyasaye tawe nibaboolanga mbu: “Shikhubalamaanga tawe halali bakhusitie ahambi muno nende Nyasaye”, toto Nyasaye alibusia omuse hakari wabo khu kalia akabawukhanangamwo. Toto Nyasaye shaluunjisinjia Omundu owuli omubeeyi, omukhayi tawe.

39:4.t: Ne Nyasaye alenyanga okhuba nende Omwana, yakhawule mubiloonje bibie owayenya, obutswenufu nobubwe. Niye Nyasaye mulala, Omushili.

39:5.t: Yaloonga likulu nende eshialo khubwatoto, afuunikhanga eshiloo khushiteere ne afuunikhanga eshiteere khushiloo, ne yakhola eliuba nende omwesi mubiikhonyele, bioosi bichendanga khubise biarebwaho. Manye mbu niye Owamaani, Omulesheli muno.

39:6.t: Yabaloonga enywe okhurulana nende Omundu mulala, mana namurusiamwo owashie, mana nabarerera ebiruche ebisatsa nende ebikhasi tsimbia munane. Abaloonganga mutsinda tsia banyinenywe okhuloonga khulondokhane nende okhuloonga khundi mubiilima bitaru. Oyo niye Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi. Obwami nobubwe. Abulaho Nyasaye wundi owulali ye tawe. Kho nanyu mulinjibungwa heena?

39:7.t: Nimukhaya, toto Nyasaye ni omuyinda khwinywe. Ne shachamilanga Abasumba bebe obukhayi tawe. Ne nimumukhupila orio, alabafuchilila elo, ne Omundu shalichinga obusiro bwo owashie tawe. Mana mulikalukha ewa Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi, ne alibaboolela akamwakholanga. Toto ye ni Omumanyi muno khu kali mubilifu.

39:8.t: Ne Omundu nanyoola amasila kosikosi, asaba Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi namukalushila. Ne namuhelesia tsimbabaasi okhurula ewuwe, yebilila akayasabanga imbeli, mana atsokasie Nyasaye nende Abanyasaye bandi mbu kho akosie Abandu ehale nende injila yiyie. Boola mbu: “Wikhoye nende obukhayi bubwo hatiti. Toto ewe oli mubaandu bomumulilo.”

39:9.t: Koo, ulia ulaamanga Nyasaye wuwe mubwihotselefu eshilo narerere obweni hasi ne niyeemere nali noburi khu inyanga imalilishi, ne nasuubilanga okhunyoola tsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi. Boola mbu: “Bakhaba nashilala abamanyile nende abalamanyile tawe?” Toto abachesi nibo betsulilanga butswa.

39:10.t: Boola mbu: “Enywe Abasumba banje basuubila, rie Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi. Balia bakhola amalayi khushialo khuno balinyoola amalayi, ne eshialo shia Nyasaye neshibangufu. Toto abesumilisi balihebwa omurungo kwabu mubwitsufu okhubura eshichelo.”

39:11.t: Boola mbu: “Esie ndalomesibwa okhulaama Nyasaye nemutswenulila Idini.

39:12.t: Ne ndalomesibwa mbu embe weyimbeli mubasalamu.”

39:13.t: Boola mbu: “Esie eritsaanga eshinyasio shia inyanga ikhongo nekhaya okhuloonda ka Nyasaye wanje Omulesi.”

39:14.t: Boola mbu: “Ni Nyasaye butswa niwenaamanga nemutswenushila mu dini yanje.

39:15.t: Kho laame shia mwenya owulali Ye tawe.” Boola mbu: “Toto abatiba ni balia beetibia abeene nende abandu babu inyanga yeyindukho. Koo, manye mbu okho nikho okhutiba khwa habulafu.”

39:16.t: Baliba nende emibunjikho chiomulilo hekulu nende hasi wabu. Endio nilwa Nyasaye arisinjia Abasumba bebe. Enywe abasumba banje khaarie.

39:17.t: Ne balia basita ehale nende bioosi ebilali Nyasaye; khobalabilama tawe, mana nibakalukha khu Nyasaye, bali nende eshikhoyero, kho boolera abasumba banje akeshikhoyero.

39:18.t: Balia bawulilanga amakhuwa mana baloonda lilai muno liako. Abo nibo ba Nyasaye yalunjisia. Ne abo nibo bamachesi.

39:19.t: Ne koo, ulia wamala okhukhoyeshela okhunyoola likhuwa lieshinyasio (shia Nyasaye), mana ewe oli nobunyali bwokhuhabina uli mumulilo?

39:20.t: Halali balia baria Nyasaye wabu Omulesi balinyoola tsigorofa ebikoro biombakhwa hekulu webindi, emialo chiburanga hasi watsio. Ino niindache ya Nyasaye, ne Nyasaye shakalukhasinjia indache yiye tawe.

39:21.t: Koo, shololangakhwo mbu Nyasaye yeshia amaatsi okhurula mwikulu, mana nakabusia mutsifututu mwiloba, mana nakamesilia emimela chiaukhane obukondo, mana chiume chikalukhane chibe namabuyu, mana achikhole amasakaria. Toto mu ako shilimwo eshitsulisio khubandu bamachesi.

39:22.t: Koo, ulia wa Nyasaye yaanguyia eshilifu shishie shiachama obusalamu, mana naba mubulafu burulanga ewa Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi (yakhaba nashilala nende ulia womwoyo omumu?) Kho, eshinyasio eshikhongo shili khubemioyo emiumu chaletsulilanga Nyasaye tawe. Abo bali mubukori obwa habulafu.

39:23.t: Nyasaye yeshia amakhuwa amalayi muno, eshitabu shietsinyaali tsifwanana, tsiakalushilwa, tsirenjinjia amasero ka balia abaria Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, mana khandi amasero kabu nende emioyo chiabu bianguye khulwa okhwitsulila Nyasaye. Obo nibo obulunjifu bwa Nyasaye alunjisinjia khubwo owayenya. Ne owa Nyasaye akosia, abulaho umulunjisia tawe.

39:24.t: Koo, ulia wishinga khubweni bubwe okhurulana nende eshinyasio eshibii shia inyanga yeyindukho (aliba nashilala nende abalayi)? Mana ababii baliboolelwa mbu: “Pile kalia kamwakholanga.”

39:25.t: Balia abali imbeli wabu bakhaya, mana eshinyasio nishibetsela munjila yabalamanyile tawe.

39:26.t: Mana Nyasaye nabakhofia eshinyasio shiobuteshele mubulamu bwokhushialo. Ne eshinyasio shieyinyanga yeyindukho neshikhongo muno, bamanyangakhwo!

39:27.t: Ne toto khwachelasilia Abandu mu Ikurani ino buli imbia yamachelasio kho banyoole okhwitsulila.

39:28.t: Ikurani yolwarabu ibulamwo okhwikotiombola; khobanyoole okhuria Nyasaye.

39:29.t: Nyasaye achelasia omusatsa uli nende Abaami balakholelanga halala tawe, basolananga sa, nende omusatsa uli nende Omwami mulala sa. Koo, bakhaba nashilala? Okhwitsomibwa khwoosi nikhwa Nyasaye. Halali abaanji babu shibamanyile tawe.

39:30.t: Toto ewe olifwa, nabo toto boosi balifwa.

39:31.t: Mana toto enywe inyanga yeyindukho imbeli wa Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi mulisoolana.

39:32.t: Kho ni wina omwonooni muno okhushila ulia owakatilia Nyasaye, ne nakhaya obwatoto nibumwitsile? Koo, Jahannamu shini habundu wokhumenya wa abakhayi?

39:33.t: Ne ulia owetsa nende obwatoto mana nabufuchilila muno. Abo nibo abaria Nyasaye.

39:34.t: Balinyoola biabeenya imbeli wa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi. Oko niko omurungo kwa abakholi bamalayi.

39:35.t: Kho Nyasaye abaleshele amabii kabakhola, ne abarunje omurungo kwabu khulwa amalayi muno kabakholanga.

39:36.t: Koo, Nyasaye shali uyela omusumba wuwe tawe? Ne bakhurisinjia khubalia abalali ye tawe. Ne owa Nyasaye akosia, oyo abulaho umulunjisia tawe.

39:37.t: Ne owa Nyasaye alunjisia, shali nende umukosia tawe. Koo, Nyasaye shali niye Owamaani, Oweyimongo (wokhurunga likhobo) tawe?

39:38.t: Ne nobareeba mbu ni wina waloonga likulu nende eshialo, balaboola mbu: “Ni Nyasaye.” Boola mbu: “Koo, mulola murie biamulaamanga ebilali Nyasaye, Nyasaye niyenya okhuuwumisia esie, abanyasaye abo banyala okhuiniaho amabii keke ako? Nohomba niyanyenyela tsimbabaasi, bo bakhekalila tsimbabaasi tsitsie etso?” Boola mbu: “Nyasaye yambela, ne khuye bamwisiche bokhwisika.”

39:39.t: Boola mbu: “Enywe Abandu banje, khole shinga mwenya, esie siesi ekholanga kekhoyeshere. Mulitsa okhumanya.

39:40.t: (Mbu) Ni wina ulitsirwa nende eshinyasio shiokhumuhelesia tsisoni, ne shilimunyola eshinyaasio shilaliwa tawe.”

39:41.t: Toto khwakhwishilia eshitabu khulwa abandu boosi nende khubwatoto. Kho ulia ulunjikha, nikhululwe omwene. Ne ulia ukora, khandi toto kalikhuye. Ne ewe sholi omwemeresi wabu tawe.

39:42.t: Nyasaye afwisinjia emioyo ebise biokhufwa khwachio, ne chilafwile (chibukulungwa) ebise biokhukona khwachio, mana atiile chilia echiahandichilwa okhufwa ne alekhule echindi echo okhula ebise biachio biachahandichilwa. Toto mu ako kalimwo ameeko khubandu baparanga.

39:43.t: Nohomba babukula abalali Nyasaye okhuba bokhubasabila? Boola mbu: “Kata nikali mbu babula obunyali bwa shiosishiosi, ne khandi shibekhonyelanga obwongo tawe?”

39:44.t: Boola mbu: “Okhusabila khwoosi ni khwa Nyasaye. Nobubwe obwami bwomwikulu nende khushialo, mana ewuwe niwomulikalusibwa.”

39:45.t: Ne Nyasaye narumbulwa yenyene butswa, emioyo chiabalia abalasuubilanga inyanga yeindukho chisiukhanga. Ne abandi nibarumbulwa abalali ye, obalola nibasangala.

39:46.t: Boola mbu: “Ewe Nyasaye wanje, owaloonga likulu nende eshialo, Omumanyi wa kalalolekhanga tawe nende kalolekhanga, ewe newe uliawukhasia hakari wabasumba bobo khukalia akabakabukhananga.”

39:47.t: Ne abamabii babetsanga nende bioosi bili mushialo nende khandi ebindi shinga ebo, toto bakhabirusiye okhwinunula okhurulana nende eshinyasio eshibii shieyinyanga yeyindukho. Ne kabaliloloshela ewa Nyasaye kalia akabalali niberecheshele tawe.

39:48.t: Ne bulibaloloshela obubii bwakabakholanga, mana kalibaterera kalia kabakholeranga omubayo.

39:49.t: Ne Omundu nanyoola amasila, akhusaba efwe. Mana nikhumuwa tsimbabasi tsirula khwifwe, aboola mbu: “Toto esie ehelesibwe kano okhurulana nende amachesi kanje.” Halali ako ni amatemo, habula Abandu abaanji shibamanyile tawe.

39:50.t: Toto baboola ako balia bali imbeli wabu mana shikabakhonyakhwo akabakholanga tawe.

39:51.t: Mana obubii bwakabakhola nibubanyoola, ne balia abetsimbi mubano kalibanyoola amabii kabakhola, nabo shibalishila tawe.

39:52.t: Koo, shibamanyile mbu Nyasaye akabanga emikabo mubunji nende khushichelo owayenya? Toto mu kano kalimwo ameeko khubandu basuubilanga.

39:53.t: Boola mbu: “Enywe Abasumba banje bekholela obubii, mulawesia omwoyo khutsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye tawe. Toto Nyasaye aleshelanga ebionoono bioosi. Toto ye niye Omulesheli muno, Omukoosia po.”

39:54.t: Ne mukalushile Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi mana mwilekhule khuye eshinyasio nishishili okhubetsela mana mukhaywe okhuhonokosibwa tawe.

39:55.t: Ne loonde amalayi muno akamweshilibwa okhurula khu Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi, eshinyasio nishishili okhubapwoka nanyu nimulamanyile tawe.

39:56.t: Mana omundu yaletsa yaboola mbu: “Abayie ndiyitsulisia khukambura ewa Nyasaye. Ne toto esie ndali mubokhukhola omubayo muno.”

39:57.t: Nohomba aboole mbu: “Toto Nyasaye yanunjisinjia, ndakhabeele mubalia bamuria.”

39:58.t: Nohomba aboole ebise bialola eshinyasio mbu: “Abayie nengalusibwayo, nemba mubandu abalayi.”

39:59.t: Shikanyalikhana tawe. Toto ebimanyiso bianje biakhwitsila, mana nobikhaya, nokhola obufuru, ne noba mubakhayi.

39:60.t: Ne inyanga yeyindukho olilola balia bachishila Nyasaye wabu Omulesi obweni bwabu nibumaliye ti. Koo, mu Jahannamu shinishio eshimenyo shiabafuru?

39:61.t: Ne Nyasaye alihabina balia abamuria khulwokhubura khwabu, shibalinyoolwa nobubii bwosibwosi tawe, ne shibalibeelela tawe.

39:62.t: Nyasaye niye waloonga buli eshindu, naye niye omulindi wa buli eshindu.

39:63.t: Niye uli nende tsifunguo tsielikulu nende eshialo, ne balia bakhaya ebimanyisio bia Nyasaye, abo nibo balitiba.

39:64.t: Boola mbu: “Owulali Nyasaye niye wamunomesinjia okhulaama enywe Abasilu?”

39:65.t: Ne toto wafimbulilwa ewe nende balia abaliho imbeli wuwo mbu notsokaasia Nyasaye, toto ebikhole bibio bioosi bilakwa akhaya, ne toto oliba Mubandu basikha.

39:66.t: Halali laama butswa Nyasaye mana obe mubalia bakhupanga orio.

39:67.t: Ne shibahelesia Nyasaye oluyali shingala kenyekhana tawe, ne eshialo shiosi shiliba mumukhono kukwe, ne likulu lilikanyakanyibwa liaba mumukhono kukwe omulunji. Okhwitsomibwa nookhukhwe, ne ali hekulu muno ehale nende akabamutsokaasinjia ninako ako.

39:68.t: Ne olwika lulifurwamwo, mana bifwe bioosi ebili mwikulu nende khushialo halali ulia wa Nyasaye alichama, mana khandi lulifurwamwo olundi, mana lola, bioosi bilibukha biachaka okhuhenga.

39:69.t: Mana eshialo shiliakha khubulafu bwa Nyasaye washio Omulesi, ne Eshitabu shilirebwa imbeli, ne Abarumwa nende Abaloli balirerwa, mana eshina shilibusibwa hakari wabu khubwatoto, nabo shibalikholelwa obubii tawe.

39:70.t: Mana buli shiamundu alirungwa mubwitsufu akayakholanga, naye (Nyasaye) yamanya muno kabakholanga.

39:71.t: Ne abakhayi baliyilwa mujahannamu mumikanda, okhula shingala baliyuulakhwo, awo emiliango chayo chiliikulwa, ne abemeresi bayo balireeba mbu: “Koo, Abarumwa shibabetselakhwo okhurula mwinywe tawe? Nibabasoomelanga tsinyaali tsia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi, ne nibabekanyilisianjia okhubukanana nende inyanga yenyu ino?” Baliboola mbu: “Kali kario, halali likhuwa lieshinyasio liakhoyeshela abakhayi.”

39:72.t: Baliboolelwa mbu: “Injile mumiliango chia Jahannamu mumenyemwo tsinyanga tsioosi.” Awo ni habundu ambii muno wokhumenya wabafuru.

39:73.t: Ne balia abaria Nyasaye wabu Omulesi baliyilwa mumukunda kwomwikulu mumikanda, okhula shingala balikuulakhwo, emiliango chiakwo chiliba nichimaliile okhwikulwa. Abemeresi bachio baliboola mbu: “Omuleembe kube ninanyu. Muli abalayi. Injilemwo mumenyemwo tsinyanga tsioosi.”

39:74.t: Baliboola mbu: “Okhwitsomibwa khwoosi nikhwa Nyasaye ukhuhelesiye kayakhulaka, ne akhulesheele eshialo okhumenya mumukunda kwomwikulu nikhutsiamwo wakhwenya.” Oko noomurungo omulayi muno khubakholi (bamalayi)!"

39:75.t: Ne olilola Abamalaika nibabotokhananga eshisala shioluyali shia Nyasaye, nibatswenulanga Nyasaye wabu Omulesi khutsifumia tsioluyali tsitsie, mana eshina shilibusibwa hakari wabu khubwatoto, ne baliboola mbu: “Okhwitsomibwa khwoosi nikhwa Nyasaye Omulesi webiloonje bioosi.

40:2.t: Okhwishibwa khweshitabu shino khurula khu Nyasaye Owamaani, Omumanyi muno.

40:3.t: Uleshelanga tsimbi khandi ufuchililanga eshileshelo, Oweshinyasio eshilulu, Omuhaani. Abulaho nyasaye tawe halali Ye, ne ewuwe niwo wokhukalukha.

40:4.t: Shibakatsulanga ebimanyisio bia Nyasaye tawe halali balia bakhaya, kho okhuchendana khwabu khushialo khulakhukatia tawe.

40:5.t: Imbeli wabu, Abandu ba Nuhu nende emikanda chindi chiakhaya okhuloonda ka Nyasaye, ne buli omukanda kwali nende amahababa kokhutila Omurumwa wabu, mana nibayingana khubukori khobanyoole okhukalukhania obwatoto, mana nebatiila, kho eshinyasio shianje shiali shirie?

40:6.t: Ne endi nilwa liakhoyeshela likhuwa lia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi khubakhayi, mbu toto bo ni Abandu bomumulilo.

40:7.t: Ne balia bachinganga eshisala shioluyali shia Nyasaye (Arsh) nende bali mutsimbeka tsiashio bamutswenulanga Nyasaye wabu Omulesi khutsifumia tsitsie tsioluyali, ne bamusuubilanga, ne basabilanga eshileshelo balia basuubila nibaboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, waswania buli eshindu tsimbabaasi nende obumanyi, kho baleshele balia abasaba eshileshelo mana nibaloonda injila yiyio, ne obekalile eshinyasio shiomulilo.

40:8.t: Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, ne obenjisie mumikunda chomwikulu chilaliwa tawe chia wabalaka, nende balia bakhola amalayi mubebusi babu, nende abakhasi babu nende olwibulo lwabu. Toto ewe newe Owamaani, Owamachesi muno.

40:9.t: Ne obekalile amabii. Ne owawikalila amabii inyanga eyo, toto oliba omubeelele tsimbabaasi. Ne okho nikho okhubura okhukhongo.”

40:10.t: Toto balia bakhaya balilangwa mana baboolelwe mbu: “Toto okhusinya khwenyu Nyasaye ni okhukhongo okhushila shinga mwesinya abeene, olwa mwalangungwa khubusuubili nanyu nimukhaya.”

40:11.t: Baliboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, wakhufwisia khabili, ne wakhulamusiyia khabili, mana khufuchilile tsimbi tsiefu, kho injila yokhurula ilihowo?”

40:12.t: Ako ni endio, okhubeela Nyasaye niyalaamungwa yenyene, mwakhayanga. Ne natsokaasibwa, mwasuubilanga. Mana okhubusia omuse ni khwa Nyasaye wa hekulu muno, Omukhongo.

40:13.t: Ye niye ubalolosinjia ebimanyisio bibie, ne abeshilinjia okhurula hekulu emikabo. Ne abulaho witsulilanga kano halali ulia umukalushila (khukhusaba eshileshelo).

40:14.t: Kho sabe Nyasaye nimumutswenulila Idini yiyie, kata abakhayi nibasinyikha.

40:15.t: Niye webichelo bia hekulu muno, mwene eshisala shioluyali, arumanga Roho (malaika Jibril) khubunyali bubwe khuwayenya mubasumba bebe khulwa okhubekanyilisia inyanga yokhubukana.

40:16.t: Inyanga ya baliema balolokhana, shibulaho shiosishiosi shiliifisa khu Nyasaye tawe. “Obwami ni bwa wina Inyanga yino? Ni bwa Nyasaye Mulala, Omushili.”

40:17.t: Nyanga yino buli Omundu alarungwa kayakholanga. Olwa lelo okhukholilwa obubii khubulaho. Toto Nyasaye ni Omwangu wokhubala (ebikhole).

40:18.t: Ne bekanyilisie inyanga ili ahambi, olwa emioyo chiliula khwiporokotio nabo nibayinjilwe neshibeela, abamabii shibaliba nende Omwitsa nohomba ubasabila yawulilwa tawe.

40:19.t: Yamanya okhukatia khwetsimoni nende ka ebilifu bifisanga.

40:20.t: Ne Nyasaye abusinjia khubwatoto, ne balia babalaamanga abalali Nyasaye tawe shibabusinjia shiosishiosi tawe. Toto Nyasaye ni Omuwulili muno, Omuloli muno.

40:21.t: Shibachendangakhwo khushialo mana balola indukho yabalia bali imbeli wabu yali irie tawe? Bali nende amaani amaanji okhubashila, nende ebikhole ebikhongo khushialo, mana Nyasaye nabatila obutinyu khutsimbi tsiabu, mana shibalikho nende wokhubakhonya okhurulana nende eshinyasio shia Nyasaye tawe?

40:22.t: Endio nilwokhuba mbu Abarumwa babu babetselanga nende ebifune bia habulafu mana nibakhaya, ne Nyasaye nabatila. Toto ye niwa amaani, weshinyasio eshilulu.

40:23.t: Ne toto khwaruma Musa halala nende ebimanyisio biefu nende ebifune bia habulafu.

40:24.t: Khu Firauni, nende Hamana nende Qarun, mana nibaboola mbu: “Uno ni omulosi omubeyi muno.”

40:25.t: Olwa yabeetsela nende obwatoto okhurula khwifwe, baboola mbu: “Yire abana abasiani ba balia basuubila ninaye, mana muleshe abana babu abakhana.” Ne ebifwanga bia abakhayi shibili wosiwosi tawe halali mubukori.

40:26.t: Ne Firauni naboola mbu: “Ndeshe ndire Musa mana alanje Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi. Esie toto eritsanga ye okhukalukhania idini yenyu nohomba akhole amabii khushialo.”

40:27.t: Ne Musa naboola mbu: “Esie toto ndilinda khu Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, khandi Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi, okhurulana nende buli Omufuuru ulasuubilanga inyanga yokhubalilwa (ebikhole) tawe.”

40:28.t: Mana Omusatsa mulala omusuubili mubandu ba Firauni owafisa obusuubili bubwe naboola mbu: “Koo, mwira butswa Omusatsa shichila mbu aboolanga sa mbu Omulesi wanje ni Nyasaye, ne abetseele nende obwatoto okhurula khu Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi. Ne nali mbu nomubeyi, obubeyi bubwe obwo buli khuye. Ne nali owatoto, akandi mukaamulakanga ako kalamunyoola enywe. Toto Nyasaye shalunjisinjia ulia wabura eshichelo, Omubeyi muno tawe.

40:29.t: Enywe abandu banje, obwami nobwenyu nyangayino, mushilile khushialo. Kho, ni wina ulikhuhabina efwe okhurulana nende eshinyasio shia Nyasaye nishilikhwitsila?” Firauni naboola mbu: “Esie shebaboolelanga liosiliosi tawe halali lilia liendolanga, ne esie shebalunjisinjia tawe halali khunjila yobulunjifu.”

40:30.t: Ne wasuubila oyo naboola mbu: “Enywe abandu banje, esie ebaririranga shinga tsinyanga tsia Emikanda.

40:31.t: Shinga Abandu ba Nuhu, nende ba Aad, nende Thamud nende balia ababaloondakhwo. Ne Nyasaye shiyeenyelanga Abandu bebe obubii tawe.

40:32.t: Ne enywe abandu banje, esie ebaririranga inyanga yetsimbungu.

40:33.t: Inyanga yamulikalukhana inyuma, shimuliba nende wokhubalinda ehale nende Nyasaye tawe. Ne ulia wa Nyasaye akosia, shali nende umulunjisia tawe.

40:34.t: Ne toto Yusuf yamala okhubetsela nende obwinosi bwa habulafu, halali enywe nimutsilila okhuba nende tsinganakani khukalia akayamurerera, okhuula shinga yafwa, nimuboola mbu: “Nyasaye shalirerakho Omurumwa wundi tawe.” Endio nilwa Nyasaye akosinjia ulia owabura eshichelo, wikanakaninjia.

40:35.t: Balia bayingananga khubimanyisio bia Nyasaye nibabula amatililo, neshisinyisio eshikhongo imbeli wa Nyasaye nende imbeli wabasuubili. Endio nilwa Nyasaye asubanga buli omwoyo kwa omufuru wisunganga."

40:36.t: Mana Firauni naboola mbu: “Ewe Hamana, nyumbashila ingasi (munara) kho enyoole okhuulila khutsinjila.

40:37.t: Tsinjila tsielikulu, khenyoole okhulola Nyasaye wa Musa, ne toto esie emuparira sa mbu ni omubeyi.” Ne endio ni lwa Firauni yakholelwa alole ebikhole bibie ebibii okhuba ebilayi, mana niyekalilwa Injila (yatoto). Ne ebifwanga bia Firauni shibiamukhoonya tawe halali okhumusishia.

40:38.t: Ne owasuubila oyo naboola mbu: “Enywe abandu banje, nondekhwo ebalunjisie injila yobolunjifu.

40:39.t: Enywe abandu banje, toto obulamu bwokhushialo khuno ni omwikhoyo omutiti, ne toto mwikulu nisho eshimenyo shietsinyanga tsioosi.

40:40.t: Ulia ukhola amabii, shalirungwa halali amabii. Ne ulia ukhola amalayi mubasatsa nohomba mubakhasi nali omusuubili, abo nibo balinjila mumukunda kwomwikulu, balihebwamwo emikabo chibula eshichelo.

40:41.t: Enywe abandu banje, muli murie, ebalanganga khukhuhonokokha, nanyu munaanganga okhutsia mumulilo?

40:42.t: Munaanganga mbu ekhaye Nyasaye mana emutsokaasie khukengorerwe, nasi ebalanganga khu owa Amaani, Owobulesheli muno.

40:43.t: Toto owamunanjilanga okhumulaama shakhoyesheele okhukholelwa omulango khushialo khuno nohomba mwikulu tawe, ne efwe fwesi khulikalusibwa ewa Nyasaye. Ne toto balia babura eshichelo nibo Abandu bomumulilo.

40:44.t: Mana mulitsulila kebaboolelanga kano, ne esie endeshela likhuwa lianje Nyasaye. Toto Nyasaye alolanga muno Abasumba bebe.”

40:45.t: Mana Nyasaye namuliinda okhurulana nende ebifwanga ebibii biabamukholela, mana eshinyasio eshibii muno nishiulila Abandu ba Firauni.

40:46.t: Omulilo barerungwamwo itsuli nende ingoloobe. Ne olwa indukho iliula, baliboolelwa mbu: “Injisie Abandu ba Firauni mushinyasio eshilulu mno.”

40:47.t: Ne olwa balireebana mumulilo, mana abateshele babolere abafuru mbu: “Toto efwe khwabaloondangakhwo. Mana munyala okhukhututuyiliakhwo eshindu shititi mumulilo kuno?”

40:48.t: Abafuru baliboola mbu: “Toto efwe fwesi khulimwo. Toto Nyasaye amalile okhubusia eshina hakari wa abasumba bebe.”

40:49.t: Balia bali mumulilo baliboolela abalindi bomulilo kwa Jahannam mbu: “Khusabilekhwo Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi akhututuyiliekhwo eshinyasio kata inyanga ndala sa.”

40:50.t: Baliboola mbu: “Abarumwa shibabeetselanga nende ebifune bia habulafu tawe?” Baliboola mbu: “Kali kario.” Mana baliboolelwa mbu: “Sabe (Nyasaye wenyu). Halali amalaamo kabakhayi ni amakhaya imbeli wa Nyasaye.”

40:51.t: Toto efwe khulihabina Abarumwa befu nende balia basuubila khushialo, nende inyanga yabaloli balieema.

40:52.t: Inyanga yebichila biabakhayi shibiliwulilwa tawe, ne balinyoola eshitsubo, ne balinyoola eshimenyo eshibii muno.

40:53.t: Ne toto khwahelesia Musa obulunjifu ne nikhuchelamia Abana ba Israili Eshitabu.

40:54.t: Shilimwo obulunjifu nende ametsulisio khubandu bamachesi.

40:55.t: Kho, wisumilisie. Toto aka Nyasaye yalaka kalirulila. Ne saba eshileshelo khumabii ko, ne mutswenule Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi khutsifumia tsitsie tsindaye ingoloobe nende itsuli.

40:56.t: Toto balia bayingananga ekulu wa ebimanyisio bia Nyasaye nibabula amatililo kabeetsela, ebilifu biabu nebikhaya halali benyanga obukhongo ne shibanyala okhubuulila tawe. Kho wilinde khu Nyasaye. Toto Ye ni Omuwulili po, Omuloli muno.

40:57.t: Toto okhulongwa khwelikulu nende eshialo nokhukhongo muno okhushila okhulongwa khwa abandu, halali abandu abaanji shibamanyile tawe.

40:58.t: Ne omuwofu nende owulolanga shibahelaana tawe, nohomba balia abasuubila mana nibakhola amalayi bakhayelana nende abetsimbi? Mwitsulilanga hatiti muno.

40:59.t: Toto indukho iliula, ibula obukanakani tawe, halali Abandu abaanji shibasuubilanga tawe.

40:60.t: Ne Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi yaboola mbu: “Sabee, ndalabahelesia. Toto balia belolanga baalekha okhuulaama esie balinjila mumulilo nibatutuye.”

40:61.t: Nyasaye niye wabakholela eshilo muhulushilemwo, ne eshitere mulolele. Toto Nyasaye ni wetsimbabaasi khubandu, halali Abandu abaanji shibakhupanga orio tawe.

40:62.t: Oyo niye Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi, owaloonga buli eshindu. Abulaho nyasaye wundi owulali Ye tawe, kho ni hena wamuhenjibungwa?

40:63.t: Ne endio nilwa baliinjibwa mubukori balia abakhayanga ebimanyisio biefu.

40:64.t: Nyasaye niye wabakholela eshialo okhuba eshimenyo, ne likulu okhuba eshiumbashe, mana nabahelesia ifwani indayi muno, ne nabahelesia emikabo emilayi muno. Oyo niye Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi. Kho niwoluyali, Nyasaye Omulesi webilonje bioosi.

40:65.t: Naye nomulamu watoto. Abulaho nyasaye wundi owulali Ye tawe. Kho mumusabe mubutswenufu. Okhwitsomibwa nikhwa Nyasaye Omulesi webilonje bioosi.

40:66.t: Boola mbu: “Toto esie ndakanibwa okhulaama biamulamaanga ebilali Nyasaye tawe olwa obulafu bwanzitsila okhurula khu Nyasaye wanje Omulesi. Ne elomesibwe mbu ndilekhulile Nyasaye Omulesi webiloonje bioosi.

40:67.t: Niye wabaloonga okhurula khwiloba, mana okhurula khumaatsi kolwibulo, okhutsia okhuba lilika lia matsayi, okhula shingala murulamwo abatoro, okhula shingala muula abakali, okhula shingala muba abakofu. Ne mwinywe baliho abafwisibungwa nibashili abatiti. Ne khumuule khubise biamwalachilwa, khomunyoole okhwikhonyela obwongo.

40:68.t: Niye ulamusinjia, ne niye ufwisiinjia. Ne niyenya okhukhola likhuwa, aboolanga butswa mbu: “Ba” niliba.

40:69.t: Shololanga balia bayingananga ekulu webimanyisio bia Nyasaye shinga balinjibungwa ehale tawe?

40:70.t: Ne balia bakhaya Eshitabu nende kalia kakhwaruma nako Abarumwa befu, ahambi hano balitsa okhumanya.

40:71.t: Olwa baliboywa mwikosi mwabu emikoye nende eminyororo nibakhwesululwa.

40:72.t: Mumaatsi kayia pa (hamiim), mana basambwe mumulilo.

40:73.t: Mana baliboolelwa mbu: “Bali hena abamwasaanjinjia esie ninabo?

40:74.t: Abalali Nyasaye.” Baliboola mbu: “Bakhukorerekhwo. Halali shikhwalaamanga shiosishiosi inyuma hao tawe.” Endio nilwa Nyasaye akosinjia Abakhayi.

40:75.t: Ako nilwokhuba mbu mwasangalanga khushialo khunjila ilali ya habwene tawe nende shingala mwelolanga.

40:76.t: "Injile mumiliango chia Jahannamu, mumenyemwo tsinyanga tsioosi. Kho habundu ambii muno wokhumenya ni wa abafuru!"

40:77.t: Kho wisumilisie, toto aka Nyasaye yalaka kaliba. Ne nikhukhwechesia khu kalia kakhwabalaka nohomba nikhukhufwisia, nikhwifwe butswa niwo wabalikalusibwa.

40:78.t: Ne toto khwaruma Abarumwa imbeli wuwo, abandi khwakhuboolela ne abandi shikhwakhuboolela tawe. Ne Omurumwa shiyakharerere eshimanyisio shiosishiosi tawe halali khumunwa kwa Nyasaye. Mana lilako lia Nyasaye lwaliliitsa, lilibusibwa khubwatoto, ne awo Abakori balisikha.

40:79.t: Nyasaye niye wabalonjela ebiruche, ebindi bibachingenge ne ebindi mulitsenje.

40:80.t: Ne munyoolanga obukhoonyi khubio, ne bibamalilanga obusiro buli mumioyo chienyu, ne muchingungwa khubio nende biomumatsi.

40:81.t: Ne abechesinjia ebimanyisio bibie, kho nibimanyisio shina bia Nyasaye biamukhayanga?

40:82.t: Shibachendangakhwo khushialo mana balola indukho ya balia bali imbeli wabu yali irie tawe? Bali abaanji, ne bali namaani amaanji nende ebikhole ebikhongo khushialo okhubashila. Ne koosi kabakholanga shikabakhoonya shiosishiosi tawe.

40:83.t: Kho olwa Abarumwa babu babetsela nende ebifune bia habulafu, basaangalila butswa obumanyi bwa baali ninabwo, mana nikabolela kalia akabakholelanga omubayo.

40:84.t: Olwa balola eshinyasio shiefu, baboola mbu: “Khusuubiile Nyasaye mulala yenyene, ne khwikanile biakhwatsokaasinjia (Nyasaye) ninabio.”

40:85.t: Halali obusuubili bwabu obo shibwabakhoonya eshindu tawe olwa balola eshinyasio shiefu. Eyo ni imelo ya Nyasaye yamala okhubura khubasumba bebe, mana eyo Abakhayi nibasikha.

41:2.t: Ameshio kano karula khu Omunji Wetsimbabaasi, Wobukoosia muno.

41:3.t: Eshitabu shie tsinyali tsiashio tsienoosibwa, shisomungwa mulwarabu khubandu bamanyile.

41:4.t: Shiboolanga koomwikhoyo nende okhwikanyilisia, halali abaanji bakhaya okhubukulamwo oluchendo, mana shibasuubilanga tawe.

41:5.t: Ne baboola mbu: “Emioyo chiefu chiafunikhwa khukokhulanjilanga ako, ne amarwi kefu kekala, ne hakari wefu ninawe shilio eshikalilo, kho khola, toto fwesi khukholanga.”

41:6.t: Boola mbu: “Toto esie endisa Omundu shinga enywe, enyolanga obufimbuli mbu toto Nyasaye wenyu ni Nyasaye mulala, kho lunjishe khuye ne mumusabe eshileshelo, ne eshinyasio eshikhongo shilinyoola balia abatsokaasinjia Nyasaye.

41:7.t: Balia balarusinjia eshihanwa shia Izaka tawe, ne bakhaya okhusuubila inyanga yeyindukho.”

41:8.t: Toto balia basuubila mana nibakhola amalayi bali nomurungo kulaliwa tawe.

41:9.t: Boola mbu: “Toto enywe mukhayanga ulia waloonga eshialo khutsinyanga tsibili, ne mumusaasinjia nende abanyasaye bandi. Oyo niye Nyasaye Omulesi webiloonje biosi.”

41:10.t: Ne yaramwo tsingulu hekulu washio, ne naramwo tsikhabi, ne nachelamwo emikabo chabio khutsinyanga tsine, kano kali habwene muno khubarebanga.

41:11.t: Mana naachoma khumakulu nako nikali omwosi, nakaboolela nende eshialo mbu: “Itse nimuchamile nohomba nimukhayile.” Nibiboola mbu: “Khwitsile nikhuli abawulili.”

41:12.t: Mana naloonga amakulu saba khutsinyanga tsibili, mana nahelesia buli likulu amakhuwa kalio, mana nikhurona likulu lieshialo khu tsitaa nende khubulindi. Esho nishio eshichelo shia Nyasaye Owamaani, Omumanyi muno.

41:13.t: Ne nibalakabukulamwo oluchendo tawe, boola mbu: “Ebekanyisilia eshinyasio sholuyoka shinga shiali sha A’ad nende Thamud.

41:14.t: Olwa betselwa nende Abarumwa okhurulila imbeli wabu nende inyuma wabu, nibaboolelwa mbu: 'Mulalaame shiosishiosi tawe halali Nyasaye.' Nibaboola mbu: 'Nyasaye wefu Omulesi alenya, yakharumile Abamalaika, kho toto efwe khukhayile akamwarumwa ninako ako.’”

41:15.t: Mana Abandu ba A’ad bali abafuru khushialo munjila ilali yatoto tawe, mana nibaboola mbu: "Wina ushila efwe amaani?" Shibalolanga mbu Nyasaye wabaloonga ali namaani okhubashila tawe? Ne bakhayanga ebimanyisio biefu.

41:16.t: Mana nikhubarumila omuyeka kweyimbumbuyeka khutsinyanga tsiamasila, kho banyoole okhupila eshinyasio shiokhubafulafusia mubulamu bwokhushialo, ne eshinyasio shie indukho ni shokhufulafusia okhukhongo muno, nabo shibalihabinwa tawe.

41:17.t: Nabo Abandu ba Thamud khwabalunjisia halali nibachama obuwofu okhushila obulunjifu, mana omulilo kweshinyasio shieshifulafusio nikubabukula khu kalia kabakholanga.

41:18.t: Mana nikhuhabina balia abasuubila, nabo balitsingi nibaria Nyasaye.

41:19.t: Ne inyanga yabasuku ba Nyasaye balikhung’asibwa okhutsia mumulilo, nibakabulwa mumikanda chaukhane.

41:20.t: Okhula olwa balikuulakhwo (omulilo oko), amarwi kabu nende tsimoni tsiabu, nende amaseelo kabu bilirusia obuloli khu koosi pe kabakholanga.

41:21.t: Ne balireeba amaseelo kemibili chiabu mbu: “Shina shichila nimuyinia obuloli khwifwe?” Kaliboola mbu: “Nyasaye owulomalominjia buli eshindu akhulomalomiyie. Naye niye owamulonga olwokhuranga, ne ewuwe niwamulikalusibwa."

41:22.t: Shimwali nimunyala okhwifisa tawe, kho amarwi kenyu nende tsimoni tsienyu, nende amaseelo kenyu okhurusia obuloli ekulu wenyu, halali mwaparanga mbu toto Nyasaye shiyamanya amaanji kamukholanga tawe.

41:23.t: Ako niko amaparo kenyu kamwapariranga Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi, kamusishiye, mana nimuba mubalia abasikha.

41:24.t: Kho, nibefwila, omulilo niwo habundu wabu wokhumenya. Ne nibasaba eshileshelo, shibaliba mubalileshelwa tawe.

41:25.t: Mana nikhubahelesia abetsa, mana nibabaronela ke imbeli nende inyuma wabu, mana likhuwa nilibusibwa khubo, babe halala nende amahanga kabura imbeli wabu, okhurulana nende Amajini nende Abandu, toto abo nibo bali basikha.

41:26.t: Ne Abakhayi baboola mbu: “Mularechelesia Ikurani ino tawe, ne khupe oluyoka lwamabii khuyo khomunyoole okhushila.”

41:27.t: Mana toto khulabapilia eshinyasio eshilulu balia bakhaya, ne toto khulabarunga omurungo omubii khukabakholanga.

41:28.t: Oko niko omurungo kwa abasuku ba Nyasaye, Omulilo. Eyo niyo inzu yabu yabalimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi, omurungo kwabu khu kalia akabakhayanga ebimanyisio biefu.
