41:29.t: Ne abakhayi baliboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, khwechesie balia bakhukosinjia mu Majini nende Mubandu, khubakhole babe hasi webilenje biefu khobabe mubandu bahasi muno.”

41:30.t: Toto balia baboola mbu: “Omulesi wefu ni Nyasaye", mana nibalunjikha, Abamalaika balabeeshelanga mana bababoolele mbu: “Mularie tawe nohomba mulabeelela tawe, ne sangalile omukunda komwikulu okwamwalakungwa.

41:31.t: Efwe khuli abalina benyu khubulamu bwokhushialo nende mwikulu. Ne bilimwo bioosi pe bie mioyo chenyu chikombanga, ne omo mulinyoolamwo bioosi biamwenya.

41:32.t: Obucheni bwokhubukanilwa okhurula khu Nyasaye Omulesi, Omulesheli muno, wobukoosia po.”

41:33.t: Ne wina oyo wamakhuwa amalayi muno okhushila ulia ulanganga khu injila ya Nyasaye mana akhole amalayi, mana aboole mbu toto esie endi halala nabasalamu?

41:34.t: Ne obulayi shibuyelana nende obubii tawe, runga obubii khu lilia lilayi, kho bibe shinga ulia woli naye obusuku ni omwitsa wo wa mbusia ngonia.

41:35.t: Ne shibakhanyoola obulayi buno tawe halali balia bokhwifwila, ne shiyakhanyoola tawe halali ulia weyikhabi indayi ikhongo.

41:36.t: Ne Shetani nakhubeyiabeyia neshibeyibeyi, wishinje khu Nyasaye. Toto ye niye Omuwulili muno, Omumanyi muno.

41:37.t: Ne mubimanyisio bibie ni eshilo nende eshitere, nende eliuba nende omwesi, mulare obweni bwenyu hasi khulwa eliuba nohomba omwesi tawe, ne re obweni bwenyu hasi khulwa Nyasaye ulia wabiloonga toto nikali mbu mumulaamanga Ye yenyene sa.

41:38.t: Ne nibakhola obufuru, manya mbu bioosi ebili ewa Nyasaye bimutswenulanga eshilo neshitere, nabio shibichong’anga tawe.

41:39.t: Ne mubimanyisio bibie ni mbu toto ewe ololanga liloba nilili (liniongofu) liabuyukha. Ne nikhulirakhwo amatsi, olola nilirenga emirombo nichirulamwo. Toto ulia walilamusia niye ulilamusia abafu. Toto Ye ni Omunyali muno wa buli eshindu.

41:40.t: Toto balia bakoyasinjia obwatoto buli mubimanyisio biefu shibakhakhwifise tawe. Kho ulia ufubwa mumulilo ali obulayi okhushila ulia witsa nomulembe inyanga yeyindukho? Khole shamwenya. Toto Ye alolanga muno kamukholanga.

41:41.t: Toto balia bakhaya ametsulisio olwa kabetsela (balisishibwa), ne toto neshitabu shiamaani, shioluyali.

41:42.t: Obukori shibwakhashitsila okhurulila inyuma washio nohomba imbeli washio tawe, sheshibwa nende Omuchesi, Owitsomibungwa muno.

41:43.t: Koboolelungwa kano ni kalia kaboolelwa Abarumwa betsa imbeli wuwo. Ne toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi ni wobulesheli, ne ni weeshinyasio eshilulu.

41:44.t: Ne khukholanga Ikurani ino mulusungo olucheni, bakhaboolele mbu: “Shichila shina tsinyali tsiayo shitsiaukhanibwa tawe? Lwakhaba lurie olusungo olucheni, naye Omurumwa nomwarabu?” Boola mbu: “Ikurani ino ni obulunjifu nende eshihonia khu usuubila. Ne balia balasuubila tawe, mumarwi kabu bilimwo ebiakeekala, nayo khubo ni obuwofu. Abo balangungwa nabo bali ehale."

41:45.t: Ne toto khwahelesia Musa Eshitabu, mana nibaukhanamwo. Ne lilabetsanga likhuwa liaranjilila okhurula khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi tawe, bakhabusilibwe eshina, ne toto abo bali mushibeyibeyi shiobuyendi.

41:46.t: Owukhola amalayi, yekholelanga omweene. Ne ukhola amabii, kali khuye mweene. Ne Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi shakholelanga Omundu obubii tawe.

41:47.t: Obumanyi bwokhumanya inyanga yeyindukho bukalusibwa butswa khuye (Nyasaye). Ne ebiamo shibirulanga mubimuli biabio, nohomba omukhasi shiyakhabelekha inda nohomba yebule tawe halali Nyasaye namanyile. Ne inyanga yaalibalanga mana abareebe mbu: “Bali hena abamwasanjinjia esie ninabo?” Baliboola mbu: “Khufuchilila mbu abulaho yesiyesi mwifwe uyinia obuloli khu kano.”

41:48.t: Mana nibabakorakhwo balia ababalamanga, ne nibaba nende obwatoto mbu babula wabelushila.

41:49.t: Omundu shachong'anga okhusaba amasayo amalayi tawe, ne amabii nikamunyoola, afwa omwoyo muno.

41:50.t: Ne nikhumupilia tsimbabaasi tsiefu niyakhamala okhunyakhanakhwo, toto alaboola mbu: “Kano niko kekhoyeshele, ne shembara indukho nilibaho tawe, ne nengalusibwa khu Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, toto esie endi nende obulayi muno ewuwe.” Khuliboolela abakhayi kabakholanga, ne toto khuli bahelesia eshinyasio eshisiro.

41:51.t: Ne nikhuhelesia omundu obwokholo, akalukhana niyera ehale yenyene. Ne amabii nikamunyoola, asaba amasayo amarambi.

41:52.t: Boola mbu: “Mulola murie nikali mbu kano karula khu Nyasaye, mana mukakhaye, ni wina omukori muno okhushila ulia wamainji nende okhuloba khuli ehale?”

41:53.t: Khulabechesia ebimanyisio biefu mutsimbeka tsia hekulu muno tsia likulu lia hasi, nende mwenyewe abeene, okhula kabamanyikhanile habulafu mbu kano nikatoto. Koo, Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi shayela tawe mbu toto niye omuloli muno wa buli eshindu?

41:54.t: Manye mbu toto abo bali mutsinganakani khukhubukana nende Nyasaye wabu Omulesi. Manye mbu toto Nyasaye yatererera buli eshindu.

42:3.t: Endi nilwa khukhufimbulilanga obufimbuli ewe nende balia abaliho imbeli wuwo. Nyasaye ni Owamaani, Owamachesi muno.

42:4.t: Nebibie bili mwikulu nende mushialo, naye niye Owahekulu muno, Woluyali.

42:5.t: Likulu lili hambi muno okhwatikhanamwo hekulu eyo, ne Abamalaika batswenulanga Nyasaye wabu Omulesi nibamwitsomia khuluyali lulwe, ne basabilanga bali khushialo eshileshelo. Manya mbu Nyasaye niye Omulesheli po, Owobukoosia muno.

42:6.t: Ne balia abekholela abalindi bandi abalali Ye tawe, Nyasaye niye omulindi wabu watoto, ne ewe sholi omwemeli wabu tawe.

42:7.t: Ne endio nilwa khwakhufimbulila Ikurani mulusungo lwolwarabu, kho wikanyilisie Abandu ba nyina tsingongo (Makka) nende abali mutsimbeka tsiayio, ne okanyilisie inyanga yokhukhung’asibwa Abandu boosi ibula obukanakani tawe. Omukanda kundi kuliba mumukunda kwomwikulu ne okundi kuliba mumulilo.

42:8.t: Ne Nyasaye yenyanga, yakhabakholele boosi omukanda mulala, halali yenjisinjia owayenya mutsimbabaasi tsitsie, ne ababii shibaliba nende omuliindi nohomba omukhonyi tawe.

42:9.t: Nohomba babukula abalindi bandi abalali Nyasaye tawe? Nyasaye niye omulindi watoto, naye niye ulamusinjia abafuu, naye niye Omunyali muno wabuli eshindu.

42:10.t: Ne shiosishiosi shiamwawukhanamwo, obukhalachi eshina buashio buli khu Nyasaye. Oyo niye Nyasaye Omulesi wanje, niye wa ndiisikanga, ne ni ewuwe ni wengalukhanga.

42:11.t: Omulonji welikulu nende eshialo, niye owabaloonga omukhasi nende omusatsa, nende tsisolo tsiosi tsisatsa nende tsikhasi, abametelelangakhwo ario. Shibulaho shiosishiosi shili shinga Ye, naye ni Omuwulili muno, Omuloli muno.

42:12.t: Niye mwene tsifunguo tsielikulu nende eshialo, ahelesinjia owayenyele omukabo omunji ne atutuyilia owayenya. Toto Ye ni Omumanyi muno wabuli eshindu.

42:13.t: Nyasaye yabalachila mudini ka yalachila Nuhu nende kakhwakhufimbulila ewe, nende kakhwalachila Ibrahim nende Musa nende Isa, mbu tile idini obulai muno, ne mulakabukhana khuyo tawe. Ni amasiro khubatsokaasi akobalanjilanga ako. Nyasaye alobolaanga ewuwe wayenya, ne alunjisinjia umukalushila.

42:14.t: Ne shibaakabukhana tawe halali nibakhanyoola obumanyi khulwa eshikhalikhali shiali hakari wabu. Ne likhayanga okhuba likhuwa liaranjilila okhurula khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi liokhusitia okhuula khundukho, bakhakhalachilwe eshina. Ne toto balia banyoola Eshitabu khubalia baliho imbeli wabu bashikanakanilanga nibakoyana.

42:15.t: Kho khwako, balanje, ne lunjikha shinga walomesibwa, ne olaloonda okhwenya khwabu tawe. Ne boola mbu: “Esuubile ka Nyasaye yeshia mubitabo, ne elomesibwe okhukhola obuleng’afu hakari wenyu, ne Nyasaye niye Omulesi wefu nende Omulesi wenyu, khuli nende ebikhole biefu nanyu muli nende ebikhole bienyu, liakhuyinganilakhwo libulaho hakari wefu tawe. Ne Nyasaye alikhukhung’asia fwesi halala. Ne amakalushilo ni ewuwe.”

42:16.t: Ne balia bayingananga khu Nyasaye nibamalile okhufuchililwa, okhuyingana khwabu nokhukhaya imbeli wa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, ne basinyishilwa, ne bali nende eshinyasio eshilulu.

42:17.t: Nyasaye niye weshia Eshitabu khubwatoto nende eshichelo, ne ni shina shiokhumanyia ewe mbu khaundi indukho ili ahambi?

42:18.t: Abalasuubilanga tawe bachiyungubanilanga benya mbu yitse lwangu, ne abasuubili bayiria muno, ne bamanya mbu toto ni ya habwene. Koo, manya mbu balia bayingananga ekulu wa inyanga ye indukho eyo bali mubukori bwa ehale muno.

42:19.t: Nyasaye nomwihotselefu khubasumba bebe, akabanga omukabo owayenya, naye niye Owamaani, Owoluyali muno.

42:20.t: Yesiyesi wenya lichesa liomwikulu, khulamumetela khulichesa elo. Ne ulia wenya lichesa liokhushialo, khulamuhelesia khulio, ne abula shiosishiosi mwikulu.

42:21.t: Nohomba bo bali nende abanyasaye babatsokaasinjia, babakaasilia amalako keyidini ya Nyasaye alachifuchilila tawe? Ne likhayanga okhuba likhuwa liokhwaukhasia, bakhakhalachilwe eshina, ne toto ababii bali nende eshinyasio eshilulu.

42:22.t: Olilola aboononi nibali abari muno khukabakhola, nako kaliboolela butswa. Ne balia basuubila mana nibakhola amalayi baliba mumikunda chio mwikulu, baliba nende shiabenya shiosishiosi imbeli wa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi. Oko nikwo omukabo omukhongo.

42:23.t: Ako niko ka omwikhoyo ka Nyasaye aboolera Abasumba bebe basuubila mana nibakhola amalayi. Boola mbu: “Esie shebarebanga omurungo kwosikwosi tawe halali obuheli khubeekho.” Ne ukhola lilayi, khumumetela lilayi. Toto Nyasaye nomulesheli, wokhukalusia orio ikhongo muno.

42:24.t: Nohomba baboolanga mbu: “Achishilinjia Nyasaye amakhuwa kobubeyi kabulaho.” Ne Nyasaye niyenya, naasuba khumwoyo kwo. Ne Nyasaye yosinjia obukori, ne atinyisia obwatoto khumakhuwa keke. Toto ye ni Omumanyi muno khukali mubilifu.

42:25.t: Naye niye ufuchililanga okhusaba eshileshelo khwa Abasumba be, ne aleshelanga tsimbi, ne yamanya muno akamukholanga.

42:26.t: Ne niye ufuchililanga balia basuubila mana nibakhola amalayi, ne abametalanga emikabo chichie, ne abakhayi bali neshinyasio eshilulu.

42:27.t: Ne Nyasaye ahelesinjia Abasumba bebe omukabo omunji, bakhakholile obufuru khushialo. Halali yeshinjia khushichelo shiayenya. Toto ye yamanya obulayi Abasumba bebe, ne abalolanga.

42:28.t: Naye niye wishinjia ifula abandu nibawesiyekhwo omwoyo muno. Ne aswaninjia tsimbabaasi tsitsie, naye niye omulindi watoto, witsomibungwa muno.

42:29.t: Ne mubimanyisio bibie nokhulongwa khwelikulu nende eshialo, nende tsisolo tsiayaswaniamwo, naye ali nobunyali muno bwokhubikhung’asia niyenya.

42:30.t: Ne amasila kosikosi kamunyoola, karulana nende kemikhono chienyu chikholele, ne aleshelanga amanji.

42:31.t: Ne enywe shimwakhashila khushialo tawe, ne mubula omulindi nohomba ubakhonya ulali Nyasaye tawe.

42:32.t: Ne mubimanyisio bibie ni ebiilukhanga khumatsi nibitsia nibikalukha shinga tsingulu.

42:33.t: Niyenya, nayenzesia omuyeka, ni bitong’a halala nibiemele khunyanza. Toto muako bilimwo ebimanyisio khubuli wisumilisianjia muno, omukhupi muno wa orio.

42:34.t: Nohomba abitibie mumatsi khukabakhola, ne aleshelanga amanji.

42:35.t: Ne khobamanye balia bayingana ekulu webimanyisio biefu mbu babula habundu wabelushila tawe.

42:36.t: Ne bioosi biamwahebwa ni omwikhoyo kwobulamu bwokhushialo. Ne bili ewa Nyasaye nebilayi bilaliwa tawe khubalia basuubila mana nibesika Nyasaye wabu Omulesi yenyene.

42:37.t: Ne balia beyikalilanga ebionono ebikhongo nende eshifwolo, ne nibasinyisibwa baleshelanga.

42:38.t: Ne balia bafuchililanga Nyasaye wabu Omulesi mana balaamanga (baswaliyanga) khatsotso, ne amakhuwa kabu basanjilananga, ne bahananga khubia khubakabile.

42:39.t: Nende balia olwa bakholelwa obusuku, behabinanga.

42:40.t: Ne omurungo kwa amabii ni amabii shinga ako. Kho ulia uleshela, mana yakasia omulembe, omurungo kukwe kuli khu Nyasaye. Toto ye shiyayanza abetsimbi tawe.

42:41.t: Ne balia behabinanga nibakholelwe amabii, babula injila yokhufunaanibwa tawe.

42:42.t: Bafunaanibungwa ni balia bakholelanga abandu amabii, ne bakholanga obufuru khushialo munjila ilali yatoto tawe. Abo balinyoola eshinyasio eshilulu.

42:43.t: Ne ulia wifwila mana yaleshela, toto ako niko amakhuwa kenyekha.

42:44.t: Ne wa Nyasaye akosia, abula omulindi ulali Ye tawe. Ne olilola abamabii olwa balilola eshinyasio, baliboola mbu: “Koo, ilikhowo injila yosiyosi yakhunyala okhukalusibwakhwo?”

42:45.t: Ne olibalola nibayilwa mumulilo, nibehotselesiye mubuteshele, bahenganga mefisa. Ne Abasuubila baliboola mbu: “Toto balia abasikha nibalia beesishia abeene nende Abandu babu inyanga yeyindukho.” Koo, manya mbu toto balia betsimbi baliba khushinyasio shilaliwa tawe.

42:46.t: Ne shibaliba nende abalindi babahabina tawe halali Nyasaye. Ne owa Nyasaye akosia, oyo abula injila yosiyosi.

42:47.t: Fuchilile Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi nishili okhuboolela Inyanga ileyikalilwa tawe, irulanga khu Nyasaye. Shimuliba nende wamwilushila tawe, ne shimuliba nende eshibekalila tawe.

42:48.t: Ne nibakhaya, efwe shikhwakhuruma obe omulindi wabu tawe. Shikali khwiwe halali okhusia oburume butswa. Ne toto efwe nikhupilia omundu tsimbabaasi okhurula khwifwe, atsisangalilanga. Ne obubii nibumunyoola khu kakholele omwene, toto Omundu oyo akhayanga muno.

42:49.t: Obwami bwomwikulu nende khushialo ni bwa Nyasaye. Alonganga shinga yenya. Ahelesinjia owayenya abana abakhana, ne ahelesia owayenya abasiani.

42:50.t: Nohomba amusaasilie abasiani nabakhana. Ne akholanga owayenya okhuba omukumba. Toto ye Nomumanyi muno, Omunyali muno.

42:51.t: Ne omundu shiyakhalomalomesibwa nende Nyasaye tawe halali khubufimbuli, nohomba okhurulila inyuma weshiikalilo, nohomba okhuruma Omurumwa mana amufimbulile khubunyali bwe shiayenya. Toto Ye ni wa hekulu muno, Owamachesi muno.

42:52.t: Ne endio nilwa khwakhufimbulila Ikurani khubunyali bwefu. Shiwali niwamanya mbu Eshitabu ni shina tawe, nohomba Obusuubili. Halali nikhushikhola obulafu, khulunjisia khushio owakhwenya mubasumba befu. Ne toto ewe olunjisinjia khunjila ingololofu.

42:53.t: Injila ya Nyasaye wa bioosi bia mwikulu nende bia khushialo nebibie. Koo, manye mbu amakhuwa koosi kalikalukha khu Nyasaye.

43:3.t: Toto efwe khwachikhola Ikurani yolwarabu khomunyoole okhumanya.

43:4.t: Ne toto eyo ili nende amaandiko karula khwifwe, niyoluyali, eyamachesi.

43:5.t: Koo, khuleshe okhubetsulisia mana khwibilile mbu shichila muli Abandu babura eshichelo?

43:6.t: Ne ni Abarumwa benga bakhwaranjilila okhuruma khubandu bakhale?

43:7.t: Ne abulaho Omurumwa yesiyesi wabetselanga halali bamukholelanga omubayo.

43:8.t: Ne khwasishia balia abali nende amaani okhushila bo. Ne okhuchelaasia khwa Abandu ba khale khwamala okhubura.

43:9.t: Ne nobareba mbu: “Ni wina waloonga likulu nende eshialo?” Toto balaboola mbu: “Nyasaye Owamaani, Omumanyi muno niye wabiloonga.”

43:10.t: Ulia wabakwalasilia liloba shinga obulili, mana nabarereramwo tsinjila khomunyoole okhulunjikha.

43:11.t: Ne ni ulia wishinjia amaatsi okhurula mwikulu khushichelo, nikhukalamusilia liloba liafwa, ne endio nilwa mulirusibwamwo.

43:12.t: Ne niye owaloonga buli eshindu eshisatsa nende eshikhasi, mana nabakasilia ebininwamwo biomumaatsi nende tsisolo tsiamuninangakhwo.

43:13.t: Kho mwikhale obulayi khumikongo chiatsio, mana mwitsulile emikabo chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi nimwakhamala okhwikhalakhwo obulayi, mana muboole mbu: “Obutswenufu nibwa ulia owakhuanguyilia bino mbu khubikhonyele, ne shikhwakhakholele abeene kano tawe.

43:14.t: Ne toto khulikalukha ewa Nyasaye wefu Omulesi.”

43:15.t: Ne mubasumba bebe bamukholelanga omukabo. Toto Omundu nomukhayi owahabulafu muno khumikabo chia Nyasaye.

43:16.t: Nohomba yebukulila Abana abakhaana mubiloonje bibie biayaloonga, mana nabawulila enywe Abana abasiani?

43:17.t: Ne yesiyesi mubo naboolelwa khukabachelasinjiakhwo Nyasaye Owetsimbabaasi, obweni bubwe bumaliyanga ti, ne yetsulamwo oburuma.

43:18.t: Koo, ulia wakhusibwa muburone, ne shanyala okhwinoosia obulai nayingananga tawe?

43:19.t: Ne bakhola Abamalaika abali abasumba ba Omunji Wetsimbabaasi mbu naabakhasi! Koo, balolakhwo okhulongwa khwabu? Obuloli bwabu bulihandikwa ne balireebwa.

43:20.t: Ne baboolanga mbu: “Omunji Wetsimbabaasi yenyanga, efwe shikhwakhabalaamile tawe.” Shibamanyile ako tawe. Babula liababoola halali obubeyi butswa.

43:21.t: Koo, khwabahelesiakhwo eshitabu imbeli wa shino, mana batilananga ninashio nibashiloonda?

43:22.t: Halali baboola mbu: “Toto efwe khwanyoola bapapa befu nibaloondanga idini yabu yilobole, ne efwe khuloondanga mubilenje biabu.”

43:23.t: Ne endio shikhwarumakhwo imbeli wuwo omwikanyilisi mulukongo lwosilwosi tawe, halali balia bali mubwokholo baboola mbu: “Efwe khwanyoola bapapa befu nibaloondanga idini yabu ilobole, nafu khuloondanga mubilenje biabu.”

43:24.t: Naboola mbu: “Kata nebarerera kobulunjifu obulayi okhushila biamwanyoola basenywe nibali ninabwo?” Nibaboola mbu: “Efwe toto khukhayile sa akamwarumwa ninako ako.”

43:25.t: Mana nikhubatila khumabii kabakhola. Kho hengakhwo, indukho yabakhayi shingala yali.

43:26.t: Ne olwa Ibrahim yaboolela Samwana nende Abandu bebe mbu: “Toto esie endi ehale muno nende kamulaamanga ako.

43:27.t: Halali ulia owalonga esie niye ulalunjisia.”

43:28.t: Ne nalikhola lino okhuba likhuwa liatong’a khulwibulo lulwe khobanyoole okhukalukha.

43:29.t: Halali khwasangasia bano nende abebusi babu okhula shinga obwatoto bwaboolela nende Omurumwa wa habulafu.

43:30.t: Ne olwa obwatoto bwaboolela, baboola mbu: “Buno ni obulosi, ne efwe toto khubukhayile.”

43:31.t: Ne nibaboola mbu: “Shichila shina Ikurani ino nileshibwa khumusatsa omukhongo mumatokho amakhongo kabili kano?”

43:32.t: Koo, abo nibo bakabanga tsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi? Efwe khwabakabila obulamu bwabu bwokhushialo hakari wabu, ne nikhuninia abaandi mubo okhushila abaandi khubichelo kho abaandi mubo banyoole okhukholela abaandi emilimo. Ne tsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi tsishila bioosi biabakhung’asinjia.

43:33.t: Ne bikhayanga okhuba mbu abandu banyala okhuba omukanda mulala, khwakhakholele balia abakhaya Nyasaye wabu Omulesi tsinzu tsiabu okhuba nende ebitsafu bia ifedha nende tsingasi tsiabu tsioosi tsiabaninilanga.

43:34.t: Nende emiliango chietsinzu tsiabu nende ebitanda biabayiekhangakhwo.

43:35.t: Nende oburone. Halali ako shini shiosishiosi tawe, halali ni omwikhoyo kwobulamu bwomushialo butswa. Ne mwikulu ili ewa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi niya balia abaria Nyasaye.

43:36.t: Ne ulia wikhola omuwofu khumakhuwa ka Nyasaye, khulamukholela Shetani abe omwitsa ulalekhana ninaye tawe.

43:37.t: Ne toto bo babekalilanga injila muno, ne abeene baparanga mbu balunjika.

43:38.t: Okhula shinga balikhwitsila, baliboola mbu: “Oh, manyanga bibetsanga ehale hakari wanje ninawe shinga ebukwe nende mumbo. Oli omwitsa omubii muno.”

43:39.t: Ne khulwo khuba mbu mwakhola obubii, shibulaho shilabakhoonya enywe olwa lelo mbu musanganga mwesi mushinyasio.

43:40.t: Koo, onyala okhukhola abekala amarwi bawulile, nohomba onyala okhulunjisia abawofu bali mubukori bwa habulafu?

43:41.t: Ne kata nikhukhuhiniaho, toto efwe khwitsa okhubarunga imongo.

43:42.t: Nohomba khulakhwechesia akakhwabalaka, nafu toto khuli nende obunyali khubo.

43:43.t: Mana tilana nende akawafimbulilwa, toto ewe oli khunjila ingololofu.

43:44.t: Ne toto kano ni ametsulisio khwiwe nende khubandu bao, ne mulitsa okhurebwa.

43:45.t: Ne reba Abakhwaruma imbeli wuwo mubarumwa befu, koo, khwakhola abanyasaye bandi balamwe balali Nyasaye Owetsimbabaasi tawe?

43:46.t: Ne toto khwaruma Musa nende ebimanyisio biefu khu Firauni nende abakhongo baye, mana naboola mbu: “Esie toto endi Omurumwa wa Nyasaye Omulesi webilonje bioosi.”

43:47.t: Olwa yabetsela nende ebimanyisio biefu, lola, nibachaka okhubitseshela khumubayo.

43:48.t: Ne shikhwabechesia eshimanyisio shiosishiosi tawe, halali neshikhongo muno okhushila eshindi shilia, mana nikhubatila khushinyasio khobanyoole okhukalukha.

43:49.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Ewe omulosi, khusabile Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi indache yayakhulaka, (nakhurusiliaho eshinyasio shino luno), efwe toto khulalunjikha.”

43:50.t: Olwa khwabarusiliaho eshinyasio esho, lola habwene nahabwene nibafunaka indache.

43:51.t: Firauni nalaanga mubandu bebe nababoolela mbu: “Enywe Abandu banje, shendi Omwami welitokho lia Misri, ne emialo chino chiburanga hasi wanje. Koo, shimulolangakhwo tawe?

43:52.t: Nohomba esie shendi noluyali okhushila omuteshele uno, ulanyala okhwinoosia amakhuwa obulayi tawe?

43:53.t: Ne shichila shina nalafwalwa ebifwalo bia mumakhono, bieyidhahabu, nohomba yetse nende Abamalaika halala ninaye (bokhumukhoonya)?”

43:54.t: Mana nabayila Abandu bebe mana nibamufuchilila, toto abo bali Abandu abakori.

43:55.t: Kho olwa bakhusinyisia, khwabatila obutinyu mana nikhubasishia mumaatsi boosi.

43:56.t: Ne nikhubakhola okhuba abaranjilili nende eshilolelo khubandu beyinyuma.

43:57.t: Ne olwa Omwana wa Mariam yachelasibwa (nende Adam), lola, Abandu bo boopa oluyoka khulwa elo.

43:58.t: Mana nibaboola mbu: “Abanyasaye befu nibo abalayi nohomba Ye?” Ne shibakhuchelasilia bario tawe halali amayinji butswa. Ne abo ni Abandu bokhusolana butswa.

43:59.t: Naye (Isa) shali nobunyali tawe halali yali Omusumba wakhwahelesia tsimbabaasi mana nikhumukhola eshilolelo khubana ba Israili.

43:60.t: Ne khwenyanga, khwakharerere Abamalaika khushialo nibaloondana.

43:61.t: Ne toto ye (Isa) ni eshimanyisio shieyinyanga yeyindukho. Kho mulakhatema mwakanakana khwelio tawe, ne munondekhwo. Ino niyo injila ingololofu.

43:62.t: Ne toto Shetani alakhatema yabekalila tawe. Toto ye ni Omusuku wenyu owa habulafu.

43:63.t: Ne olwa Isa yetsa nende ebifune bia habulafu, yaboola mbu: “Toto ebeetsele nende amachesi nende okhubenoosilia kalia akamukabukhanangamwo, kho rie Nyasaye mana muuwulile esie.

43:64.t: Toto Nyasaye niye Omulesi wanje nende Omulesi wenyu, kho mumulaame yenyene butswa. Ino niyo injila ingololofu.”

43:65.t: Mana emikanda nichikabukhana abeene khubeene. Kho eshinyasio shieyinyanga indulu shiliba khu balia bakhola amabii.

43:66.t: Koo, shina shiabaliindanga, halali indukho ibetsele mapwoka nabo nibalamanyile tawe.

43:67.t: Abeetsa ba mbusia ngonia inyanga eyo baliba Abasuku abeene khubeene, halali balia abaria Nyasaye.

43:68.t: Enywe Abasumba banje, shimulaba noburi inyanga yino tawe, neshimulabeelela tawe.

43:69.t: Balia Abasuubila ebimanyisio biefu mana nibelekhuula khu Nyasaye (nibaba abasalamu).

43:70.t: "Injile mumukunda kwomwikulu enywe nende abakhaye benyu musangasibwemwo."

43:71.t: Balihelesibwa luno nende lulia ebisanda nende ebikaye bia idhahabu, ne bilibamwo bia emioyo chikombanga nende ebisangasia tsimoni, ne enywe mulimenyamwo tsinyaanga tsioosi.

43:72.t: Oko niko omukunda kwomwikulu (Janna) okwamulihebwa khulwa kamwakholanga.

43:73.t: Mulibaamwo nende ebiamo ebinji biamulilia khubio.

43:74.t: Toto abetsimbi baliba mushinyasio shia mumulilo kwa Jahannam tsinyanga tsioosi.

43:75.t: Shibalihulusibwa okhurulana nende eshinyasio esho tawe, ne omo baliwesiakhwo omwoyo (okhurulamwo) muno.

43:76.t: Ne shikhwabakholela amabii tawe, halali boo abeene nibo bali abamabii.

43:77.t: Ne balikhupa oluyoka nibalanga: “Ewe Malik! Boolela Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi akhufwisie.” Naye alibaboolela mbu: “Enywe toto omo butswa nimwamulamenya.”

43:78.t: Toto khwabetsela nende obwatoto, halali abanji mwinywe mwali mwakhaya obwatoto.

43:79.t: Nohomba babusia amalako kabu. Ne toto nefwe babusinjia.

43:80.t: Nohomba baparanga mbu efwe shikhuwulilanga akobwifisi nende kokhumonyana kabu tawe? Eeh tawe. Abarumwa befu bali ninabo bahandikanga kabakholanga.

43:81.t: Boola mbu: “Nyasaye abetsanga nende Omwana, nesie wakhabeele weyimbeli okhumulaama.”

43:82.t: Ni omutswenufu Nyasaye Omulesi welikulu nende eshialo, Nyasaye Omulesi weshisaala shioluyali ehale nende koosi kabamureetsangakhwo.

43:83.t: Ne baleshe bakoyaane nibabaya, okhula shinga balinyoolana nende inyanga yabalakwa.

43:84.t: Naye niye Nyasaye mwikulu khandi ni Nyasaye mushialo, naye niye Omuchesi, Omumanyi muno.

43:85.t: Ni woluyali ulia owuli nobwami bwomwikulu nende mushialo, nende bioosi bilimwo, ne niye uli nobumanyi bwebise bieyindukho, ne ewuwe ni wamulikalusibwa.

43:86.t: Ne abamulaamanga abalali Ye tawe babula obunyali bwokhusabila Omundu eshileshelo, halali ulia wobuloli bwatoto, nabo bamanya.

43:87.t: Ne nobareeba mbu ni wina wabaloonga bo? Toto bweene balaboola mbu: "Ni Nyasaye." Kho ni hena wabakalukhanibungwa?

43:88.t: Ne okhuboola khukhwe (Omurumwa) mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, bano ni Abandu balasuubila tawe.”

43:89.t: Kho baleshele ne baboolele amakhuwa komuleembe. Baliitsa okhumanya!

44:3.t: Toto efwe khwashishia mushilo shietsikhabi, toto efwe khuli abekanyilisi.

44:4.t: Toto eshilo esho buli likhuwa eliamachesi linoosibungwa.

44:5.t: Likhuwa lirula khwifwe, toto efwe nefwe Abaruma.

44:6.t: Tsimbabaasi okhurula khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, toto Ye ni Omuwulili po, Omumanyi muno.

44:7.t: Nyasaye Omulesi welikulu nende eshialo, nende bioosi bili hakari wabio, toto nimuli mbu mwasuubila noobwatoto.

44:8.t: Abulaho Nyasaye wundi halali Ye tawe, alamusinjia ne afwisinjia. Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi khandi owabasenywe beyimbeli.

44:9.t: Halali bo bali mutsinganakani, babayanga sa.

44:10.t: Kho linda inyanga yelikulu liakharusie omwosi kulolekha.

44:11.t: Kulifunikha Abandu, shino ni eshinyasio eshilulu.

44:12.t: "Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, khuyiniliekhwo eshinyasio, toto efwe khulasuubila."

44:13.t: Okhwitsulila khwabu khubakhoonya shina bulano, ne toto Omurumwa Omwinoosia yamala okhubeetsela.

44:14.t: Mana nibamuhelesia omukongo, nibaboola mbu: “Uno yechesibwa, naye ni Omulalu.”

44:15.t: Toto efwe khwitsa okhuyiniaho eshinyasio hatiti, ne toto enywe mulakalukha shinga mwali.

44:16.t: Inyanga yakhulikhupa eshikhupo eshikhongo, toto efwe khulibarunga imongo.

44:17.t: Ne toto efwe khwakholela Abandu ba Firauni amatemo imbeli wabu, ne yaboolela Omurumwa woluyali.

44:18.t: Naboola mbu: “Mumbe (akeekhoyeshele), Abasumba ba Nyasaye, toto esie endi Omurumwa omwisikwa khwinywe.

44:19.t: Ne mulakholela Nyasaye obufuru tawe. Toto esie ndalabarerera ebifune biyela.

44:20.t: Ne esie ndiliinda khu Nyasaye wanje Omulesi khandi Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi mulandasa amachina tawe.

44:21.t: Ne nimulasuubila tawe, be ehale ninasi.”

44:22.t: Nasaba Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi mbu: “Toto bano ni Abandu abamabii.”

44:23.t: Mana Nyasaye naboola mbu: “Rula nende Abasumba banje eshilo. Toto enywe mulalondwakhwo.

44:24.t: Ne oleshe inyanza endio ngayilekhaane. Toto abo ni omukanda kweliyie kwitsa okhusishibwa.”

44:25.t: Ne balekha emikunda chinga nende tsisebele?

44:28.t: Endio nilwa kali, mana nikhuhelesia ako Abandu bandi.

44:29.t: Ne likulu nohomba eshialo shibialila khulwa bo tawe, ne shibahebwa ebise tawe.

44:30.t: Ne toto khwahabina Abana ba Israili okhurulana nende eshinyasio shiokhubatutuyia.

44:31.t: Okhurulana nende Firauni, toto ye yali Omufuru mubalia babura eshichelo.

44:32.t: Ne toto khwabalobola khumachesi kefu, okhushila ebilonje bindi bioosi.

44:33.t: Ne nikhubahelesia ebimanyisio biefu, amatemo kalolekha.

44:35.t: “Khubulaho okhufwa khundi tawe halali okhufwa khweimbeli sa, ne efwe shikhulilamusibwa tawe.

44:36.t: Mana lamusiekhwo basefwe nikali mbu muboolanga habwene.”

44:37.t: Koo, abo naabalayi muno nohomba Abandu ba Tuba’ nende balia baliho imbeli wabu bakhwasishia? Toto abo bali abamabii.

44:38.t: Ne efwe shikhwaloonga likulu nende bioosi bilimwo khumubayo tawe.

44:39.t: Shikhwabiloonga tawe halali khubwatoto, ne abaanji mubo shibamanyile tawe.

44:40.t: Toto inyanga yokhubusia eshina ni ebise biabu biabarererwaho boosi.

44:41.t: Inyanga yomwitsa omukhoonyi shalikhoonya owashie nende shiosishiosi tawe, ne shibalihabinwa tawe.

44:42.t: Halali ulia owa Nyasaye alihelesia tsimbabaasi. Toto ye niwa Amaani, Owobukoosia muno.

44:46.t: Shinga okhurabachila khwa amatsi kayile pa.

44:47.t: Baliboolelwa mbu: “Mumutile mana mumusukune hakari womulilo kwa Jahim.

44:48.t: Mana muyombole khumurwe kukwe eshinyasio shia amaatsi karabachilanga.

44:49.t: Pila.. toto (mbu newe welolanga), newe Omwami, Woluyali?

44:51.t: Toto abaria Nyasaye baliba habundu womulembe.

44:53.t: Balifwala tsingubo tsinderere tsinyangu tsia hariri..nende tsisiro .. nibahengana.

44:54.t: Endio nilwo lwakaliba, ne khulibabashila mahurul-ain (abakhana bomwikulu).

44:55.t: Bali laangamwo ebiamo bietsimbia tsioosi nibekhaale nomulembe.

44:56.t: Omo shibalipilamwo lifwa tawe, halali okhufwa khwokhuranga. Ne Nyasaye alibalinda okhurulana nende eshinyasio shia Jahim.

44:57.t: Tsino nitsimbabaasi okhurula khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, okho nikho okhubura okhukhongo.

44:58.t: Ne efwe khwaikhola (Ikurani) okhuba inyangu khululimi lulwo kho banyoole okhwitsulila.

44:59.t: Kho liinda, bosi toto baliindanga butswa.

45:2.t: Okhwishibwa khweshitabu shino khurula khu Nyasaye Owaamani, Owamachesi muno.

45:3.t: Toto khulikulu nende khushialo biliwo ebimanyisio khubalia basuubila.

45:4.t: Nende mukhuloongwa khwenyu, nende tsisolo tsiayaswaania, ebimanyisio bilimwo khubandu basuubilanga muno.

45:5.t: Ne okhubusania khweshilo nende eshitere nende omukabo kwa Nyasaye yeshinjia okhurula hekulu, mana nalamusia khukwo eshialo okhurula mulifwa liashio, nende okhubotokhana khwomuyeka, ebimanyisio bilimwo khubandu bekhonyelanga obwongo.

45:6.t: Tsino ni tsinyaali tsia Nyasaye khukhusomelanga khubwatoto, ne makhuwa shina kabanyala okhusuubila nikalali ka Nyasaye nende ebimanyisio bibie tawe?

45:7.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo shilinyoola buli omubeyi po, wetsimbi muno.

45:8.t: Awulilanga tsinyaali tsia Nyasaye nitsisomwa khulwa ye, niyekhulumamia khukalia kayakaywa, niyelola opara mbu shaatsiwulilekhwo tawe. Kho musuubisie eshinyasio eshilulu.

45:9.t: Ne namanya eshindu shiosishiosi mutsinyaali tsiefu nashikhonga okhuba omubayo. Abandu abo nibo baliba nende eshinyasio shiokhututuyibwa.

45:10.t: Inyuma wabu ni Jahannam, kabakhola shikalibakhoonya shiosishiosi tawe, nohomba balia babakhola okhuba abalindi, ne baliba neshinyasio eshikhongo.

45:11.t: Buno ni obulunjifu, ne balia bakhaya ebimanyisio bia Nyasaye wabu Omulesi balinyoola eshinyasio eshilulu eshibii.

45:12.t: Nyasaye niye wakhola inyanza ibarumushile kho ebininwa bichendemwo khubunyali bubwe, ne kho mukhaabemwo omukabo kukwe, kho munyoole okhupa orio.

45:13.t: Niye wakhola bibarumushile ebili mwikulu nende mushialo bioosi okhurula khuye. Toto mu ako bilimwo ebimanyisio khubandu baparanga.

45:14.t: Boolela abasuubila mbu baleshele balia abalasuubilanga tsinyanga tsia Nyasaye tawe, kho anyoole okhubarunga Abandu khukabakholanga.

45:15.t: Ulia ukhola amalayi, yekholelanga omwene, ne ukhola amabii kali khuye, mana mulikalusibwa ewa Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi.

45:16.t: Ne toto khwahelesia Abana ba Israili Eshitabu, nende amalako nende oburumwa, mana nikhubakaba emikabo emilayi, ne nikhubakholela obulayi muno okhushila Abandu boosi.

45:17.t: Mana nikhubahelesia amalako kalolekha kali habulafu, ne shibawukhana tawe halali nibakhanyoola obumanyi, khulwe ishinda yali hakari wabu. Toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi alibusia eshina hakari wabu inyanga yeyindukho khukabawukhananga.

45:18.t: Mana nikhukhura ewe khunjila ya amakhuwa kano, kho iloondekhwo, ne olaloonda obwikombi bwa balia balamaanyile tawe.

45:19.t: Abo shibalikhukhonyakhwo shiosishiosi imbeli wa Nyasaye tawe, ne toto abonooni ni abetsa abeene khubeene, ne Nyasaye ni Omwitsa wa balia bamuria.

45:20.t: Bino ni ebimanyisio bia Abandu okhulolelakhwo, nende obulunjifu nende tsimbabaasi khubandu basubilanga nobwatoto.

45:21.t: Nohomba abakholi betsimbii baparanga mbu khwakhabakhole shinga balia abasuubila mana nibakhola amalayi, nashilala okhumenya khwabu nende okhufwa khwabu? Ni obubii buli burie bwababusinjia.

45:22.t: Ne Nyasaye yaloonga likulu nende eshialo khubwatoto, ne khobuli Omundu arungwe khukayakhola, nabo shibalikholelwa obubii tawe.

45:23.t: Koo, walolakhwo ulia wakhola obwikombi bubwe okhuba nyasaye wuwe mana Nyasaye namukosia, kata nali nende obumanyi, mana naasuba khumarwi keke nende khumwoyo kukwe, ne nara khutsimoni tsitsie shiokhutsisuba kho owakhamulunjisia ni wina nalali Nyasaye tawe, shimwitsulilangakhwo?

45:24.t: Ne baboola mbu: “Buno ni obulamu bwokhushialo, khufwitsanga ne khumenyanga, ne shibulaho shikhusishia tawe halali tsinyanga.” Ne babula obumanyi bwako, halali baparanga butswa.

45:25.t: Ne nibasomelwa tsinyaali tsiefu tsia habulafu, babula eshifune halali baboola mbu: “Lamusiekhwo bapapa befu nikali mbu muboolanga akatoto.”

45:26.t: Boola mbu: “Nyasaye niye ubalamusinjia khandi niye ulibafwisia, mana alibakhung’asia inyanga yeyindukho ibulamwo obukanakani tawe, halali Abandu abanji shibamanyile tawe."

45:27.t: Ne obwaami bwomwikulu nende khushialo nibwa Nyasaye, ne inyanga yeyindukho olwa yiliula, abonooni bakhasikhe.

45:28.t: Ne olilola buli omukanda nikusikame hasi, buli omukanda kulilangwa okhutsia okhusoma eshitabu shiakwo. Lelo mularungwa kamwakholanga.

45:29.t: Eshitabu shiefu shino shiboolanga khwinywe khubwatoto, toto efwe khwahandikanga akamwakholanga.

45:30.t: Ne balia basuubila mana nibakhola amalayi, Nyasaye wabu Omulesi alibenjisia mutsimbabaasi tsitsie. Okho nikho okhubura khwa habulafu.

45:31.t: Ne balia bakhaya baliboolelwa mbu: “Shimwasomelungwakho tsinyaali tsianje mana nimuba nende obufuru mumioyo chienyu, mana nimuba Abandu ababii?"

45:32.t: Ne olwa liboolwa mbu: "Toto indache ya Nyasaye niyahabwene, ne inyanga yeindukho ibula tsinganakani", nanyu muboola mbu: "Khukorerwe indukho eyo. Khuparirisinjiakhwo butswa, ne khubula obusubili bwatoto.”

45:33.t: Mana obubii bwabakhola bwakhabaloleshele, ne kalibolela kalia akabakholelanga omubayo.

45:34.t: Baliboolelwa mbu: “Olwalelo khubebilila shingala enywe mwebilila omukhung’ano kweyinyanga yenyu ino. Eshimenyo shienyu nimumulilo, ne mubula babahabina.

45:35.t: Khulwo khuba enywe mwakholelanga tsinyaali tsia Nyasaye omubayo mana obulamu bwokhushialo nibubakatilisia.” Kholeelo shibalirusibwamwo tawe nohomba shibalileshelwa tawe.

45:36.t: Kho okhwitsomibwa nikhwa Nyasaye Omulesi we likulu, Omulesi weshialo, Omulesi webilonjo bioosi.

45:37.t: Ne obukhongo ni obubwe butswa yenyene, mwikulu nende khushialo, naye ni owa Amaani, Omuchesi muno.

46:2.t: Okhwishibwa khweshitabu khurula khu Nyasaye owa Amaani, Omuchesi muno.

46:3.t: Shikhwaloonga likulu nende eshialo nende bioosi bili hakari wabio halali khubwatoto nende ebise biarebwaho. Ne balia bakhaya shibabukulanga oluchendo mukabekanyilisibungwa tawe.

46:4.t: Boola mbu: “Mulolangakhwo biamulamanga bilali Nyasaye, munzechesie ni shina shabialonga shili khushialo, nohomba bali nende obulala khu walonga likulu, mundererekhwo eshitabu eshialiho imbeli wa shino, nohomba eshimanyisio shiosishiosi shiobumanyi nikali mbu muboolanga obwatoto?”

46:5.t: Ni omukori omukhongo uli arie ushilakhwo ulamaanga abalali Nyasaye tawe, abalalibafuchilila okhula inyanga yeyindukho tawe, nabo kata bakorerwe obusabi bwabu obo.

46:6.t: Ne olwa Abandu balikhung’asibwa, baliba abasuku khubo, ne balikaana okhulamwa khwabu okho.

46:7.t: Ne nibasomelwa tsinyaali tsiefu etsili habulafu, abakhayi baboolanga nibakhalola obwatoto mbu: “Buno ni obulosi bwa habulafu.”

46:8.t: Nohomba baboolanga mbu: “Yekasiliasa omwene”, boola mbu: “Nikali mbu ndekasilia omwene, enywe shimulikhoonyakhwo shosishosi imbeli wa Nyasaye tawe. Ye amanyile muno kamutiabukhanga. Ye niye omuloli hakari wanje ninenyu, naye ni Omunji wobulesheli, Owetsimbabasi muno.”

46:9.t: Boola mbu: “Esie shendi omwishemuli (wokhwibukhasa) mubarumwa tawe, ne engorwa ngala ndilikholwa nohomba enywe. Enondanga butswa kefimbulilungwa nende Nyasaye. Ne shendi shiosishiosi tawe halali omwikanyilisi wa habulafu.”

46:10.t: Boola mbu: “Mulola murie nikali mbu kano karula khu Nyasaye, mana mukakhaye, mana abeho omuloli okhurula mubaana ba Israili khukali shinga kano, mana nasuubila, nanyu mukhaye?” Toto Nyasaye shalunjisinjia betsimbi tawe.

46:11.t: Ne abakhayi baboolela abasuubila mbu: “Kano kabetsanga mbu namalayi, shibakhakhuranjilile efwe tawe.” Ne olwabakhaya okhulunjikha khuko, baboola mbu: “Buno ni obubeyi bwa khale.”

46:12.t: Ne imbeli wuwe shaliho eshitabu shia Musa, shiobulunjifu nende tsimbabaasi, ne shino ni eshitabu shitinyisia, shiolulimi olwarabu kho shikanyilisie abetsimbi ne shisuubisie abakholi bamalayi.

46:13.t: Toto balia baboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi ni Allah (Nyasaye)”, mana nibaba abalunjifu, shibaliba nobuyendi tawe ne shibalibeelela tawe.

46:14.t: Abo nibo Abandu bomwikulu, balimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi, omurungo khukabakholanga.

46:15.t: Khwalomesia omundu akholele abebusi bebe babili amalayi. Nyinamwana yamuchinga munda khukhusanda ne namwibula khukhunyakhana. Okhumuchinga munda nende okhumuleshesia okhununa ni emiesi amakhumi kataru. Okhula ngala yola omundu omukhongo mana niyola emika amakhumi kane, naboola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, nyalila enyoole okhupa orio khumikabo chichio chiawambelesia nende khubebusi banje, ne ekhole amalayi kakhuchamisia, ne ungasilie olwibulo lwanje, esie toto ndikanile khwiwe, ne esie toto endi mubasalamu.”

46:16.t: Abo nibo bakhulifuchilila ebikhole biabu biabakholanga, ne khulibaleshela tsimbii tsiabu, ne baliba mubandu bomwikulu. (Ino ni) Indache yatoto yabalakungwa.

46:17.t: Ne ulia wekhanila abebusi bebe babili, nababoolela mbu: “Murisinjia mbu ndililamusibwa, ne lwabura olwibulo olunji neshili okhubaho”, ne abebusi abo basabanga obukhoonyi khu Nyasaye nibaboola mbu: “Abaane ewe suubila, toto indache ya Nyasaye niyatoto”, naye aboola mbu: “Ni shina shino? Tsikhali butswa tsingano tsia abakhale.”

46:18.t: Abo nibo bamakhuwa kabu kabusibwa mubandu babura imbeli wabu Mumajini nende Abandu. Toto abo banyoola okhusikha.

46:19.t: Ne boosi baliba nende ebichelo biawukhane khukabakhola, kho abarunje ebikhole biabu mubwitsufu, nabo shibalikholelwa obubii tawe.

46:20.t: Ne inyanga yabakhayi balirerwa mumulilo, baliboolelwa mbu: “Mwamala okhubukula ebilayi bienyu khubulamu bwokhushialo, mana nimubwikhoyela, kho lelo luno mularungwa eshinyasio shietsisoni khulwa okhukhola obufuru khwenyu khushialo khunjila ilali yatoto tawe, nende khulwa amabii kenyu kamwakholanga.”

46:21.t: Ne itsulila omusiani wababu A’d, olwa yekanyilisia abandu be khumatulo koluyeshe, ne toto abekanyilisi abanji babura imbeli nende inyuma wuwe, nibaboola mbu: “Mulalaama shiosishiosi tawe halali Nyasaye. Esie toto ebaririranga eshinyasio shieinyanga ikhongo.”

46:22.t: Baboola mbu: “Okhwitsile okhukhura ehale nende (amalamo ka) abanyasaye befu? Khakhurererakhwo kokhulakanga ako noli mubalia baboolanga obwatoto.”

46:23.t: Yaboola mbu: “Toto obumanyi bweinyanga eyo buli khu Nyasaye, ne eboosilinjia butswa kendumilwe ninako, halali esie ebalolanga mbu muli abandu bakholanga obusilu.”

46:24.t: Mana olwa bashilola (shinga) lileesi niliitsilanga amatwoma kabu, baboola mbu: “Lileesi lino nilia okhukhukwisilia ifula?” Khane nikalali kario tawe, halali kano nikamwerushilanga, omuyeka kulimwo eshinyasio eshilulu.

46:25.t: Kusishia buli eshindu khubunyali bwa Nyasaye wakwo Omulesi, mana nibiba mbu shishikhalolekhana tawe halali tsinzu tsiabu butswa. Endio nelwakhurunganga Abandu betsimbi.

46:26.t: Ne toto khwabamenyiamwo obulayi, shibili shinga khwabamenyia enywe tawe, mana nikhubahelesia tsimbulililo nende tsindolelo nende emioyo, mana amarwi kabu nohomba tsimoni tsiabu nohomba emioyo chiabu shibiabakhonyakhwo shiosishiosi tawe shichila bo bakhayanga ebimanyisio bia Nyasaye mana ebiabakholelanga omubayo nibibaterera.

46:27.t: Ne toto khwasishia tsingongo tsisubilana ninanyu, nekhwatsirumila ebimanyisio bakhaba bario banyoola okhukalukha.

46:28.t: Mana nibalabahabinakhwo balia ababalamanga abalali Nyasaye tawe. Halali babakorakhwo, ne obo nibwo obubeyi bwa bachikhanga.

46:29.t: Ne olwa khwachomia omukanda kwa majini okhwitsa khwiwe okhuwulilisia Ikurani. Olwa bayuwulila, baboola mbu: “Ulilisie.” Olwa yamalwa okhusoomwa, bakalushila abaashiabwe okhubekanyilisia.

46:30.t: Baboola: “Enywe abashiefwe, toto efwe khuwulile eshitabu shiarumwa inyuma wa Musa shifuchilisania nende kalia kaliho imbeli wuwe, ne shilunjisinjia khubwatoto nende khunjila ingololofu.

46:31.t: Enywe Abandu befu, fuchilile omulanji wa Nyasaye, ne mumusuubile (Nyasaye), alabaleshela tsimbi tsienyu, ne alabekalila eshinyasio eshilulu.

46:32.t: Ne ulafuchilila omulanji wa Nyasaye tawe, shalishila khushialo tawe ne shaliba nende abalimuliinda imbeli wuwe tawe. Abo bali mubukori obwa habulafu.”

46:33.t: Koo, shibalolanga mbu toto Nyasaye owalonga likulu nende eshialo, ne shiyachong’a khulwa okhubilonga tawe, mbu ni omunyali muno wokhulamusia abafu? Nendio. Ye toto nomunyali muno wabuli eshindu.

46:34.t: Ne inyanga yabakhayi balirerwa khumulilo, mana bareebwe mbu: “Kano shikali katoto?” Baliboola mbu: “Ni toto khwitsuba khu Nyasaye wefu Omulesi.” Baliboolelwa mbu: “Mana pile eshinyasio khulwa okhukhaya khwenyu khwamwakhayanga.”

46:35.t: Kho wifwile shinga befwila Abarumwa bokhwifwila okhukhongo muno, ne olabayungubanilia tawe. Toto inyanga yabalilola kabalakungwa, baliba shinga shibamenyakhwo khushialo halali lisaa lilala butswa mushitere. Ngako kaboolele. Kho, shibasishibungwa tawe halali Abandu ababii.

47:1.t: Balia bakhaya mana nibekalila injila ya Nyasaye, alikosia (alinyasia) ebikhole biabu.

47:2.t: Ne balia basuubila, mana nibakhola amalayi, mana nibasuubila khukeshibwa khu Mohammad, nako ni obwatoto okhurula khu Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, alabaleshela tsimbi tsiabu, ne alabakaasilia obulamu bwabu.

47:3.t: Ako nilwokhuba mbu abakhayi baloonda obukori, ne balia abasuubila baloonda obwatoto okhurula khu Nyasaye wabu Omulesi. Endio nilwa Nyasaye achelasilinjia Abandu ifwani yabu.

47:4.t: Ne nimubukana nende abakhayi, khuye amakosi kabu okhula shinga mubatosia, mubaboye emikoye. Okhula hawo munyala okhubalekhula khubulayi, nohomba benunule, okhula shinga liyie liwa. Ne endio, Nyasaye yenyanga yakhabashilile omwene, halali yenya okhubatema abeene khubeene. Ne balia berwa khunjila ya Nyasaye, shalikosia (shalinyasia) ebikhole biabu tawe.

47:6.t: Ne alabenjisia mumukunda kwomwikulu kwa yabamanyia.

47:7.t: Enywe Abasuubila, nimuhabina Nyasaye, yesi alabahabina, ne alatinyia amakulu kenyu.

47:8.t: Ne balia bakhaya, khubo ni okhutiba, ne alikosia (alinyasia) ebikhole biabu.

47:9.t: Endio nilwokhuba mbu basila aka Nyasaye yeshia mana nanyasia ebikhole biabu.

47:10.t: Shibachendakhwo khushialo balola indukho ya balia bali imbeli wabu tawe? Nyasaye yabasishia, ne abakhayi bano, balikholelwa shinga endio.

47:11.t: Endio nilwokhubeela Nyasaye nomuliindi wabasuubili, ne toto abakhayi babula omuliindi.

47:12.t: Toto Nyasaye alinjisia Abasuubila mana nibakhola amalayi mumikunda chomwikulu chiburangamwo emialo. Ne balia bakhaya, bekhoyanga nibalia shinga ebiayo biliitsanga, ne mumulilo nishio eshimenyo shiabu.

47:13.t: Ne tsingongo tsinga tsiali na amaani amanji okhushila olukongo lulwo luno lwakhutafia, khwabasishia, ne abulaho wabahabina tawe.

47:14.t: Koo, ulia uli nende obulafu okhurula khu Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, yakhaba shinga ulia wakaasilibwa amabii keke akalole mbu naamalayi, mana nibaloonda eshihonya shyabu?

47:15.t: Ifwani yomukunda kwomwikulu kwarecheshelwa abaria Nyasaye, emialo chilimwo chia amatsi kabulamwo obutukhulu, nende emialo chia amabeele kalaboyanga tawe, nende emialo chia amalwa keshiuya khubanywi, nende emialo chiobuushi obulafu tswe, ne balimwo nende tsimbia tsioosi tsiebiamo, nende obulesheli okhurula khu Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, bakhaba shinga balia baliba mumulilo tsinyanga tsioosi, nibanywesibwa amatsi kayile pa, nikateta amala kabu?

47:16.t: Ne mubo baliwo bakhurechelesinjia, mana nibarula woli, bareebanga balia bahebwa obumanyi mbu: “Ni shina shiayakhaboola bulaano?" Abo nibo ba Nyasaye yekala emioyo chiabu, mana nibaloonda eshihonya shie emioyo chiabu.

47:17.t: Ne balia balunjikha, yabameta obulunjifu mana nabanyalila okhumuria.

47:18.t: Kho balikho nende shiabalindanga halali ni indukho ilibapwoka. Ne toto ebimanyisio biayo biamala okhwitsa. Ne indukho eyo niyiliboolela, okhwitsulila khwabu khulibakhonya shina?

47:19.t: Ne manya mbu abulaho ukhoyeshele okhulaamwa khubwatoto halali Nyasaye. Ne saba eshileshelo khulwa tsimbi tsitsio, nende khulwa abasuubili beshisatsa nende abasuubili abeshikhasi. Ne Nyasaye amanyire kamukholanga wamutsire eshitere nende kamukholanga eshiro nimwakhakalukha wamumenyanga.

47:20.t: Ne Abasuubili baboolanga mbu: “Shichila shina nileshibwa isura?” Ne niyishibwa isura yelilako mana khwarumbulamwo okhupana, olalola balia bemioyo chiabu chilimwo obulwale bakhuhenganga shinga ulia womwoyo kukwe kurula nafwitsanga, halali nobulayi khubo.

47:21.t: Okhutila amalako ka Nyasaye nende (okhusunga) amakhuwa amalayi. Ne likhuwa nilimalile okhusuubilwa (lilako lieliye), babetsanga bobwatoto khu Nyasaye, bwakhabere obulayi khubo.

47:22.t: Ne muparanga nimuhelesia Nyasaye omukongo mbu mulakhola obwonooni khushialo nende okhwira olwikho?

47:23.t: Abo nibo ba Nyasaye yaheresia eshilamo, mana nabekasia amarwi, mana nawofusia tsimoni tsiabu.

47:24.t: Ne shibaparangakhwo Ikurani ino tawe, nohomba emioyo chiabu chilikhwo amakafuli kachio.

47:25.t: Toto balia bakalukha inyuma nibakhamala okhumanya obulunjifu, Shetani yabarechekha khuburono bwa khushialo ne nabakatia mbu baliba nobulamu oburambi.

47:26.t: Ako nikhulwokhuba mbu baboolela balia balenyanga okhuwulila aka Nyasaye yeshia tawe mbu: “Khwitsa okhubawulila mumakhuwa kandi”, ne Nyasaye amanyile akefisile mumioyo chiabu.

47:27.t: Ne kaliba karie olwa Abamalaika balibafwisia, nibaboopa obweni bwabu nende emikongo chiabu?

47:28.t: Ako nilwokhuba mbu balooonda kasinyisia Nyasaye ne nibakhaya kamusangasia, mana nakwisia ebikhole biabu.

47:29.t: Nohomba baparanga balia abali nobulwale mumioyo chiabu mbu Nyasaye shalira habulafu obusuku bwabu tawe?

47:30.t: Ne khwenyanga, khwakhakhwechesiye bo, ne wakhabamanyile khubimanyisio biabu. Ne toto olabamanya butswa khukhulomaloma khwabu. Ne Nyasaye yamanya muno ebikhole bienyu.

47:31.t: Ne toto khulabatema okhula khumanye abalwani khunjila ya Nyasaye mwinywe, nende abesumilisi, ne khulabatema mumakhuwa kenyu.

47:32.t: Toto balia bakhaya mana nibekalila injila ya Nyasaye, mana nibayingania Omurumwa, obulunjifu nibumalile okhubabela habulafu, shibalikholakho Nyasaye eshindu shiosishiosi tawe, ne alikwisia ebikhole biabu.

47:33.t: Enywe abasuubila, tiile amalako ka Nyasaye nende Omurumwa, ne mulanyasia ebikhole bienyu tawe.

47:34.t: Toto balia bakhaya mana nibekalila injila ya Nyasaye mana nibafwa nibali abakhayi, Nyasaye shalibaleshela tawe.

47:35.t: Kho mulatendeya mwasaba omulembe tawe, ne enywe nenywe balashila, ne Nyasaye ali ninanyu, ne shalabeema omurungo kwebikhole bienyu tawe.

47:36.t: Toto obulamu bwokhushialo nomubayo nende amakhuwa kabulamwo obukhala, ne nimusuubila mana mwaria Nyasaye, alabahelesia omurungo kwenyu, ne shalabareeba emiandu chienyu tawe.

47:37.t: Nabareba echo (emiandu chienywe), mana abatilile, muleemana, ne alarusia obusuku bwenyu habulafu.

47:38.t: Enywe mbabano mulangungwa muhane khunjila ya Nyasaye, ne mwinywe balimwo bemananga. Ne wimana, yemananga khububii bumutsila omwene. Ne Nyasaye nomuyinda, nanyu muli abatakha. Ne nimukhaya, Nyasaye alarera Abandu bandi balali enywe tawe, mana shibaliba shinga enywe tawe.

48:1.t: Toto efwe khwakhwikulila obushili bwa habulafu.

48:2.t: Kho Nyasaye akhuleshele ebionoono bibio biaranjilila nende biamalilikha, ne akhwitsusilie emikabo chichie, ne akhulunjisie khunjila ingololofu.

48:4.t: Niye weshia obuyeenzefu mumioyo chia abasuubili; kho anyoole okhubameeta obusuubili hekulu wobusuubili bwabu. Ne omukaanda kwabalwani beliyie kwomwikulu nende kwokhushialo ni kwa Nyasaye, ne Nyasaye niye Omumanyi po, Owamachesi muno.

48:5.t: Kho yenjisie Abasuubili abasatsa naabakhasi mumikunda chiomwikulu chiburangamwo emialo, balimenyamwo tsinyanga tsiosi, mana abaleshele tsimbi tsiabu, ne okho imbeli wa Nyasaye nikho okhubura okhukhongo.

48:6.t: Ne abahelesie eshinyasio abeshikhabili abasatsa naabakhasi, nende abatsokaasinjia Nyasaye abasatsa nabakhasi, abapariranga Nyasaye amaparo amabii. Kuliboolela omukalukhano omubii, ne Nyasaye yabasinyishila, mana nabatsuba, ne nabarecheshela omulilo kwa Jahannam, ne ni amakalushilo amabii muno.

48:7.t: Ne abalwani beliyie bo mwikulu nende bomushialo ni ba Nyasaye, ne Nyasaye ni wa amaani, Owamachesi muno.

48:8.t: Toto efwe khwakhuruma obe Omuloli, Omuboli wa amakhuwa koomwikhoyo, Omwikanyilisi.

48:9.t: Kho musuubile Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, ne mumukhoonye, ne mumuwe eshiribwa, ne mwitsomie Nyasaye itsuli nende ingolobe.

48:10.t: Toto balia bakhunganga omukhono toto bonganga Nyasaye omukhono. Omukhono kwa Nyasaye kuli hekulu wemikhono chiabu. Ne ulia ufunakanga indakano, afunaka khulwo okhuumisia omwoyo kukwe. Ne ulia ukhola kalia akayalaka Nyasaye, (Nyasaye) alamuhelesia omurungo omukhongo.

48:11.t: Ababeduwi (abamenyi bomumasokholio) batong’a inyuma balakhuboolela mbu: “Omwandu kwefu nende Abandu befu bakhutiyisiye, kho khusabile eshileshelo.” Baboolanga netsinimi tsiabu akalali mumioyo chiabu tawe. Boola mbu: “Ni wina unyala okhumukhoonya imbeli wa Nyasaye niyenya okhubaha eshinyasio nohomba niyenya okhubaha amalayi, nohomba niyenya okhubaha amabii? Ne Nyasaye amanyile muno kamukholanga.

48:12.t: Halali mwapara mbu Omurumwa nende Abasuubili shibalakalushila Abandu babu tawe, mana nikasangasia emioyo chienyu. Mana nimupara amaparo amabii muno, mana nimuba Abandu basikha.”

48:13.t: Ne ulia ulasuubila Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe tawe, toto efwe khwarecheshela abakhayi omulilo omululu.

48:14.t: Ne obwami bwo mwikulu nende mushialo ni bwa Nyasaye, aleshelanga wayenya, ne asandia wayenya, ne Nyasaye ni Omunji wobulesheli, Omukoosia muno.

48:15.t: Abatonga inyuma baliboola mbu: “Nimutsia okhubukula omwandu kweliyie (ghanima), leshe khutsie ninanyu." Benyanga okhukalukhania amakhuwa ka Nyasaye. Boola mbu: “Shimulakhulondakhwo tawe, endio nilwa Nyasaye yamala okhuboola imbeli awo.” Kho balaboola mbu: “Enywe muli neshikhalikhali ninafu”, halali shibali bamanya tawe halali hatiti.

48:16.t: Boolela batong’anga inyuma mubamenyi bomumasokholio (Ababeduwi) mbu: “Mwitsa okhulangwa mutsie khubandu ba amaani po, mukhupane ninabo nohomba balonde amalako. Ne nimuwulila mwaloonda, Nyasaye alabarunga omurungo omulayi. Ne nimukhaya shinga mwakhaya imbeli awo, Nyasaye alabaha eshinyasio eshilulu.”

48:17.t: Omuwofu shafunanibwa tawe, nohomba omulema shafunanibwa tawe, nohomba omulwale shafunanibwa tawe. Ne uloonda ka Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, Nyasaye alamwinjisia mumikunda chomwikulu chiburangamwo emialo hasi wachio. Ne ukhaya, alamuhelesia eshinyasio eshilulu.

48:18.t: Toto Nyasaye yachamila Abasuubili olwa bakhuunga omukhono hasi womusaala. Mana Nyasaye namanya kali mumioyo chiabu, mana nabeshilia obuyeenzefu, ne naabarunga obushili bwa hambi.

48:19.t: Nende omwandu omunji kweliyie kwabalabukula, ne Nyasaye niwaamani, Owamachesi muno.

48:20.t: Nyasaye yabalaka okhunyoola omwandu omunji kweliyie, mana abaranjilisiye kuno mbeli, mana niyekalila emikhono chiabandu okhuboolakhwo, ne shibe eshimanyisio khubasuubili, ne abalunjisie khunjila ingololofu.

48:21.t: Ne okundi (yetsa okhubahelesia) kwamushili okhunyoola tawe, Nyasaye yamala okhukutereera. Ne Nyasaye ni Omunyali muno wabuli eshindu.

48:22.t: Ne abakhayi balwananga ninanyu, bakhelushe nibakalukha inyuma, mana shibakhanyoolele owubalinda nohomba ubahabina tawe.

48:23.t: (Eyo niyo) Imelo ya Nyasaye eyabura khale, ne sholinyoola mu imelo ya Nyasaye obukalukhani tawe.

48:24.t: Ye niye wekalila emikhono chiabu okhuboolakhwo, ne emikhono chienyu okhuboolakhwo, mulitokho lia Makka, niyakhamala okhubaha enywe obushili khubo. Ne Nyasaye alolanga po kamukholanga.

48:25.t: Abo nibo bakhaya, mana nibabekalila okhwinjila mumusikiti kwoluyali, ne nibekalila eebiayo biokhusinzwa okhuula habundu wabio. Ne babulanga okhuba abasatsa abasuubili nende abakhasi abasuubili, abamulamanyile tawe, mwakhalwanile ninabo, mana mwenjila mububii okhurulana ninabo nimulamanyile tawe. Kho Nyasaye yenjisie owayenya mutsimbabaasi tsitsie. Ne bakabukhananga, toto khwakhahelesie abakhayi mubo eshinyasio eshilulu.

48:26.t: Olwa abakhayi bara mumioyo chiabu oburuma, oburuma bwobusilu, mana Nyasaye niyeeshia obuyeenzefu khumurumwa wuwe nende khubasuubili. Ne nabalomesia likhuwa liokhumuria, ne toto nibo bali balikhoyeshele nende beenelio, ne Nyasaye yamanya muno buli eshindu.

48:27.t: Ne toto Nyasaye yakhola amaloro komurumwa wuwe okhuba katoto. Toto mulenjila mumusikiti kwoluyali Nyasaye nachama – mumulembe, nimubechele emirwe chienyu nohomba nimututuyie liswi. Shimularia tawe. Mana yamanya kamulamanya tawe, mana nabaha imbeli wa kano obushili bwa hambi.

48:28.t: Niye waruma Omurumwa wuwe khubulunjifu nende idini yatoto, kho ayihelesie obushili khutsidini tsioosi. Ne Nyasaye niye Omuloli uyela.

48:29.t: Muhammad ni Omurumwa wa Nyasaye. Ne balia bali halala ninaye, bali nende amaani khubakhayi, ne babeelanilanga tsimbabaasi abeene khubeene. Olabalola nibeenama (rukuu), nibara hasi obweni po nibakoonya emikabo nende obuchami okhurula khu Nyasaye. Ebimanyisio biabu bili khubweni bwabu, okhurulana nende okhura hasi obweni bwabu (nibasujuda). Endio nilwa ili ifwani yabu mutawurati. Ne ifwani yabu mu injili, bali shinga omumela kwarusia imbandu yakwo, mana niikuyelesia amaani, mana nikunera, nikwema obulayi namasafu kakwo, mana nikusangasia abalima, kho asinyisie khukwo abakhayi. Nyasaye yalaka balia abasuubila mana nibakhola amalayi mubo, obulesheli nende omurungo omukhongo.

49:1.t: Enywe Abasuubila, mularanjilila imbeli wa Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe tawe, ne rie Nyasaye. Toto Nyasaye ni Omuwulili muno, Omumanyi muno.

49:2.t: Enywe Abasuubili, mulalomaloma khumioyo chiehekulu okhushila Omurumwa tawe, ne mulasunga naye noluyoka shinga okhulomaloma khwenyu abeene khubeene tawe; ebikhole bienyu bietsa biabiya nimukorerwe.

49:3.t: Toto balia beshinjia emioyo chiabu hasi nibalomaloma nomurumwa, abo nibo ba Nyasaye yoosia emioyo chiabu khulwa okhumuria. Bali nende eshileshelo nende omurungo omukhongo.

49:4.t: Toto balia bakhukhuumanga noli munzu, abanji babu shibekhonyelanga obwongo tawe.

49:5.t: Ne besumilisinjia okhula shinga orula, bwakhabeele obulayi khubo. Ne Nyasaye nomulesheli, Owetsimbabaasi muno.

49:6.t: Enywe Abasuubili, owetsimbi nabeetsela nende likhuwa, muliliinjemwo obulai, muletsa mwaumisia abandu mukhukorwa tawe, mana mwetsa mweyitsulisia khukamukholele.

49:7.t: Ne manye mbu Omurumwa wa Nyasaye ali mwinywe. Abaloondanga enywe mumakhuwa amanji, mwakhanyakhane. Halali Nyasaye yabakhola okhuchama obusuubili, mana naaburona mumioyo chienyu, ne nakhola obukhayi nende obukori nende obufuru okhubasinya. Abo nibo abakololofu.

49:8.t: Emikabo okhurula khu Nyasaye nende obwokholo. Ne Nyasaye ni Omumanyi po, Owamachesi muno.

49:9.t: Ne emikanda chibili chabasuubili nichikhupana, khole omulembe hakari wachio. Ne mulala muchio nikuranga okwashie, kulwaane okhuula kukalushe khumalako ka Nyasaye. Ne nikukalukha hasi, rere omulembe hakari wachio khubwatoto, ne muchiyaale khubuleeng’afu. Toto Nyasaye yachama abakholanga obuleeng’afu.

49:10.t: Toto Abasuubili ni abaananda, kho rere omulembe hakari wa abana benyu. Ne rie Nyasaye kho munyole okhuhelesibwa tsimbabaasi.

49:11.t: Enywe Abasuubila, abasatsa balalechelesia abatsa bashiabwe tawe, banyala okhuba abalayi okhubashila. Nohomba abakhasi balalechelesia abashiabwe tawe, banyala okhuba abalayi okhubashila. Ne mulanyekana tawe, ne mulalaangana amera kokhutsalasania tawe. Eliira liibi muno nokhurula mumalako ka Nyasaye nimumalilenje okhusuubila. Ne balia balekanila tawe, abo nibo ababii.

49:12.t: Enywe abasuubila, mwire ehale muno nende okhuparirisia. Toto okhuparirisia khundi ni ebionooni. Ne mulanonelesania tawe, ne mulamoonyana tawe. Koo, omundu yakhachama okhulia inyama yomulambo kwomusiani wabu ufwile? Shimunyala okhuchama elo tawe. Ne rie Nyasaye. Toto Nyasaye nomunji wobulesheli, Owobukoosia po.

49:13.t: Enywe abandu, toto efwe khwabaloonga okhurula khumusatsa nomukhasi, ne nikhubakhola amahaanga nende tsimbia, khomunyoole okhumanyana. Toto owoluyali muno mwinywe imbeli wa Nyasaye ni ulia owamuria (Nyasaye) muno. Toto Nyasaye niye Omumanyi muno, Mwene amakhuwa koosi.

49:14.t: Abandu bomumasookholio baboola mbu: “Khwasuubila.” Bola mbu: “Mushili okhusuubila, halali boole mbu ‘khwinjile mubwisilamu’, khulwa obusubili bushili okhwinjila mumioyo chienyu tawe. Ne nimuwulila ka Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, shalabalemilia shiosishiosi mubikhole bienyu tawe. Toto Nyasaye nomulesheli po, wobukoosia muno."

49:15.t: Toto Abasuubili nibalia basuubila Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, mana nibalaba netsinganakani tawe, mana nibakhalabana khunjila ya Nyasaye khumiandu chiabu nende emioyo chiabu. Abo nibo abobwatoto.

49:16.t: Boola mbu: “Koo, mwechesinjia Nyasaye idini yenyu, ne Nyasaye yamanya bioosi bili mwikulu nende mushialo. Ne Nyasaye nomumanyi muno wabuli eshindu?”

49:17.t: Bakhuminanga mbu benjila mubusalamu. Boola mbu: “Mulaamina khulwokhwinjila khwenyu mubusalamu tawe, halali Nyasaye niye wabenyela amalayi, nabalunjisia khubusuubili nimuli mbu muli abobwatoto.”

49:18.t: Toto Nyasaye yamanya akefisa mwikulu nende mushialo, ne Nyasaye alolanga muno kamukholanga.

50:2.t: Bawukanga mbu Omwikanyilisi yabeetsela okhurula mubo! Abakhayi nibaboola mbu: “Po, kano nikokhuchenyia.

50:3.t: Mbu nikhulifwa mana khube liloba, okhukalukha okho khuli ehale (shikhunyalikhana tawe).”

50:4.t: Toto khwamanya shiosishiosi shilemukha khusialo mubo, ne khuli nende eshitabo eshibikhanga koosi.

50:5.t: Halali bakhaya obwatoto olwabwabeetsela, mana abo bali mubukoyanu.

50:6.t: Shibalolangakhwo likulu hekulu wabu, shingala khwaliumbakha mana nikhulirona, shililikhwo nolwafwa tawe?

50:7.t: Ne liloba khwalikwaalasia mana nikhuliramwo tsingulu, mana nikhumesiakhwo buli imbia yemimela emilayi.

50:8.t: Kho shibe eshilolelo nende eshitsulisio khu buli omusumba ukalukha khu Nyasaye.

50:9.t: Ne khweshia amaatsi ketsikhabi okhurula mwikulu, nikhukamesilia emikunda nende imele ichesungwa.

50:10.t: Nende emitende emirambi chilikhwo ebibuli (chiebulana mubunji).

50:11.t: Omukabo khubasumba banje, mana nikhulamusia khuko eshialo shiali nishifwile, ne ni endio nilwa Abandu balilamusibwa.

50:12.t: Bakhaya imbeli wabu Abandu ba Nuhu, nende Abandu ba Rasi nende ba Thamud.

50:13.t: Nende ba Aa’d, nende ba Firauni nende Abana babu Luti.

50:14.t: Nende abamenyi ba Aikat (bomumasokholio), nende Abandu ba Tubaa, boosi bakhaya Abarumwa mana kabekanyilisibwa nikabanyoola.

50:15.t: Ne muparanga khwachong’a olwa khwabaloonga olwo khuranga? Halali bo bali nobukoyani khukhuloongwa okhuyiakha.

50:16.t: Ne toto khwaloonga Omundu, ne khwamanya shimubeyibeyinjia mumwoyo kukwe, nafu khuli ahambi muno khuye okhushila omusi kwo mwikosi we.

50:17.t: Olwa Abamalaika babili balibukana, owundi niyekhala omukhono omulunji ne owundi omukaata.

50:18.t: Shiyakhaboola liosiliosi tawe halali hali nende omulenji werechekha obulayi muno (owuhandikanga).

50:19.t: Ne tsisaalila tsiokhurula omwoyo tsiliitsa khubwatoto. Ako niko kawerukhanga.

50:20.t: Ne olwika lulifurwamwo, eyo niyo inyaanga yokhunyola amabii kalakwa.

50:21.t: Ne buli Omundu aliitsa nali nende Omuliindi nende Omuloli.

50:22.t: Aboolelwe mbu: “Toto ewe wali wang’ang’ala ehale nende kano, mana khukhuyiniyekhwo shiakhwikalilanga okhulola, kho okhulola khukhwo nyanga yino nokhulayi muno.”

50:23.t: Ne owashie aliboola mbu: “Wendi ninaye uno amalile okhurechekhwa.”

50:24.t: (Nyasaye aboole): “Sukune mumulilo buli omukhayi po, omwandakanyu.

50:26.t: Ulia watsokaasia Nyasaye nende abanyasaye baandi, kho mumusukune mushinyasio eshilulu.”

50:27.t: Owashe aliboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, esie shindamukosia tawe halali ye yali mubukori obwa ehale.”

50:28.t: Nyasaye aliboola mbu: “Mulasolana imbeli wanje tawe, ndamala okhubarumila amekanyilisio.

50:29.t: Liumaho likalukhanibungwa imbeli wanje tawe, ne esie shekholelanga Abasumba banje obubii tawe.”

50:30.t: Inyanga yakhulireba (omuliro kwa) Jahannam mbu: “Witsuule?” Nayo ilikalusia mbu: “Abaandi baliwo umete?”

50:31.t: Ne omukunda kwomwikulu (Janna) kulisitibwa hambi khu baria Nyasaye.

50:32.t: Kano niko kamulakungwa khu ulia ukalukha muno khu Nyasaye mana niyelinda po.

50:33.t: Ulia waria Nyasaye khukefisile, mana niyetsa nende omwoyo omulunjifu.

50:34.t: "Injilemwo nomulembe, ino ni inyanga yokhumenya obulaliwa tawe.”

50:35.t: Balinyoolamwo shiosishiosi shiabeenya, ne khuli nende ebindi ebinji.

50:36.t: Ne ni tsingongo tsinga tsiakhwasishia imbeli wabu, bali nende amaani okhushila bano! Mana nibayiya khushialo muno, koo banyolakhwo wabelushila?

50:37.t: Toto mu ako, shilimwo eshitsulisio khu ulia uli nomwoyo nohomba owareka eshirwi naye naaliho obulai (nalolanga).

50:38.t: Ne toto khwaloonga likulu nende eshialo nende bioosi bilimwo khutsinyanga tsisasaba, ne shikhwanyoola obuchonyi bwosibwosi tawe.

50:39.t: Kho, wisumilisie khukababoolanga, ne mutswenule Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi khutsifumia tsitsie tsindayi eliuba nilishili okhurula nende nilishili okhukwa.

50:40.t: Ne mutswenule khandi eshilo nende niwakhamala okhumurerera obweni hasi (okhusujuda).

50:41.t: Ne rechelesia inyanga yomulaanji alilanga okhurulila habundu ahambi.

50:42.t: Inyanga yabaliwulila oluyoka lwomulango kwa toto. Eyo niyo inyanga yokhurula (mubilindwa).

50:43.t: Toto efwe nefwe balamusinjia khandi bafwisinjia, ne ewefu niwa amakalushilo.

50:44.t: Inyanga yeshialo shiliatikha barula lwangu lwangu. Okhukhung’asibwa okho khuliba okhwangu khwifwe.

50:45.t: Efwe khumanyile muno kababoolanga, ne ewe shobarukanga na amaani tawe. Kho wikhoonyele Ikuran okhwitsulisia balia abaria ambii akalakwa (okhurulila inyanga yeyindukho).

51:15.t: Toto balia baria Nyasaye baliba mumikunda chomwikulu nende tsisebele.

51:16.t: Ne balibukula ka Nyasaye abahele, toto imbeli awo abo bali abakholi bamalayi.

51:18.t: Ne eshilo nishitsia okhushia, balamanga nibasaba eshileshelo.

51:19.t: Ne mumiandu chiabu omukabo kwa abasabi nende balasabanga kwalimwo.

51:20.t: Ne khushialo biliwo ebimanyisio khubasuubila toto.

51:21.t: Nende khumibili chienyu. Koo, shimulolangakhwo tawe?

51:22.t: Ne mwikulu kuliyo omukabo kwenyu, nende kamulakungwa.

51:23.t: Kho, nditsuba khu Nyasaye Omulesi welikulu nende eshialo, mbu toto kano nikahabwene shinga enywe muboolanga.

51:24.t: Koo, lwakhuulilakhwo olukano lwa abacheni ba Ibrahim boluyali?

51:25.t: Olwa benjila ewuwe nibaboola mbu: “Mulembe.” Naye nabakalusia mbu: “Mulembe muno Abandu bengorerwe.”

51:26.t: Natsia khubandu be, niyetsa nende eshimosi shianera.

51:27.t: Nabasitilia hambi eshiakhulia, nabareba mbu: “Shimulitsanga tawe?”

51:28.t: Naba noburi khubo, nibamuboolela mbu: “Olaria tawe.” Ne nibamubolera komwikhoyo koomusiani wobumanyi po.

51:29.t: Nilwa omukhasi wuwe yabachoma, nawuka, niyepama obweni, naboola mbu: “Esie omushiele mana omukumba ndakhebula endie?”

51:30.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Endio nilwa kali, nilwa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi aboolele. Toto niye Owamachesi muno, Omumanyi po.”

51:32.t: Nibabola mbu: “Toto efwe khurumilwe khubandu abetsimbi.

51:34.t: Karebwakhwo eshimanyisio okhurula ewa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi khulwa balia babura eshichelo.”

51:36.t: Ne shikhwanyoolamwo halali inzu ndala yonyene yabasalamu.

51:37.t: Ne nikhulekhamwo eshimanyisio khubalia baritsanga eshinyasio eshilulu.

51:38.t: Ne khulukano lwa Musa, olwa khwamuruma khu Firauni nende ebifune bia habulafu.

51:39.t: Nakhola obufuru khumaani keke naboola mbu: “Oli omulosi nohomba omulalu.”

51:40.t: Ne nikhumutila nende omukanda kukwe kwabalwani, nikhubasukuna munyanza naye nali ufunaanibwa.

51:41.t: Ne (okhusishibwa khwa) Abandu ba A’ad, olwa khwabarumila omuyeka omukumba.

51:42.t: Shikwalekha shiosishiosi shiakwaburakhwo tawe, halali nikushikhola shinga eshindu shionoonibwe obubii muno.

51:43.t: Ne Abandu ba Thamudi, olwa baboolelwa mbu: “Mwikhoye khubise bititi.”

51:44.t: Ne nibakhaya okhulonda amalako ka Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, mana likulu nilibakhupa nabo nibalolanga.

51:45.t: Mana shibanyala okhwema tawe, ne shibanyala okhwihabina tawe.

51:46.t: Ne Abandu ba Nuhu imbeli eyo. Toto bali Abandu baruuma eshichelo.

51:47.t: Ne likulu khwaliumbakha khumaani, ne toto efwe khuli nobunyali obushila ako.

51:48.t: Ne liloba khwaliala, ne khuli abaali abalayi balibarie efwe!

51:49.t: Ne mubuli eshindu khwaloonga eshisaatsa neshikhasi kho munyoole okhwitsulila.

51:50.t: Kho ilushile ewa Nyasaye. Toto esie endi omwikanyilisi wenyu owa habulafu okhurulana ninaye.

51:51.t: Ne mulakholela Nyasaye nyasaye wundi tawe. Toto esie endi omwikanyilisi wahabulafu okhurulana ninaye.

51:52.t: Ne endio, shiyabetsela Omurumwa yesiyesi balia bali imbeli wabu tawe halali baboola mbu: “Oyo ni Omulosi nohomba Omulalu.”

51:53.t: Ne koo, baboolanila kano? Halali bo ni Abandu baruma muno eshichelo.

51:54.t: Mana lekhana ninabo, nawe sholafunaanibwa tawe.

51:55.t: Ne itsulisia. Toto ametsulisio kakhoonyanga Abasuubili.

51:56.t: Ne shindaloonga Amajini nende Abandu tawe halali khulwa baalame esie.

51:57.t: Shebenyakhwo omukabo tawe, ne shindenya bandisie tawe.

51:58.t: Toto Nyasaye niye Omukabi muno, Owamani amanji muno.

51:59.t: Ne toto balia abamabii, bali nende tsimbi tsiabu shinga tsimbi tsia abaashiabwe, kho balaayungubasia tawe.

51:60.t: Kho eshinyasio eshikhongo shili khubalia bakhaya okhurulana nende inyanga yabu yabalakwa.

52:1.t: Nditsuba khulukulu lwa Tur (olwa Nyasaye yalomalomiliakho omurumwa Musa).

52:4.t: Nende khunzu yombakhwa (ya abamalaika balamilangamwo mwikulu).

52:5.t: Nende khushitsafu shiachingulwa (likulu lili eshitsafu shie eshialo).

52:7.t: Toto eshinyasio shia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi shilibaho (khubakhayi).

52:10.t: Ne efikulu lwa filikhulukha nifichenda okhuchenda khwa toto.

52:11.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo inyanga eyo shiliba khubayingani.

52:14.t: Baliboolelwa mbu: “Kuno nikwo omulilo kwa mwaingananga.

52:15.t: Koo, buno ni obulosi nohomba shimulolangasa tawe?

52:16.t: Injilemwo, mwisumirisie nohomba mukhaye okhwisumirisia, ninashilalasa khwinywe. Toto enywe murungungwa sa kamwakholanga."

52:17.t: Toto balia baria Nyasaye baliba mumikunda chomwikulu nende mubwokholo.

52:18.t: Nibasangalila khuka Nyasaye wabu Omulesi abahele, ne Nyasaye wabu Omulesi alibahonokosia okhurulana nende eshinyasio shiomulilo.

52:20.t: Ne baliyeekha khubifumbi bwioluyali, bilondokhane khulunyaali, ne khulibabashila abakhana bomwikulu (Hurul ain).

52:21.t: Ne balia basuubila mana olwibulo lwabu nilubaloondakhwo khukhusuubila, khulibabukanania, ne shikhulibalemilia khubikhole biabu shiosishiosi tawe. Buli Omundu alitililwa khushiayakhola.

52:22.t: Ne khulibametela buli imbia yebiamo nende yeyinyama shingala benya.

52:23.t: Balihelesaniamwo efikombe fia okhung’inang’ina filimwo eshinywebwa shibulamwo eshifwabi nohomba tsimbii tawe.

52:24.t: Ne Abakholi babu balibabotokhananga, bang’inang’ina opara mbu bo nebisole bifunikhwe obulai mufikombe fyokhung’inang’ina.

52:26.t: Baliboola mbu: “Toto efwe khwali khale nabandu befu nikhwaria muno.

52:27.t: Mana Nyasaye nakhukhonya, nakhuhonia okhurulana nende eshinyasio shiomulilo omululu.

52:28.t: Toto efwe khwamulamanga (khushialo) Ye yenyene butswa. Toto ye niye Omulayi muno, wetsimbabasi muno.”

52:29.t: Kho yitsulisia, ne khumikabo chia Nyasaye wuwo sholi Omulosi nohomba Omulalu tawe.

52:30.t: Nohomba baboolanga mbu: “Uno ni omukaasia wamashairi, wakhulindanga lifwa limuulile.”

52:31.t: Boola mbu: “Yiisiriesa lifwa, toto esie siesi endi halala ninanyu mukhulindilisia kalibanyola okhurulana nende eshinyasio shia Nyasaye.”

52:32.t: Nohomba amaparo kabu niko kabarumanga kario, nohomba bo ni Abandu abafuru butswa?

52:33.t: Nohomba baboolanga mbu: “Wakasia kano (Ikurani)”, halali bo shibasuubilangasa tawe!

52:34.t: Mana barerekhwo amakhuwa shinga kano, nikali mbu baboolanga akatoto.

52:35.t: Nohomba shibaalongwakhwo nende shiosishiosi tawe, nohomba bo nibo baloonganga (kata nibelonga abeene)?

52:36.t: Koo! Nibo baloonga likulu nende eshialo? Halali babula obulaamba tawe.

52:37.t: Nohomba bali nende libishilo lia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, nohomba nibo abemeli ba buli eshindu?

52:38.t: Nohomba bali netsingasi tsiokhurechelesiliakhwo? Mana omurechelesi wabu oyo arerekhwo ebifune bilolekha.

52:39.t: Nohomba Nyasaye ali nabakhana nanyu muli nabasiani?

52:40.t: Nohomba obarebanga bakhurunge, nabo balolanga obusiro muno okhurunga omurungo oko?

52:42.t: Nohomba benyanga okhukhukholela ebifwanga? Halali balia bakhaya nibo abalakholelwa ebifwanga.

52:43.t: Nohomba bali nende nyasaye wundi owulali Nyasaye tawe? Nyasaye nomutswenufu ehale nende bia bamutsokasinjia ninabio.

52:44.t: Ne nibalolanga lileesi lieshinyasio nilikwa okhurula hekulu, bakhaboolele mbu ni amalesi kachingane.

52:45.t: Kho baleshe butswa okhuula olwa balibukaana nende inyanga yabu yabalisishilibwamo.

52:46.t: Inyanga ya ebifwanga biabu shibikhabakhoonye shiosishiosi tawe, ne shibalihabinwa tawe.

52:47.t: Ne toto balia abakhola amabii, balinyoola eshinyasio shindi shilali shino tawe. Ne abaanji mubo shibamanyile tawe.

52:48.t: Ne linda okhubusia omuse khwa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi. Toto ewe oli mutsimoni tsiefu, ne mutswenule khulwokhumwitsomia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi olwa oba niwema.

52:49.t: Ne eshilo khandi omutswenule nende olwa tsing’ining’ini tsitsia.

53:2.t: Owashienywe uno shiyakora nohomba shiyakhola kano mukhwitsukhanila tawe.

53:7.t: Naye ali ebuleka wa hekulu muno wekulu lia hasi.

53:8.t: Mana nasuta ehambi nende omurumwa, ne nameta khandi okhusuta ehambi.

53:9.t: Naba shinga oburambi bwa akari wetsimbeka tsibili tsiatsiyingo tsibiri nohomba ahambi muno.

53:10.t: Mana namufimbulila Omusumba wuwe kalia akayafimbula.

53:14.t: Mushisina shio musaala (mkunazi) kwokhumalilikha muno (omusala kuno kuli mwikulu lia msafu).

53:15.t: Ahambi nende omusaala oko, kuliwo omukunda kwomwikulu kwamenywamwo.

53:16.t: Olwa kwafimbwa omusaala oko (khubunyali bwa Nyasaye) nende shiakufiimba (shilamanyishe mbu ni shina halali Nyasaye butswa niumanile).

53:17.t: Tsimoni shitsiesundukha tawe nohomba shitsiabura eshichelo tawe.

53:18.t: Toto yalola khubimanyisio ebikhongo bia Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi.

53:21.t: Koo, nenywe muli nabasiani Naye ali nabakhaana?

53:22.t: Toto okho ni okhukaba okhubi muno.

53:23.t: Ako namerasa kamwakulikha enywe nende basenywe, Nyasaye shiyeshiakhwo shiosishiosi khumeera ako tawe. Balondangasa amaparo nende shie mioyo chiabu chienya. Ne toto obulunjifu bwabetsela okhurula khu Nyasaye wabu Omulesi.

53:25.t: Nyasaye sa niye mwene mwikulu nende eshialo.

53:26.t: Ne ni Abamalaika benga bali mwikulu, abokhusabila khwabu shikhulikhoonya yesiyesi tawe, halali khuwa Nyasaye achamile mana namufuchilila?

53:27.t: Toto balia balasuubilanga mwikulu tawe balanganga Abamalaika amera keshikhasi.

53:28.t: Ne babula shibamanyile khu ako tawe, balondanga butswa amaparo. Ne toto okhuparirisia shikhukhoonyanga shiosishiosi imbeli wobwatoto tawe.

53:29.t: Lekhana nende ulia uhelesia omukongo ametsulisio kefu, ne shiyenya shosishosi tawe halali obulamu bwokhushialo.

53:30.t: Awo niwo obumanyi bwabo bulira. Toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi niye umanyile muno ulia wakora ehale nende injila ye, naye amanyile muno ulia walunjikha.

53:31.t: Ne nibia Nyasaye bioosi bili mwikulu nende mushialo, kho abarunge betsimbi khukabakholanga ne abakhola amalayi abarunge obulayi.

53:32.t: Balia beikalilanga okhukhola ebionono ebikhongo nende akeshifwabi, halali orwonono orutiti titi. Toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi obulesheli bwe nobubambalifu. Ye abamanyile muno, olwa yabaloonga okhurula khuliloba, nende ngamwali mutsinda tsia banyinenywe. Kho muleelole abatswenufu tawe. Ye amanyile muno owamuria.

53:33.t: Koo! Walolakhwo ulia ufutariranga (ulobanga obwisilamu nibwakhamulila)?

53:35.t: Koo, akhali nende obumanyi khu kefisile, mana akalolanga?

53:36.t: Nohomba shiyabolelwakhwo khukali mubitabu bia Musa.

53:38.t: Mbu Omundu shalichinga tsimbi tsiowashie tawe?

53:39.t: Ne Omundu shalinyoola halali kalia kayakhola.

53:41.t: Mana alirungwa omurungo kukwe kwoosi nikwitsule.

53:42.t: Ne toto khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi niwo akaliweela.

53:43.t: Ne toto niye ureranga okhutsekha nende okhulila.

53:44.t: Naye toto niye owufwisinjia nende ulamusinjia.

53:45.t: Ne toto ye niye waloonga eshisatsa nende eshikhasi.

53:47.t: Netoto mbu kali khuye okhulamusibwa khandi.

53:48.t: Ne toto niye uyindiasinjia nende ukholanga ebindu okhuhela.

53:49.t: Ne toto niye Nyasaye Omulesi wetsing’ining’ini tsia Shiira (Ing’ining’ini ya abakhayi balaamanga).

53:50.t: Ne toto niye wasishia A’ad beimbeli.

53:52.t: Nende Abandu ba Nuhu abaliho imbeli. Toto bali ababii muno abatsimbi po.

53:53.t: Nende tsingongo (tsia abandu ba Luti), yatsichingula hekulu mana natsilakasia mafumama.

53:55.t: Mana ni emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi chiokanakananga?

53:59.t: Ne amakhuwa kano (Ikurani) nikamuukanga (mbu karula wa Nyasaye)?

53:62.t: Kho re obweni bwenyu hasi khulwa Nyasaye, ne mumulaame.

54:1.t: Indukho ili hambi okhwitsa, ne omwesi kwabukhamwo (tsinyanga tsia Omurumwa Muhammad).

54:2.t: Ne nibalola eshimanyisio shiosishiosi bashifutarira nibaboola mbu: “Buno nobulosi butsilililanga.”

54:3.t: Ne baingasia, ne nibaloonda eshihonya shiabu, ne buli likhuwa liemekhwa.

54:4.t: Ne toto kamala okhuboolela amakhuwa kalimwo okhwalaba.

54:5.t: Amachesi kafung’anile, halali amekanyilisio shikakhoonya eshindu khubo tawe.

54:6.t: Mana lekhana ninabo (nibalobere okhulunjikha). Inyanga yalilaanga omulaanji khushindu shilamanyishe tawe.

54:7.t: Tsimoni tsiabwe tsilihenga hasi. Balirula mubilindwa opara mbu nitsisiche tsisaalanibwe.

54:8.t: Nibelushila Omulaanji oyo, ne Abakhayi baliboola mbu: “Inyanga ino ni indinyu.”

54:9.t: Abandu ba Nuhu bakhaya bo nibashili, nibayingasia Omusumba wefu, nibamuboolela mbu nomulalu mana nibamwalabila.

54:10.t: Mana nasaba Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, naboola mbu: “Toto esie ekhailwe, kho habina.”

54:11.t: Mana nikhwikula emiliango chomwikulu khu maatsi kayombokhanga.

54:12.t: Ne nikhufutula liloba nikhukhola emialo (emichela), amaatsi nikabukanana (kamwikulu nende kamwiloba) khulikhuwa liali nilibusibwe (okhusishibwa abandu ba Nuhu mumaatsi).

54:14.t: Shiatsitsanga khubwemeresi bwefu, okhuba ni omurungo khu balia abakhaya ka Nyasaye.

54:15.t: Ne toto bwene khwachikhola okhuba eshimanyisio. Ne koo, aliwo witsulila?

54:16.t: Kho eshinyasio shianje shiali shirie, nende okhwikanyilisia khwanje?

54:17.t: Ne toto efwe khwakhola Ikurani ibe inyangu khubwitsulisio, ne koo aliwo witsulila?

54:18.t: Babu A’di bakhaya, kho eshinyasio shianje shiali shirie nende okhwikanyilisia khwanje?

54:19.t: Toto efwe khwabarumila omuyeka kweyimbumbuyeka khutsinyanga tsimbi tsilondokhaane.

54:20.t: Nikusiula Abandu opara mbu nebisichiri biemisala chisiulilwe.

54:21.t: Mana eshinyasio shianje shiali shirie nende amekanyilisio kanje?

54:22.t: Ne toto efwe khwakhola Ikurani ibe inyangu khubwitsulisio. Ne koo, aliwo witsulila?

54:24.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Khuloonde omundu namundu urula mwifwe. Efwe mana khuba khulaba mubukori bwa habulafu.

54:25.t: Niye butswa yenyene okhurula mwifwe wamakanyiliso keshela? Halali uno nomubeyi omukhongo, omufuru.”

54:26.t: Nibamanye mutsuli niwina omubeeyi omukhongo, omufuru.

54:27.t: Toto efwe khwitsa okhubarumila ingamia ikhasi khulwa okhubatema, mana bahenge butswa ne wifwile.

54:28.t: Ne baboolele mbu amatsi kalakabwa hakari wabu (nende ingamia) mana inyanga yabu yokhunywa amatsi ne iyaga yindi ye ingamia.

54:29.t: Mana nibalaanga omundu wabu, niyetsa mana nayisinza.

54:30.t: Kho eshinyasio shianje shiali shirie nende okhwikanyilisia khwanje?

54:31.t: Toto efwe khwabarumila olwang’a lulala lwonyene, nibaba shinga ebitiisi biokhumbashila olukaka.

54:32.t: Ne toto efwe khwakhola Ikurani okhuba inyangu khubwitsulisio, ne koo aliwo witsulila?

54:34.t: Toto efwe khwabarumila eshifulumutu shiamachina, halali abaloondi ba Luti, khwabahabina mumabwibwi.

54:35.t: Tsimbabaasi okhurula khwifwe. Endio nilwa khurunganga ulia ukhupanga orio muno.

54:36.t: Ne toto ye yabekanyilisilia eshinyasio shiefu, halali bo bali netsinganakani khumekanyilisio ako.

54:37.t: Ne toto benya mbu abahelesie abacheni be, mana nikhubawofusia tsimoni tsiabu, nikhubaboolela mbu: “Pile eshinyasio shianje nende amekanyilisio.”

54:38.t: Ne toto shiabeeshela eshinyasio shitsililila mumabwibi.

54:39.t: Kho mana pile eshinyasio shianje nende amekanyilisio.

54:40.t: Ne toto khwakhola Ikurani okhuba inyangu khubwitsulisio, ne koo aliwo witsulila?

54:41.t: Ne toto Abekanyilisi betsela Abandu ba Firauni.

54:42.t: Bakhaya ebimanyisio biefu bioosi pe, mana nikhubatila omutilo kwa Wamaani, Wobunyali po.

54:43.t: Ne Abakhayi benyu bali nende amaani okhushila abo baranjilila, nohomba kahandikwa mubitabu mbu enywe mubule okhufunaanibwa tawe?

54:44.t: Nohomba baboolanga mbu: “Efwe khuli abaanji khulishila butswa.”

54:45.t: Abanji abo balashilwa ne balakalukha inyuma tsimbilo.

54:46.t: Halali inyanga yeyindukho niyabalakwa. Ne indukho ni isiro muno mana khandi indulu pa.

54:47.t: Toto Abetsimbi bali mubukori nende mubulalu.

54:48.t: Inyanga yabalikhwesurulwa mafumama khubweni bwabu nibasukunwa mumulilo, baliboolelwa mbu: “Pile omutilo kwomulilo kwa Saqar.”

54:49.t: Toto efwe buli eshindu khwashiloonga khushichelo shiabura inyuma.

54:50.t: Ne likhuwa liefu nililala butswa, shinga okhulimba nende okhulimbula tsimoni.

54:51.t: Ne toto khwasishia abashienywe, kho alikho mwinywe witsulilanga?

54:53.t: Ne liosiliosi lititi nende likhonga liahandikwa.

54:54.t: Toto balia baria Nyasaye baliba mumikunda chomwikulu nende emialo.

54:55.t: Mushikhalo shiatoto, ewa Omwami, Omunyali muno.

55:5.t: Eliuba nende Omwesi bichendanga khubise (Nyasaye yabiraho kho abandu bamanye khubio ebise, tsinyanga, amawichi nende emyaka).

55:6.t: Ne emilandula nende emisaala binamilanga Nyasaye.

55:7.t: Ne yachingula likulu (nalikhola okhuba eshitsafu shye eshialo) ne naraho eshichelo.

55:9.t: Ne muchele habwene, ne mulaleemia eshichelo tawe.

55:11.t: Shilimwo ebiamo nende emitende chili nende ebibuli.

55:12.t: Nende imele yamakhoba nende amasafu ka raihan (kawunyanga obulayi).

55:13.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:14.t: Yaloonga Omundu okhurula khwiloba shinga liokhuloonjela tsinyungu.

55:15.t: Ne naloonga Al-Jan (papa wa amajini) okhurula khumulilo kubula omwosi.

55:16.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:17.t: Nyasaye Omulesi we ebukwe tsibili nende we mumbo tsibili.

55:18.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:20.t: Hakari watsio shiliho eshikalilo tsilasasania tawe.

55:21.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:22.t: Mutsinyaanza etso ebisole (lulu) birulangamwo nende ebiendo (marjan).

55:23.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:24.t: Ne bioosi ni ebibie bichendanga khumaatsi shinga efikulu.

55:25.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:27.t: Ne bulitong’a obweni bwa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi Woluyali nende Obuhani.

55:28.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:29.t: Bioosi bili mwikulu nende mushialo bisabanga Nyasaye, buli ebise atsililisinjia amakhuwa.

55:30.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:31.t: Khulibabalila kamwakholanga mana khubarunje, enywe ebilonje bibili (amajini nende abandu).

55:32.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:33.t: Enywe Amajini nende Abandu, nimunyala okhunyeleela elwanyi welikulu nende eshialo, nakhanyeleele. Shimunyala okhunyeleela tawe okhurusiakho murumushire amaani katoto (ne mulanyola hena amani ako).

55:34.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:35.t: Mularumilwa tsinzesele tsiomulilo nende ebichuma bisaalululwe, mana shimulahonokokha tawe.

55:36.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:37.t: Olwelikulu liliatikha mana libe eliakhanyu shinga amafura kasalululwe.

55:38.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:39.t: Inyanga eyo abulao ulireebwa tsimbi tsitsie tawe, omundu nohomba lijini.

55:40.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?
