55:41.t: Abetsimbi balimanyikhana khubimanyisio biabu, nibatilwa khulwotosi nende ebisisilo.

55:42.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:43.t: Ino niyo Jahannamu ya ababii bayingasinjia.

55:44.t: Bakhabotokhanengemwo nende mumatsi kamwo akayia paa.

55:45.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:46.t: Ne ulia waria okhwemibwa imbeli wa Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi aliba nemikunda chibili.

55:47.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:49.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:51.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:52.t: Mumikunda echo bilimwo ebiamo bioosi bibili bibili.

55:53.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:54.t: Baliyekha khubulili obwa amarungeti kabwo kakwalaala, ne ebiamo biemikunda echo bilieleela ahambi.

55:55.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:56.t: Ne mukari omo abakhasi balimwo beliinda, shibatilwakhwo nende omundu nohomba lijini tawe.

55:57.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:58.t: Opara mbu bo ni lichina lia yaqut nende ebisole ebilafu (marjan).

55:59.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:60.t: Koo, omurungo kwobulayi kwakhakhaya okhuba obulayi?

55:61.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:62.t: Ne okhushilakhwo hao chilimwo emikunda chindi chibili.

55:63.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:65.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:67.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:69.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:70.t: Mukari omo balimwo abakhasi abalayi abawulili.

55:71.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:72.t: Abakhasi abalayi betsimoni tsikhongo, balarulanga munzu tawe.

55:73.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:75.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:76.t: Baliyekha khubifumbi bioluyali biobukondo bwamasafu nende emikeka chianabwa obulayi.

55:77.t: Kho emikabo shina chia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi chiamukhayanga?

55:78.t: Ni lietsikhabi elira lia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, Woluyali nende Obuhani.

56:3.t: Shiishinjia (okhwinjisia abakhayi mumuliro) shinininjia (okhuninia abakhola amalai mwikulu).

56:8.t: Abandu bomukhono omulunji. Koo, ni babu wina abo Abandu bomukhono omulunji?

56:9.t: Ne Abandu bomukhono omukaata. Koo, nibabu wina abo bomukhono omukaata?

56:11.t: Abo nibo bali hambi muno (nende Nyasaye).

56:17.t: Balikhalabanilwa nende Abasiani bolusoolili lulawa tawe.

56:18.t: Nibachinjile bikombe nende tsibinika nende tsigilasi, tsilimwo ebinywebwa okhurula musebele ingwalafu.

56:22.t: Nende Abakhasi bomwikulu abalahenganga abalali abasatsa babu tawe, abetsimoni tsindayi.

56:27.t: Ne Abandu bomukhono musatsa, nishina shilinyoola Abandu bomukhono musatsa?

56:35.t: Toto efwe khwabaloonga abakhasi bomwikulu (hurul ain) okhulonga khwa toto obuyia.

56:37.t: Bachamana nende Abasatsa babu abayelana ninabo.

56:41.t: Abandu bomukhono mukhasi. Koo, ni shina shilinyoola Abandu bomukhono mukhasi?

56:42.t: Baliba mumuyeka kwomulilo nende amatsi kayia pa.

56:44.t: Shishili shiokhunyoolamwo obunyifu nohombo obwihotselefu tawe.

56:45.t: Toto abo bali, khale awo bamenyanga, shinga benya mubwokholo.

56:47.t: Ne baboolanga mbu: “Nikhumala khwafwa mana khwaba liloba nende ebikumba, mbu toto efwe khulilamusibwa?

56:49.t: Boola mbu: “Toto balia abeyimbeli nende beinyuma.

56:50.t: Toto balikhuung’aasibwa khulwa ebise bieyinyanga yarechekhwa yamanyikha.

56:54.t: Ne mana mulinywa amaatsi kayile pa!

56:55.t: Ne mulikanywa shinga ingamia inywetsanga nili nende obuloo.

56:56.t: Obo nobucheni bwokhubukaniIwa bwabu inyanga yomurungo."

56:57.t: Nefwe khwabaloonga enywe, shichilanga shina nimulasuubila tawe?

56:59.t: Koo nenywe mukaloonganga nohomba nefwe abaloonji?

56:60.t: Efwe khwabarecheshela lifwa, nafu shikhushilungwa tawe.

56:61.t: Okhukalukhania abaandi balali enywe, ne khubalonje enywe ebilonje biamulamanyile tawe.

56:62.t: Ne toto mwamala okhumanya okhulongwa khwa ambeli, neshina shichilanga nimuletsulila tawe?

56:65.t: Ne khwenyanga, khwakhachikholele chiakhaya okhurakhwo shiosishiosi tawe, mwatong’a nimung’ang’alile.

56:69.t: Ni enywe mukeshinjia okhurula mumaleesi nohomba nefwe bakeshiinjia?

56:70.t: Khwenyanga, khwakhakakholele keyichumbi, nikakhabanga mbu simuupanga orio tawe?

56:72.t: Nenywe mwaloonga omusaala kwakwo nohomba nefwe baloonga?

56:73.t: Efwe khwakukhola okhuba eshitsulisio nende kwokhukhoonya balia bali mushitsimi.

56:74.t: Kho litswenule elira lia Nyasaye wuwo Omulonji, Omukhongo.

56:75.t: Ne toto nditsuba khubise bietsing’ining’ini tsikwitsanga.

56:76.t: Ne toto shino neshitsubo eshikhongo, mumanyangakhwo toto.

56:80.t: Sheshibwa okhurula khu Nyasaye Omulesi webiloonje bioosi.

56:82.t: Amwakhopele orio khumukabo kwenyu (kwa abahele) nanyu mwikhola mbu muyingananga?

56:83.t: Kaliba karie olwa omwoyo kuliuula khulukamukamu (mwikolomero)?

56:85.t: Ne efwe khuli ahambi muno ninanyu, nanyu shimukhulolanga tawe.

56:86.t: Ne enywe nikakhabanga mbu shimulirungwa tawe.

56:87.t: Kalusiekhwo omwoyo oko nikali mbu muboolanga obwatoto.

56:88.t: Ne naliba mubalia basutibwa hambi nende Nyasaye.

56:89.t: Kuliba omwikhoyo nende ebiokhuunya obulai, nende emikunda chomwikulu chobwokholo.

56:91.t: Ni omulembe khwiwe owuli Mubandu bomukhono musatsa.

56:93.t: Obucheni bwokhubukaniIwa bubwe buliba amaatsi kayile pa!

56:96.t: Kho litswenule elira lia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, Woluyali.

57:1.t: Bitswenulanga Nyasaye bili mwikulu nende mushialo, naye niye Owamaani, Owamachesi muno.

57:2.t: Nobubwe obwami bwo mwikulu nende khushialo. Niwelesinjia obulamu, khandi niye ufwisinjia, naye ni omunyali muno wa buli eshindu.

57:3.t: Ye niye wokhuranga na niye wokhumalilikha, naye niye owahabulafu nende owulalolekha, naye niye Omumanyi muno wabuli eshindu.

57:4.t: Niye waloonga likulu nende eshialo khutsinyanga sita, mana nachingukha ekulu weshisaala shioluyali, yamanya shinjilanga mwiloba nende shirulangamwo, nende shikholomokhanga okhurula mwikulu nende bininanga hekulu, naye ali ninanyu wosiwosi wamuli. Ne Nyasaye alolanga muno kamukholanga.

57:5.t: Obwami bwo mwikulu nende khushialo nobubwe, ne ewa Nyasaye ni wamakhuwa koosi kakalusibwa.

57:6.t: Yenjisinjia eshilo mushitere, ne yenjisinjia eshitere mushilo, naye niye umanyile muno kali mubilifu.

57:7.t: Suubile khu Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, ne murusie khubia Nyasaye yamukhola okhuba abalindi. Kho, balia basuubila mwinywe, mana nibarusia (emiandu), baliba nende omurungo omukhongo.

57:8.t: Ne muli murie mulasuubilanga khu Nyasaye tawe ne Omurumwa abalaanganga mbu musuubile khu Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi, naye toto yamala okhubukula indache yenyu, toto nimuli abasuubili?

57:9.t: Ye niye wishilinjia omusumba wuwe tsinyaali tsinoosinjia, kho tsibarusie mubiilima nitsibeenjisia mubulafu, ne toto Nyasaye khwinywe ni Omwihotselefu, Owobukoosia muno.

57:10.t: Muli murie mularusinjia (emiandu mwachiila) khunjila ya Nyasaye, ne nibia Nyasaye bioosi bili khushialo nende mwikulu? Shibali nashilala tawe owayiinia mwinywe nikhushili okhwikula Makka, mana nalwaana. Abo bali nende omurungo omukhongo okhushila balia bayinia Makka niyikulwe, mana nibalwana. Ne boosi Nyasaye yabalaka amalayi. Ne Nyasaye amanyile koosi pe kamukholanga.

57:11.t: Ni wina wuhelesia Nyasaye likofi lilayi, ne amurunge omurungo kumeteshe, ne anyoole omurungo kwobuhaani muno?

57:12.t: Inyanga yolilola abasuubili abasatsa nabakhasi, obulafu bwabu buli imbeli wabu, nende omukhono kwabu omusaatsa, omwikhoyo kwenyu lelo neemikunda chomwikulu chiburangamwo emialo, mulikhalamwo tsinyanga tsioosi. Okho nikho okhubura okhukhongo.

57:13.t: Inyanga ya abeshikhabili abeshisatsa nende abeshikhasi baliboolela abasuubili mbu: “Mukhuliinde khunyoole okhubukulakhwo mubulafu bwenyu.” Lisisi lili nende omuliango lilirebwa hakari wabu: mukari wakwo tsilibamwo tsimbabaasi, na elwanyi wakwo okhurulila elubeka eyo shiliba eshinyasio.

57:14.t: Balibalaanga nibababoolela mbu: “Abayiee shikhwali ninanyu?” Balibaboolela mbu: “Nabweene, halali enywe mwechemela abeene nimwirechekha okhulinda (amasila kakhunyole efwe), nimukanakana, ne obwikombi bwa emioyo chienyu nibumukatia, okhula shingala likhuwa lia Nyasaye lietsa, mana Omubeyi wulia nababeya okhukhaya okhuloonda Nyasaye.

57:15.t: Kho, inyanga yino sishilabukulwa shiosishiosi khwinywe shokhubanunula tawe, nohomba khu balia abakhaya. Eshimenyo shienyu ni mumulilo, nimwamukhoyeshele. Ne ni habundu abii muno wokhukalukha.”

57:16.t: Ne koo, ebise bishili okhula khubasuubila emioyo chiabu chiihotselesie khulwokhwitsulila Nyasaye nende khulwa amakhuwa ka toto keshibwa? Ne balaba ta shinga balia abahebwa Eshitabu bali imbile wabu, ne nibaba nende ebise ebirambi, emioyo chiabu nichiba emiumilanu, ne abaanji babu nibokhurula mumalako.

57:17.t: Manye mbu Nyasaye alamusinjia liloba nilimalilenje okhufwa. Toto khubenoosiliye ebimanyisio biefu khomunyoole okhwikhonyela obwongo.

57:18.t: Toto balia abaininjia muno eshihanwa shia Izakaa abasatsa nabakhasi, mana bahelesie Nyasaye likofi lilayi, balimetelwakhwo amakhabi, ne balinyoola omurungo kwobuhani omulayi muno.

57:19.t: Ne balia basuubila Nyasaye nende Abarumwa bebe, abo nibo abobwatoto, nende abaloli imbeli wa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi. Abo balinyoola omurongo kwabu nende obulafu bwabu. Ne balia bakhaya, mana nibaingasia ebimanyisio biefu, abo nibo Abandu bomumulilo kwa Jahim.

57:20.t: Manye mbu obulamu bwokhushialo nomubayo, nende amakhuwa kabulamwo obukhala, nende okhwirona, nende okhwilaya abeene khubeene, nende okhushilana okhukhaba emiandu eminji nende Abana. Bili shinga ifula yemimela chiayio chiasangasia abalimi, mana chitse chiume chikalukhane ochilole nichili namabuyu, mana chibe amasakaria. Ne mwikulu shiliyo eshinyasio eshikhongo, nende obulesheli nende okhufuchililwa okhurula khu Nyasaye. Ne obulamu bwokhushialo shini shiosishiosi tawe halali omwikhoyo kwobubeyi.

57:21.t: Ilushile eshileshelo shia Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi nende omukunda kwomwikulu, oburakalafu bwakwo buli shinga oburakalafu bwelikulu nende eshialo, kwarecheshelwa Abasuubila Nyasaye nende Abarumwa bebe. Etso nitso tsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye ahelesinjia owayenya. Ne Nyasaye ali netsimbabaasi tsinyinji.

57:22.t: Ne amasila kosikosi shimwakhanyoola khushialo nohomba mwinywe abeene halali khwamala okhukaandika mushitabu nikhushiili okhukaloonga. Toto ako khu Nyasaye ni amangu.

57:23.t: Khomukhaye okhubeelela khushiamulanyolele, ne mukhaye okhwilola khushiabahelesiye. Ne Nyasaye shiyachama buli omufuru wilolanga tawe.

57:24.t: Balia bemananga, ne balomesinjia Abandu okhuba abeemani. Ne ulia ufutara, amanye mbu toto Nyasaye niye Omuyinda, Owitsomibungwa muno.

57:25.t: Ne toto khwaruma Abarumwa befu nende ebimanyisio binoosinjia, ne nikhubeshilia eshitabu nende eshichelo kho Abandu beeme khubwatoto, ne nikhwishia eshichuma shili namaani amanji nende obukhoonyi khubandu, kho Nyasaye amanye ni wina umuhabina nende Abarumwa bebe khumakhuwa kefisile. Toto Nyasaye niwa Amaani, Omushili muno.

57:26.t: Ne toto khwaruma Nuhu nende Ibrahim, mana nikhura mulwibulo lwabu oburumwa nende Eshitabu, mana baliwo abasuubila mubo, ne abaanji mubo barulanga mumalako.

57:27.t: Mana nikhubalondiakhwo Abarumwa abaanji inyuma wabu, ne nikhulondiakho Isa (Yesu) Omwana wa Mariam, ne nikhumuwa Injili, ne nikhura mumioyo chia abaloondi bebe eshisa nende tsimbabaasi. Nabwo “obusirasoti” abeene nibo babuchachia sa. Sikhwabalachila elo tawe, halali okhukonya tsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye. Halali shibaalondanga kenyekhana tawe. Mana balia basuubila mubo khwabawa omurungo kwabu, ne abanji mubo nibokhurula mumalako.

57:28.t: Enywe abasuubila, rie Nyasaye, ne suubile Omurumwa wuwe. Yetsa okhubahelesia emikabo chibili mutsimbabaasi tsie, ne alabahelesia obulafu bwokhuchendela, ne alabaleshela. Naye Nyasaye ni Omulesheli muno, Omunji wetsimbabaasi.

57:29.t: Kho Abandu ba Eshitabu bamanye mbu babula obunyali khutsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye tawe, ne mbu tsimbabaasi tsioosi tsili mumukhono kwa Nyasaye. Ahelesinjia owayenya. Ne Nyasaye niwetsimbabaasi tsinyinji.

58:1.t: Toto Nyasaye awulile amakhuwa komukhasi urebananga ninawe okhulondokhana nende Omusatsa wuwe, ne alilila Nyasaye wuwe, ne Nyasaye awulilanga amakalusanio kenyu. Toto Nyasaye ni Omuwulili muno, Omuloli po.

58:2.t: Balia bachelasinjia Abakhasi babu nende banyinabwe mwinywe, abo shini banyinabwe tawe. Banyinabwe ni balia ababeebula. Ne toto abo baboolanga likhuwa libii muno khandi liobubeyi. Ne toto Nyasaye niwokhubeela muno, Omulesheli po.

58:3.t: Ne balia bachelasinjia Abakhasi babu nende banyinabwe mana nibakalukha inyuma (okhukhola) akababoolele (mbu shabalikhola ta), banunule Omurumwa nibashili okhutilanakhwo (omusatsa nende omukhasi). Endio nilwa mwikanyilisibwa khu (makhuwa) ako. Ne Nyasaye ni Omumanyi muno khukoosi kamukholanga.

58:4.t: Ne ulanyoola omurumwa wokhununula tawe, afunge saumu emiesi chibili chilondane nibashili okhutilanakhwo. Ne ulanyalilwa ako tawe, alisie abamanani amakhumi kasaasaba. Endio kho musuubile khu Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe. Ne etso nitso tsinzakho tsia Nyasaye, ne Abakhayi balinyoola eshinyasio eshilulu.

58:5.t: Ne toto balia bayingasinjia Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, balinyoola eshifimbwa murwe shinga balia baranjilila, ne toto khwamala okhubeeshilia ebimanyisio bilolekha, ne abakhayi bakhanyoole eshinyasio shiokhututuyia.

58:6.t: Inyanga ya Nyasaye yakhabalamusie boosi pe mana ababoolele koosi kabakhola, Nyasaye yakabikha, nabo bakebilila, ne Nyasaye nomuloli muno wabuli eshindu.

58:7.t: Shololangakhwo mbu Nyasaye yamanya bioosi bili mwikulu nende mushialo, shikhwakhaba okhwimoonya khwa Abandu bataru tawe halali Nyasaye niwokhune khubo, nohomba khwabane halali Ye (Nyasaye) ni wakharano khubo, nohomba babe batiti khubo nohomba abanji khu abo halali ali ninabo wosiwosi wa bali, mana alibaboolela kabakholanga inyanga yeyindukho. Toto Nyasaye nomumanyi muno wabuli eshindu.

58:8.t: Shololangakhwo balia bakanibwa okhwimoonyelesia, mana nibakalushila kabakanibwa, ne bemoonyelesinjia khumakhuwa katsimbii nende obusuku, nende okhuruma tsinzakho nende okhuloba okhutiila amalako komurumwa. Ne nibakhwitsila, shibakhushesinjia shingala Nyasaye wuwo akhushesinjia tawe, ne baboolanga mumioyo chiabu mbu: “Sichila shina Nyasaye nalakhwelesia eshinyasio khukakhuboolanga kano tawe?” Mana omulilo kwa Jahanam kulibayela, balinjilamwo! Ne awo ni habundu abii muno wokhukalukha.

58:9.t: Enywe abasuubila, nimwimoonyelesia, mleemoonyelesia khutsimbi nende okhuruma tsinzakho nende okhuloba okhutiila amalako komurumwa tawe. Ne mwimoonyelesie khumalayi nende okhuria Nyasaye, ne rie Nyasaye owamulikhung’asibwa imbeli wuwe.

58:10.t: Toto okhwimoonyelesia khurulanga khu Shetani, kho asinyisie Abasuubili. Halali shanyala okhubawumisia tawe halali khubunyali bwa Nyasaye. Ne Nyasaye butswa niwa abasuubili besiche.

58:11.t: Enywe Abasuubili, nimuboolelwa habundu wookhwikhala mbu: “Site mukasie obwiyangu”, site mukaasie obwiyangu, Nyasaye alabahelesia obwiyangu. Ne nimuboolelwa mbu: “Rule mutsie mumiero”, rule. Nyasaye achingulanga ekulu tsingasi balia basuubila mwinywe nende balia abahebwa obumanyi, mubichelo biawukhane, ne Nyasaye amanyile muno kamukholanga.

58:12.t: Enywe Abasuubili, nimumumoonyelia Omurumwa, ranjilisie eshihanwa nimushili okhumumoonyelia khwenyu okho. Endio nibo obulayi khwinywe nende obutswenufu muno. Ne nimulanyoola shokhurusia tawe, toto bwene Nyasaye ni Omulesheli muno, Owetsimbabaasi po.

58:13.t: Muritsanga okhuyinia ebihanwa imbeli wokhumonyelia khwenyu okho? Ne nimulakhola murio tawe, mana Nyasaye afuchilile okhwikanila khwenyu, lumilile okhulaama (iswala), ne yinie eshihanwa shia izakaa, ne rie Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, ne Nyasaye ni Omumanyi muno khukamukholanga.

58:14.t: Shololanga ta balia bakhola obulina nende Abandu ba Nyasaye yasinyishila? Shibali mwinywe tawe khandi shibali mubo (abayahudi) tawe. Ne betsubanga khububeyi nibamanyile.

58:15.t: Nyasaye yabarecheshela eshinyasio eshilulu. Toto kabakholanga ni amabii muno.

58:16.t: Bakhola ebitsubo biabu okhuba ingabo, mana nibekalila injila ya Nyasaye, kho bali neshinyasio shiokhututuyibwa.

58:17.t: Emiandu nende Abana babu shibilibakhoonya shiosishiosi imbeli wa Nyasaye tawe. Abo nabandu bomumulilo, balimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi.

58:18.t: Inyanga ya Nyasaye alibalamusia boosi, ne balimwitsubila shinga bamwitsubilanga enywe, ne baparanga mbu bali abwene. Koo, toto abo nibo ababeyi.

58:19.t: Shetani yabeekhalamwo mana nabeebilisia ametsulisio ka Nyasaye. Oko niko omukanda kwa Shetani. Koo, toto omukanda kwa Shetani niko kwasikha.

58:20.t: Toto balia bekalilanga amakhuwa ka Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, abo baliba neshifimbwa murwe shimalayo.

58:21.t: Nyasaye yabusia mbu: “Toto nisie ulishila, nende abarumwa banje.” Toto Nyasaye Niwa amaani, Woluyali.

58:22.t: Shiwakhanyoola Abandu basuubila Nyasaye nende inyanga imalilishi, nibayanzanga po balia abaloba Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe tawe, kata nibakhaba basaabwe, nohomba Abana baabu, nohomba Abasiani babu, nohomba Abakhasi babu. Abo Nyasaye yara mumioyo chiabu obusuubili, ne nabahelesia amaani khu roho okhurula khuye. Ne alibenjisia mumikunda chomwikulu chiburangamwo emialo, balimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi. Nyasaye yabafuchilila, nabo nibamufuchilila. Abo nibo bomukanda kwa Nyasaye. Koo, toto bwene omukanda kwa Nyasaye niko kulishila.

59:1.t: Bitswenulanga Nyasaye bioosi bili Mwikulu nende bili Mushialo. Naye Niwamani, Owamachesi muno.

59:2.t: Niye warusia Abakhaya abokhurula mu balia bahebwa Eshitabu okhurula Mutsinzu tsiabu, ebise biokhurusibwa khwabo khwaambeli. Shimwaparakhwo mbu banyala okhurula tawe, nabo nibapara mbu tsingoba tsiabu tsilabekalila ehale nende Nyasaye. Halali Nyasaye yabetsela munjila yabalamanyile tawe, ne nara obuyendi obukhongo mumioyo chiabu, banyasinjia tsinzu tsiabu khumikhono chiabu, nende emikhono chiabasuubili, kho paremwo enywe abetsimoni.

59:3.t: Ne kalaba mbu Nyasaye shiyabahandichila okhurula tawe, yakhabahelesiye eshinyasio khushialo, ne inyanga imalilishi bakhabe nende eshinyasio shio mumulilo.

59:4.t: Ako nilwokhubeela mbu bomela omirwe amakhuwa ka Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe. Ne ulia wumila Nyasaye omurwe, toto Nyasaye niweshinyasio eshilulu.

59:5.t: Omusala kwosikwosi kwamwarema, nohomba kwamwalekha nikwemele khushisina shiakwo, nikhumunwa kwa Nyasaye, ne kho afimbie omurwe abarulanga mumalako.

59:6.t: Ne omwandu kwa Nyasaye yahelesia Omurumwa wuwe okhurula khubo, shimwakulwanila okhwikhonyela tsifarasi nohomba tsingamia tawe. Halali Nyasaye ahelesinjia Abarumwa bebe obunyali khu yesiyesi wayenya. Ne Nyasaye nomunyali muno wabuli eshindu.

59:7.t: Ne omwandu kwa Nyasaye yahelesia Omurumwa wuwe okhurula khubandu betsingongo, nikwa Nyasaye nende Omurumwa, nende Abeekho, nende Abafwilwa, nende Abamanani nende bananjila, kho kukhaye okhubotokhanila sa mubayinda mwinywe. Ne shia Omurumwa abahelesia, shibukule. Ne shiabakaya, shileshe. Ne rie Nyasaye. Toto Nyasaye niweshinyasio eshilulu.

59:8.t: Nikwa Abamanani abawuyi abaloondwa mutsinzu tsiabu nibanulwa omwandu kwabu, bakhabanga amalayi okhurula khu Nyasaye nende obuchami, ne bahabinanga Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe. Abo nibo abatieli.

59:9.t: Ne balia bali namatala nende obusuubili imbeli wabu, bayanza balia babeetsela, ne shibali nobwimani mumioyo chiabu tawe khushabahelesibwa, ne beyimanga kata nibali mbu bo nibakhoyeshele. Ne ulia wiikaliwa obwimani bwomwoyo kukwe, abo nibo ababura.

59:10.t: Ne balia betsa inyuma wabu baboolanga mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, khuleshele efwe nende Abana befu abakhuranjilila mubusuubili, ne olara mumioyo chiefu ishinda khubalia basuubila tawe. Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, toto oli Omwihotselefu, Owetsimbabaasi muno.”

59:11.t: Shololangakhwo abeshikhabili baboolelanga abashiabwe abakhaya ka Nyasaye abokhurula mubandu bahebwa Eshitabu mbu: “Nimurusibwa, toto khularula halala ninanyu. Ne shikhularia (yesiyesi ukhukayira efwe okhurula ninenyu) tawe. Ne nimukhuywa, toto khulabahabina.” Ne Nyasaye aininjia obuloli mbu toto bo bakatinjia.

59:12.t: Nibarusibwa, shibalarula halala ninabo tawe. Ne nibakhuywa, shibalabahabina tawe. Ne nibatema okhubahabina, toto balabelukha muno mana shibalahabinwa tawe.

59:13.t: Toto enywe muli eshirisio eshikhongo mumioyo chiabu okhushila Nyasaye. Ako ni khulwa okhuba mbu bo ni Abandu balamanyile shiosishiosi tawe.

59:14.t: Shibalakhuyananga ninanyu boosi halala tawe, halali mutsingongo tsietsingoba nohomba inyuma wamasiisi. Emielo chiabu abeene khubeene ni emisiro. Opara mbu bali halala, ne emioyo chiabu chiakabukhanamwo. Ako ni khulwokhuba mbu abo ni Abandu balekhonyelanga obwongo tawe.

59:15.t: Bali shinga balia bali imbeli wabu hatiti, banyola obubii bwa amakhuwa kabu, ne balinyoola eshinyasio eshilulu.

59:16.t: Shinga Shetani olwayaboolela Omundu mbu: “Khaya ka Nyasaye”, ne olwa yakhaya, (Shetani) yaboola mbu: “Esie toto endi ehale ninawe, esie toto ndaria Nyasaye Omulesi webilonje bioosi.”

59:17.t: Ne niiba indukho yabu babili mbu toto bo balimumulilo tsinyanga tsioosi, ne oko niko omurungo kwa Abamabii.

59:18.t: Enywe abasuubila, rie Nyasaye, ne buli shia mundu ahenge nishina shiayekasilia khulwa mutsuli. Ne rie Nyasaye. Toto Nyasaye nomumanyi po khukamukholanga.

59:19.t: Ne mulaba shinga balia bebilila Nyasaye mana nabakhola nibeyibilila abeene tawe. Abo nibo abarulanga mumalako.

59:20.t: Shibayelana tawe Abandu bomulilo nende Abandu bomwikulu. Abandu bomwikulu nibo abalibura.

59:21.t: Khuleshinjiakho Ikurani ino khushikulu, wakhashilutsi nishiriire muno nishiatikhana khulwokhuria Nyasaye. Ne endio nilwa khuchelasilinjia Abandu bakhaba bario banyoola okhupara.

59:22.t: Ye niye Nyasaye, abulao nyasaye wundi ulali Ye tawe. Omumanyi wakefisa nende kalolekha, naye ni Omunji wetsimbabaasi, Omukoosia muno.

59:23.t: Ye niye Nyasaye, abulao nyasaye wundi ulali Ye tawe. Omwaami, Woluyali, Womulembe, Omureri Womulembe, Uchesinjia amakhuwake omwene, Owaamani, Ukholanga liayenya, Omukhongo, obutswenufu ni bwa Nyasaye, ali ehale nende akabamusanjinjia.

59:24.t: Ye niye Nyasaye Omuloonji, Omukaasi, Uretsangakhwo obukoondo, ali nende ameera amalayi muno. Bimutswenulanga bioosi bili mwikulu nende mushialo, naye niye Woluyali, Owamachesi muno.

60:1.t: Enywe Abasuubila, mulakhola Abasuku banje nende Abasuku benyu okhuba abeetsa tawe, mwabachama tawe, ne toto bamala okhukhaya obwatoto bwamwitsila. Bekalilanga Omurumwa nende enywe okhusuubila khu Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi, olwa murulanga khulwa okhulwaana khunjila yanje, nende okhukhaaba obuchami bwanje. Mukholanga nabo obwitsa mubwifisi, nasi emanyile muno kamukholanga mubwifisi nende mubwang’ang’u. Ne ukhola ario mwinywe, toto aba yamala okhukora injila ya habwene.

60:2.t: Nibetsukhana babashila, nibaba Abasuku benyu, ne balaboosiakhwo emikhono chiabu nende tsinimi tsiabu khububii, ne bekombanga mbu mube abakhayi.

60:3.t: Abeekho benyu nohomba Abana benyu shibilibakhoonya shiosishiosi tawe. Inyanga yeyindukho alibakabukhasia hakari wenyu ninabo, ne Nyasaye alolanga muno kamukholanga.

60:4.t: Toto enywe muli nende eshilolelo eshilayi muno khu Ibrahim nende balia abali ninaye. Olwa baboolela Abandu babu mbu: “Toto efwe khuli ehale muno ninanyu nende biamulaamanga bilali Nyasaye tawe, khubakhayile, ne obusuku nende ishinda biloleshe hakari wefu ninanyu okhuula shinga mulisuubila khu Nyasaye mulala”, halali amakhuwa ka Ibrahim yaboolela samwana mbu: “Toto nditsa okhukhusabila eshileshelo. Ne shendi nobunyali bwosibwosi khu Nyasaye tawe." Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, newe butswa wakhwisichile, ne ni ewuwo butswa wakhuliinjile, ne ni ewuwo butswa wakhulikalukha.

60:5.t: Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, olakhukholela amatemo okhurula khubakhayi tawe, ne khuleshele ebionoono biefu, Nyasaye wefu Omulesi. Toto ewe newe Owamaani, Omuchesi muno.”

60:6.t: Toto muli neeshilolelo eshilayi muno mubo, khu ulia wikoombanga okhulolana nende Nyasaye nende inyanga imalilishi. Ne ulia ukhaya, toto Nyasaye niye Omuyinda, Owitsomibuungwa muno.

60:7.t: Yakhaba ario Nyasaye yara obuyanzi hakari wenyu nende abasuku benyu. Ne Nyasaye nomunyali muno, ne Nyasaye ni Omulesheli po, Owobukoosia muno.

60:8.t: Nyasaye shabakaaninjia balia balabalwaninjia khudini, ne shibabarusia mutsinzu tsienyu mbu mubakholele amalayi tawe, nende okhubakholela obuleng’aafu. Toto Nyasaye yayanza balia bakholaanga obuleng’aafu.

60:9.t: Ne toto abakaninjia okhukhola obwitsa bwa mbusia ngonia nende balia babalwaninjia khudini, mana nibabarusia mutsinzu tsienyu, mana nibakhoonya okhulondwa khwenyu, okhubakhola abalina benyu ba mbusia ngonia. Ne balia balabakhola okhuba abetsa babu ba mbusia ngonia, abo nibo abetsimbii.

60:10.t: Enywe abasuubila, Abakhasi Abasubili abawuyi nibabeetsela, mubaree khumareebo, Nyasaye niye umanyile muno obusuubili bwabu. Nimunyoola mbu nabasuubili, mulabakalusia mubakhayi tawe. Bo shibakwaanila Abasaatsa abo tawe, ne abasatsa abo shibakwanile ninabo tawe, ne mukalusilie abasatsa abo shiabarunga (ikhwe), shinobubii enywe okhubateshia tawe nibili mbu mubahelesia omurungo kwabu. Ne mulakhayira okhuteshia abakhasi benyu bahandachila mubukhayi tawe. Ne reebe shiamwarunga, nabo bareebe shiabarunga. Ako niko amalako ka Nyasaye abusia hakari wenyu. Ne Nyasaye ni Omumanyi muno, Owamachesi po.

60:11.t: Ne Omukhasi yesiyesi mwinywe niyakhakalushila abakhayi, mana nimulwana nende abakhayi, nimunyoola omwandu kweliyie, muhelesie balia babakhasi babu babalekha, omwandu kuyelana nende okwabarunga, ne murie Nyasaye wamusuubilanga.

60:12.t: Ewe Omurumwa, Abakhasi abasuubili nibakhwitsila nibakhulaka mbu shibalatsokaasia shiosishiosi nende Nyasaye tawe, ne shibaleeba tawe, nohomba shibalayeya tawe, nohomba shibaleera Abana babu tawe, nohomba shibalarera akokhuchikha akarulana hakari wemikhono nende ebilenje biabu tawe, nohomba shibalakhaya amalako koko akamubulayi tawe, lakana ninabo, ne obasabile eshileshelo khu Nyasaye. Toto Nyasaye Nomulesheli muno, Wobukoosia po.

60:13.t: Enywe Abasuubila, mulakhola obulina nende balia ba Nyasaye yasinyishila tawe. Bamala okhuwesia omwoyo khumakhuwa komwikulu, shinga abakhayi bawesia omwoyo khubandu bomubilindwa.

61:1.t: Bitswenulanga Nyasaye bioosi bili mwikulu nende mushialo, naye niye Woluyali, Owamachesi muno.

61:2.t: Enywe Abasuubili, shichila shina muboolanga akamulakhola tawe?

61:3.t: Ni eshisinyo eshikhongo imbeli wa Nyasaye okhuboola kamulakhola.

61:4.t: Toto bwene Nyasaye yayanza balia abalwananga khunjila yiyie khulunyaali shinga lisisi liatilana.

61:5.t: Ne olwa Musa yaboolela Abandu bebe mbu: “Enywe Abandu banje, shichila shina musinyisinjia, ne toto mwamanya mbu esie endi Omurumwa wa Nyasaye khwinywe?” Ne olwa barula khunjila, Nyasaye nakosia emioyo chiabu. Ne Nyasaye shalunjisinjia Abandu abakori tawe.

61:6.t: Yitsulila olwa Isa (Yesu), Omwana wa Mariam yaboola mbu: “Enywe Abana ba Israeli, esie endi Omurumwa wa Nyasaye khwinywe, efuchilila obwatoto bwendi nabo okhurula mutaurati, nende okhubahelesia akomwikhoyo kookhwitsa Omurumwa unondakhwo ulangwa mbu Ahmad." Olwa yabeetsela nende ebifune bia habulafu, baboola mbu: “Buno nobulosi bulolekha.”

61:7.t: Ne wina wetsimbi muno, okhushilakhwo ulia uchishila Nyasaye obubeyi, naye alangungwa mubusalamu? Ne Nyasaye shalunjisinjia Abandu ababii tawe.

61:8.t: Benyanga okhusumia obulafu bwa Nyasaye neeminwa chiabu, ne Nyasaye alatinyia obulafu bubwe kata abakhayi nibalachama tawe.

61:9.t: Niye owaruma Omurumwa wuwe nende obulunjifu nende idini ya toto kho achihelesie obushili khu tsidini tsindi, kata Abatsokaasi nibalachama tawe.

61:10.t: Enywe Abasuubili, koo, ebamanyiekhwo inganga yitsa okhubahonia okhurulana nende eshinyasio eshilulu?

61:11.t: Musubilenje Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, ne mukhalabanenje khunjila ya Nyasaye khumiandu chienyu nende emioyo chienyu. Ako ni amalayi khwinywe nikaba mbu mwakhamanya.

61:12.t: Alabaleshela ebionoono bienyu, ne alabenjisia mumikunda chomwikulu chiburanga emialo hasi wachio, nende eshimenyo eshilayi mumikunda chia Eden. Okho nikhwo okhubura okhukhongo.

61:13.t: Ne eshindi shibachamisia: obukhoonyi okhurula khu Nyasaye nende obushili buli hambi, ne bila Abasuubili akomwikhoyo.

61:14.t: Enywe Abasubili, be abahabini ba Nyasaye, shinga Isa (Yesu) yareeba abechi bebe mbu: “Ni wina omuhabini wanje khu Nyasaye?” Abechi bebe nibaboola mbu: “ Efwe khuli abahabini ba Nyasaye.” Mana nikusuubila omukanda mulala mubana ba Israil, ne omukanda kundi nikukhaya. Kho, nikhukhoonya kulia okwasuubila khubasuku bakwo, mana nibaba abashili.

62:1.t: Bitswenulanga Nyasaye, ebili mwikulu nende mushialo, Omwami, Woluyali, Owamaani, Owamachesi muno.

62:2.t: Ye niye waruma Omurumwa mubandu bakorwa okhusooma nende okhuhandika, abasoomele tsinyaali tsitsie, ne abatswenule, ne abechesie Eshitabu nende amachesi, kata nibaali inyuma awo mubukori bulolekha.

62:3.t: Ne abandi bashili okhuliimaana ninabo, naye niye Owamaani, Omuchesi po.

62:4.t: Etso nitsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye, ahelesinjia owa yenya. Ne Nyasaye niwetsimbabaasi tsinyinji.

62:5.t: Abahebwa Eshitabu shia Itaurati mana nibalashiloonda tawe, bali shinga isishili ichinjile ebitabu. Ifwani imbii muno ni Abandu bakhaya amakhuwa ka Nyasaye. Ne Nyasaye shalunjisinjia Abandu ababii tawe.

62:6.t: Bola mbu: “Enywe Abayahudi, nimuparanga mbu enywe muli abahelwa ba Nyasaye okhushila Abandu boosi, mwikoombe liifwa nikali mbu muboolanga obwatoto.”

62:7.t: Ne shibanyala okhwikomba liifwa tawe khulwa akemikhono chiabu chiaranjilisia okhukhola. Ne Nyasaye yamanya muno ababii.

62:8.t: Bola mbu: “Toto liifwa liamwilukhanga elo, lilibanyoola, mana mulikalusibwa khumumanyi wa kefisa nende kalolokhanga, ne alibaboolela koosi kamwakholanga.”

62:9.t: Enywe Abasuubili, nikulangwa omulaango kwa amalaamo inyanga ya chirano, ilushile okhwitsulila Nyasaye, ne leshe inganga. Endio nobulayi khwinywe nikali mbu mumanyile.

62:10.t: Ne amalaamo nikakhamalwa, saalaane khushialo, ne koonye khumikabo chia Nyasaye, ne mwitsulile Nyasaye muno, mwakhaba murio mwanyoola okhubura.

62:11.t: Ne nibalola inganga nohomba amakhuwa kabula obukhala, bakelushila, ne bakhulekha niwemele. Boola mbu: “Akali ewa Nyasaye ni amalayi muno okhushila amakhuwa kabula obukhala nende inganga, ne Nyasaye niye Omukabi omulayi okhushila boosi bakabanga.”

63:1.t: Abeshikhabili nibakhwitsila nibaboola mbu: “Toto efwe khusuubila mbu ewe oli Omurumwa wa Nyasaye”, ne Nyasaye amanyile mbu toto ewe oli Omurumwa wuwe, ne Nyasaye ayininjia obuloli mbu toto abeshikhabili nababeyi.

63:2.t: Bakhola ebitsubo biabu okhuba ingabo, mana nibekalila injila ya Nyasaye. Ni amabii muno akabakholanga.

63:3.t: Ako nikhulwokhuba mbu basuubila mana khandi nibakhaya, mana Nyasaye naasuba emioyo chiabu, mana bo shibamanyile tawe.

63:4.t: Ne nobalola, emibili chiabu chikhuchamisia. Ne nibaboola, orechelesia amakhuwa kabu, opara mbu ni emisala chiyeshibwe. Baparanga mbu buli oluyoka lwosilwosi lupwa luli khubo. Abo nibo Abasuku, ba meso ninabo. Nyasaye yabatsuba. Bakosibuungwa barie?

63:5.t: Ne nibaboolelwa mbu: “Itse Omurumwa abasabile eshileshelo”, bayuyia emirwe chiabu, ne obalola nibashukhana nibakhola obufuru.

63:6.t: Ninashilala khubo, nobasabila eshileshelo nohomba nolekha, Nyasaye shiyakhabaleshela tawe. Toto Nyasaye shalunjisinjia abonooni tawe.

63:7.t: Nibo baboolonga mbu: “Mulahelesie emikabo balia abali halala nomurumwa tawe, okhula bamwilushe.” Ne Nyasaye ni Mwene ebiachi biomwikulu nende mushialo. Halali abeshikhabili shibamanyile tawe.

63:8.t: Baboolanga mbu: “Nikhukalukha Madina, toto abamaani balaloondamwo abateshele.” Ne amaani ni ka Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, nende Abasuubili. Halali Abeshikhabili shibamanyile tawe.

63:9.t: Enywe Abasuubili, omwandu nende Abana benyu bilachila mwebilila okhumurumbula Nyasaye tawe. Ne yesiyesi ukhola ario, aba ali mubatiba.

63:10.t: Ne rusie eshihanwa mumiandu chiakhwabahelesia, liifwa nilishili okhuulila mulala wenyu, mana aboole mbu: “Abaayiee Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, nolametakhwo tsinyanga atiti, ndarusia muno eshihanwa, mana ndaba mubandu abalayi.”

63:11.t: Ne Nyasaye shanyala okhumeta Omundu ebise liifwa lilie niliakhoola tawe. Ne Nyasaye nomumanyi muno khukamukholanga.

64:1.t: Bitswenulanga Nyasaye bioosi bili mwikulu nende mushialo, obwami nobuubwe nende oluyali, naye ni Omunyali muno wa buli eshindu.

64:2.t: Ye niye Owabaloonga, ne mwinywe balimwo Abakhayi khandi mwinywe balimwo Abasuubili. Ne Nyasaye alolanga muno kamukholanga.

64:3.t: Yalonga likuli nende eshialo khubwatoto mana nabahelesia obukoondo, ne nakhola obukondo bwenyu obo okhuba obulayi muno. Ne ewuwe niwo wamulikalukha.

64:4.t: Yamanya ebili mwikulu nende mushialo, ne yamanya kamukholanga mubwifisi nende mubwang’ang’u. Ne Nyasaye nomumanyi muno khukali mubilifu.

64:5.t: Shikabetselakhwo amacheni kabakhayi abaali imbeli wenyu tawe, bapila obubii bwa amakhuwa kabu, mana baliba nende eshinyasio eshilulu.

64:6.t: Endio nilwokhubeela mbu Abarumwa babu babetselanga nende obwatoto bwa habulafu mana nibamiena mbu: “Omundusa akhuluunjisie efwe!” Mana nibakhaya, nibafutara, mana Nyasaye nalabateba tawe. Ne Nyasaye nomuyinda witsomibungwa muno.

64:7.t: Abakhayi bapara mbu shibalilamusibwa tawe. Boola mbu: “Shinendio tawe! Nditsuba khu Nyasaye wanje Omulesi mbu toto mulilamusibwa mana toto muliboolelwa kamwakhola. Ne ako khu Nyasaye ni amangu.”

64:8.t: Kho suubile Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, nende obulafu bwa khweshia. Ne Nyasaye nomumanyi po khukamukholanga.

64:9.t: Inyanga lwa alibakhung’asia khu inyanga yomukhung’aano, eyo niyo inyanga yokhukhobana. Ne ulia usuubila Nyasaye mana akhole amalayi, alamuleshela tsimbi tsitsie, ne alimwinjisia mumikunda chomwikulu chiburangamwo emialo, balimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi. Okho nikho okhubura okhukhongo.

64:10.t: Ne balia bakhaya mana nibayingasia ebimanyisio biefu, abo nibo Abandu bomumulilo, balimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi, ne ni habundu abii muno wokhukalukha.

64:11.t: Ne amasila kosikosi shiketsanga tawe halali khumunwa kwa Nyasaye. Ne usuubila khu Nyasaye, alunjisia omwoyo kukwe. Ne Nyasaye ni Omumanyi muno wabuli eshindu.

64:12.t: Ne loonde amakhuwa ka Nyasaye nende Omurumwa. Ne nimuloba, toto eshili khumurumwa wefu ni okhusia butswa oburume obuli habulafu.

64:13.t: Naye ni Nyasaye, abulaho nyasaye wundi owulali Ye tawe, ne Abasuubili besiche butswa Nyasaye.

64:14.t: Enywe Abasuubila, toto mubakhasi benyu nende abana benyu balimwo abasuku benyu, kho be meso ninabo. Ne nimubeela ne mwakhaya okhura mumakani, ne mwaleshela, toto bwene Nyasaye ni Omulesheli po, Owobukoosia muno.

64:15.t: Toto emiandu chienyu nende abaana benyu namatemo. Ne Nyasaye ali nende omurungo omukhongo.

64:16.t: Kho rie Nyasaye shinga munyalilwa, ne muwulile mana muloonde (amalako), ne rusie eshihanwa, nobulayi khumioyo chienyu. Ne ulia uhonokosibwa ehale nende obwimani bwa omwoyo kukwe, abo nibo Ababura.

64:17.t: Nimuhelesia Nyasaye likofi lilayi, alabametelakhwo, ne alabaleshela ebionono, ne Nyasaye ni Omunji wokhupa orio, Omwihotselefu.

64:18.t: Owamanya akefisile nende akali habulafu, Owamaani, Owamachesi muno.

65:1.t: Ewe Omurumwa, nimulekha Abakhasi, mubaleshe nebekhale eda yabu, ne mubale tsinyanga tsia eda, ne rie Nyasaye Omulesi wenyu. Mulabarusia mutsinzu tsiabu tawe, nohomba balarulamwo tawe, halali nibakhola eshifwabi shilolekha. Ne etso ni tsinzakho tsia Nyasaye, ne uruuma tsinzakho tsia Nyasaye, obwatoto aba yekholele obubii. Shomanyile tawe, awundi Nyasaye anyala okhurera likhuwa lindi olunyuma lwa kano.

65:2.t: Ne nibakhamala eda yabu, mubakalushile mumenye ninabo khubulayi, nohomba mubaleshe nomulembe. Ne mulaanje abaloli abesikwa mwinywe, ne mukhole obuloli khulwa Nyasaye. Endio nilwa mulachilwa khu balia basuubila Nyasaye nende inyanga imalilishi. Ne uria Nyasaye, alamukholela injila yokhurula mumatinyu.

65:3.t: Ne alamuhelesia omukabo kukwe munjila ya alamanyile tawe. Ne wisika Nyasaye, Nyasaye alamuyela. Toto Nyasaye yosinjia amalako keke, yamala okhura khubuli eshindu eshichelo.

65:4.t: Ne balia bema okhuswamila mubakhasi benyu, nimukanakana, awo eda yabu ilaba emiesi chitaru, nende balia abalaaswamilakhwo tawe. Ne balia abali inda, eda yabu iwa mukhwibula khwabu. Ne uria Nyasaye, amwanguyisilinjia amakhuwa keke.

65:5.t: Ako niko amalako ka Nyasaye yamwishilia. Ne ulia uria Nyasaye, alaleshelwa ebionono bibie, ne alamuhelesia omurungo omukhongo.

65:6.t: Mubamenyie mutsinzu tsiamumenyangamwo, ne mulabasandia khomubakholele obutinyu tawe. Ne nibali nobusiro (tsinda), mubahelesie obukhoonyi okhula shingala beboolola (bebula). Ne nibabanunilia Abana benyu, mubahelesie omurungo kwabu, ne mumenyane khubulayi. Ne nimulola obusiro, Omukhasi wundi amununilie.

65:7.t: Wobunyali arusie okhulondokhana nobunyali bubwe, ne ulanyalilwa tawe arusie khu shia Nyasaye amuheele. Nyasaye shanichilisinjia Omundu tawe halali khushia amuheelesiye. Nyasaye alarera obwangu olunyuma lwa obusiro.

65:8.t: Ne tsingongo tsinga tsiafunaka amalako ka Nyasaye watsio Omulesi nende Abarumwa bebe, mana nikhutsikhola okhukalusia amarebo khubikhole biatsio, ne nikhutsihelesia eshinyasio eshilulu?

65:9.t: Mana nitsipila obubii bwamakhuwa katsio, ne indukho yamakhuwa katsio niba okhusikha.

65:10.t: Nyasaye yabarecheshela eshinyasio eshilulu, kho rie Nyasaye enywe Abamachesi abasuubila. Toto Nyasaye yabeshilia ametsulisio.

65:11.t: Omurumwa ubasoomelanga tsinyaali tsia Nyasaye tsinoosinjia, kho arusie balia abasuubila mana nibakhola amalayi okhurula mubilima abayile mubulafu. Ne usuubila khu Nyasaye mana nakhola amalayi, alamwinjisia mumikunda chomwikulu chiburangamwo emialo, balimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi. Toto Nyasaye alaba amuhelesiyie omukabo omulayi muno.

65:12.t: Nyasaye niye owaloonga amakulu saba, nende liloba khushichelo esho, amalako ke kekhanga hakari wabio, kho mumanye mbu toto Nyasaye ni Omunyali muno wabuli eshindu, ne toto Nyasaye yatereera buli eshindu khubumanyi bubwe.

66:1.t: Ewe Omurumwa! Mbushina nokaana eshia Nyasaye yakhufuchilila? Okhaabanga okhuchamisia Abakhaye bobo. Ne Nyasaye ni Omulesheli po, Wetsimbabasi muno.

66:2.t: Toto Nyasaye yamala okhubarereraho injila yokhurimbulula ebitsubo bienyu, ne Nyasaye ni Omwami wenyu, naye ni Omumanyi muno, Owamachesi po.

66:3.t: Ne olwa Omurumwa yaboolela mulala khubakhaye be likhuwa mubwifisi, mana omukhaye oyo shingala yalirusia habulafu, ne Nyasaye namanyia Omurumwa, yamubila akandi ne nawulelela akandi. Olwa yamuboolela ario, omukhaye oyo naboola mbu: “Wina ukhuboolele kano?” Omurumwa naboola mbu: “Omumanyi uli nende amakhuwa koosi niye umboolele.”

66:4.t: Nimulasaba eshileshelo khu Nyasaye tawe, enywe babili emioyo chienyu chilenjila mubwonooni. Ne nimukhonyana khulwo okhukholela Omurumwa amabii, mumanye mbu toto Nyasaye niye omuhabini wuwe, nende Jibril, nende abasuubili abakholi bamalayi, ne okhumeta khwako Abamalaika balamukhoonya.

66:5.t: Nabalekha, Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi anyala okhumukalukhasirya Abakhaye bandi habundu wenyu, Abalayi okhushila enywe, Abehotselefu, Abasuubili, Abarechelefu, Abekanili, Abalaami, Abakholi bamalayi, nashikoko nende abakhaana bashili okhutekhakhwo.

66:6.t: Enywe Abasuubila, mwihonokosie enywe abeene nende Abandu benyu okhurulana nomulilo kwetsikhwi tsiakwo ni Abandu nende amachina. Abemeresi bakwo ni Abamalaika abalulu aba amaani. Shibakhayanga okhukhola lia Nyasaye ababoolele tawe, ne bakholanga liabalomesibwe.

66:7.t: Enywe Abakhayi, mulayinia ebichila olwa lelo tawe. Toto murungungwa sa kamwakholanga.

66:8.t: Enywe Abasuubila, sabe eshileshelo khu Nyasaye eshileshelo shia toto. Nyasaye wenyu alabaleshela tsimbi tsienyu, ne alabenjisia mumikunda chomwikulu chiburangamwo emialo, inyanga ya Nyasaye alalifimbia omurwe ta Omurumwa wuwe nende Abasuubili bali halala naye. Obulafu bwabu buliba imbeli wabu, nende elubeka womukhono musatsa, baliboola mbu: “Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, khwitsusilie obulafu bwefu, ne okhuleshele ebionono biefu. Toto ewe oli Omunyali muno wabuli eshindu."

66:9.t: Ewe Omurumwa, lwaana abakhayi nende abeshikhabili, ne obe omumilanu khubo, ne eshimenyo shiabu ni mumulilo, ne ni habundu abii muno wokhukaluka.

66:10.t: Nyasaye yachelasilia Abandu abakhayi, omukhasi wa Nuhu nende Omukhasi wa Luti, bali mumikhono chia abasumba befu babili, abakholi bamalayi, mana nibabakhoba, halali okhukhoba okho nikhulabakhoonya shiosishiosi tawe, nibaboolelwa mbu: “Injile mumulilo halala nende abenjila.”

66:11.t: Ne Nyasaye yachelasilia balia abasuubila, Omukhasi wa Firauni, olwa yaboola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi nyumbashila inzu ewuwo mumukunda kwomwikulu, ne uhabine okhurulana nende Firauni nende ebikhole bibie, ne uhabine okhurulana nende abandu abonooni.”

66:12.t: Nende Mariam Omukhana wa Imran, welinda omubili kukwe, ne nikhumufuramwo okhurulana nende roho wefu, nafuchilila amakhuwa ka Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, mana naba mubehotselesinjia (khulwa Nyasaye).

67:1.t: Niwoluyali ulia wobwaami bwoosi buli mumukhono kukwe, naye ni Omunyali muno wabuli eshindu.

67:2.t: Owaloonga lifwa nende obulamu khulwa okhubateema mbu ni wina mwinywe ukhola amalayi muno, naye niye Owaamaani muno, Omunji wobulesheli.

67:3.t: Niye owalonga amakulu saba keyichikhane. Shiwakhalolakhwo mubuloonji bwa Omunji Wetsimbabaasi obwawukhani tawe. Kho kalusiakhwo tsimoni! Olalolakhwo obuleemefu bwosibwosi?

67:4.t: Mana khandi kalusia tsimoni tsitsio olwakhabili, tsilakhukalushila omwene nitsibeelele, natsio nitsichoonyele.

67:5.t: Ne toto bwene khwarona likulu lieshialo elia hambi nende tsitaa, ne nikhutsikhola okhuba eshikhupo khumashetani, ne khwabarecheshela eshinyasio shiomulilo kwakhanga muno.

67:6.t: Ne balia bakhaya okhuloonda ka Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, balinyoola eshinyasio shia Jahannam, ne ni abundu ambii muno wookhuweera.

67:7.t: Olwa balisukunwamwo, balikuwulila nikuwoola ne nikupupuchila.

67:8.t: Kukhaaba okhukhalikhamwo khulwoburuma. Buli olwa Omukanda kusukunwamwo, abemeresi bakwo babareeba mbu: “Omwikanyilisi shiyabetselakhwo tawe?”

67:9.t: Baliboola mbu: “Ata, toto bwene abekanyilisi bakhwitsila ne nikhubaingasia, ne nikhuboola mbu: “Nyasaye shiyeshiakhwo shiosishiosi tawe, enywe amukhali butswa mubukori obukhongo.”

67:10.t: Ne baliboola mbu: “Khubetsanga bokhuwulila nohomba bamachesi, shikhwakhabere mubandu bomulilo tawe.”

67:11.t: Kho mana balifuchilila tsimbi tsiabu, kho mana babe ale muno abandu bomumulilo.

67:12.t: Toto bwene balia baria Nyasaye wabu Omulesi mukabalalolanga tawe, bali nende obulesheli nende omurungo omukhongo.

67:13.t: Ne lomalome amakhuwa kenywe mumwoyo kwa asi nohomba mumwoyo kwa ekulu, toto Ye amanyile muno akali mubilifu.

67:14.t: Yakhakhaywa okhumanya owaloonga, naye niye omumanyi wamakhuwa kefisile, mwene amakhuwa koosi?

67:15.t: Niye owabakholela liloba okhuba eliangu khubukhala bwenyu. Kho chendekhwo mutsimbeka tsialio tsioosi, ne lie khumiandu chichie. Ne ewuwe niwamulilamusibwa okhutsia.

67:16.t: Mparanga mbu muli nomulembe okhurulana nende ulia uli hekulu mbu shanyala okhubayibisia muliloba nalio nilirenga tawe?

67:17.t: Nohomba mparanga mbu muli nomulembe okhurulana nende ulia uli hekulu, mbu shanyala okhubarumila omuyeka kweyimbumbuyeka kwetsimbaale tawe? Ne mulimanya butswa mbu amekanyilisio kanje kali karie.

67:18.t: Ne toto bwene bamala okhukatsula balia bali imbeli wabu, kho mana okhusinyikha khwanje khwali khurie?

67:19.t: Nohomba shibalolangakhwo amayoni hekulu wabu shingala kabambulanga tsimbaya nende kafumbanga halala tawe? Shakatilililanga tawe halali Omunji Wetsimbabaasi. Toto bwene Ye ni Omuloli muno wabuli eshindu.

67:20.t: Ne ni wina oyo unyala okhuba omukanda kwenyu kwabalwani kwokhubahabina owulali Omuunji wetsimbabaasi tawe? Toto bwene abakhayi shibali khushiosishiosi tawe halali mukhukatania.

67:21.t: Nohomba niwina oyo unyala okhubahelesia omuhandu, Ye niyekalila omuhandu kukwe? Halali abo bahandila sa khubufuru nende okhwira ehale.

67:22.t: Koo, ulia uchendanga niyetukumula nabushila khubweni bwe, nomulunjifu muno nohomba ulia uchendanga shiluunji khunjila ingololofu?

67:23.t: Boola mbu: “Ye niwabaloonga olwambeli, nabahelesia tsimbulililo nende tsindolelo, nende emioyo. Ne oriomuno yenyu ni inditi muno.”

67:24.t: Boola mbu: “Ye niye wabasaalasia khushialo, na ewuwe niwa mulikhung’asibwa.”

67:25.t: Ne baboolanga mbu: “Ni liina kamulakanga kano, nikali mbu muboolanga obwatoto?”

67:26.t: Boola mbu: “Obumanyi bwe inyanga eyo buli khu Nyasaye, nasi shendi halali omwikanyilisi wa habulafu.”

67:27.t: Olwa balilola kabalakwa nikakhoola, obweni bwa abakhayi bulisinyikha, ne baliboolelwa mbu: “Kano niko kamwasabaanga muno.”

67:28.t: Boola mbu: “Mulola murie Nyasaye niyasishia halala nende bali ninasi, nohomba nakhubeela tsimbabaasi, ni wina ulilinda abakhayi okhurulana nende eshinyasio eshilulu?”

67:29.t: Boola mbu: “Ye niye Omunji wetsimbabaasi, khwamusuubila, ne niye wakhwesika. Ne mulimanya ni wina uli mubukori bulolekha.”

67:30.t: Boola mbu: “Mulola murie amaatsi kenyu nikakhama, ni wina ulabarerera amaatsi kakhulukusinjia?”

68:2.t: Ewe khumikabo chia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi sholi omulalu tawe.

68:3.t: Ne toto bwene oli nomurungo omukhongo kulaliwa tawe.

68:4.t: Ne toto bwene oli nende ebima ebilayi muno.

68:5.t: Hambi ano olalola, nabo bosi nibalole.

68:7.t: Toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi niye umanyile muno ulia wakora okhurula khunjila yiyie, ne amanyile muno abali khubulunjifu.

68:9.t: Bekombanga mbu olaba omuteshere (khudini yiyio) kho nabo bakhutoratosilie (amakhuwa kabo).

68:10.t: Ne olaloonda buli ulia witsubanga muno, owulekungwa tawe.

68:12.t: Omwikalili muno wamalayi, urumanga tsinzakho, owetsimbi po.

68:14.t: Khulwokhubeela ali nende emiandu nende Abana.

68:15.t: Nibasomelwa tsinyaali tsiefu nibaboola mbu: “Etso nitsingano tsiabakhale.”

68:17.t: Ne toto bwene khulabatema shinga khwatema Abandu bomukunda, olwa betsuba mbu: “Toto khulauna okhukuchesa obulachweya.”

68:19.t: Awo, eshikhole shiamaraba, okhurula khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi nishikholekha khumukunda oko nabo nibali mutsindoolo.

68:22.t: Mbu: “Tsie itsuli mumukunda kwenyu nimuli toto mbu mutsitsanga okhuchesa.”

68:25.t: Ne nibatsia nibasuubile muno nibeelolanga mbu bali noobunyali.

68:26.t: Olwa bakulola, baboola mbu: “Toto bwene khukorere.

68:28.t: Omulayi muno mubo naboola mbu: “Shebaboolelekhwo tawe mbu, khulwa shina mulatswenula Nyasaye tawe?”

68:29.t: Nibaboola mbu: “Obutswenufu nibwa Nyasaye wefu Omulesi. Toto efwe khuli abonooni.”

68:32.t: Awundi Nyasaye wefu Omulesi alakhukalukhasiria amalayi okhushila kano. Toto efwe khukalushila Nyasaye wefu Omulesi.”

68:33.t: Endio nilwa eshinyasio shili. Ne eshinyasio sheyindukho neshikhongo muno, bamanyangakhwo bayie!

68:34.t: Toto bwene balia abaria Nyasaye wabu baliba nende emikunda chomwikulu chobwokholo ewa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi.

68:39.t: Nohomba muli neebiitsubo khwifwe, ebiliboosia khu inyanga yeyindukho, mbu toto bwene mulinyoola koosi pe kamubusinjia?

68:40.t: Barebe mbu: “Ni wina mubo Omwimilisi wa kano?”

68:41.t: Nohomba bali nende abasaanji? Mana barere abasaanji babu abo nikali mbu baboolanga akatoto.

68:42.t: Inyanga lwomuluku (kwa Nyasaye) kulifunulwa, ne balilangwa okhurerera Nyasaye obwenu bwabu hasi (okhusujuda), ne shibalinyalilwa tawe.

68:43.t: Tsimoni tsiabu tsilihenga hasi, tsisoni tsilibalia muno, toto bwene balaangungwa okhurerera Nyasaye obweni bwabu hasi (nibali khushialo) nibali abalamu muno.

68:44.t: Kho ndeshela balia bakatsulanga likhuwa lino, khulabasitia khushinyasio kalahakalaha munjila yabalamanyile tawe.

68:45.t: Ne ndalabahelesia ebise. Toto amaraba kanje ni amasiro.

68:46.t: Nohomba obasabanga omurungo, nabo bakhayungwa eshichelo esho khulwa neeshisiro?

68:48.t: Kho linda okhula shinga Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yetsa okhubusia eshina, ne olaba ta shinga omundu weyimonye (omurumwa Yunus) tawe, olwa yalaanga nafwinyiikhe.

68:49.t: Tsikhayanga okhumuulila tsimbabaasi okhurula khu Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, yakhasalilwe khulukuku nafunanibwa.

68:50.t: Halali Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi namwawula, mana namukhola okhuba mubandu abalayi.

68:51.t: Ne abakhayi bali hambi muno okhukhureresia khu tsimoni tsiabu, olwa bawulila ametsulisio ka Nyasaye. Ne baboolanga mbu: “Toto bwene ye ni omulalu.”

68:52.t: Ne amakhuwa kano (Ikurani) shikali halali ni ametsulisio khubiloonje bioosi.

69:4.t: Abandu ba Tsamudi nende A’ad bakatsula amasila karenjinjia omwoyo.

69:5.t: Mana Abandu ba Tsamudi basishibwa nende amasila amakali.

69:6.t: Ne Abandu ba A’ad basishibwa nomuyeka kweyimbumbuyeka.

69:7.t: Okwayabarumila khubilo saba nende tsinyanga munane tsilondokhana, olola Abandu nibalambalile shinga emisala chia mitende emikhaya.

69:9.t: Ne Firauni niyetsa nende abali imbeli wuwe, nende tsingongo tsiakalukhanibwa hasi niba hekulu, okhurulana nende tsimbi tsiabu.

69:10.t: Nibakhaya okhuloonda Omurumwa wa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, ne mana nabakhamara obutinyu muno.

69:11.t: Toto olwa amaatsi ketsula, khwabachinga Muliaro.

69:12.t: Khulwokhukhola ako kabe eshitsulisio khwinywe, ne shikawulile eshirwi shiokhuwulila.

69:14.t: Ne eshialo nende efikulu olwa bilichingwa, mana biswakwe okhuswakwa khulala.

69:15.t: Inyanga eyo niyo olwe indukho ilirulila.

69:16.t: Ne likulu lilirandukha, nalio inyanga eyo liliba liteshele.

69:17.t: Ne Abamalaika baliba khundulo khwalio, ne munane mubo balichinga eshifumbi shiobwami shia Omulesi wuwo hekulu wabu.

69:18.t: Inyanga eyo mulirebwa habulafu mwesi, ne shibulaho shiosishiosi shiliifisa mwinywe.

69:19.t: Kho ulia ulihebwa eshitabu shishie nomukhono omuluunji, aliboola mbu: “Itse musomekhwo eshitabu shianjie.

69:20.t: Toto bwene ndali ndamanya ndilinyola okhurebwa ebikhole bianje.”

69:24.t: “Lie mana munywe mubusangafu okhurulana nende kamwaranjilisia mutsinyanga tsiabura (khushialo).”

69:25.t: Ne ulia ulihebwa eshitabo shishie nomukhono omukhasi, aliboola mbu: “Manyanga ekhaya okhuhebwa eshitabu shianje.

69:26.t: Mana kata ekhayanga okhumanya shinga ndilirebwa ebikhole bianje.

69:27.t: Aaah bayee liakhaberesa lifwa elala (ndakhaya okhulamusibwa).

69:32.t: Mana mumuboyokanie nomunyororo kweshichelo shiemikhono amakhumi saba.

69:33.t: Toto bwene shiyali yasuubila Nyasaye woluyali tawe.

69:40.t: Toto bwene namakhuwa ka Omurumwa Owoluyali.

69:41.t: Ne shinamakhuwa ka omwimbi wa mashairi tawe. Obusubili bwenyu nibutiti po.

69:42.t: Nohomba shinamakhuwa komufumu tawe. Okhwitsulila khwenyu nokhutiti muno.

69:43.t: Keshibwa okhurula khu Nyasaye Omulesi webiloonje bioosi.

69:48.t: Ne ako ni amachelo khubaria Nyasaye.

69:49.t: Ne toto bwene khwamanya mbu mwinywe balimwo abakhayi.

69:52.t: Kho mana tswenula elira lia Nyasaye wuwo Woluyali.

70:1.t: Omureebi yereeba okhulondokhana nende eshinyasio eshiakharulile.

70:3.t: Okhurula khu Nyasaye Omwene hekulu tsiachelekhana.

70:4.t: Abamalaika nende Roho baninanga nibatsia ewuwe khunyanga ya eshichelo shiayo ni emika tsiyelefu amakhumi karano.

70:6.t: Toto abo bayilolanga mbu ili ehale.

70:8.t: Inyanga yelikulu liliba shinga eshichuma shisalululwe.

70:9.t: Ne tsingulu tsiliba shinga obwoya bwelikondi.

70:10.t: Ne omulina shalireeba omulina wuwe tawe.

70:11.t: Balilolesibwa balolane. Omwononi yakhekombe okhwinunula okhurulana nende eshinyasio shieyinyanga eyo khulwokhuyinia Abana be.

70:12.t: Nende omukhaye wuwe, nende Omusiani wabu.

70:14.t: Nende bioosi bili mushialo, mana elo limuhonokosie.

70:15.t: Shikali kario tawe! Toto oko ni omulilo omululu.

70:21.t: Ne nanyoolwa na amalayi, yemana po.

70:23.t: Balia bakholelanga eshinani amalaamo kabu (iswala) obulachweya tawe.

70:24.t: Nende balia bomumwandu kwabu kulimwo omukabo omulobole.

70:25.t: Khu usaba nende khu uritsanga okhusaba.

70:27.t: Nende balia baritsanga muno eshinyasio shia Nyasaye wabu Omulesi.

70:28.t: Toto eshinyasio shia Nyasaye wabu Omulesi sishili shawakhasuubila okhuhonokokhamwo tawe.

70:30.t: Okhuyiniakhwo khubakhaye baabu, nohomba balia babaruka bali mumikhono chiabu emisatsa. Toto abo shibafunanibwa tawe.

70:31.t: Ne balia abokhwenya kalali kano tawe. Abo nibo babura eshichelo.

70:32.t: Nende balia balindanga obulayi obwisikwa nende indakano yabu.

70:33.t: Nende balia bemanga shilunji khubuloli bwabu.

70:35.t: Abo nibo balihelesibwa oluyali nende amalayi mumikunda chomwikulu.

70:36.t: Bali barie abakhayi, abakhwitsilanga mubunji nibakhunga’nga’lilakhwo butswa.

70:37.t: Emikanda nemikanda, na mukhono musatsa nende namukhono mukhasi.

70:38.t: Koo, buli yesiyesi yekombanga mbu alinjila mumukunda kwomwikulu kwobwokholo?

70:39.t: Shikali kario tawe! Toto efwe khwabalonga okhurulana nende eshiabamanyile.

70:40.t: Nditsuba khu Nyasaye, Omulesi webukwe nende mumbo, toto efwe khuli nobunyali.

70:41.t: Bwokhukalukhasia abalayi bashilakhwo abo, nafu shikhwakhashilwa tawe.

70:42.t: Kho baleshe mubukalakala nende emibayo chiabu, okhula lwabalinyoolana nende inyanga yabalakwa.

70:43.t: Inyanga yabakharule mubilindwa tsimbiro opara mbu belukhanga okhutsia khumasanamu.

70:44.t: Obweni bwabu bulihenga hasi, tsisoni tsilibafumbeela. Eyo niyo inyanga yabalakungwa.

71:1.t: Toto efwe khwaruma Nuhu khubandu bebe mbu: “Wikanyilisilie abandubo, eshinyasio eshilulu nishishili okhuboolela.”

71:2.t: Naboola mbu: “Enywe Abandu baanje, toto esie endi Omwikanyilisi wenyu wahabulafu.

71:3.t: Mbu mumulaame Nyasaye, ne mumurie, ne muwulile esie.

71:4.t: Alabaleshela tsimbi tsienyu, ne alabameta tsinyanga okhula indukho yenyu. Toto indukho ya Nyasaye niyuula, yibetsanga yulile. Abaane nimwakhamanyilekhwo!”

71:5.t: Naboola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, esie enaanjile Abandu banje eshilo nende eshitere.

71:6.t: Habula omulaango kwanje shikwabametela shiosishiosi tawe halali okhwilukha.

71:7.t: Ne toto buli olwa ndabalanganga mbu khonyoole okhubaleshela, bara tsinzala tsiabu mumarwi kabu, nibefunikha muno tsingubo tsiabu, nibekhulumamia, nibooma emirwe obutinyu muno.

71:9.t: Mana khandi nebakhuumila obutinyu, mana khandi nebalaanga mubwifisi muno.

71:10.t: Ne nebaboolela mbu: 'Sabe Nyasaye wenyu Omulesi eshileshelo, toto Ye ni Omunji wokhuleshela.

71:12.t: Ne alabahelesia Omwandu nende abana, ne alabahelesia emikunda nende emialo.

71:13.t: Muli murie wamulahetsanga Nyasaye eshiriibwa tawe?

71:15.t: Shimulolanga shingala Nyasaye yalonga amakulu saba nikalondokhaane tawe?

71:16.t: Ne nakhola omwesi okhubamwo obulafu, ne nakhola eliuba okhuba itaa.

71:17.t: Ne Nyasaye yabamesia khwiloba shinga emimela.

71:18.t: Khandi alibakalusiamwo, ne khandi alibarusiamwo mwesi burusia.

71:19.t: Ne Nyasaye yabakholela eshialo okhuba shinga omukeka.

71:21.t: Nuhu naboola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, toto bo baakhayile nibaloonda ulia owa omwandu kukwe nende omwana wuwe shibiamumetelakhwo shiosishiosi tawe halali okhusikha.

71:23.t: Ne nibaboola mbu: ‘Mlakhalekhakhwo abanyasaye benyu tawe. Ne mlakhalekhakhwo Wada, nohomba Suwa, nohomba Yaghutsa, nohomba Ya’uka nohomba Nasra tawe.’

71:24.t: Ne toto bo bamala okhukosia abaanji, ne olametela balia abetsimbi tawe halali obukori.”

71:25.t: Okhurulana nende tsimbi tsiabu berwa namatsi, mana nibenjisibwa mumulilo, ne shibanyoola ababahabina owulali Nyasaye tawe.

71:26.t: Ne Nuhu naboola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, olalekhakhwo khushialo abamenyakhwo yesiyesi mubakhayi tawe.

71:27.t: Toto Ewe nobalekhakhwo, balakosia Abasumba bobo, ne shibalebula tawe halali abonooni abakhayi po.

71:28.t: Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, ndeshela esie nende abebusi banje, nende ulia wenjila munzu yanje Omusuubili, nende balia boosi abasubila abasatsa nende abakhasi. Ne olameta abonooni shiosishiosi tawe halali okhusikha.”

72:1.t: Boola mbu: “Enyoolele obufimbuli mbu toto omukanda mulala kwa Majini kwarechelesia, nikuboola mbu: ‘Efwe toto bwene khuwulile Ikurani yokhuchenyia po!

72:2.t: Ilunjisinjia khubulunjifu, mana khuyisuubile, ne shikhulisaasia Nyasaye wefu Omulesi nende shiosishiosi tawe.

72:3.t: Ne toto bwene Nyasaye wefu Omulesi niwoluyali olukhongo, shiyekholela omukhasi nohomba omwana tawe.

72:4.t: Ne khubwatoto abasilu mwifwe baboolanga khu Nyasaye obubeyi obunji muno.

72:5.t: Ne efwe toto khwaparanga mbu Abandu nende Amajini shibanyala okhuboola obubeyi khu Nyasaye tawe.

72:6.t: Ne toto bwene Abasatsa okhurula mubandu, bakhabanga okhwilinda khubasatsa beshijini, mana nibabameta obusiro obunji.

72:7.t: Ne toto abo baparanga shingala muparanga mbu, Nyasaye shaliruma yesiyesi tawe.

72:8.t: Ne toto khwatila khulikulu, nikhunyoola lietsula abalindi abalulu, nende tsing’ining’ini tsiomulilo.

72:9.t: Ne toto bwene khwekhalangamwo nikhurechelesia. Ne ulatsia okhurechelesia bulaano, alabukana nende tsing’ining’ini tsiomulilo omululu.

72:10.t: Ne toto efwe shikhumanyile tawe nibenyelwa amabii abali khushialo, nohomba Nyasaye wabu Omulesi yabenyela obulunjifu.

72:11.t: Ne toto bwene mwifwe balimwo abakholi bamalayi, ne abaandi balimwo balali bario tawe. Toto khuli emikanda chikabukhane.

72:12.t: Ne toto efwe khwamanya mbu shikhunyala okhushila Nyasaye khushialo tawe, ne shikhunyala khwerukha khwamushila tawe.

72:13.t: Ne toto efwe olwa khawulila obulunjifu, khwabusuubila. Ne usuubila mu Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, sharitsanga okhwibilwa nohomba obusilo obunji tawe.

72:14.t: Ne toto mwifwe balimwo Abasalamu nende abalekha katoto. Ne balia basilima, abo nibo baloonda obulunjifu.

72:15.t: Ne balia balekha obwatoto, baliba tsikhwi tsia omulilo kwa Jahannam.

72:16.t: Ne balunjikhanga khunjila yatoto, khwakhabanywesie amaatsi amaanji.

72:17.t: Kho khubateme khuko. Ne ulia uhelesia ametsulisio ka Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi omukongo, alanyoola eshinyasio eshilulu.'”

72:18.t: Ne toto emisikiti ni chia Nyasaye, kho mulalaama halala nende Nyasaye shiosishiosi tawe.

72:19.t: Ne toto olwa Omusumba wa Nyasaye yasinjila namulaama, (amajini) ako kali hambi muno okhumufwinya!

72:20.t: Boola mbu: “Toto esie enamanga sa Nyasaye wanje Omulesi, ne shemutsokaasinjiakhwo nende yesiyesi tawe.”

72:21.t: Boola mbu: “Esie embula obunyali bwokhubawumisia nohomba okhubalunjisia tawe.”

72:22.t: Boola mbu: “Toto abulaho yesiyesi unyala okhuuninda okhurulana nende eshinyasio shia Nyasaye tawe, ne shindilinyoola wandakhelushila tawe halali khuye."

72:23.t: Halali okhusia (amakhuwa) okhurula khu Nyasaye nende oburume bubwe. Ne uloba okhutiila ka Nyasaye nende Omurumwa wuwe, toto alinyoola Omulilo kwa Jahannam, alimenyamwo tsinyanga tsioosi.

72:24.t: Okhula olwa balilola kabalakungwa, balimanya mbu ni wina omuteshele muno mubukhoonyi nende omuleemu muno khushichelo.

72:25.t: Boola mbu: “Esie engorwa kamulakungwa kano mbu kali ahambi nohomba Nyasaye wanje Omulesi alakasitia ehale.”

72:26.t: Omumanyi wakefisile, ne shafunulilanga yesiyesi akefisa keke tawe.

72:27.t: Halali ulia wayachamila Mubarumwa. Ne toto oyo amwelesinjia abalindi imbeli wuwe nende inyuma wuwe.

72:28.t: Kho anyoole okhumanya mbu toto bosia oburume bwa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi, naye yaterera obulayi akabali ninako, ne yamanya obubasio bwa buli eshindu.

73:2.t: Bukha mushilo shioosi, halali hatiti butswa!

73:4.t: Nohomba ometekhwo, ne osoome Ikurani mushiroonyo.

73:5.t: Toto efwe khwitsa okhukwishilia likhuwa lisiro.

73:6.t: Toto okhubukha eshilo, omwoyo kukwalalanga muno, ne amakhuwa kashio kabetsanga amalunjifu muno.

73:7.t: Ne toto bwene ewe obetsanga nende okhubotokhana okhunji mushitere.

73:8.t: Kho lirumbule elira lia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, ne irushila elala khuye.

73:9.t: Nyasaye Omulesi webukwe nende mumbo, abulaho nyasaye wundi owulali Ye tawe, khomukhole Omwisikwa wuwo.

73:10.t: Ne wifwile khukababoolanga, ne bawuyekhwo mubulayi.

73:11.t: Ne ndeshela abaingani abali mubwokholo, ne obahelesie obwiyangu butiti.

73:12.t: Toto bwene efwe khuli nende tsirimba tsisiro nende omulilo omululu.

73:13.t: Nende eshilibwa shirekamanga mumworokoro nende eshinyasio eshilulu.

73:14.t: Inyanga lwa eshialo shilirenga nende tsingulu tsiosi, ne tsingulu tsilibulungukha shinga olufu.

73:15.t: Toto efwe khwabarumila Omurumwa abe Omuloli khwinywe, shingala khwarumila Firauni omurumwa.

73:16.t: Halali Firauni naalatila amalako ka Omurumwa oyo tawe, mana nikhumutila okhutila khweshinyasio.

73:17.t: Ne shingala mukhayanga, muliba murie inyanga ya abana balimela tsimbutsi?

73:18.t: Awo likulu liliatikha! Ne awo kayalachisilia kaliikholekha.

73:19.t: Toto bwene kano ni ametsulisio. Kho, owenya, atiile injila ya Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi.

73:20.t: Toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yamanya mbu ewe wemanga nolaama ahambi eshilo shioosi, nohomba eshitonye shiashio nohomba mukhuwa khwashio, nende omukanda kulia kuli halala ninawe. Ne Nyasaye niye ureranga eshilo neshitere. Yamanya mbu shimunyala okhumanya okhushibala obulai tawe, mana nabaleshela tsimbi tsienu. Kho soome shiamunyalilwa mukurani. Yamanya mbu mwinywe balimwo abalwale, ne abandi basamulanga khushialo nibakhaaba khutsimbabaasi tsia Nyasaye. Nabo abandi bakhupananga khunjila ya Nyasaye. Kho soome shiamunyalilwa mushio, mana mulaame iswala obulachweya, ne muhane eshihanwa, ne muhelesie Nyasaye likofi lilayi. Ne lilayi liosiliosi liamwiranjilisilia abeene, mulilinyoola ewa Nyasaye nilili lilayi khandi lia omurungo omukhongo muno. Ne sabe Nyasaye eshileshelo. Toto Nyasaye ni Omunji wokhuleshela, Owetsimbabaasi muno.

74:6.t: Ne olarusia nosuubile okhwenya eshinji tawe.

74:7.t: Ne wisumilisie khulwa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi.

74:9.t: Kho inyanga eyo iliba inyanga indinyu muno.

74:16.t: Shikali kario tawe! Toto ye yakholelanga eshileka muno amakhuwa kefu (Ikurani).

74:17.t: Nditsa okhumuha eshinyasio shialanyala okhwisumilisia tawe.

74:18.t: Toto ye yapara mana napanga shinga atuta.

74:19.t: Mana nasishibwa okhurulana shingala yapanga okhututa.

74:20.t: Khandi mana nasishibwa okhurulana shingala yapanga okhututa.

74:23.t: Mana niyechesia obwatoto omukongo, mana nakhola obufuru.

74:24.t: Naboola mbu: “Bino shine shindu tawe halali obulosi bwainibwa khubandu bandi.

74:25.t: Kano shini shiosishiosi tawe halali namakhuwa kabandu sa.”

74:27.t: Ne ni shina shilikhumanyia omulilo kwa Saqar oko?

74:31.t: Ne shikhwakhola abalindi bomulilo halali ni Abamalaika, ne shikhwakhola isaabu yabu eyo halali okhubeyiabeyia Abakhayi, kho babe nobulaamba balia bahebwa Eshitabu, ne Abasuubila bamete obusuubili. Ne balaba nokhukanakana balia bahebwa Eshitabu nende Abasuubila tawe. Ne khobaboole balia bali nobulwale mumioyo chiabu nende Abakhayi mbu: “Nyasaye yenyanga shina, okhurulana nende okhuchelasia khuno?” Endio nilwa Nyasaye akosinjia owayenyele, nalunjisia owayenya. Ne awumao umanyile omukanda kweliyie kwa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi halali Ye omwene. Ne kano shini shiosishiosi tawe halali ni ameetsulisio khubandu.

74:35.t: Toto omulilo oko nimulala khumakhuwa amakhongo muno.

74:37.t: Kho ulia wenya mwinywe, aranjilile nohomba amalilishe.

74:38.t: Buli omundu alitiilwa khulwa amakhuwa kayakhola.

74:42.t: “Ni shina shiachila nimwinjila mumulilo kwa Saqar?”

74:45.t: Ne khwali nikhweibila halala nende balia beyibila mutsimbi.

74:48.t: Kho okhusabila khwomusabi shikhulibakhoonya shiosishiosi tawe.

74:49.t: Mana bali barieena abahelesinjia omukongo ameetsulisio kano?

74:52.t: Mbu buli omundu mubo yenyanga ahebwe eshitabu shishie okhurula mwikulu.

74:53.t: Shikali kario tawe! Halali shibaritsanga aka Mwikulu tawe.

74:54.t: Shikali kario tawe! Toto kano ni ametsulisio.

74:56.t: Ne shibakhetsulila tawe okhuula Nyasaye achame. Ye niukhoyeshele okhuribwa, khandi ni Wobulesheli muno.

75:3.t: Koo, omundu aparanga mbu shikhulikhung’asia halala ebikumba bibie tawe?

75:4.t: Khulwa shina! Efwe khunyala okhura habwene tsinyali tsia tsinzala tsitsie.

75:5.t: Habula omundu yenyanga sa okhutsililila okhukhola amabii khutsinyanga tsili imbeli waye.

75:9.t: Ne olwa eliuba nende omwesi bilihambasibwa.

75:10.t: Inyanga eyo Omundu aliboola mbu: “Amelushilo kali yena?”

75:12.t: Inyanga eyo ewa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi niiliba habundu wokhutong’ao.

75:13.t: Inyanga eyo omundu aliboolelwa kayaranjilisia nende kayamalilishia.

75:14.t: Halali buli omundu yemanyile omwene muno.

75:16.t: Olabuyungubasilia (obufimbuli bwa Nyasaye) olulimi lulwo tawe, khulwokhubusooma lwangu lwangu tawe.

75:17.t: Toto kali khwifwe okhubukhuung’asia (mushilifu shishio) halala nende okhukhukhola obusome.

75:20.t: Shikali kario tawe! Halali enywe mwayanza obulamu bwokhushialo.

75:24.t: Ne obweni bundi inyanga eyo bulisinyikha po.

75:25.t: Bulimanya mbu buulilwe nende shifunakanga olukongofuma.

75:26.t: Shikali kario tawe! Olwa omwoyo kuliula khushikumba shielikosi.

75:28.t: Ne omwene namanya mbu toto bwene okho nikho okhufwa.

75:29.t: Ne olwa emiluku chilitilana halala okundi khukundi.

75:30.t: Inyanga eyo niyo yebindu bioosi biliyilwa ewa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi.

75:31.t: Mana shiyafuchilila (aka Nyasaye), nohomba shiyaswaliya tawe.

75:34.t: Oh abaane koo ewe! Oh abaane koo ewe!

75:35.t: Mana khandi oh abaane koo ewe! Oh abaane koo ewe!

75:36.t: Koo, omundu aparanga mbu anyala okhulekhwa butswa eshikhaya?

75:37.t: Koo, shiyali indonyande yamatsi kolwibulo kamitsungwa tawe?

75:38.t: Mana naba amalika, mana Nyasaye namuloonga namukaasia obulayi muno.

75:39.t: Mana nakhola okhurulanamwo tsimbia tsibili: abasatsa nende abakhasi.

75:40.t: Kho koo, oyo shali omunyali muno wokhulamusia abafu tawe?

76:1.t: Toto biabura ebise ebirambi khumundu, olwa yaali naalali eshindu shirumbulwa tawe.

76:2.t: Toto efwe khwaloonga Omundu okhurulana nende imwo yobulamu, yesasania, (yomusatsa nende omukhasi) khulwokhumutema, kho nikhumukholaye okhuwulila muno, nende okhulola po.

76:3.t: Toto efwe khwamulunjisia kunjira ilunjifu, niyenya asubire Nyasaye mana abe wokhupa orio, nohomba alonde khunjira ya obukhayi (alobe injira ya Nyasaye).

76:4.t: Toto efwe khwarecheshela Abakhayi eminyororo, nende tsirimba nende omulilo omululu.

76:5.t: Toto Abandu abalayi balinywa eshinywebwa shiasasibwamwo ‘kafura’.

76:6.t: Ne Isebele ya Abandu ba Nyasaye balinywamwo, bali ikhola ikhulukusie mubunji.

76:7.t: Bakholanga kabalaka, ne baritsanga inyanga yobusiro bwayio buliswana.

76:8.t: Ne balisinjia eshilibwa shia abene bashiyanza Abamanani, nende Abafwilwa nende Ababoye.

76:9.t: “Toto efwe khubalisinjia khulwokhwenya obweni bwa Nyasaye, shikhubenyakhwo omurungo nohomba orio muno tawe.

76:10.t: Toto efwe khuritsaanga okhurulana khu Nyasaye wefu Omulesi, inyanga yobutinyu nende Omusando.”

76:11.t: Kho mana Nyasaye alibashinga okhurulana nende obusiro bwe inyanga eyo, ne alibakhola okhulolekha obulayi po, khandi abasangafu.

76:12.t: Ne alibarunga omukunda kwomwikulu nende tsingubo tsieshironyo, khulwa okhwifwila khwabu.

76:13.t: Omo baliyekha khubisaala bioluyali, shibalilolamwo omubasu omululu nohomba omunyiri omululu tawe.

76:14.t: Ne ebiinikha biliba ahambi ninabo, ne ebiamo biamwo bilieletsanga muno.

76:15.t: Ne balitendelwa khubindu bie ifedha nende bikombe bia tsigilasi.

76:16.t: Tsihilasi tsia ifedha inzwenufu shinga shiwoo, tsiachelwa khushichelo.

76:17.t: Ne omo balinywesibwamwo eshinywebwa shasasibwamwo itangawizi.

76:18.t: Eyo isebele iliyo ilangwa mbu Salsabil.

76:19.t: Ne balibetsela luno nende lulia okhubatenda abasiani bashili ababukha. Nobalola, olapara mbu bo ni tsisole tsing'enang'ena tsiomunyanza tsiasaalasibwa.

76:20.t: Ne nolenga eyo, olalola obwokholo nende obwaami obukhongo.

76:21.t: Hekulu wabu tsiliba tsingubo tsia Hariri (tsingwalafu) tsiobukondo bwamasafu, ne balifwala emikasa chieyifedha, ne Nyasaye wabu Omulesi alibanywesia eshinywebwa eshilafu muno.

76:22.t: (Alibaboolela mbu) “Toto kuno nikwo omurungo kwenyu, ne okhukhalabana khwenyu khufuchililwe.”

76:23.t: Toto efwe khwakhwishilia Ikurani indutu, indutu.

76:24.t: Kho linda okhula shingala Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi alabusia eshina, ne olaulila yesiyesi mubo owetsimbi nohomba omukhayi tawe.

76:25.t: Ne itsulila elira lia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi nibushia nende nibwila.

76:26.t: Ne mushilo murerere obweni hasi, ne mutswenule oluwono olurambi lweshilo.

76:27.t: Toto Abandu bano bachama obulamu bwokhushialo, ne balekhanga inyuma wabu inyanga isiro.

76:28.t: Efwe khwabaloonga, ne nikhubaramwo amaani, ne nikhwenya, khunyala okhukalukhasia abandi bali shingabo.

76:29.t: Toto bwene kano ni ametsulisio. Kho, owenya, atiile injila itsia ewa Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi.

76:30.t: Ne shimwakhenya tawe okhula Nyasaye achame. Toto bwene Nyasaye niye Omumanyi muno, Owamachesi po.

76:31.t: Yenjisinjia owayenya mutsimbabasi tsitsie, ne abamabii yabarecheshela eshinyasio eshilulu.

77:4.t: Nende abamalaika bekhanga okhwaukhasia amalayi nende amabii.

77:11.t: Ne olwa Abarumwa balikhung'asibwa kubise bilala.

77:12.t: Khulwa inyanga shina eyo yasutibwa imbeli?

77:15.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo inyanga eyo shiliba khubakatsulanga.

77:19.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo inyanga eyo shiliba khubakhayi.

77:23.t: Mana nikhuraho ebise, ne nifwe abamanya ebise bikhoyeshele.

77:24.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo inyanga eyo shiliba khubakatsulanga.

77:27.t: Ne nikhuramwo efikulu efirambi (fiokhutinyisia liloba), ne nukhubanywesia amatsi amalayi.

77:28.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo inyanga eyo shiliba khubakatsulanga.

77:31.t: Sishirera eshinikha shiosishiosi tawe, ne sishikhonya shiosishiosi okhurulana nende omulilo tawe.

77:32.t: Omulilo oko kusukunanga tsinzesele shinga tsinzu tsikhongo.

77:34.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo inyanga eyo shiliba khubakatsulanga.

77:35.t: Ino ni inyanga yabalaliboola shiosishiosi tawe.

77:37.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo inyanga eyo shiliba khubakatsulanga.

77:38.t: Ino niyo inyanga yobwawukhani, khubakhung’asiye nende abeyimbeli.

77:40.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo inyanga eyo shiliba khubakatsulanga.

77:41.t: Toto abaria Nyasaye baliba mubiinikha nende tsisebele.

77:43.t: Lie, ne munywe mumwikhoyo khukalia kamwakholanga.

77:45.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo inyanga eyo shiliba khubakatsulanga.

77:46.t: Lie, ne mwikhoye hatiti. Toto enywe muli abamabii muno.

77:47.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo inyanga eyo shiliba khubakatsulanga.

77:48.t: Ne nibabolerwa mbu: “Inamile Nyasaye”, shibenamanga tawe.

77:49.t: Eshinyasio eshikhonga inyanga eyo shiliba khubakatsulanga.

77:50.t: Mana nimakhuwa shina olunyuma lwa kano akabalasuubila?

78:4.t: Tawe! Lekha butswa. Ahambi hano baletsa okhumanya.

78:5.t: Mana khandi tawe lekha butswa. Ahambi hano baletsa okhumanya.

78:8.t: Ne ni khubaloonga tsimbia tsibili (eshisatsa neshikhasi)?

78:9.t: Ne nikhukhola okhukona khwenyu okhuba okhuwuluukha?

78:11.t: Ne nikhukhola eshitere okhuba shiokhukhalabanila obulamu?

78:12.t: Ne nikhumbakha hekulu wenyu amakulu saba aka amaani.

78:14.t: Ne nikhwishia amatsi karulanga mubunji okhurula mumaleesi.

78:15.t: Kho khurusie khuko imele nende emimela.

78:18.t: Inyanga yolwika lulifurwamwo, nanyu muliitsa mumikanda.

78:19.t: Ne likulu liliikulwa liaba shinga emiliango.

78:20.t: Ne efikulu filisiulwa fiaba shinga amaweruweru.

78:22.t: Ni habundu wokhumenya wa Ababura eshichelo (shia Nyasaye).

78:24.t: Shibalipilamwo shiosishiosi eshinyifu nohomba eshinywebwa tawe.

78:25.t: Halali amatsi kayile pa nende amafila.

78:27.t: Toto bo shibasubilanga mbu khuliba nende inyanga yokhurebwa ebikhole tawe.

78:29.t: Ne buli eshindu khwashimanya obulai muno mubuhandiche.

78:30.t: Kho pile! Shikhulabameta shiosishiosi tawe halali eshinyasio!

78:36.t: Omurungo okhurula khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, okhuhebwa khuyela.

78:37.t: Nyasaye Omulesi welikulu nende eshialo nende bioosi bilimwo, Omunji wetsimbabaasi, shibalinyala okhulomaloma imbeli wuwe tawe.

78:38.t: Inyanga ya Roho (Jibril) alisinjila nende Abamalaika khulunyaali. Shalilomaloma yesiyesi tawe okhuyiniakhwo ulia ulifuchililwa nende Omunji wetsimbabaasi, ne aliboola obulaamba bwonyene.

78:39.t: Eyo niyo inyanga yatoto. Ne owenya, atile injila akalushile Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi.

78:40.t: Toto efwe khubekanyisilia eshinyasio shili ahambi okhuula. Inyanga yomundu alilola kayakhola omwene. Ne Omukhayi aliboola mbu: “Manyanga ndakhabeele liloba!”

79:1.t: Nditsuba khubamalaika bakhunyulanga (emioyo cha bakhayi) nende amaani.

79:4.t: Nende balia bashilananga tsimbilo (nende emioyo chiabasuubili okhuyila mwikulu).

79:5.t: Nende balia bachesinjia amakhuwa (emioyo emibii nichinyoola eshinyasio, ne emilayi nichisangaasibwa).

79:6.t: Inyanga yolwika lulifurwamwo lweyimbeli (lulirenjia buli eshindu).

79:13.t: Kho toto okhulamusibwa okho ni oluyoka lulala lwonyene.

79:14.t: Hawo na hawo buli eshiloonje shiliba mushikuri eshiya.

79:16.t: Olwa Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi yamulanjila mulitwoma lioluyali lia T’uwaa.

79:19.t: Ekhwimilile khu Nyasaye wo Omulesi onyoole okhumuria.'”

79:22.t: Khandi nakalukha inyuma, nakhola eshinani (okhukania Abandu balafuchilila Musa tawe).

79:24.t: Naboola mbu: “Nesie nyasaye wenyu omulesi ohuli hekulu muno.”

79:25.t: Kho Nyasaye namutila namuhelesia eshinyasio khukayaboola kokhumalilikha (‘nesie Nyasaye wenyu omukhongo’), nende kayaranjilila (‘abulaho Nyasaye wundi owulali esie’).

79:26.t: Toto esho neshimanyisio khubalia baria Nyasaye.

79:27.t: Koo! Nobutinyu okhubaloonga enywe nohomba likulu? Ye niye waliumbakha!

79:29.t: Ne nara eshilima mushilo shiayio, ne nayiniamwo eshitere.

79:33.t: Bibe biokhwisangasia bwenyu nende ebiayo bienyu.

79:36.t: Ne Jahannamu ililolesibwa yalolekha khu ulola.

79:39.t: Toto Jahannamu ni habundu wuwe wokhumenya!

79:40.t: Ne ulia waria okhwema imbeli wa Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, mana nakaania omwoyo kukwe eshihonya.

79:41.t: Toto oyo Omukunda kwomwikulu nikuliba habundu wuwe wokhumenya!

79:43.t: Ne shiomanyile shiosishiosi khubio khobabolere tawe.

79:44.t: Obumalilishi bweyinyanga eyo buli khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi.

79:45.t: Toto ewe oli butswa Omwikanyilisi khu ulia owaria inyanga eyo.

79:46.t: Olwa baliyilola inyanga eyo, balikaala mbu shibaamenyakhwo (khushialo) tawe halali ingolobe ndala nohomba eshitere shiayo.

80:3.t: Ne nishina shikhumanyia ye awundi anyala okhwitswenula?

80:11.t: Shikali kario tawe! Toto kano nametsulisio.

80:17.t: Omundu yasikha! Nishina shimukholanga naba omukhayi?

80:19.t: Okhurulana nende indonyande ya amaatsi kolwibulo, yamuloonga mana namupangila amakhuwa ke.

80:32.t: Khulwa okhwisangasia khwenyu nende ebiruche bienyu.

80:36.t: Nende omukhaye wuwe nende abana be.

80:37.t: Buli shiamulala aliba nende akeke kamuyela.

80:40.t: Ne obweni bundi inyanga eyo buliba nende olufu.

81:4.t: Ne olwa tsingamia tsili inda tsililekhwa.

81:8.t: Ne olwa omukhana wayabilwa omulamu alireebwa.

81:12.t: Ne olwa omulilo kwa Jahannamu kulimetwa omwakho (khukutsiririre okhwaakha).

81:13.t: Ne olwa omukunda kwomwikulu kulisitibwa ahambi.

81:19.t: Toto kano ni amakhuwa komurumwa woluyali.

81:20.t: Owamaani, owa ingasi yoluyali, ewa Mwene Eshisala shiobwami.

81:22.t: Ne owashienywe uno shali omulalu tawe.

81:23.t: Ne toto bwene yamulola (Jibril) netsimoni tsie elubeka wa hekulu muno welikulu lia hasi ili habulafu.

81:24.t: Naye shali omwimani khumakhuwa kefisa tawe.

81:25.t: Ne kano shikali amakhuwa ka Shetani walondwa tawe.

81:27.t: Ikurani ino ni eshitsulisio butswa khubiloonje bioosi.

81:29.t: Ne enywe shimulenya tawe halali okhuula Nyasaye yenye, Omulesi webiloonje bioosi.

82:5.t: Buli omundu alimanya shayakhola imbeli nende mukhumalilikha.

82:6.t: Ewe Omundu, ni shina shiakhukatia waalekha Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, Woluyali?

82:7.t: Ulia wakhuloonga, mana naakhukasia obulayi, nakhuleng’ania.

82:9.t: Shikali kario tawe! Halali enywe mukatsulanga Inyanga yomurungo.

82:10.t: Ne toto bwene muli nende Abalindi.

82:14.t: Ne toto abakholi betsimbi baliba mumulilo.

82:17.t: Ne ni shina shilakhumanyia inyanga yomurungo eyo?

82:18.t: Khandi ni shina shilakhumanyia inyanga yomurungo eyo?

82:19.t: Inyanga yomundu alikhaywa okhukhoonya owundi shiosishiosi, ne inyanga eyo okhulomesia khwoosi khuliba khwa Nyasaye yenyene.

83:2.t: Balia abeene nibechelela khubandu, benyanga betsusilibwe.

83:3.t: Nabo nibachelela abandu khushichelo nohomba khuratili, nibakatia.

83:4.t: Koo, shibaparangakhwo mbu toto bakhayabululwe mubafu?

83:6.t: Inyanga yabandu baliema khulwa Nyasaye Omulesi webilonje bioosi.

83:7.t: Shikali kario tawe (shinga olwa mukholanga)! Toto bwene amaandiko ka (ebikhole bia) abamabii kali mushitabu shilangwa mbu Sijjiin.

83:8.t: Ne ni shina shikhumanyia Sijjiin ino?

83:10.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo inyanga eyo shiliba khubakhayi.

83:12.t: Ne shibachikatsulanga inyanga eyo tawe okhuyiniakhwo buli wabura eshichelo, omukholi wetsimbi.

83:13.t: Nasoomelwa ebimanyisio biefu naboola mbu: “Etso ni tsingano etsia abakhale!”

83:14.t: Shikali kario tawe! Habula emioyo chiabu chakhupa tsindebelende okhurulana khu kalia kabakholanga.

83:15.t: Shikali kario tawe! Toto bwene abo inyanga eyo baliikalilwa okhunyoola emikabo chia Nyasaye wabu Omulesi.

83:18.t: Shikali kario tawe (shingala mukholanga)! Toto bwene amaandiko ka (ebikhole bia) abamalayi kali mushitabu shilangwa mbu I’liyyin.

83:21.t: Bakhashilole balia abarebwa hambi nende Nyasaye.

83:22.t: Toto bwene abakholi bamalayi baliba mubwokholo.

83:24.t: Olibamanyila khukhumesamesa khwobweni bwabu okhurulana khubwokholo.

83:26.t: Eshisubo shiabio shiliwunya obulayi shinga imisk. Ne khulwa okhunyoola kano, bashilane balia abenya okhushilana.

83:28.t: (Tasniim eyo) ni Isebele yabalia abali hambi nende Nyasaye balinywamwo.

83:29.t: Toto bwene abakholi betsimbi batsekhaanga abasuubili.

83:30.t: Ne olwa baburanga ewa bali, babakhondiolanga nibechesania.

83:31.t: Ne nibakalukha mubandu babu, bakalukha nibasangaalile.

83:32.t: Ne nibabalola, baboola mbu: “Toto bano nibo bakora.”

83:33.t: Nabo abo shibarumwa okhuba abalindi babu tawe.

83:34.t: Kho olwa lelo Abasuubila nibo abatsekha Abakhayi.

84:2.t: Ne olwa liliwulila Nyasaye walio Omulesi, shingala lialachilwa okhumuwulila.

84:4.t: Mana liarusia bioosi bilimwo liaba likhaya.

84:5.t: Ne olwa liliwulila Nyasaye walio Omulesi, shingala lialachilwa okhumuwulila.

84:6.t: Ewe omundu, toto ewe okhalabananga muno okhutsia ewa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, mana olibukana ninaye.

84:7.t: Kho ulia owulihebwa eshitabu shishie nomukhono kukwe omulunji.

84:10.t: Ne ulia ulihelesibwa eshitabu shishie namukongo wuwe.

84:13.t: Toto ye yali mubandu bebe niyasaangala.

84:14.t: Toto ye yaparanga mbu shalikalukha khandi tawe.

84:15.t: Tawe! Toto bwene Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi yamulolanga muno!

84:16.t: Ne nditsuba khubwakhanyu bweliuba nilitsia okhukwa.

84:19.t: Toto bwene mwitsa okhunina eshisia khushisia!

84:21.t: Ne nibasoomelwa Ikurani, shibaretsanga obweni hasi tawe.

84:23.t: Ne Nyasaye amanyile muno akababisanga mukari mwabu.

84:25.t: Halali balia basuubila mana nibakhola amalayi. Abo baliba nende omurungo kulawa tawe.

85:1.t: Nditsuba khulikulu lili nende ameeshelo ketsing’ining’ini tsikhongo!

85:7.t: Nabo nibo abaloli khu kalia kabakholelanga Abasuubili.

85:8.t: Nabo shibalolakhwo khubo obubii bwosibwosi tawe habula okhusuubila khwabu khu Nyasaye, Owamaani, Owitsomibungwa muno.

85:9.t: Uli nende obwami bwomwikulu nende khushialo, ne Nyasaye nomuloli muno wabuli eshindu.

85:10.t: Toto balia bara Abasuubili Abasatsa nende Abasuubili Abakhasi mumarechekho, mana nibalekanila tawe, abo balinyoola eshinyasio shiomulilo kwa Jahannam, ne balinyoola eshinyasio eshiokhusambwa.

85:11.t: Toto bwene balia basuubila mana nibakhola amalayi, balinyoola emikunda chiburangamwo emialo hasi wachio, ne okho nikho okhubura okhukhongo.

85:12.t: Toto bwene eshinyasio shia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi neshilulu.

85:13.t: Toto Ye aranjilisinjia, khandi niye ukalusinjia.

85:17.t: Koo, wawulilakhwo olukano lwa abalwani beliyie?

86:2.t: Ne nishina eshikhumanyia mbu nishina esho shitsanga eshilo?

86:5.t: Kho Omundu ahenge yalongwa okhurulana nende shina?

86:6.t: Yalongwa okhurulana nende amatsi karulanga nikamitsikha.

86:7.t: Karulanga hakarikari wa mulukongofuma nende natsimbafu.

86:8.t: Toto bwene Nyasaye ali nende obunyali bwokhumukalusia.

86:9.t: Inyanga ya kalia kefisa kalirebwa habulafu.

86:10.t: Abwene aho shaliba nende amaani nohomba Omuhabini tawe.

86:17.t: Mana bahelesie ebise abakhayi kaala kaala.
