87:1.t: Tswenula elira lia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi, Owoluyali, Owa hekulu muno.

87:7.t: Halali aka Nyasaye achama. Toto Ye amanyile akali habulafu nende kefisile.

87:9.t: Kho itsulisia, nikali mbu okhwitsulisia okho khukhoonya.

87:11.t: Ne yetsa okhwira ehale nako (ametsulisio ako) omukori.

87:15.t: Mana niyetsulila elira lia Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi mana naswaliya.

87:16.t: Halali enywe mwayanza mana nimuranjilisia muno obulamu bwokhushialo!

87:17.t: Ne obulamu bwomwikulu nobulayi ne nibwokhutong'a muno.

87:18.t: Toto kano kali mubitabo bia imbeli.

88:1.t: Koo, kamala okhukhwitsila amacheni kamasila kalifundesia Abandu?

88:7.t: Sishikhomesinjia ta ne sishimalanga inzala tawe.

88:8.t: Inyanga eyo obweni bundi buliba nibunula.

88:10.t: Baliba mumikunda chomwikulu chia hekulu choluyali.

88:17.t: Koo, shibahengangakhwo ingamia shingala yaloongwa tawe?

88:21.t: Kho itsulisia! Katoto ewe oli Omwitsulisi butswa.

88:24.t: Kho Nyasaye alimuhelesia eshinyasio eshikhongo muno!

88:26.t: Mana khandi toto okhubalilwa amakhuwa kabu khuli khwifwe!

89:3.t: Nende khu bibili bibili nende khushilala shilala.

89:5.t: Kho, mu kano shilimwo eshitsubo khumuchesi?

89:6.t: Shiwalolakhwo shinga Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yakhola Abandu ba A’di tawe?

89:7.t: Abandu ba Iram, eyali nende tsinzu tsindambi?

89:8.t: Aba Nyasaye alalongakhwo shinga bo khushialo tawe.

89:13.t: Mana Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi nabakhupa eshiboko shieshinyasio.

89:14.t: Toto Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi abahenganga nabalindilile.

89:15.t: Ne Omundu olwa Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi amutema namuhelesia emiandu nende obwokholo, amalanga aboola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi yambelesiye oluyali!”

89:16.t: Ne namutema mana amuleemie omukabo kwe, naboola mbu: “Nyasaye wanje Omulesi yandutuyia!”

89:17.t: Shikali kario tawe! Halali enywe shimuhenganga abana bafwilwa neshisa tawe.

89:19.t: Ne mulitsanga emiandu chia abafwilwa okhulia khwatoto.

89:20.t: Ne mwayanza emiandu obuyanzi obuunji muno.

89:21.t: Shikali kario tawe! Olwa eshialo shilifunakwa ebitonye ebitonye.

89:22.t: Ne aliitsa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi nende Abamalaika olunyali olunyali.

89:23.t: Ne omulilo kwa Jahannamu kulireerwa inyanga eyo, omundu inyanga eyo alitsulila, halali okhwitsulila okho shikhulimukhoonya shiosishiosi tawe.

89:24.t: Aliboola mbu: “Manyanga, ndakharanjisiliyie ebikhole ebilayi khulwa obulamu bwanje (bwemakombe)!”

89:25.t: Mana inyanga eyo abulaho yesiyesi ulihelesia eshinyasio shinga eshinyasio shishie.

89:26.t: Ne yesiyesi shaliboya shinga okhuboya khukhwe tawe.

89:28.t: Kalukha khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi noli nende obuchami, ne khandi nochamilwe.

89:29.t: Kho injila halala nende Abasumba banje.

90:2.t: Ne ewe oli omwibule omulekhule welitokho lino.

90:5.t: Koo, aparanga mbu abulaho omundu yesiyesi umunyala?

90:7.t: Kho aparanga mbu abulaho yesiyesi umulolanga?

90:12.t: Ne nishina shikhwechesia okhumanya injila yebisikirasio?

90:17.t: Mana abe mubalia basuubila mana nibachelelana okhwifwila ne nibachelelana okhulolanila eshisa.

90:19.t: Ne balia bakhaya ebimanyisio biefu, abo nibo Abandu bomukhono mukhasi.

90:20.t: Ekulu wabu kuliba omulilo omululu kwekalilwa buli tsimbeka.

91:7.t: Nende khu mwoyo nende ulia wakuleng’aasia!

91:8.t: Mana nakumanyisia injila ya amabii nende ya amalayi.

91:9.t: Toto bwene yamala okhubura ulia wakutswenula.

91:10.t: Ne toto bwene yamala okhusikha ulia wakulekhula.

91:11.t: Babu Tsamudi bayingasia (omurumwa wabu) khulwa okhubeela obufuru bwabu.

91:12.t: Olwa yanguya ulia womwoyo omumu muno mubo.

91:13.t: Aho Omurumwa wa Nyasaye nababoolela mbu: "Ingamia ino ni ya Nyasaye, muyileshe inywe amatsi kayio ne mulayira tawe."

91:14.t: Mana bamala bamukatsula, ne nibayisinza. Khulwako Nyasaye wabu Omulesi nabasishia khulwokhubeela tsimbi tsiabu nabamala boosi.

92:5.t: Kho, ulia urusia mana naaria Nyasaye,

92:6.t: Mana naasubila muno kalia akali amalayi,

92:8.t: Ne ulia ukhola obwimani, mana niyelola mbu yeyerere.

92:11.t: Ne omwandu kukwe kulimukhonya shina olwa aliba nasikhanga?

92:12.t: Toto bwene kali khwifwe okhwechesia obulunjifu.

92:13.t: Ne toto bwene kali khwifwe ka mutsuli (akhera) nende kokhuranjilila.

92:17.t: Ne ulia waria Nyasaye alireebwa ehale ninakwo.

92:18.t: Ulia urusinjia omwandu kukwe khulwa okhwitswenula.

92:19.t: Ne shikali mbu aliho yesiyesi wamukholela amalayi lano khamurunje tawe.

92:20.t: Halali nokhukhaaba obweni bwa Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi, Oweekulu muno.

93:1.t: Nditsuba khu isenya (okhurula itsuli okhula eshitere)!

93:3.t: Nyasaye wuwo shiyakhulekha tawe, nohomba shiyakhusinyishila tawe.

93:4.t: Ne obulamu bwomwikulu nobulayi khwiwe okhushira bwa khushialo.

93:5.t: Ne Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi alakhuwa okhula ochame.

93:6.t: Shiyakhunyoola noli omufwilwa mana nakhuwa eshimenyo?

93:8.t: Ne nakhunyoola noli omumanani mana nakhuyindiasia?

93:11.t: Ne obwokholo bwa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi obuboole.

94:5.t: Ne toto halala nende obusiro buliho obwangu.

94:6.t: Toto halala nende obusiro buliho obwangu.

94:8.t: Ne yenya muno ewa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi.

95:4.t: Khubwatoto khwaloonga Omundu okhuloonga okhulayi muno.

95:5.t: Mana nikhumukalusia hasi muno okhushila abali hasi!

95:6.t: Halali balia Abasuubila mana nibakhola amalayi. Abo balinyoola omurungo kulawa tawe.

95:7.t: Mana nishina nikhwakhamala shilakhukhola okhukatsula inyanga yomurungo?

95:8.t: Nyasaye shali niye wukhalakanga eshiina obulai muno okhushila abakhalakanga eshina boosi?

96:1.t: Soma khulira lia Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi owaloonga.

96:3.t: Soma! Ne Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi ni Omuhani Okhushila boosi.

96:5.t: Yechesia Omundu kalia akayalali namanyile tawe.

96:6.t: Shikali kario tawe! Toto Omundu abetsanga omufuru.

96:8.t: Toto khu Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi niho wamakalushilo.

96:13.t: Omulutsi kakhabanga ayingana mana akalukhe inyuma?

96:14.t: Shamanyilekho ta mbu toto Nyasaye alolanga?

96:15.t: Tawe! Nalalekha tawe, khulamukhwesulula khwiswi lia imberi woomurue.

96:16.t: Liswi lia imberi woomurue libeyi, lietsimbi!

96:19.t: Tawe! Olamuwulila tawe! Ra obweni hasi (nosujudila Nyasaye), ne mwisitiekhwo!

97:2.t: Ne nishiina shilakhumanyia mbu nishina eshilo shioluyali?

97:3.t: Eshilo shioluyali ni shiobukhala muno okhushila emiesi iyelefu.

97:4.t: Abamalaika bekhanga nende Roho mushilo esho khumunwa kwa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi nende buli likhuwa.

98:1.t: Shibali Abakhayi mubandu beshitabu nende Abatsokaasi bokhulekha akabali ninako okhuula kaboolele amenoosio.

98:2.t: Omurumwa okhurula khu Nyasaye ubasomelanga tsimbapulo tsindafu.

98:4.t: Ne shibakabukhana balia bahebwa eshitabu halali nibakhamala okhuulilwa nende amenoosio.

98:5.t: Nabo shibalomesibwa shiosishiosi tawe halali okhulaama Nyasaye nibamutswenulila idini, Abandu abalunjifu, ne balumilile okhulaama iswala, ne barusie eshihanwa shia izaka. Ne eyo niyo idini yema obulayi muno.

98:6.t: Toto balia bakhaya mu bandu beshitabu nende mubatsokaasi balinjila mumulilo kwa Jahannamu, bamenyemwo tsinyanga tsioosi. Ebio nibio ebiloonje ebibii mubilonje bioosi.

98:7.t: Toto balia abasuubila mana nibakhola amalayi, ebio nibio ebilonje ebilayi mubilonje bioosi.

98:8.t: Omurungo kwabu ewa Nyasaye wabu Omulesi ni emikunda chilaliwa tawe, echiburangamwo emialo. Ako nikhu ulia uritsanga Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi.

99:2.t: Ne olwa liloba liliyinia emisiko chialio!

99:5.t: Khulwa okhuba Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi alifimbulile!

99:6.t: Inyanga eyo Abandu balirula nibakabukhane emikanda khobalolesibwe ebikhole biabu!

99:7.t: Kho ulia ukhola amalayi shinga obusiro bwoluloolo, yakhakalole!

99:8.t: Ne ulia ukhola amabii shinga obusiro bwoluloolo, yakhakalole!

100:2.t: Nitsirusia tsinzesele tsiomulilo khukhupa ebilekeyi biatsio hasi.

100:6.t: Toto Omundu ni omukhayi muno wa (tsimbabaasi tsia) Nyasaye wuwe Omulesi.

100:7.t: Ne toto ye mwene ni omuloli muno khu elo!

100:8.t: Ne toto ye ali neshinani muno shiokhuyanza omwandu!

100:9.t: Kho koo shamanyilekho olwa ebili mubilindwa bilipukululwa tawe?

100:11.t: Toto Nyasaye wabu Omulesi inyanga eyo aliba nende amakhuwa kabu boosi!

101:3.t: Ne nishiina shilakhumanyia mbu eshikhong’ondanga nishina?

101:4.t: Inyanga yabandu baliba shinga tsimburukuru tsisaalanibwe.

101:5.t: Ne tsingulu tsiliba shinga obwoya bwelikondi busakhululwe!

101:6.t: Kho ulia weshichelo shishie shiliba eshisiro,

101:8.t: Ne ulia weshichelo shishie shiliba eshiangu,

101:9.t: Oyo eshimenyo shishie shiliba mumulilo kwa Hawiya!

101:10.t: Ne nishina shikhumanyisia mbu nishina esho?

102:4.t: Mana khandi shikali kario tawe! Mulitsa okhumanya!

102:5.t: Shikali kario tawe! Mumanyangakhwo okhumanya khwatoto.

102:7.t: Mana khandi toto bwene muliyilola nende imoni yatoto.

102:8.t: Mana khandi toto mulirebwa inyanga eyo okhulondokhana nende obwokholo.

103:2.t: Toto bwene omundu ali mu khusikha (abula inganga).

103:3.t: Halali balia basuubila, mana nibakhola amalayi, ne nibachelanila okhwema khubwatoto, ne nibachelanila okhwifwiila.

104:1.t: Eshinyasio eshikhongo shilinyoola buli umoonyanga khubikhole nende khumakhuwa!

104:3.t: Aparanga mbu omwandu kukwe kulimutonyia tsinyanga tsioosi!

104:4.t: Shikali kario tawe! Toto alikhuyungwa mu Hutwama.

104:5.t: Ne nishina shilakhwechesia mbu Hutwama nishina?

105:1.t: Koo, shiwalolakhwo shinga Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi yakhola Abandu beyinzofu balia?

106:2.t: Okhunala khwabu tsinjendo tsieyirotso nende tsieshirumbi.

106:3.t: Khomana balaame Nyasaye Omulesi owe Inzu ino.

106:4.t: Ulia ubaliisinjia ninabelenje inzala, mana nabahelesia omulembe okhurulana nende oburi.

107:1.t: Koo! Olutsikhwo ulia ukananga omurungo kwa inyanga ya indukho?

107:3.t: Ne shakholangakhwo eshinani shokhulisia omutakha tawe.

107:4.t: Oooh, eshinyasio eshikhongo shili khubalia balaamanga.

108:2.t: Kho laama ne osinze khulwa Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi.

108:3.t: Toto ulia ukhusila niye ulakhalishilwa muno (olwibulo nende amakhuwa keke).

109:6.t: Enywe muli nende idini yenyu, nasi endi nende idini yanje.”

110:1.t: Olwa obuhabini bwa Nyasaye nende obwikuli buliitsa,

110:2.t: Ne nolola Abandu nibenjila mudini ya Nyasaye mumikanda.

110:3.t: Awo tswenula Nyasaye wuwo Omulesi khutsifumia tsitsie tsindayi, ne omusabe eshileshelo. Toto bwene niye Omulesheli muno.

111:1.t: Chiasikha emikhono chibili chia Abu Lahab, naye mwene nasikha.

111:2.t: Omwandu kukwe shikwamukhoonya tawe nohomba ebiayakhalabanila.

111:4.t: Nende Omukhasi wuwe omuchinji muno wetsikhwi.

112:1.t: Boola mbu, “Ye ni Nyasaye mulala yenyene.

112:4.t: Ne abulaho uyelana ninaye kata mulala."

113:1.t: Boola mbu, “Ndishinga khu Nyasaye Omulesi owa amabwibwi.

113:2.t: Okhurulana nende obubii obwa bilia ebia yaloonga.

113:3.t: Nende okhurulana nende obubii bwa eshilima shia eshilo olwashinjilanga.

113:4.t: Nende okhurulana nende obubii bwa balia abeshikhasi bafuririranga muno mumafundikho.

113:5.t: Nende okhurulana nende obubii bwa weshikhalikhali olwaaba nakhola eshikhalikhali."

114:1.t: Bola mbu, “Ndishiinganga khu Nyasaye, Omulesi wa Abandu.

114:4.t: Okhurulana nende obubii bwa (Shetani) ureranga obuyendi, owikhunanga muno.
